meanings.meaning_en: in a coma
meanings.example: The right side of my brain had been so severely bruised that I was comatose for a month.
meanings.example_cn: 我右侧的大脑受了重创，以致我一个月都昏迷不醒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 昏头昏脑的, 入迷的
meanings.meaning_en: having strong feelings of love for someone or a strong interest in something that makes you unable to think in a sensible way
meanings.example: He was utterly infatuated with her.
meanings.example_cn: 他完全被她迷住了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to marriage
meanings.example: marital problems
meanings.example_cn: 婚姻问题

meanings.meaning_en: a chaotic situation is one in which everything is happening in a confused way
meanings.example: a chaotic mixture of images
meanings.example_cn: 杂乱无章的各种图像

meanings.meaning_en: involving a wide range of different things
meanings.example: When such a tool is running in promiscuous mode, it can "sniff" everything going around on that segment such as logins and data transfers.
meanings.example_cn: 当以 混杂方式运行这种工具时，它可以“嗅探出”该网段上发生的每件事，如登录和数据传输。

meanings.meaning_cn: 混浊的, 不纯的, 脏的, 混乱的, 雾重的
meanings.meaning_en: turbid water or liquid is dirty and muddy
full of energy and fun
meanings.example: a frisky horse
meanings.example_cn: 一匹欢蹦乱跳的马

meanings.meaning_cn: 活泼的, 活跃的, 栩栩如生的, 真实的
meanings.meaning_en: lively movements or music are very quick and exciting
meanings.example: a lively Spanish dance
meanings.example_cn: 轻快活泼的西班牙舞蹈

meanings.meaning_cn: 活泼的, 快活的, [植]多年生的
meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a woman, who is vivacious has a lot of energy and a happy attractive manner – used to show approval
meanings.example: a vivacious personality
meanings.example_cn: 活泼外向的个性

meanings.example: a dashing young doctor
meanings.example_cn: 一个帅气的年轻医生

meanings.meaning_cn: 火的, 似火的, [地]火成的
meanings.meaning_en: igneous rocks are formed from lava(= hot liquid rock )
meanings.example: The Great Dyke of Zimbabwe is a layered mafic intrusion of igneous, metal-bearing rock that has been dated to approximately 2.5 billion years old.
meanings.example_cn: 津巴布韦大堤是一个分层的火成岩，金属镁铁质侵入岩轴承已追溯到大约2.5亿年的历史。

meanings.meaning_en: slightly hungry
meanings.example: She was feeling a bit peckish .
meanings.example_cn: 她觉得有点饿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 机灵的, 有独创性的, 精制的, 具有创造才能
meanings.meaning_en: an ingenious plan, idea, or object works well and is the result of clever thinking and new ideas
meanings.example: Many fish have ingenious ways of protecting their eggs from predators.
meanings.example_cn: 很多鱼都有绝妙的方法来保护它们产的卵不被捕食者吃掉。

meanings.meaning_en: able to understand situations or behaviour very well and very quickly, especially so that you can get an advantage for yourself
meanings.example: an astute politician
meanings.example_cn: 机敏的政治家

meanings.meaning_cn: 机智的, 得体的, 圆滑的
meanings.meaning_en: not likely to upset or embarrass other people
meanings.example: There was no tactful way of phrasing what he wanted to say.
meanings.example_cn: 没有办法婉转地表达他想说的话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 肌肉发达的, 有勇气的, 冷静的
meanings.example: She was all tired and nervy.
meanings.example_cn: 她很累，又很紧张。

meanings.meaning_cn: 肌肉结实的, 强壮的
meanings.meaning_en: very large and strong
meanings.example: His brawny arms glistened with sweat.
meanings.example_cn: 他强壮的胳膊上有亮晶晶的汗水。

meanings.meaning_en: so nervous or upset that you are unable to keep still or think calmly
meanings.example: Amanda was getting visibly agitated.
meanings.example_cn: 看得出来，阿曼达紧张不安。

meanings.example: Sea air is Nature's best tonic for mind and body.
meanings.example_cn: 海上的空气是大自然赋予的对人们身心的最佳补品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 激烈的, 猛烈的, (情感)热烈的
meanings.meaning_en: showing very strong feelings or opinions
meanings.example: She suddenly became very vehement and agitated, jumping around and shouting.
meanings.example_cn: 她突然变得十分激动和不安，四处暴跳并大喊大叫。

meanings.example: These forms of art are large, bold and bright and certainly make a poignant statement - regardless of what that public statement may be, it is powerful and thought provoking.
meanings.example_cn: 这些形式上的艺术是巨大的、大胆的和明亮的并且可能制造痛苦的声明-不管公共声明是什么，都是强有力的和思想激怒的。

meanings.meaning_en: done or happening at exactly the right time
meanings.example: The fight ended only with the timely arrival of the police.
meanings.example_cn: 幸亏警察及时赶到，打斗总算停止。

meanings.meaning_en: good and likely to bring good results
meanings.example: a propitious moment
meanings.example_cn: 有利时机

meanings.meaning_en: very big, fast, powerful etc
meanings.example: Suddenly, there was a tremendous bang, and the whole station shook.
meanings.example_cn: 突然一声巨响，整个车站都晃动了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 极大的, 银河的, 乳汁的
meanings.meaning_en: Galactic means relating to galaxies
meanings.example: These speedy electrons interact with photons in the galactic halo, boosting some of them up to the gamma-ray energies observed in the bubbles.
meanings.example_cn: 这些高速电子与银河晕的光子相互作用，将它们中的一些激发，使之成为泡泡中观测到的伽马射线。

meanings.meaning_cn: 极广大的, 无边的, <口>非常好的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely large
meanings.example: People who travel by rail still read an immense amount.
meanings.example_cn: 人们坐火车旅行时仍然会读很多书。

meanings.meaning_en: produced or existing in large quantities
meanings.example: He made profuse apologies .
meanings.example_cn: 他不住地道歉。

meanings.meaning_en: based on a political system in which ordinary people have no power and are completely controlled by the government
meanings.example: ...a brutal totalitarian regime.
meanings.example_cn: …一个残忍的极权主义政权。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is sacrosanct is considered to be so important that no one is allowed to criticize or change it
meanings.example: Weekends are sacrosanct in our family.
meanings.example_cn: 在我们家，周末的时间是神圣不可侵犯的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 极痛苦的, 折磨人的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely painful
meanings.example: When I bend my arm, the pain is excruciating.
meanings.example_cn: 我弯胳膊时疼得简直受不了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 极为愉快的, 绝妙的, 极好的, 味美的
meanings.meaning_en: food that is scrumptious tastes very good
meanings.example: a scrumptious chocolate cake
meanings.example_cn: 美味可口的巧克力蛋糕

meanings.meaning_en: more important than anything else
meanings.example: During a war the interests of the state are paramount, and those of the individual come last.
meanings.example_cn: 战争时期国家利益是首要的，个人利益置于最后。

meanings.meaning_cn: 即将来临的, 逼近的
meanings.meaning_en: an event that is imminent, especially an unpleasant one, will happen very soon
meanings.example: A new trade agreement is imminent.
meanings.example_cn: 一项新的贸易协定即将签署。

meanings.example: "A whole nation of belligerent, snappish people?"asked Nikolai.
meanings.example_cn: “整个国家都是好战暴躁的人民？” 尼古拉不敢相信。

meanings.meaning_en: If one person is involved with another, especially someone they are not married to, they are having a sexual or romantic relationship
meanings.example: During a visit to Kenya in 1928 he became romantically involved with a married woman.
meanings.example_cn: 在1928年到肯尼亚访问期间，他和一位已婚妇女产生了暧昧关系。

meanings.meaning_cn: 记在页边的, 边缘的, 边际的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to a change in cost, value etc when one more thing is produced, one more dollar is earned etc
meanings.example: marginal revenue
meanings.example_cn: 边际收益

meanings.meaning_en: a homely person is warm and friendly and enjoys home life
meanings.example: Mrs Keane is a comfortable, homely person.
meanings.example_cn: 基恩太太平易近人，亲切好客。

meanings.example: Researchers found the 70-millimeter crustacean in the dark shale of an Oklahoma quarry.
meanings.example_cn: 研究者在俄克拉荷马采石场的页岩层发现这些70毫米的甲壳纲动物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 假的, 伪装, 做作的, 捏造的

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something as phony, you disapprove of it because it is false rather than genuine
meanings.example: He'd telephoned with some phony excuse she didn't believe for a minute.
meanings.example_cn: 他用一些假的借口打电话，她根本就不信。

meanings.meaning_cn: 假设的, 假定的,爱猜想的
meanings.meaning_en: based on a situation that is not real, but that might happen
meanings.example: The question is purely hypothetical .
meanings.example_cn: 这个问题完全基于假设。

meanings.meaning_cn: 假想的, 编造的, 虚伪的, 习惯上假定的, 假想的, 假装的, 小说中的
meanings.meaning_en: not true, or not real
meanings.example: a fictitious address
meanings.example_cn: 杜撰的地址

meanings.meaning_cn: 假想的, 想象的, 虚构的
meanings.meaning_en: not real, but produced from pictures or ideas in your mind
meanings.example: As she listened, she played an imaginary piano on her knees.
meanings.example_cn: 她边听边在膝盖上作弹钢琴状。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is pretended appears to be real but is not
meanings.example: Her eyes widened in pretended astonishment.
meanings.example_cn: 她眼睛瞪得大大的，假装很吃惊。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving as if you are morally better than other people, in a way that is annoying – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: sanctimonious politicians preaching about family values
meanings.example_cn: 大谈家庭价值观的虚伪政客

meanings.example: He’s looking a bit peaky today.
meanings.example_cn: 他今天看起来有点不舒服。

meanings.meaning_en: a shrill sound is very high and unpleasant
meanings.example: ‘That’s not true,’ she protested in a shrill voice.
meanings.example_cn: “不是这样的。”她尖声抗议道。

meanings.meaning_en: giving strong loyal support to another person, organization, belief etc
meanings.example: a staunch conservative
meanings.example_cn: 忠实的保守党党员

meanings.example: The original flick is a stalwart of the genre, and it is the duty of everyone, not just horror fans, to watch it at least once.
meanings.example_cn: 原版电影是一种坚定的流派，不仅仅是狂热的影迷，每个人都有义务去看至少一遍。

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚忍的, 不屈不挠的
meanings.example: Success belongs to the persevering.
meanings.example_cn: 成功属于不屈不挠的人。

meanings.meaning_en: determined not to change your opinion or a decision that you have made
meanings.example: She begged me to change my mind, but I remained adamant .
meanings.example_cn: 她求我改变主意，但我坚决不肯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚硬的, 冷酷的, 强硬的, 严峻的, 含燧石的, 强硬的, 严峻的, 燧石似的
meanings.meaning_en: like flint or containing flint
meanings.example: ...her flinty stare.
meanings.example_cn: ...她冷酷无情的目光。

meanings.meaning_cn: 间歇的, 断断续续的
meanings.meaning_en: stopping and starting often and for short periods
meanings.example: The weather forecast is for sun, with intermittent showers.
meanings.example_cn: 天气预报为晴，有阵雨。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a fever or the symptoms of a disease) characterized by periods of diminished severity

meanings.meaning_cn: 艰难的, 苦恼的, 窘迫的

meanings.example: Derek’s terse reply ended the conversation.
meanings.example_cn: 德里克的简短回答结束了谈话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 简洁的, 紧身的, 压缩在小范围内的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is succinct expresses facts or ideas clearly and in few words
meanings.example: The book gives an admirably succinct account of the technology and its history.
meanings.example_cn: 这本书对该项技术及其历史作了极其简明的叙述。

meanings.meaning_cn: 简洁的, 警句的, 富于格言的, 很多(过分)说教式的
meanings.meaning_en: telling people how they should behave – used in order to show disapproval
meanings.example: sententious remarks
meanings.example_cn: 说教的话

meanings.meaning_en: using very few words in a way that seems rude
meanings.example: With a curt nod, he turned away and sat down.
meanings.example_cn: 他简慢地点点头就转身坐下了。

meanings.meaning_en: short, with no unnecessary words
meanings.example: Your summary should be as clear and concise as possible.
meanings.example_cn: 你的总结应该尽可能地明白简洁。

meanings.meaning_en: able to think in a normal and reasonable way
meanings.example: He seems perfectly sane (= completely sane ) to me.
meanings.example_cn: 在我看来他神志完全正常。

meanings.meaning_cn: 健壮的, 精力充沛的
meanings.meaning_en: strong and healthy
meanings.example: the lusty cry of a new-born baby
meanings.example_cn: 新生儿响亮的哭声

meanings.meaning_cn: 渐消失的, 易消散的, 会凋零的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is evanescent gradually disappears from sight or memory
meanings.example: ...the evanescent scents of summer herbs.
meanings.example_cn: ...夏季香草逐渐消散的味道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 讲出来的, 显著的, 断然的, 明确的
meanings.meaning_en: very great or noticeable
meanings.example: a pronounced Polish accent
meanings.example_cn: 明显的波兰口音

meanings.meaning_cn: 讲究的, 罕有的,异国风味的
降伏的, 沮丧的, 衰竭的, 俯卧的
meanings.meaning_en: lying on your front with your face towards the ground
meanings.example: They found him lying prostrate on the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 他们发现他趴在地板上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 交流感情的,仅仅是交际性的
meanings.meaning_en: (of speech, esp of conversational phrases) used to establish social contact and to express sociability rather than specific meaning
proud
meanings.example: The boy court the girl greatly, but the orgulous girl could not make up her mind because she could not validate his promises.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩在女孩面前不断大献殷勤，但是出色而又骄傲的女孩始终下不了最后的决心，因为她无法验证他千百次的承诺。

meanings.meaning_cn: 骄傲的, 自负的, 夸大了的
meanings.meaning_en: too proud and confident – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: overweening ambition
meanings.example_cn: 狂妄的野心

meanings.example: She disliked his sly ways, but granted him certain vulpine intelligence.
meanings.example_cn: 她厌恶他狡猾的行事，但承认他的机智。

meanings.meaning_cn: 狡诈的, 诡计多端的, 善于骗人的
meanings.meaning_en: good at getting what you want by clever planning and by secretly deceiving people
meanings.example: He’s a crafty old devil.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个狡猾的老家伙。

meanings.meaning_en: excessively sentimental, sweet, or pretty
meanings.example: She produced twee little flower paintings.
meanings.example_cn: 她画的是过于艳丽的花卉小作品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 觉察不到的, 感觉不到的, 极细微的
meanings.meaning_en: almost impossible to see or notice
meanings.example: Such changes are imperceptible to even the best-trained eye.
meanings.example_cn: 这样的变化即使是对最训练有素的人来说也不易察觉。

meanings.meaning_en: speech or writing that is didactic is intended to teach people a moral lesson
meanings.example: His novel has a didactic tone.
meanings.example_cn: 他的小说有一种道德说教的口吻。

meanings.meaning_cn: 教区的, 地方范围的, 狭小的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to a particular church and the area around it
meanings.example: the parochial church council
meanings.example_cn: 教区的教堂理事会

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is dogmatic is completely certain of their beliefs and expects other people to accept them without arguing
meanings.example: Her staff find her bossy and dogmatic.
meanings.example_cn: 她的员工认为她爱指挥别人而且自以为是。

meanings.meaning_cn: 接触的, 切线的, 相切的, 离题的

meanings.meaning_en: Someone who is sparing with something uses it or gives it only in very small quantities
meanings.example: I'm never sparing with the garlic.
meanings.example_cn: 我从不吝啬使用大蒜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 节日的, 欢乐的, 祭日的
meanings.example: Happy is the house that shelters a friend! It might well be built, like a festal bower or arch, to entertain him a single day.
meanings.example_cn: 快乐是朋友定居的房子！它将会被建造，像一个节日的凉亭或者护拱，是他每一个孤单的日子的港湾。

meanings.meaning_en: using money carefully and wisely
meanings.example: hard-working, thrifty people
meanings.example_cn: 勤劳节俭的人们

meanings.meaning_en: having a strong rhythm
meanings.example: the rhythmic thud of the bass drum
meanings.example_cn: 低音鼓有节奏的咚咚声

meanings.meaning_en: famous and admired because of what you have achieved
meanings.example: She has had an illustrious career.
meanings.example_cn: 她已经有了辉煌的事业。

meanings.meaning_cn: 结果的, 相因而生的
meanings.meaning_en: happening as a direct result of a particular event or situation
meanings.example: redundancy and the consequential loss of earnings
meanings.example_cn: 裁员以及随之而来的收入损失

meanings.meaning_en: relating to marriage
meanings.example: conjugal love
meanings.example_cn: 夫妻之爱

meanings.meaning_cn: 结实的, 勇敢坚定的, 激烈的, 矮胖的, 顽强的
meanings.meaning_en: strong and thick
meanings.example: a stout pair of shoes
meanings.example_cn: 一双厚实耐穿的鞋子

meanings.meaning_cn: 金的, 含金的, 似金的, [化](化合物)正金的, 三价金的
meanings.meaning_en: of or containing gold in the trivalent state

meanings.meaning_cn: 金钱的, 金钱上的, 应罚款的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to or consisting of money
meanings.example: He was trying to get a pecuniary advantage for himself.
meanings.example_cn: 他拼命为自己敛财。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely tired
meanings.example: Some of the nurses would come in knackered after a day on A&E, strip till two in the morning and then go home.
meanings.example_cn: 有些当护士的在医院急诊室里工作了一整天，筋疲力尽地跑到会所跳舞跳到凌晨2点，然后才回家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 仅仅的, 起码的, 纯粹的
meanings.example: She lost the election by a mere 20 votes.
meanings.example_cn: 她仅仅以20票之差落选。

meanings.meaning_cn: 紧凑的, 紧密的, 简洁的
meanings.meaning_en: packed or put together firmly and closely
meanings.example: The bushes grew in a compact mass.
meanings.example_cn: 灌木长成茂密的一片。

meanings.meaning_cn: 紧张的, 矫饰的, 做作的
meanings.meaning_en: a strained situation or behaviour is not relaxed, natural, or friendly
meanings.example: I couldn’t stand the strained atmosphere at dinner any more.
meanings.example_cn: 我再也忍受不了饭桌上的那种紧张气氛了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 谨慎小心的, 精明的
meanings.meaning_en: unwilling to tell people about your plans, intentions, or opinions
meanings.example: Don't be cagey or vague in headlines.
meanings.example_cn: 不要在标题上小心谨慎和含糊不清。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving very correctly and easily shocked by anything rude – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: I grew to dislike the people from my background – they were uptight and prissy.
meanings.example_cn: 我开始讨厌和我有相同背景的人－他们很保守，总是一本正经的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 进贡的, 附庸的, 从属的, 辅助的, 支流的
进行高利剥削的, 高利贷的
meanings.meaning_en: a usurious price or rate of interest14 is unfairly high
meanings.example: These companies, cut off from bank loans at reasonable rates of interest, had turned instead to supposedly usurious moneylenders, known as the curb market.
meanings.example_cn: 这些中小企业无法以合理的贷款利率从银行获得贷款，他们因此只好求助于所谓高利贷放贷机构。

meanings.meaning_en: an approximate number, amount, or time is close to the exact number, amount etc, but could be a little bit more or less than it
meanings.example: What is the approximate number of students in each class?
meanings.example_cn: 每个班大致有多少学生？

meanings.example: The ground was soggy from the rain.
meanings.example_cn: 雨后地面湿透了。

meanings.meaning_en: very wet and heavy
meanings.example: sodden clothes
meanings.example_cn: 湿漉漉的衣服

meanings.meaning_en: forbidden; prohibited
meanings.example: Beards are virtually verboten in corporate circles.
meanings.example_cn: 事实上，留胡子在各公司几乎是被禁止的。

meanings.meaning_en: a prohibitive rule prevents people from doing things
meanings.example: prohibitive regulations
meanings.example_cn: 禁律

meanings.meaning_cn: 禁止通信的, 被单独囚禁的
meanings.meaning_en: If someone is being kept incommunicado, they are not allowed to talk to anyone outside the place where they are
meanings.example: He was held incommunicado in prison for ten days before being released without charge.
meanings.example_cn: 在被不予指控释放前，他在监狱里被单独监禁了10天。

meanings.meaning_cn: 经济情况不妙的, 拮据的, 紧张的, 心情焦躁的, 极端保守的
meanings.meaning_en: Someone who is uptight is tense, nervous, or annoyed about something and so is difficult to be with
meanings.example: Penny never got uptight about exams.
meanings.example_cn: 彭尼从未对考试感到紧张。

meanings.meaning_en: if you are living in straitened circumstances, you do not have enough money, especially not as much as you had before
meanings.example: the straitened circumstances of post-war Japan
meanings.example_cn: 日本战后窘迫的经济状况

meanings.meaning_cn: 经久不衰的,无穷尽的, 可靠的
meanings.meaning_en: always there, even in times of difficulty or trouble
meanings.example: She battled against cancer with unfailing good humour.
meanings.example_cn: 她始终乐观地与癌症抗争。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling or looking shocked by something you have seen or just found out
meanings.example: Hank looked at her aghast.
meanings.example_cn: 汉克惊恐地望着她。

meanings.meaning_en: surprisingly large or impressive
meanings.example: a stupendous achievement
meanings.example_cn: 了不起的成就

meanings.meaning_en: Robust views or opinions are strongly held and forcefully expressed
meanings.example: The Secretary of State has made a robust defence of the agreement.
meanings.example_cn: 国务卿对这项协议进行了强有力的辩护。

meanings.meaning_en: good at judging what people or situations are really like
meanings.example: Malcolm is a shrewd businessman.
meanings.example_cn: 马尔科姆是个精明的商人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 精神饱满的, 勇敢的
meanings.meaning_en: spirited, courageous, or valiant
suffering from or caused by psychosis
meanings.example: psychotic patients
meanings.example_cn: 精神病患者

meanings.meaning_cn: 精神病学的, 精神病治疗的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the study and treatment of mental illness
meanings.example: a psychiatric hospital
meanings.example_cn: 精神病医院

meanings.meaning_cn: 精神错乱的, 疯狂的, 极端愚蠢的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone's behaviour or ideas as lunatic, you think they are very foolish and possibly dangerous
meanings.example: ...the operation of the market taken to lunatic extremes.
meanings.example_cn: …疯狂到极点的市场运作。

meanings.meaning_en: affecting the mind rather than the body
meanings.example: psychic disorders (= illnesses )
meanings.example_cn: 精神错乱

meanings.meaning_cn: 精神上的, 超自然的
meanings.meaning_en: having a mysterious and holy quality, which makes you feel that God is present
meanings.example: The account of spiritual struggle that follows has a humbling and numinous power.
meanings.example_cn: 接下来的关于精神挣扎的叙述有一种令人谦卑和神圣的力量。

meanings.meaning_en: to know a lot about a subject, method etc
meanings.example: a woman well versed in the art of diplomacy
meanings.example_cn: 熟谙外交手腕的女人

meanings.meaning_cn: 精心制作的, 详细阐述的, 精细
meanings.meaning_en: having a lot of small parts or details put together in a complicated way
meanings.example: pure silks embroidered with elaborate patterns
meanings.example_cn: 绣有精美图案的真丝衣服

meanings.example: Based on what we know, I’d guess that cetacean culture is intermediate between humans and chimpanzees.
meanings.example_cn: 根据我们所知道的情况，我猜鲸目动物文化介于人类和黑猩猩之间。

meanings.meaning_en: neat and clean
meanings.example: Let’s get this house shipshape.
meanings.example_cn: 让我们把这所房子收拾干净。

meanings.example: Even in his style there is something of a modern epigrammatic ring.
meanings.example_cn: 即使在他的风格中也可见几分现代警句的感觉。

meanings.meaning_en: giving careful attention to what is happening, so that you will notice any danger or illegal activity
meanings.example: Please remain vigilant at all times and report anything suspicious.
meanings.example_cn: 请时刻保持警惕，有可疑情况随时报告。

meanings.meaning_cn: 净化的, 清洗的, 通便的
meanings.meaning_en: A purgative substance acts as a purgative
meanings.example: ...purgative oils.
meanings.example_cn: ...通便油。

meanings.meaning_en: happening for short irregular periods, not continuously
meanings.example: spasmodic machine gun fire
meanings.example_cn: 断断续续的机关枪射击

meanings.example: Although many more students are entering colleges and universities than was the case twenty years ago, there are also many more courses of study vying for their commitment.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管同二十年前相比起来，有多得多的学生进入学院和大学深造，但是与此同时，也有更多的课程在为其许诺而竞争着。

meanings.meaning_cn: 静态的, 静力的静电噪声
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is static does not move or change
meanings.example: The number of young people obtaining qualifications has remained static or decreased.
meanings.example_cn: 获得各种资格证书的年轻人的数量一直保持不变或者已经减少。

meanings.meaning_en: not developing or doing anything, especially when this is only a temporary state
meanings.example: ...a society which was politically quiescent and above all deferential.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个遵循顺从至上及政治上平静的社会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 久坐的, 坐惯的, 土生的, 不移栖的, 沉积的
meanings.meaning_en: spending a lot of time sitting down, and not moving or exercising very much
meanings.example: a sedentary people living north of the Danube
meanings.example_cn: 多瑙河北面的一个定居民族

meanings.meaning_cn: 酒神的, 酒神节的, 放纵的
meanings.meaning_en: of or relating to Bacchus

meanings.meaning_cn: 酒神节的, 狂饮作乐的
meanings.meaning_en: a bacchanalian party involves a lot of alcohol, sex, and uncontrolled behaviour
meanings.example: a bacchanalian orgy
meanings.example_cn: 醉酒纵欲的狂欢宴乐

meanings.meaning_cn: 酒醉的, 东歪西倒的, 摇摇晃晃的, 头昏眼花的
meanings.example: I felt really groggy after 15 hours on the plane.
meanings.example_cn: 我乘了15个小时的飞机，感到昏昏沉沉的。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the  stone age (= the period of time thousands of years ago when people used stone tools and weapons )
meanings.example: a paleolithic axe
meanings.example_cn: 旧石器时代的石斧

meanings.meaning_cn: 拘泥细节的, 谨小慎微的, 一丝不苟的
meanings.meaning_en: very careful to behave correctly and follow rules
meanings.example: He was punctilious about being ready and waiting in the entrance hall exactly on time.
meanings.example_cn: 他拘于礼数地准备妥当，按时在门厅的入口处等候。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely unhappy and without hope
meanings.example: Gill had been out of work for a year and was getting very despondent.
meanings.example_cn: 吉尔失业一年了，开始变得非常消沉。

meanings.meaning_en: unhappy, disappointed, or sad
meanings.example: The unemployed stood at street corners, dejected.
meanings.example_cn: 失业者沮丧地站在街角。

meanings.meaning_en: very large or great in a surprising or impressive way
meanings.example: the artist’s prodigious output
meanings.example_cn: 那位艺术家惊人的高产

meanings.meaning_cn: 巨大的, 畸形的, 怪异的, 恐怖的, 凶暴的
meanings.meaning_en: unusually large
meanings.example: a monstrous nose
meanings.example_cn: 很大的鼻子

meanings.meaning_en: extremely large
meanings.example: a meal of gargantuan proportions
meanings.example_cn: 丰盛的大餐

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that something is extremely large
meanings.example: a colossal statue of the King
meanings.example_cn: 国王的巨大雕像

meanings.meaning_cn: 巨大的, 庞大的, <古>极恶的, 凶暴的
meanings.meaning_en: very big in size or in amount
meanings.example: an enormous bunch of flowers
meanings.example_cn: 巨大的花束

meanings.meaning_cn: 剧毒的, 致命的, 刻毒的, [医]有病毒的, 恶毒的, 充满敌意的, 恶性的
meanings.meaning_en: a poison, disease etc that is virulent is very dangerous and affects people very quickly
meanings.example: a particularly virulent form of influenza
meanings.example_cn: 特别凶猛的一种流感

meanings.meaning_en: a man who is henpecked is always being told what to do by his wife, and is afraid to disagree with her
meanings.example: a henpecked husband
meanings.example_cn: 怕老婆的丈夫

meanings.meaning_cn: 锯齿状的, 犬牙交错的
meanings.meaning_en: an indented edge or surface has cuts or marks in it
meanings.example: our deeply indented coastline
meanings.example_cn: 我们蜿蜒曲折的海岸线

meanings.meaning_cn: 锯齿状的, 有锯齿的
meanings.meaning_en: having a sharp edge made of a row of connected points like teeth
meanings.example: Use a knife with a serrated edge .
meanings.example_cn: 使用带锯齿刃的刀。

meanings.meaning_cn: 锯齿状的，有凹口的，（外形）参差不齐的
meanings.meaning_en: having a rough or pointed edge or surface
meanings.example: the broken bottle’s jagged edge
meanings.example_cn: 碎瓶子的锯齿状边缘

meanings.meaning_en: kinky hair has a lot of small curves

meanings.meaning_cn: 卷数多的, 大部分的, 著书多的, 容积大的, 体积大的, 丰满的, 长篇的, 庞大的
meanings.meaning_en: voluminous books, documents etc are very long and contain a lot of detail
meanings.example: He took voluminous notes during the lecture.
meanings.example_cn: 他在听课时作了大量笔记。

meanings.meaning_cn: 倦怠的, 冷漠的，情绪低落的
meanings.meaning_en: feeling tired and not interested in things
meanings.example: The heat was making me listless.
meanings.example_cn: 炎热的天气使我懒洋洋的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 绝对戒酒的, 完全的, 绝对的
meanings.meaning_en: of, relating to, or practising abstinence from alcoholic drink

meanings.meaning_cn: 绝对可靠的, 深信的, 独断的
meanings.example: He seemed rather too cocksure for my liking.
meanings.example_cn: 他似乎太自以为是了，我不喜欢。

meanings.meaning_cn: 倔强的, 麻烦的, 困难的, 不幸的
meanings.example: The surveyor's report didn't highlight anything untoward.
meanings.example_cn: 测量员的报告没有强调有出乎意料的困难。

meanings.meaning_en: determined not to change your ideas, behaviour, opinions etc, even when other people think you are being unreasonable
meanings.example: He was the most obstinate man I’ve ever met.
meanings.example_cn: 他是我遇到过的最固执的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 开胃的, 辛辣的, 泼辣的, 兴奋的, 顽皮的, 淘气的
meanings.meaning_en: having a pleasantly spicy taste
meanings.example: a piquant wild mushroom sauce
meanings.example_cn: 开胃的野蘑菇酱

meanings.meaning_cn: 靠着的, 斜躺着的, 不活动的, 休息的
meanings.meaning_en: lying down on your back or side
meanings.example: He looked down at the recumbent figure.
meanings.example_cn: 他向下看着躺着的身影。

meanings.meaning_cn: 苛评的, 吹毛求疵的
meanings.meaning_en: too eager to criticize other people and things, especially about small details
meanings.example: He's as big a geek as Zuckerberg, but of a different type: the hypercritical, even sometimes nasty type.
meanings.example_cn: 他与扎克伯格一样，是个超级极客，只不过是另一种类型的：他吹毛求疵，有时甚至令人讨厌。

meanings.meaning_cn: 苛求的, 严格的, 吃力的, 需付出极大耐心
meanings.meaning_en: demanding a lot of effort, careful work, or skill
meanings.example: She was an exacting woman to work for.
meanings.example_cn: 她是一位对下属要求严格的女性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可爱的, 聪明的, 伶俐的, 装腔作势的
meanings.meaning_en: clever in a way that can seem rude
meanings.example: Their lawyer tried a cute trick.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的律师使了一个巧计。

meanings.meaning_en: not deserving any respect at all
meanings.example: They were portrayed as contemptible cowards.
meanings.example_cn: 他们被刻画成可鄙的胆小鬼。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely bad, immoral, or cruel
meanings.example: It’s despicable the way he treats those kids.
meanings.example_cn: 他那样对待那些孩子，真卑鄙。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可察觉的, 显而易见的, 感觉得到的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is perceptible can be noticed, although it is very small
meanings.example: a small but perceptible change
meanings.example_cn: 微小但可以察觉的变化

meanings.example: Deepen as what current system reforms commissariat, how does grain do industrial business to walk out of predicament without policy meal comestible ?
meanings.example_cn: 随着粮食流通体制改革的深化，没有政策饭可吃的粮办工业企业如何走出困境？

meanings.meaning_cn: 可耻的, 不光彩的, 下流的
meanings.meaning_en: making you feel ashamed or embarrassed
meanings.example: an ignominious end to his career
meanings.example_cn: 他职业生涯不光彩的终结

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is adorable is so attractive that they fill you with feelings of love
meanings.example: Oh what an adorable little baby!
meanings.example_cn: 啊，多么可爱的小宝宝！

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that is palpable is so strong that other people notice it and can feel it around them
meanings.example: There was a palpable sense of relief among the crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 众人显然都感到如释重负。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可恶的, 格格不入的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is abhorrent is completely unacceptable because it seems morally wrong
meanings.example: Racial discrimination is abhorrent to my council and our staff.
meanings.example_cn: 我的地方政府和全体工作人员与种族歧视水火不容。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可反对的, 可抗议的, 要不得的

meanings.meaning_en: (of an estate or interest in land) capable of being defeated or rendered void

meanings.meaning_cn: 可废止的, 可取消的
meanings.meaning_en: capable of being revoked; able to be cancelled

meanings.meaning_cn: 可改变的, 自由兑换的
meanings.meaning_en: an object that is convertible can be folded or arranged in a different way so that it can be used as something else
meanings.example: a convertible sofa
meanings.example_cn: 两用沙发

meanings.meaning_cn: 可感知的, 可评估的
meanings.meaning_en: An appreciable amount or effect is large enough to be important or clearly noticed
meanings.example: There’s no appreciable change in the patient’s condition.
meanings.example_cn: 病人的状况没有明显改变。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可耕的, 适于耕种的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to growing crops
meanings.example: arable farming
meanings.example_cn: 耕作农业

meanings.meaning_cn: 可公开得, (指理由等)表面的, 虚假的
meanings.meaning_en: Ostensible is used to describe something that seems to be true or is officially stated to be true, but about which you or other people have doubts
meanings.example: The ostensible purpose of these meetings was to gather information on financial strategies.
meanings.example_cn: 这些会议声称旨在收集金融策略方面的信息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可行的, 切实可行的
meanings.meaning_en: a plan, idea, or method that is feasible is possible and is likely to work
meanings.example: a feasible solution
meanings.example_cn: 可行的解决方法

meanings.meaning_en: things that are interchangeable can be used instead of each other
meanings.example: These two words are almost interchangeable.
meanings.example_cn: 这两个单词几乎可以互换使用。

meanings.example: Despite these new relationships, the fungible nature of oil will limit the extent to which this economic shift eastward translates into a geopolitical one.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管出现了上述种种新型关系，但石油本质上的可替代性，将限制这种经济东移转化为地缘政治转移的程度。

meanings.meaning_en: able to be presumed or taken for granted
meanings.example: The answer presumable is gonna be that the best version of the personality theory doesn't require item for item, having the very same believes, memories, desires and so forth.
meanings.example_cn: 可以揣测到的答案是,人格论最好的版本是,不去要求一丝不变，不要求,完全一样的信仰，记忆，渴望等等。

meanings.example: Both oil and coal are there but not in getatable locations.
meanings.example_cn: 这儿有石油和煤，但都不在可以开采的位置。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可接近的, 平易近人的, 亲切的
meanings.meaning_en: friendly and easy to talk to
meanings.example: The head teacher is very approachable.
meanings.example_cn: 校长非常平易近人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可口的, 香喷喷的, 好吃的
meanings.example: Her humor is good, so the meal that she does is natural also more goluptious .
meanings.example_cn: 她的心情好了，那么她做出来的饭菜也自然就更加可口了。

meanings.meaning_en: a venial fault, mistake etc is not very serious and can be forgiven
meanings.example: a venial sin
meanings.example_cn: 可赦之罪

meanings.meaning_en: Something that is intelligible can be understood
meanings.example: The language of Darwin was intelligible to experts and non-experts alike.
meanings.example_cn: 达尔文的语言对专家和平常人来说都容易理解。

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel pity or sympathy
meanings.example: The child looked a pathetic sight.
meanings.example_cn: 那个孩子看上去很可怜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可能的, 想得到的, 可想像的
meanings.meaning_en: able to be believed or imagined
meanings.example: It is conceivable that you may get full compensation, but it’s not likely.
meanings.example_cn: 你可能会得到全额赔偿，但可能性不大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可能发生的, 附随的, 暂时的

meanings.meaning_en: frightening and terrible
meanings.example: a horrendous experience
meanings.example_cn: 可怕的经历

meanings.meaning_cn: 可怕的, 可憎的, 令人厌恶的
meanings.meaning_en: very unpleasant or shocking, and involving someone being killed or badly injured
meanings.example: Police described it as a particularly gruesome attack.
meanings.example_cn: 警方称这是一起极其恐怖的袭击事件。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可怕的, 令人难亲近的
meanings.meaning_en: having a frightening or unfriendly appearance
meanings.example: His face was forbidding, even hostile.
meanings.example_cn: 他面容冷峻，甚至可以说是带有敌意。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is advisable should be done in order to avoid problems or risks
meanings.example: Regular medical check-ups are advisable.
meanings.example_cn: 定期检查身体是明智的。

meanings.meaning_en: edible
meanings.example: BHA Cell Differential Agent is extracted through botanic extraction technology of Japan macromolecule energy. It is a kind of esculent products with very strong ability to differentiate melanocyte .
meanings.example_cn: BHA细胞分化剂，由日本高分子能量植物提取技术方法提取，可食用的产品，有极强的分化黑色素细胞能力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可适用的, 可应用的
meanings.meaning_en: if something is applicable to a particular person, group, or situation, it affects them or is related to them
meanings.example: What is a reasonable standard for one family is not applicable for another.
meanings.example_cn: 对一个家庭合理的标准对于另一个家庭并不适用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可说服的, 可用恳求打动的
meanings.meaning_en: able to be persuaded or moved by pleading

meanings.meaning_cn: 可说明的, 可解释的
meanings.meaning_en: able to be easily understood or explained
meanings.example: The success of the Revolution is explicable in terms of the weakness of the king’s government.
meanings.example_cn: 革命的成功可归因于国王政府的软弱。

meanings.meaning_en: able to be tuned
meanings.example: Inside this directory are many tunable settings.
meanings.example_cn: 在这个目录中，有许多可调的设置。

meanings.meaning_en: an offer, price, contract etc that is negotiable can be discussed and changed before being agreed on
meanings.example: Part-time barman required. Hours and salary negotiable.
meanings.example_cn: 招聘兼职酒吧男服务员，工作时间及薪金面议。

meanings.meaning_en: able to be corrected or cured
meanings.example: remediable problems
meanings.example_cn: 可以解决的问题

meanings.example: The theory which is once again put forth, that the Germans as such are inherently vicious, is hardly tenable and not very creditable to those who hold it.
meanings.example_cn: 那个再一次被提出的理论，即德国人天生就那样邪恶，是很难站得住脚的，并且对持有这一理论的那些人是非常不值得称道的。

meanings.meaning_en: deserving praise or approval
meanings.example: The team produced a creditable performance .
meanings.example_cn: 该队的表现值得称赞。

meanings.meaning_en: based on facts
meanings.example: an authentic account
meanings.example_cn: 真实可信的说法

meanings.meaning_cn: 可修缮的, 可赔偿的, 可恢复的
meanings.meaning_en: able to be repaired, recovered, or remedied
meanings.example: a reparable loss

meanings.meaning_en: if something is optional, you do not have to do it or use it, but you can choose to if you want to
meanings.example: three optional courses
meanings.example_cn: 三门选修课

meanings.meaning_cn: 可以忽略的, 不予重视的
meanings.meaning_en: too slight or unimportant to have any effect
meanings.example: The damage done to his property was negligible.
meanings.example_cn: 对他财产造成的损失微不足道。

meanings.meaning_en: if something or someone is predictable, you know what will happen or what they will do – sometimes used to show disapproval
meanings.example: The snow had a predictable effect on traffic.
meanings.example_cn: 这场雪对交通造成的影响可以预见。

meanings.meaning_en: very shocking and immoral
meanings.example: a heinous crime
meanings.example_cn: 滔天罪行

meanings.meaning_en: extremely unpleasant
meanings.example: an odious little man
meanings.example_cn: 讨厌的小男人

meanings.meaning_cn: 可终止的, 有期限的
meanings.meaning_en: able to be terminated
meanings.example: Separate land use right from collective land ownership right, realize repayable and terminable transferring of collective construction land use right.
meanings.example_cn: 将集体土地使用权和所有权分离，使集体建设用地使用权也能够实现有偿、有期限的流转。

meanings.meaning_cn: 可尊敬的, 可估计的, <古>可贵的, 有价值的
meanings.meaning_en: deserving respect and admiration
meanings.example: ...the estimable Miss Cartwright.
meanings.example_cn: ...令人仰慕的卡特赖特小姐。

meanings.meaning_en: able to be done or completed
meanings.example: We’ve got to think first whether this plan is doable.
meanings.example_cn: 我们得先考虑一下这计划是否可行。

meanings.example: Meanwhile, time after time on other issues -- such as the economic stimulus package, health care and Iraq -- he has tacked to the center, much to the frustration of his most avid supporters.
meanings.example_cn: 与此同时，在其他问题上，比如经济刺激计划、医保改革以及伊拉克问题，他不止一次改弦易辙、转向中庸，这让他最热心的支持者感到失望。

meanings.meaning_en: If you are raring to do something or are raring for it, you are very eager to do it or very eager that it should happen
meanings.example: He is raring to charge into the fray and lay down the law.
meanings.example_cn: 他急切地想管管这场争斗，斥责他们一番。

meanings.meaning_cn: 刻板的, 十足的, 赤裸的, 荒凉的
meanings.meaning_en: very plain in appearance, with little or no colour or decoration
meanings.example: In the cold dawn light, the castle looked stark and forbidding.
meanings.example_cn: 在寒冷的曙光中，城堡看上去了无生气，令人生畏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 肯定的, (对正式辩论中的问题)表示赞成的, (态度, 方法等)积极的, 乐观的, 怀有希望的
meanings.meaning_en: an affirmative answer or action means ‘yes’ or shows agreement
meanings.example: an affirmative nod
meanings.example_cn: 点头表示同意

meanings.meaning_en: very stupid or without much meaning
meanings.example: Most pop lyrics are pretty inane.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分流行歌曲的歌词都相当空洞。

meanings.meaning_cn: 空闲的, 懒惰的, 停顿的, 无用的, 无价值的
meanings.meaning_en: lazy
meanings.example: Go and wake up that idle brother of yours.
meanings.example_cn: 去把你那懒哥哥叫起来。

meanings.meaning_en: imaginary or not really possible
meanings.example: He fell back from chimerical terrors to real terrors.
meanings.example_cn: 他又从空想的恐怖掉进了现实的恐怖。

meanings.meaning_cn: 空虚的, 茫然若失的, 无所事事的, 空洞的
meanings.meaning_en: showing no intelligence or having no useful purpose
meanings.example: a vacuous expression
meanings.example_cn: 茫然的表情

meanings.meaning_cn: 空运的, 空气传播的, 空降的
meanings.meaning_en: airborne soldiers are trained to fight in areas that they get to by jumping out of a plane
meanings.example: airborne pollutants
meanings.example_cn: 空气传播的污染物

meanings.meaning_cn: 恐怖的, 可怕的, 令人毛骨悚然的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely unpleasant and involving people being killed or injured
meanings.example: a series of grisly murders
meanings.example_cn: 一连串恐怖的凶杀案

meanings.meaning_cn: 恐怖的, 令人毛骨悚然的, 以死亡为主题的
meanings.meaning_en: very strange and unpleasant and connected with death or with people being seriously hurt
meanings.example: a macabre tale
meanings.example_cn: 令人毛骨悚然的故事

meanings.example: At first, he was really scared.
meanings.example_cn: 刚开始时他非常害怕。

meanings.meaning_cn: 口齿伶俐的, 油腔滑调的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe what someone says as glib, you disapprove of it because it implies that something is simple or easy, or that there are no problems involved, when this is not the case
meanings.example: ...the glib talk of "past misery."
meanings.example_cn: …对“昔日痛苦”的夸夸其谈。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a will) declared orally by the testator and later written down
meanings.example: When the emergency situation is over and if the testator is able to make a will in writing or in the form of a sound-recording, the nuncupative will he has made shall be invalidated.
meanings.example_cn: 危急情况解除后，遗嘱人能够用书面或者录音形式立遗嘱的，所立的口头遗嘱无效。

meanings.example: The tender shoots and the expanding flowers are nipped and withered, and of a vine that yearned to stretch its tendril round the world there is left but a sapless stump.
meanings.example_cn: 柔弱的嫩芽和绽放的花朵已经被掐断，枯萎败落，曾想将自己的卷须伸展到全世界的蔓藤，如今只剩下干瘪的残枝委地。

meanings.meaning_en: a wizened person, fruit etc is small and thin and has skin with a lot of lines and  wrinkle s

meanings.meaning_cn: 酷热的, 炽热的, 似烧的
meanings.meaning_en: broiling weather, sun etc makes you feel extremely hot
meanings.example: a broiling day
meanings.example_cn: 酷热的一天

meanings.meaning_cn: 夸大的, 言过其实的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone as bombastic, you are criticizing them for trying to impress other people by saying things that sound impressive but have little meaning
meanings.example: He was vain and bombastic.
meanings.example_cn: 他既虚荣又浮夸。

meanings.meaning_cn: 夸张的, 浮夸的, 夸大的
快活的, 高兴的, 愉快的, [宗](主神)朱庇特的
meanings.meaning_en: friendly and happy
meanings.example: He addressed me in a jovial manner.
meanings.example_cn: 他友好地跟我说话。

meanings.meaning_cn: 快活的, 精神的, 有弹性的, 自大的
meanings.meaning_en: a bouncy ball etc quickly moves away from a surface after it has hit it
meanings.example: The new bed is nice and bouncy.
meanings.example_cn: 这张新床很舒服，弹性很好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 快乐主义者的, 快乐论的, 快乐主义的
meanings.meaning_en: Hedonistic means relating to hedonism
meanings.example: ...an eccentric and flamboyant nobleman with a hedonistic lifestyle.
meanings.example_cn: …一个崇尚享乐主义的生活方式、古怪而派头十足的贵族。

meanings.meaning_en: a house or room that is commodious is very big
meanings.example: Designed as cruisers, many ketches are heavier, more stable in sea conditions, and more commodious down below.
meanings.example_cn: 因为它们生来就是为了远行之用，因此它们通常更重，在各种海洋状况下更稳定， 船舱也更宽敞。

meanings.meaning_cn: 宽大的, 仁慈的, 慈悲为怀的
meanings.meaning_en: not strict in the way you punish someone or in the standard you expect
meanings.example: the lenient sentences handed down by some judges
meanings.example_cn: 一些法官作出的宽大判决

meanings.meaning_cn: 宽宏大量的, 慷慨的
meanings.meaning_en: very generous
meanings.example: The second most common crop, soybeans, yields a lower return but crop rotation is necessary to keep the soil in shape for bounteous corn yields.
meanings.example_cn: 其次最常见的农作物，大豆，回报低，但轮作是必要的用以保证土壤能够拥有宽裕的玉米产量。

meanings.meaning_cn: 宽宏大量的, 有雅量的
meanings.meaning_en: kind and generous, especially to someone that you have defeated
meanings.example: a magnanimous gesture
meanings.example_cn: 宽宏大量的姿态

meanings.meaning_en: very generous
meanings.example: a munificent gift
meanings.example_cn: 一份厚礼

meanings.meaning_en: turbulent air or water moves around a lot
meanings.example: the dark turbulent waters of the river
meanings.example_cn: 灰暗汹涌的江水

meanings.meaning_cn: 狂暴的, 激烈的, 患有狂犬病的
meanings.meaning_en: having very extreme and unreasonable opinions
meanings.example: a group of rabid right-wing fanatics
meanings.example_cn: 一群极端的右翼狂热分子

meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a child, who is boisterous makes a lot of noise and has a lot of energy
meanings.example: a class of boisterous five-year-olds
meanings.example_cn: 一班活泼爱动的五岁孩子

meanings.meaning_en: extremely worried and frightened about a situation, so that you cannot control your feelings
meanings.example: I spent three frantic days trying to get everything ready.
meanings.example_cn: 我花了三天时间手忙脚乱地做准备。

meanings.example: Yesterday's decision will infuriate Turkey and Brazil, who will see it as the established powers quashing a genuine attempt at mediation by two new voices on the world stage.
meanings.example_cn: 昨日的决定会激怒土耳其和巴西，它们会把它视为公认的大国宣布世界舞台上两个新的声音所作的一次真正的和解尝试无效。

meanings.meaning_cn: 困惑的, 不知所措的
meanings.meaning_en: confused and worried by something that you do not understand
meanings.example: The student looked at him, perplexed.
meanings.example_cn: 那个学生看着他，一脸的茫然。

meanings.meaning_en: having no money, no food, no home etc
meanings.example: The floods left many people destitute .
meanings.example_cn: 这场洪水使许多人变得一无所有。

meanings.meaning_en: spreading widely or expanded
meanings.example: patulous branches

meanings.meaning_cn: 来世的, 修来世的, 专注于精神方面的
meanings.meaning_en: Otherworldly people, things, and places seem strange or spiritual, and not much connected with ordinary things
meanings.example: They encourage an image of the region as an otherworldly sort of place.
meanings.example_cn: 他们想为这个地区营造出一个世外桃源的形象。

meanings.meaning_en: lazy
meanings.example: The former investment banker has not been indolent: his department has been a factory for acronyms since the crisis began.
meanings.example_cn: 这位前投资银行家并非懒惰，自危机开始以来，他的部门已成为加工厂的代称。

meanings.meaning_cn: 懒散的, 不修边幅的
meanings.meaning_en: lazy, untidy, and careless
meanings.example: slovenly habits
meanings.example_cn: 邋里邋遢的习惯

meanings.meaning_cn: 懒散的, 邋遢的, 松软的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is floppy is soft and hangs down loosely rather than being stiff
meanings.example: a floppy hat
meanings.example_cn: 松松垂下的帽子

meanings.meaning_en: not showing enough interest in something or not putting enough effort into it
meanings.example: David has a rather lackadaisical approach to his work.
meanings.example_cn: 戴维的工作态度有点懒散。

meanings.meaning_cn: 狼吞虎咽的, 贪婪的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe a person, or their appetite for something, as voracious, you mean that they want a lot of something
meanings.example: Joseph Smith was a voracious book collector.
meanings.example_cn: 约瑟夫·史密斯是一个如饥似渴的藏书家。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who leaves their family and home without the approval of their family, but who is sorry later and returns
meanings.example: a prodigal lifestyle
meanings.example_cn: 奢侈的生活方式

meanings.meaning_en: becoming old and showing the effects of getting older
meanings.example: a senescent industry
meanings.example_cn: 衰落的行业

meanings.meaning_cn: 老年的, 高龄的, 衰老的
meanings.meaning_en: mentally confused or behaving strangely, because of old age
meanings.example: a senile old man
meanings.example_cn: 一个年老糊涂的老人

meanings.meaning_cn: 乐于助人的, 随和的, 善于适应新环境的
meanings.meaning_en: helpful and willing to do what someone else wants
meanings.example: an accommodating child
meanings.example_cn: 一个性格温顺的小孩

meanings.meaning_cn: 类似的, 相似的, 可比拟的
meanings.meaning_en: similar to another situation or thing so that a comparison can be made
meanings.example: Marine construction technology like this is very complex, somewhat analogous to trying to build a bridge under water.
meanings.example_cn: 像这样的海洋建筑技术非常复杂，有些类似于尝试在水下建筑一座桥。

meanings.meaning_cn: 棱柱的, 五光十色的
meanings.example: On the monolayer in the absence of additives, the tri-dimensional prismy COM crystals precipitated.
meanings.example_cn: 没有添加剂时，得到的COM为三维的六棱柱和三维的菱形晶体；

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone is standoffish, you mean that they behave in a formal and rather unfriendly way
meanings.example: He can be quite standoffish and rude, even to his friends.
meanings.example_cn: 他有时会很冷淡，很粗鲁，甚至对自己的朋友也是如此。

meanings.example: With a nonchalant stroll and a whistle, the US president walked past another set of locked French doors before he was finally able to gain access to his seat of power.
meanings.example_cn: 总统先生淡定地踱一圈步、吹了声口哨，经过一排同样被锁起来的法式落地窗门，最终进入办公室、回到自己的“宝座”。

meanings.meaning_en: not showing much interest or excitement
meanings.example: His idea got only a lukewarm response from the committee.
meanings.example_cn: 他的想法只得到了委员会冷淡的反应。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冷静的, 不带感情的, 平心静气的
meanings.meaning_en: not influenced by personal emotions and therefore able to make fair decisions
meanings.example: a dispassionate view of the situation
meanings.example_cn: 对形势的客观看法

meanings.meaning_cn: 冷静的, 脚踏实地的, 无懈可击的, 顽固的
meanings.meaning_en: You use hardheaded to describe someone who is practical and determined to get what they want or need, and who does not allow emotions to affect their actions
meanings.example: ...a hardheaded and shrewd businesswoman.
meanings.example_cn: ...一位务实、精明的女商人。

meanings.meaning_en: calm and not easily excited or worried
meanings.example: The taxi driver, a phlegmatic man in middle age, showed no surprise at this request.
meanings.example_cn: 出租车司机是个冷静的中年人，对这一要求毫不惊讶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冷酷无情的, 顽固的, 执拗的
meanings.meaning_en: very determined not to change your beliefs, actions, or feelings, in a way that seems unreasonable
meanings.example: They argued, but he remained obdurate.
meanings.example_cn: 他们发生了争论，但他还是固执己见。

meanings.meaning_en: not showing any emotion
meanings.example: Her impassive face showed no reaction at all.
meanings.example_cn: 她表情冷淡，毫无反应。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冷漠的的, 漠不关心的
meanings.meaning_en: indifferent or apathetic
very strange and difficult to explain
meanings.example: an uncanny coincidence
meanings.example_cn: 不可思议的巧合

meanings.meaning_cn: 离奇有趣的, 奇怪的, 做得很精巧的
meanings.example: a quaint little village in Yorkshire
meanings.example_cn: 约克郡一个古色古香的小村庄

meanings.meaning_en: acting, moving, or tending to move away from a centre
meanings.example: If the star spun just 20% faster, the centrifugal force would fling it apart.
meanings.example_cn: 如果该恒星的旋转加快仅仅20%，那么离心力就会其撕裂。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to church services and ceremonies
meanings.example: He read it loudly, his hands on his ears, in a passionate voice, following a liturgical rhythm.
meanings.example_cn: 他按照礼拜仪式的韵律，手捂着耳朵，以充满激情的声音大声地朗读起来。

meanings.example: The Idea which is independent or for itself, when viewed on the point of this unity with itself, is Perception or Intuition, and the percipient Idea is Nature.
meanings.example_cn: 自为理念，按照它同自己的统一性来说，就是直观，而直观着的理念就是自然。

meanings.meaning_en: unusually good
meanings.example: an exceptional student
meanings.example_cn: 出类拔萃的学生

meanings.example: This is very good paradigmatic.
meanings.example_cn: 这就是很好的例证。

meanings.meaning_cn: 连接的(尤指字迹), 草书的, 草书体的
meanings.meaning_en: written in a style of writing with the letters joined together
meanings.example: cursive script
meanings.example_cn: 草体

meanings.meaning_cn: 连续的, 相续的, 有继的, 有顺序的, 结果的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to or happening in a sequence
meanings.example: ...the sequential story of the universe.
meanings.example_cn: ...宇宙的变迁史。

meanings.meaning_cn: 脸上发红, 发热的, 兴奋的, 狂热的, 肺病的
meanings.meaning_en: if your face is a hectic colour, it is very pink
meanings.example: the hectic flush on her cheeks
meanings.example_cn: 她双颊的潮红

meanings.meaning_en: (esp of plant parts) having the surface marked by a network of intersecting cracks
neighbouring
meanings.example: The parameter's determination of Gaussian vicinal function is proposed to be modified, based on the maximum likelihood criterion.
meanings.example_cn: 依据最大似然原则对已有的高斯邻域函数参数取值方法进行改进。

meanings.meaning_en: a room, building, piece of land etc that is adjacent to something is next to it
meanings.example: We stayed in adjacent rooms.
meanings.example_cn: 我们住在毗连的房间里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 邻近的, 接近的, 毗边的
meanings.meaning_en: next to something, or next to each other
meanings.example: America’s 48 contiguous states
meanings.example_cn: 美国的48个互相毗连的州

meanings.meaning_en: likely or able to be changed in the future
meanings.example: a provisional government
meanings.example_cn: 临时政府

meanings.meaning_en: extremely unwilling to spend money
meanings.example: Yet the big brewers have been parsimonious in their marketing budgets, typically investing just 10% or so of their revenues, compared with around 15% at companies like Unilever and Procter &Gamble.
meanings.example_cn: 而啤酒厂商在销售预算上却很吝啬，仅投入收入的10％。 与之相比，联合利华和宝洁公司的投入则在15％左右。

meanings.meaning_en: niggardly with money
meanings.example: Raised on a hog farm in Hunan Province, she laughs off the penurious ways of her parents and grandparents.
meanings.example_cn: 她笑着说起在湖南养猪的父母的吝啬的生活方式。

meanings.meaning_en: unwilling to spend money or be generous
meanings.example: a niggardly person
meanings.example_cn: 吝啬的人

meanings.meaning_cn: 吝啬的, 小气的, 缺乏的, 有刺的
meanings.meaning_en: not generous, especially with money
meanings.example: She’s too stingy to give money to charity.
meanings.example_cn: 她很小气，不愿捐钱行善。

meanings.meaning_cn: 灵巧的, 惯用右手的
meanings.meaning_en: skilful and quick when using your hands
meanings.example: dextrous use of the needle
meanings.example_cn: 灵巧的针法

meanings.meaning_en: happening fairly often, but not regularly
meanings.example: There has been sporadic violence downtown.
meanings.example_cn: 市中心时有暴力事件发生。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely funny
meanings.example: He told some sidesplitting jokes.
meanings.example_cn: 他讲了一些令人笑破肚皮的笑话。

meanings.meaning_en: fearsome; forbidding
meanings.example: My parents want me to stay here, this rebarbative city.
meanings.example_cn: 我的父母希望我留在这个令人讨厌的城市里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人痛苦的, (味觉、嗅觉方面)刺激的、辛辣的, 尖锐的, 剧烈的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is poignant affects you deeply and makes you feel sadness or regret
meanings.example: ...a poignant combination of beautiful surroundings and tragic history.
meanings.example_cn: …优美环境与悲怆历史的辛酸结合。

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人喜欢的, 爽快的, 使人愉快的
meanings.meaning_en: making you feel happy, excited, and full of energy
meanings.example: an exhilarating experience
meanings.example_cn: 刺激的经历

meanings.meaning_en: extremely unpleasant
meanings.example: The food was revolting!
meanings.example_cn: 这些食物令人作呕！

meanings.example: But, as a former war reporter myself, I recoil from the mawkish sentimentality with which we enshrine our casualties.
meanings.example_cn: 然而作为一个前战地记者，我厌恶以这种病态的伤感来铭记我们之中的死者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人厌恶的, 讨厌的, 令人厌烦的
meanings.meaning_en: annoying
meanings.example: an irksome journey
meanings.example_cn: 一次恼人的旅行

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人厌烦的, 爱说奉承话的, 虚情假意的
meanings.meaning_en: polite in an insincere way – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: smarmy comments
meanings.example_cn: 奉承话

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something such as a loss as grievous, you mean that it is extremely serious or worrying in its effects
meanings.example: Mr. Morris said the victims had suffered from a very grievous mistake.
meanings.example_cn: 莫里斯先生说受害者们为一个非常严重的失误而受苦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 令人震惊的, 骇人听闻的
meanings.meaning_en: very unpleasant and shocking
meanings.example: She suffered appalling injuries.
meanings.example_cn: 她伤势非常严重。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流行的, 传染的, 流行性

meanings.meaning_en: modish ideas, designs etc are modern and fashionable
meanings.example: ...a short checklist of much that is modish at the moment.
meanings.example_cn: ...一张时下潮品的简表。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流浪的, 漂泊的, 浪荡的, 流浪者的

meanings.example: She was a mature lady with dyed red hair and a roguish grin.
meanings.example_cn: 她是位染着红头发和有张顽皮笑脸的成熟女士。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流星的, 疾速的, 大气的, 辉煌而短暂的
meanings.meaning_en: from a  meteor
meanings.example: meteoric iron
meanings.example_cn: 陨铁

meanings.meaning_cn: 硫酸的, 象硫酸的, 刻薄的, 讽刺的
meanings.meaning_en: vitriolic language, writing etc is very cruel and angry towards someone
meanings.example: vitriolic remarks
meanings.example_cn: 刻薄的言辞

meanings.meaning_en: arranged in the manner of or resembling steps
meanings.example: Through stepwise refinement, I can drive the model to finer details, to a point where I can start generating concrete implementation artifacts from it.
meanings.example_cn: 通过逐步的细化，我可以从模型派生出更为详细的细节，然后可以从其中生成具体的实现。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the Earth rather than to the moon or other  planets
meanings.example: ...terrestrial life forms.
meanings.example_cn: …地球上的生命形态。

meanings.meaning_en: resembling or relating to a deer
meanings.example: Future work should include: 1) isolating a large number of cervine microsatellite loci, 2) constructing genetic and physical maps of microsatellite loci.
meanings.example_cn: 将来要在以下方面开展工作：1）分离更多的鹿类特异的微卫星位点，2）构建微卫星位点的遗传和物理图谱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 露出线缝的, 丑恶的
meanings.meaning_en: involving unpleasant things such as crime, violence, or immorality
meanings.example: the seamy side of the World Wide Web
meanings.example_cn: 万维网的阴暗面

meanings.meaning_cn: 乱视的, 散光的,纠正散光的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to or affected with astigmatism
meanings.example: When the astigmatic degree< 1.50D, mydriatic optometry is of help to found the axis of cylindrical lens.
meanings.example_cn: 对于合并1.50D以下的散光患儿，散瞳验光可能更有助于确定柱镜的轴向。

meanings.meaning_en: always wanting more money, goods etc than you need or have a right to
meanings.example: rapacious landlords
meanings.example_cn: 贪婪的房东

meanings.meaning_cn: 罗马教皇的, 主教的, 大祭司的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the Pope
meanings.example: Under John Paul the Curia acquired a string of new “pontifical councils”, quasi-ministries that deal with everything from health workers to canon law.
meanings.example_cn: 在约翰保罗时代教廷获得一系列新的“主教理事会” ，准部委处理一切从卫生工作者到教会法的事务。

meanings.meaning_en: Spiral is also an adjective
meanings.example: ...a spiral staircase.
meanings.example_cn: …一段旋梯。

meanings.meaning_en: of or shaped like a helix; spiral
meanings.example: They are stabilized in a helical shape that stays active longer in the body.
meanings.example_cn: 这种肽能够以螺旋形状稳定存在，并能够在体内保持长期活性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 裸体的, 裸的, 与生俱有的, 无装饰的
meanings.meaning_en: not wearing any clothes
meanings.example: I did some work as a nude model when I was in college.
meanings.example_cn: 我上大学的时候当过裸体模特。

meanings.meaning_cn: 驴的, 象驴一样的, 愚蠢的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely stupid or silly
meanings.example: What an asinine remark!
meanings.example_cn: 多么愚蠢的话！

meanings.meaning_cn: 麻痹的, 迟缓的, 迟钝的, [动]蛰伏的
meanings.meaning_en: not active because you are lazy or sleepy
meanings.example: a torpid mind
meanings.example_cn: 迟钝的头脑

meanings.meaning_en: a part of your body that is numb is unable to feel anything, for example because you are very cold
meanings.example: My fingers were so numb I could hardly write.
meanings.example_cn: 我的手指麻木得几乎没法写字。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to horses, or looking like a horse
meanings.example: ...an outbreak of equine influenza.
meanings.example_cn: ...一次马流感的爆发。

meanings.meaning_en: a perfunctory action is done quickly, and is only done because people expect it
meanings.example: She gave him a perfunctory smile.
meanings.example_cn: 她对他漫不经心地笑了笑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 卖淫的, 妓女的, 好色的
meanings.meaning_en: A bawdy story or joke contains humorous references to sex
meanings.example: a bawdy new play
meanings.example_cn: 一出黄色搞笑的新剧

meanings.meaning_cn: 蛮横的, 残暴的, 无耻的, 可恶的, 令人不可容忍的
meanings.meaning_en: very shocking and extremely unfair or offensive
meanings.example: outrageous prices
meanings.example_cn: 骇人的价格

meanings.example: Small firms with slipshod standards are being replaced by bigger, better ones. Where people are creating companies, they are doing so out of choice, not economic necessity.
meanings.example_cn: 在某些层面上看这是一个好消息，那些不认真奉行标准的小公司正在被更大，更好的公司取代，在哪里创办公司将基于个人的选择而不再是经济的需要。

meanings.meaning_cn: 漫步的, 散漫的, 流浪性的
meanings.example: a long rambling letter
meanings.example_cn: 一封东拉西扯的长信

meanings.meaning_cn: 忙于琐事的, 无关紧要的

meanings.example: Teenagers are very sequacious and they often emulate the behavior of their idols who are sometimes negative role models.
meanings.example_cn: 青少年非常盲从，经常模仿他们偶像的行为，而有些偶像却是负面榜样。

meanings.meaning_cn: 猫的, 猫科的, 猫一样的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to cats or other members of the cat family, such as lions
meanings.example: She moves with feline grace.
meanings.example_cn: 她步履轻盈。

meanings.meaning_cn: 矛盾的, 好恶相克的
meanings.meaning_en: not sure whether you want or like something or not
meanings.example: As a group, they are ambivalent about whether the quality of online content would suffer if companies could not charge for it—34% think so while 30% do not; and the remaining 36% have no firm opinion.
meanings.example_cn: 对于如果网站对内容不收费这些内容的质量是否会变差的调查有矛盾：34%的人认为会变差，同时30%的认为不会，而36%的人没有固定的意见。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冒渎的, 该受天谴的
meanings.meaning_en: If someone's behaviour or actions are sacrilegious, they show great disrespect toward something holy or toward something that people think should be respected
meanings.example: A number of churches were looted and sacrilegious acts committed.
meanings.example_cn: 许多教堂被洗劫了，还发生了亵渎行为。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冒泡的, 沸腾的, 热情的, 热情洋溢的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone as ebullient, you mean that they are lively and full of enthusiasm or excitement about something
meanings.example: ...the ebullient Russian president.
meanings.example_cn: …精力充沛的俄罗斯总统。

meanings.meaning_cn: 没精打采的, 懒散的
meanings.example: First off, both people have to sit off to the side of the display, which can cause leaning, slouching, and twisting to get into a position to both see and type.
meanings.example_cn: 首先，两个人都并非正对显示器，而是偏向显示器的边缘，在敲打键盘或观察显示器时，将会引起相互倚靠、懒散及扭头等情况的发生。

meanings.meaning_cn: 没有错误的, 确实可靠的
meanings.meaning_en: always right and never making mistakes
meanings.example: No expert is infallible.
meanings.example_cn: 没有一个专家永远正确。

meanings.meaning_en: not guarded or protected by anyone
meanings.example: The photographers managed to capture Jane in an unguarded moment.
meanings.example_cn: 摄影师们成功地抓拍到了简不设防的瞬间。

meanings.meaning_cn: 没有开垦的, 没有耕种的, 没有教养的
没有立下遗嘱的, 不能根据遗嘱处分的
meanings.meaning_en: to die without having made a will(= a statement about who you want to have your property after you die )
meanings.example: There are strict guidelines that must be followed if someone dies intestate – in other words without a will.
meanings.example_cn: 未立遗嘱死亡的情况有严格的指导方针，换句话说，如果未立遗嘱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 没有缺点的, 不会做坏事的
meanings.example: She has taught her children impeccable manners.
meanings.example_cn: 她把她的孩子教育得举止十分得体。

meanings.meaning_cn: 没有受伤的, 未受伤的
meanings.meaning_en: not injured or harmed by something
meanings.example: The government was relatively unscathed by the scandal.
meanings.example_cn: 政府基本上没有受到这桩丑闻的影响。

meanings.meaning_cn: 没有味道的, 平淡的
meanings.meaning_en: food or drink that is insipid does not have much taste
meanings.example: an insipid pasta dish
meanings.example_cn: 一盘没有味道的意大利面食

meanings.meaning_en: marked with small pieces of dirt or  soot
meanings.example: Yellow refers to the smutty type, and grey or black to spam messages, many of which offer products or services of various shades of legality.
meanings.example_cn: 黄段子是指那些含有内容淫秽的短信，灰段子和黑段子是指那些提供法律灰色地带产品和服务的垃圾信息。

meanings.meaning_cn: 每年落叶的, 非永久性的
meanings.meaning_en: deciduous trees lose their leaves in winter

meanings.meaning_cn: 每日的, 每日发作的, 平凡的, 日常的
meanings.meaning_en: ordinary, and happening every day
meanings.example: I had hopes of escaping my quotidian world.
meanings.example_cn: 我曾希望能逃离自己的日常生活。

meanings.meaning_cn: 每日的, 一日间的, 白天的
meanings.meaning_en: happening every day
meanings.example: Kangaroos are diurnal animals.
meanings.example_cn: 袋鼠是昼出动物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 美貌的, 标致的(常用作诙谐的夸张词)

meanings.meaning_en: palatable food or drink has a pleasant or acceptable taste
meanings.example: a very palatable wine
meanings.example_cn: 口感极佳的酒

meanings.meaning_cn: 美味可口的, 促进食欲的
meanings.meaning_en: food that is appetizing smells or looks very good, making you want to eat it
meanings.example: an appetizing aroma
meanings.example_cn: 令人垂涎的香味

meanings.meaning_en: muggy weather is unpleasantly warm and the air seems wet
meanings.example: It was muggy and overcast.
meanings.example_cn: 那天天气闷热又潮湿，阴沉沉的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 闷热的, 粗暴的, 激烈的, 放荡的
meanings.meaning_en: weather that is sultry is hot with air that feels wet
meanings.example: a hot and sultry day
meanings.example_cn: 又热又闷的一天

meanings.meaning_cn: 闷热的, 中暑的, 酷热的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe the weather as sweltering, you mean that it is extremely hot and makes you feel uncomfortable
meanings.example: ...the sweltering heat of the St. Petersburg summer.
meanings.example_cn: …圣彼得堡夏季的酷热。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a pleasant and attractive way
meanings.example: a winsome smile
meanings.example_cn: 迷人的微笑

meanings.meaning_cn: 迷人的, 迷惑的, 妩媚的
meanings.meaning_en: very pleasant or attractive
meanings.example: an enchanting place
meanings.example_cn: 迷人的地方

meanings.meaning_cn: 迷人的, 有迷惑力的, 引起兴趣(或好奇心)的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is intriguing is very interesting because it is strange, mysterious, or unexpected
meanings.example: The magazine carries an intriguing mixture of high fashion, gossip and racing.
meanings.example_cn: 这本杂志内容丰富有趣，有关时尚、花边新闻和赛马的内容都有。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迷人的, 醉人的, 着魔的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely interesting
meanings.example: a fascinating book
meanings.example_cn: 一本引人入胜的书

meanings.meaning_cn: 谜一般的, 高深莫测的

meanings.meaning_en: If an action is underhand or if it is done in an underhand way, it is done secretly and dishonestly
meanings.example: ...underhand financial deals.
meanings.example_cn: …秘密的金融交易。

meanings.meaning_en: done or kept secret
meanings.example: a clandestine affair
meanings.example_cn: 秘密关系

meanings.meaning_cn: 秘密的, 含义模糊的, 神秘的, 隐藏的
meanings.meaning_en: having a meaning that is mysterious or not easily understood
meanings.example: He has issued a short, cryptic statement denying the spying charges.
meanings.example_cn: 他发表了一个简短、令人捉摸不透的声明，否认对他从事间谍活动的指控。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the work of a secretary
meanings.example: a secretarial course
meanings.example_cn: 秘书课程

meanings.meaning_cn: 密封的, 无懈可击的
meanings.meaning_en: not allowing air to get in or out
meanings.example: airtight containers
meanings.example_cn: 密封容器

meanings.meaning_cn: 密封的, 与外界隔绝的
meanings.meaning_en: If a container has a hermetic seal, the seal is very tight so that no air can get in or out
meanings.example: Its film industry operates in its own curiously hermetic way.
meanings.example_cn: 它的电影业以奇特而封闭的方式运作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 密集的, 林立的, 重叠罗列的
meanings.meaning_en: standing or arranged closely together in rows
meanings.example: the serried ranks of reporters waiting outside
meanings.example_cn: 密密麻麻地排在外面等待的记者

meanings.meaning_en: said or done without a good reason, in a way that offends someone
meanings.example: children’s books which include gratuitous violence
meanings.example_cn: 包含无谓暴力内容的儿童书籍

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is immune to a particular disease cannot catch it
meanings.example: Once we’ve had the disease, we’re immune for life.
meanings.example_cn: 我们一旦得过这种病，就获得了终身免疫力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 腼腆的, 怕羞的, 卖弄风情的
meanings.meaning_en: A coy person is shy, or pretends to be shy, about love and sex
meanings.example: I was sickened by the way Carol charmed all the men by turning coy.
meanings.example_cn: 我对卡罗尔忸怩作态哄诱男人的方式感到恶心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 面糊似的, 浆状的, 苍白的
meanings.meaning_en: a pasty face looks very pale and unhealthy
meanings.example: My complexion remained pale and pasty.
meanings.example_cn: 我的脸色依旧苍白憔悴。

meanings.meaning_cn: 苗条的, 体态娇美的
meanings.meaning_en: thin and graceful
meanings.example: She was slim, svelte, and sophisticated.
meanings.example_cn: 她身材苗条，气质优雅，而且人情练达。

meanings.meaning_en: able to move quickly and easily with light neat movements
meanings.example: nimble fingers
meanings.example_cn: 灵巧的手指

meanings.meaning_en: full of energy; lively
meanings.example: a magazine with a zippy title
meanings.example_cn: 名字吸引人的杂志

meanings.meaning_cn: 敏捷熟练的, 灵巧的
meanings.meaning_en: a deft movement is skilful, and often quick
meanings.example: He sketched her with quick, deft strokes.
meanings.example_cn: 他给她画素描，下笔又快又熟练。

meanings.meaning_cn: 敏锐的, [医]急性的, 剧烈
meanings.meaning_en: an acute feeling is very strong
meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["acute pain"]}
meanings.example_cn: 剧痛

meanings.meaning_cn: 敏锐的, 明察秋毫的, (指声音、喊叫等)尖锐的
meanings.meaning_en: showing an ability to understand things quickly and completely
meanings.example: questions that are intelligent and penetrating
meanings.example_cn: 机智而尖锐的问题

meanings.meaning_cn: 名义上的, 有名无实的, 名字的, [语]名词性的
meanings.meaning_en: officially described as being something, when this is not really true
meanings.example: the nominal head of the rebellion
meanings.example_cn: 这次叛乱名义上的领导人

meanings.meaning_cn: 名誉不好的, 卑鄙的, 艳俗的
meanings.example: an interesting character with a raffish air
meanings.example_cn: 一个大胆脱俗的有趣人物

meanings.meaning_en: overt actions are done publicly, without trying to hide anything
meanings.example: an overt attempt to silence their political opponents
meanings.example_cn: 他们想压制政敌言论的明显企图

meanings.meaning_en: done in a sensible and careful way
meanings.example: a judicious choice
meanings.example_cn: 审慎而明智的选择

meanings.meaning_cn: 鸣不平的, 发牢骚的, 易怒的, 暴躁的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is querulous complains about things in an annoying way
meanings.example: ‘But why can’t I go?’ he said in a querulous voice.
meanings.example_cn: “可是为什么我不能去呢？”他抱怨道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 命令的, 强制的, 托管的
meanings.meaning_en: if something is mandatory, the law says it must be done
meanings.example: Murder carries a mandatory life sentence .
meanings.example_cn: 谋杀罪依照法律要判无期徒刑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 谬误的, 靠不住的, 虚妄的, 令人失望的, 虚伪的, 使人误解的, 不合理的
meanings.meaning_en: containing or based on false ideas
meanings.example: Such an argument is misleading, if not wholly fallacious.
meanings.example_cn: 这种论点即使不完全是谬误，也是误导人的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 模仿的, 假装的, [生]拟态的
模糊的, 不确定的, [语]不定的
meanings.meaning_en: not clear or exact
meanings.example: Teachers find the report’s terminology so indefinite that it is confusing.
meanings.example_cn: 老师们发现报告的专门用语含义不明确，令人费解。

meanings.meaning_cn: 磨碎的, 臼齿的, 质量的, [化][物]摩尔的
meanings.meaning_en: of, relating to, or designating any of these teeth

meanings.meaning_cn: 墨丘利神的, 水星的, 雄辩机智的, 活泼善变的, 水银的
meanings.meaning_en: containing mercury
meanings.example: an actor noted for his mercurial temperament
meanings.example_cn: 以性情反复无常而出名的一名男演员

meanings.meaning_en: thinking deeply and carefully about something
meanings.example: a typically ruminative speech
meanings.example_cn: 典型的有深度的演说

meanings.meaning_en: tacit agreement, approval, support etc is given without anything actually being said
meanings.example: a tacit agreement between the three big companies
meanings.example_cn: 三家大公司之间的默契

meanings.meaning_en: too ready to agree with someone or do what they want, without complaining or saying what you want to do
meanings.example: Perhaps you are too acquiescent.
meanings.example_cn: 或许你太过顺从了。

meanings.meaning_en: of or resembling wood
meanings.example: The rice husk is a ligneous hard layer of the cereal with high silicate content.
meanings.example_cn: 稻壳灰是具有高硅酸盐含量的谷类的一种木质的硬层。

meanings.meaning_cn: 牧羊的, 牧歌的, 田园风味的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the countryside
meanings.example: ...the bucolic surroundings of Chantilly.
meanings.example_cn: ...尚蒂伊的田园景致。

meanings.meaning_cn: 男性的, 男的, 有男子气概的, 精力充沛的
meanings.meaning_en: having or showing tradition­ally male qualities such as strength, courage etc – use this to show approval
meanings.example: He wanted his sons to become strong, virile, and athletic like himself.
meanings.example_cn: 他希望他的儿子们变得像他一样身强力壮、充满阳刚之气，并擅长体育运动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 难辨认的, 字迹模糊的
meanings.meaning_en: difficult or impossible to read
meanings.example: His handwriting is totally illegible.
meanings.example_cn: 他的字迹完全无法辨认。

meanings.meaning_en: an intractable problem is very difficult to deal with or solve
meanings.example: the seemingly intractable problem of human greed
meanings.example_cn: 似乎难以解决的人性贪婪问题

meanings.meaning_cn: 难的, 艰苦的，勇敢的
meanings.meaning_en: strong and healthy and able to bear difficult living conditions
meanings.example: hardy mountain goats
meanings.example_cn: 能适应恶劣环境的石山羊

meanings.meaning_cn: 难懂的, 难捉摸的, 易忘的
meanings.meaning_en: an elusive result is difficult to achieve
meanings.example: She enjoys a firm reputation in this country but wider international success has been elusive.
meanings.example_cn: 她在这个国家享有稳固的声誉，但却一直难以在国际上取得更大的成功。

meanings.meaning_cn: 难看的, 不象样的, 笨拙的
meanings.meaning_en: moving in a way that does not look graceful
meanings.example: a tall ungainly teenager
meanings.example_cn: 一个动作笨拙的高个子少年

meanings.meaning_en: a refractory disease or illness is hard to treat or cure
meanings.example: ...refractory priests who refused to side with the king.
meanings.example_cn: ...拒绝支持国王的桀骜不驯的牧师。

meanings.meaning_cn: 难取悦的, 挑剔的, 苛求的, (微生物等)需要复杂营养地
meanings.meaning_en: very careful about small details in your appearance, work etc
meanings.example: people who are fastidious about personal hygiene
meanings.example_cn: 十分讲究个人卫生的人

meanings.meaning_cn: 难识别的, 看不见的
meanings.meaning_en: very difficult to see, hear, or notice
meanings.example: The path was almost indiscernible in the mist.
meanings.example_cn: 迷雾中小路依稀难辨。

meanings.meaning_en: difficult to discipline or instruct
meanings.example: The student of average middle school is really indocile !
meanings.example_cn: 普通中学的学生真难教啊！

meanings.meaning_cn: 难以了解的, 不能预测的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is inscrutable shows no emotion or reaction in the expression on their face so that it is impossible to know what they are feeling or thinking
meanings.example: He stood silent and inscrutable.
meanings.example_cn: 他静静地站着，让人难以捉摸。

meanings.meaning_cn: 难以明了的, 无形的
meanings.meaning_en: an intangible quality or feeling is difficult to describe exactly
meanings.example: The island has an intangible quality of holiness.
meanings.example_cn: 该岛屿有一种难以形容的神圣感。

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone or something is insufferable, you are emphasizing that they are very unpleasant or annoying
meanings.example: He was an insufferable bore.
meanings.example_cn: 他是一个非常令人讨厌的家伙。

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something such as a barrier or a forest as impenetrable, you mean that it is impossible or very difficult to get through
meanings.example: ...the Caucasus range, an almost impenetrable barrier between Europe and Asia.
meanings.example_cn: …高加索山脉，欧亚之间一道几乎不可逾越的屏障。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is indescribable is so terrible, so good, so strange etc that you cannot describe it, or it is too difficult to describe
meanings.example: a feeling of indescribable joy
meanings.example_cn: 难以言表的喜悦

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or affecting your brain
meanings.example: a cerebral haemorrhage
meanings.example_cn: 脑出[溢]血

meanings.meaning_en: An inbound flight is one that is arriving from another place
meanings.example: ...a special inbound flight from Honduras.
meanings.example_cn: ...一架从洪都拉斯归航的专机。

meanings.meaning_cn: 内在的, 固有的, [宗](上帝)无所不在的
meanings.meaning_en: a quality that is immanent seems to be present everywhere
meanings.example: Love is a force immanent in the world.
meanings.example_cn: 爱是世界上一种无处不在的力量。

meanings.meaning_cn: 嫩的, 温柔的, 软弱的
