meanings.example: I just decided I was a bit too frivolous to be a doctor.
meanings.example_cn: 我只是认定自己有点儿太轻率，不适合当医生。

meanings.meaning_en: always believing what you are told, and therefore easily deceived
meanings.example: Quinn charmed credulous investors out of millions of dollars.
meanings.example_cn: 奎因花言巧语从轻信的投资者那里骗取了数百万美元。

meanings.meaning_en: likely to do something or suffer from something, especially something bad or harmful

meanings.meaning_cn: 倾斜的, 间接的, 不坦率的, 无诚意的
meanings.meaning_en: not expressed in a direct way
meanings.example: an oblique reference to his drinking problem
meanings.example_cn: 拐弯抹角地提及他的酗酒问题

meanings.example: Pure religion and undefiled before our God and Father is this: to visit the orphan and the widow in their distress, and to keep oneself unspotted from the world.
meanings.example_cn: 纯宗教的虔敬，在我们的神与父面前，这就是访问孤儿和寡妇在危难中，仍然保守自己的清白在这个世界。

meanings.meaning_en: clear or transparent
meanings.example: limpid blue eyes
meanings.example_cn: 清澈的蓝眼睛

meanings.meaning_en: very strict about moral matters, especially sex – used in order to show disapproval
meanings.example: a puritanical father who wouldn’t let his children watch television
meanings.example_cn: 不让孩子看电视的清教徒式的父亲

meanings.meaning_en: written or printed clearly enough for you to read
meanings.example: Her handwriting was so tiny it was barely legible.
meanings.example_cn: 她的字写得这么小，简直都看不清楚。

meanings.meaning_en: a comely woman is attractive
meanings.example: Here, a comely woman coach jogs alongside an inmate in the prison yard.
meanings.example_cn: 这儿，一个清秀的女子教练一起和犯人在监狱院子里慢跑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 庆祝的, 喜庆的, 欢乐的, 节日似
meanings.meaning_en: looking or feeling bright and cheerful in a way that seems suitable for celebrating something
meanings.example: The atmosphere was festive and jolly.
meanings.example_cn: 气氛喜庆欢乐。

meanings.meaning_cn: 屈从的, 有帮助的, 有用的, 奉承的
meanings.meaning_en: always obeying another person and doing everything they want you to do – used when someone seems too weak and powerless
meanings.example: Her willingness to be subservient to her children isolated her.
meanings.example_cn: 她对她的孩子们顺从的意愿使她陷于孤立。

meanings.meaning_cn: 趋于时尚的, 流行的, 风行的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something as faddish, you mean that it has no real value and that it will not remain popular for very long
meanings.example: ...faddish footwear.
meanings.example_cn: ...一时流行的鞋袜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 曲线美的, 肉体美的
meanings.meaning_en: having an attractively curved body shape – used about women
meanings.example: a tall curvaceous young woman
meanings.example_cn: 一个身材高挑、曲线优美的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_cn: 曲折的, 转弯抹角的
meanings.meaning_en: a tortuous path, stream, road etc has a lot of bends in it and is therefore difficult to travel along
meanings.example: a tortuous path over the mountains to Kandahar
meanings.example_cn: 翻山越岭通往坎大哈的一条蜿蜒小径

meanings.meaning_cn: 去不掉的, 不能拭除的
meanings.meaning_en: Indelible ink or an indelible stain cannot be removed or washed out
meanings.example: It leaves indelible stains on clothes.
meanings.example_cn: 它会在衣物上留下洗不掉的污渍。

meanings.meaning_cn: 权威的, 有权威的, 命令的
meanings.meaning_en: an authoritative book, account etc is respected because the person who wrote it knows a lot about the subject
meanings.example: the most authoritative work on English surnames
meanings.example_cn: 有关英语姓氏的最权威著作

meanings.example: The goal of recommended actions during these phases is to reduce the impact of the pandemic on society.
meanings.example_cn: 在这些阶段被推荐采取的行动的目标就是要减少流行病对社会的影响。

meanings.meaning_cn: 全面的, 广泛的, 能充分理解的, 包容的
meanings.meaning_en: including all the necessary facts, details, or problems that need to be dealt with
meanings.example: We offer our customers a comprehensive range of financial products.
meanings.example_cn: 我们为客户提供全面的金融产品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 全能的, 无所不能的
meanings.meaning_en: able to do everything
meanings.example: Doug lived in the shadow of his seemingly omnipotent father.
meanings.example_cn: 道格生活在他那看似无所不能的父亲的阴影里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 全身泥污的, 湿透的, 荒废的
meanings.meaning_en: Someone or something that is bedraggled looks messy because they have got wet or dirty
meanings.example: He looked weary and bedraggled.
meanings.example_cn: 他看上去精疲力尽，又湿又脏。

meanings.meaning_en: so interested in something that you do not notice anything else
meanings.example: They listened with rapt attention .
meanings.example_cn: 他们全神贯注地听着。

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone or something is devoid of a quality or thing, you are emphasizing that they have none of it
meanings.example: I have never looked on a face that was so devoid of feeling.
meanings.example_cn: 我从未见过这样一张完全没有感情的脸。

meanings.meaning_cn: 全知的, 无所不知的
meanings.meaning_en: knowing everything
meanings.example: the book’s omniscient narrator
meanings.example_cn: 本书中全知全能的叙事者

meanings.example: Accordingly, the literature in English that has come down to us from this period (1150-1250) is almost exclusively religious or admonitory.
meanings.example_cn: 因此，从这一时期（1150—1250）流传下来给我们的用英语写的作品几乎单一地是关于宗教或劝告的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 劝告的, 鼓励的, 忠告的, 奖励的
meanings.meaning_en: tending to exhort; encouraging
meanings.example: The print is a hortative drawing. It tells us that everybody has shortcoming and the power of the individual is smaller than group.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅图片是一张勉励的漫画，他告诉我们每个人都有缺点，一个人的力量总是不如集体的力量的。

meanings.meaning_en: having no teeth
meanings.example: Conclusion: The collapsible complete denture can restore the edentulous of the patient with microstomia.
meanings.example_cn: 结论：折叠式上颌全口义齿可用于修复小口畸形患者的牙列缺失。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缺乏的,不足的,将近的,欠缺的
meanings.meaning_en: not enough
meanings.example: The story has received scant attention in the press.
meanings.example_cn: 这件事没在报界引起多少注意。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缺乏兴趣的, 缺乏感情的, 无动于衷的
meanings.meaning_en: not interested in something, and not willing to make any effort to change or improve things
meanings.example: She felt too apathetic even to move.
meanings.example_cn: 她毫无兴趣，甚至连动都不想动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缺乏营养的, 贫瘠的, 无兴趣的, 不成熟的
meanings.meaning_en: ideas that are jejune are too simple
meanings.example: jejune political opinions
meanings.example_cn: 幼稚的政治观点

meanings.meaning_cn: 确立的，不容易改的（风俗习惯）

meanings.meaning_en: certain to happen or to be achieved
meanings.example: Her political future looks assured.
meanings.example_cn: 她的政治前途一片光明。

meanings.meaning_en: serving to corroborate
meanings.example: As a corroborant theory, what it mainly encounters is "tracing argumentation".
meanings.example_cn: 作为一种确证的理论，它面对的主要是“回溯论证”的问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 饶舌的, 啁啾的, 多嘴的
meanings.meaning_en: always talking a lot
meanings.example: Ian isn’t normally this garrulous!
meanings.example_cn: 伊恩一般不这么唠叨！

meanings.meaning_en: involving strong emotions, especially of sexual love
meanings.example: a torrid love affair
meanings.example_cn: 狂热的风流韵事

meanings.meaning_cn: 热的, 热情的, 辣的, 激动的, 紧迫的, 节奏强的
meanings.meaning_en: food that tastes hot has a burning taste because it contains strong spices
meanings.example: a hot curry
meanings.example_cn: 一种辛辣的咖喱

meanings.example: She appeared on television to make an impassioned plea for help.
meanings.example_cn: 她在电视上恳切地请求人们帮助。

meanings.example: There's a skeleton made of thermoplastic polymer, actuators that correspond to each muscle and kiteline as tendons.
meanings.example_cn: 他们研制的新型机器人的“骨骼”是由热塑性聚合物和促动器构成的，响应每一块肌肉和类似筋腱的线路的运动。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is zealous does or supports something with great energy
meanings.example: a zealous preacher
meanings.example_cn: 热心的讲道者

meanings.meaning_cn: 热心的, 热情洋溢的, 激烈的, 燃烧般的
meanings.meaning_en: showing strong positive feelings about an activity and determination to succeed at it
meanings.example: an ardent supporter of free trade
meanings.example_cn: 自由贸易的热心支持者

meanings.meaning_en: not often visited by many people
meanings.example: an unfrequented spot
meanings.example_cn: 人迹罕至的地方

meanings.meaning_cn: 人口多的, 人口稠密的
meanings.meaning_en: a populous area has a large population in relation to its size
meanings.example: Hong Kong is one of the most populous areas in the world.
meanings.example_cn: 香港是世界上人口最稠密的地区之一。

meanings.meaning_en: seeming false and not natural
meanings.example: The characters are as contrived as the plot.
meanings.example_cn: 这些人物和情节一样不自然。

meanings.meaning_cn: 人为的, 做作的, 不自然的
meanings.meaning_en: made to happen artificially by people rather than happening naturally
meanings.example: So we know that the right and wrong are factitious.
meanings.example_cn: 而这些是非对错的标准显然都是人为的。

meanings.meaning_en: treating people or animals in a way that is not cruel and causes them as little suffering as possible
meanings.example: the campaign for the humane treatment of criminals
meanings.example_cn: 提倡人道地对待罪犯的运动

meanings.meaning_cn: 仁慈的, (为)慈善事业的,宽恕的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to giving help to the poor
meanings.example: charitable groups
meanings.example_cn: 慈善团体

meanings.meaning_en: patient and willing to forgive
meanings.example: By long forbearing is a prince persuaded, and a soft tongue breaketh the bone.
meanings.example_cn: 恒常忍耐，可以劝动君王。 柔和的舌头，能折断骨头。

meanings.meaning_cn: 任性的, 暴躁的, [航海]摇荡不稳的, 怪僻的
meanings.meaning_en: strange
meanings.example: Organic farming is no longer thought of as cranky.
meanings.example_cn: 有机耕作不再被认为是古怪的想法了。

meanings.example: There is a willful self-destructiveness in the air here as if America has all the time and money in the world for petty politics.
meanings.example_cn: 这里的空气里中弥漫着一种故意自我毁灭的气息，为了狭隘的政治，美国好像在全世界有的是金钱和时间。

meanings.meaning_cn: 任意的, 武断的, 独裁的, 专断的
meanings.meaning_en: decided or arranged without any reason or plan, often unfairly
meanings.example: an arbitrary decision
meanings.example_cn: 武断的决定

meanings.meaning_cn: 绒毛似的, 披着绒毛的, 蓬松的, 愚蠢的
meanings.meaning_en: food that is fluffy is made soft and light by mixing it quickly so that a lot of air is mixed into it
meanings.example: Cream the butter and sugar until the mixture is light and fluffy.
meanings.example_cn: 搅拌黄油和糖，直到混合物变得松软。

meanings.meaning_cn: 容积大的, 宽敞的, 广阔的
meanings.meaning_en: able to contain a lot
meanings.example: a capacious suitcase
meanings.example_cn: 容量很大的手提箱

meanings.meaning_cn: 容易操作的, 有机动性的
meanings.example: Smaller cars use less gas, are more maneuverable, cause fewer deaths, use fewer resources.
meanings.example_cn: 小车更节约汽油，更容易操作，造成的死亡率更低，用更少的资源。

meanings.meaning_cn: 容易的, 不费力气的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is effortless is done in a very skilful way that makes it seem easy
meanings.example: Alexei rose to his feet with a single effortless movement.
meanings.example_cn: 阿列克谢轻巧地一跃而起。

meanings.meaning_cn: 容易的, 轻松而容易赚钱的
meanings.meaning_en: a cushy job or life is very easy and does not need much effort
meanings.example: I wish I had a nice cushy job like her.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望有份她那样的轻松的好工作。

meanings.meaning_en: food that is perishable is likely to decay quickly
meanings.example: perishable goods such as butter, milk, fruit and fish
meanings.example_cn: 黄油、牛奶、水果和鱼等易变质的商品

meanings.meaning_cn: 容易倾斜的, 不安定的, <英>头等的, 漂亮的, (毛织品)多绒尖的
容易受感动的, 敏感的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is impressionable is easily influenced, especially because they are young
meanings.example: The kids are at an impressionable age.
meanings.example_cn: 这些儿童正处于易受影响的年龄。

meanings.meaning_cn: 溶解的, 有偿付能力的, 有溶解力
meanings.meaning_en: having enough money to pay your debts
meanings.example: They're going to have to show that the company is now solvent.
meanings.example_cn: 他们将不得不证明公司现在是具备偿债能力的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冗长的, 说话罗嗦的
meanings.meaning_en: a prolix piece of writing has too many words and is boring
meanings.example: Everyone hates the prolix Gadaffi, particularly Arab despots who he routinely blasts as  “old women in robes,” “Zionist lackeys,” and “cowards and thieves.
meanings.example_cn: 任何一个痛恨卡扎菲说话罗嗦的人，尤其是阿拉伯独裁君主们，他们例行公事似地攻击卡扎菲是“穿着长袍的老女人”，“犹太复国主义走狗”，和“懦夫和小偷”。

meanings.meaning_cn: 柔韧性, 易曲的, 灵活的, 柔软的, 能变形的, 可通融的
meanings.meaning_en: a person, plan etc that is flexible can change or be changed easily to suit any new situation
meanings.example: We can be flexible about your starting date.
meanings.example_cn: 你具体从哪天开始，我们可以灵活一点。

meanings.meaning_en: supple in the limbs or body; lithe; flexible

meanings.meaning_cn: 柔软的, 逢迎的, 顺从的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is supple bends and moves easily and gracefully
meanings.example: She exercises every day to keep herself supple.
meanings.example_cn: 她每天锻炼以保持身体柔韧。

meanings.meaning_en: not firm or strong
meanings.example: a limp handshake
meanings.example_cn: 无力的握手

meanings.meaning_cn: 柔弱的, 女人气的, 娇气的
meanings.meaning_en: a man who is effeminate looks or behaves like a woman
meanings.example: ...a skinny, effeminate guy in lipstick and earrings.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个抹口红、戴耳环，骨瘦如柴的娘娘腔男人。

meanings.meaning_en: of or relating to the soma
meanings.example: somatic cells

meanings.meaning_cn: 肉欲的, 色情的, 世俗的, 感觉的, 感觉论的
meanings.example: the sensual pleasure of good food
meanings.example_cn: 美食的感官享受

meanings.meaning_cn: 如百科辞典的, 百科全书式的
meanings.meaning_en: having a lot of knowledge or information about a particular subject
meanings.example: an encyclopedic knowledge of medieval literature
meanings.example_cn: 广博的中世纪文学知识

meanings.meaning_cn: 如黄蜂的, 腰细的, 易怒的, 尖刻的
meanings.meaning_en: A waspish remark or sense of humour is sharp and critical
meanings.example: waspish remarks
meanings.example_cn: 恶毒的话语

meanings.example: I grew up around people who had wonderful, mellifluous voices.
meanings.example_cn: 我是在一群有着悦耳动听嗓音的人周围长大的。

meanings.meaning_en: having colours that shine and seem to change
meanings.example: an opalescent sky
meanings.example_cn: 色彩变幻的天空

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or derived from milk
meanings.example: Kimchi has antibiotic functions as lactic acid bacteria produced in the process of fermentation suppresses growth of harmful bacteria.
meanings.example_cn: 由于在发酵过程中产生的乳酸菌抑制了有害菌的生长，所以泡菜有抗生素作用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 软弱的, 无活力的, 没气力的
meanings.meaning_en: You use flaccid to describe a part of someone's body when it is unpleasantly soft and not hard or firm
meanings.example: I picked up her wrist. It was limp and flaccid.
meanings.example_cn: 我抓起她的手腕，她的手腕软弱无力。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone’s appearance or their clothes, hair etc is dishevelled, they look very untidy
meanings.example: Pam arrived late, dishevelled and out of breath.
meanings.example_cn: 帕姆迟到了，衣冠不整，上气不接下气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 散漫的, 不得要领的
meanings.meaning_en: discussing many different ideas, facts etc, without always having a clear purpose
meanings.example: a long, discursive article
meanings.example_cn: 一篇冗长且不着边际的文章

meanings.meaning_cn: 散漫的, 不连贯的, 断断续续的
meanings.meaning_en: done without any particular plan or purpose
meanings.example: They talked briefly in a desultory manner.
meanings.example_cn: 他们随意地谈了一小会儿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 散文的, 散文体的, 平凡的
meanings.example: a prosaic writing style
meanings.example_cn: 乏味的写作风格

meanings.meaning_en: sounding unpleasantly loud
meanings.example: He burst into raucous laughter .
meanings.example_cn: 他突然发出沙哑的笑声。

meanings.meaning_en: on this (the writer's or speaker's) side of the mountains, esp the Alps
provocative behaviour, remarks etc are intended to make people angry or upset, or to cause a lot of discussion
meanings.example: a provocative act by a terrorist group
meanings.example_cn: 恐怖团体的挑衅行为

meanings.meaning_cn: 煽动性的, 妨害治安的
meanings.meaning_en: A seditious act, speech, or piece of writing encourages people to fight against or oppose the government
meanings.example: He fell under suspicion for distributing seditious pamphlets.
meanings.example_cn: 他因分发反政府传单而受到怀疑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 善于接受的, 能接纳的
meanings.meaning_en: willing to consider new ideas or listen to someone else’s opinions
meanings.example: You might find them in a more receptive mood tomorrow.
meanings.example_cn: 也许他们明天会更乐于接受意见。

meanings.meaning_cn: 商议定的, 协定的, [乐]协调的
meanings.example: Although more concerted action is required, its results bear out the need for the various sectors and stakeholders to work together.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管需要更多的协调的行动，它的结果证明了需要各部门和利益攸关方联合起来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 上升的, 进步的, 强调的
meanings.example: It occupies special position- joint of agriculture and nomadism civilization, and also it is the most important strategic field, so the whole area is still creative and ascensive.
meanings.example_cn: 但由于自身处在农耕文明与游牧文明交汇处的特殊区位，始终是屏藩京畿的战略要地，整个地区仍然有新的创造和进步。

meanings.meaning_en: if a substance, especially a drug, is addictive, your body starts to need it regularly and you are unable to stop taking it
meanings.example: Tobacco is highly addictive .
meanings.example_cn: 烟草很容易使人上瘾。

meanings.meaning_en: very impressive and expensive
meanings.example: a sumptuous feast
meanings.example_cn: 盛宴

meanings.meaning_cn: 奢侈的, 浪费的, 过分的, 放纵的
meanings.meaning_en: spending or costing a lot of money, especially more than is necessary or more than you can afford
meanings.example: Would it be too extravagant to buy both?
meanings.example_cn: 把两个都买下会不会太奢侈了？

meanings.meaning_cn: 奢侈逸乐的, 柔弱的
meanings.meaning_en: wanting or enjoying expensive pleasures and comforts
meanings.example: While ten years ago design and style were unique selling propositions, nowadays they are minimum requirements to attract the sybaritic post-modern guest.
meanings.example_cn: 十年前，设计和潮流都作为卖点，而今他们已经是最基本的吸引奢侈后现代客人的最低要求了。

meanings.meaning_en: of or resembling a snake

meanings.meaning_cn: 蛇一般的, 弯弯曲曲的, 阴险的, 多蛇的
meanings.meaning_en: of or like a snake; sinuous
friendly and preferring to be with other people
meanings.example: She is such a gregarious and outgoing person.
meanings.example_cn: 她就是这样一个爱社交而且外向的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 社团的, 法人的, 共同的, 全体的
meanings.meaning_en: shared by or involving all the members of a group
meanings.example: corporate responsibility
meanings.example_cn: 共同的责任

meanings.meaning_en: known and understood by only a few people who have special knowledge about something
meanings.example: the esoteric world of scientific supercomputing
meanings.example_cn: 深奥的科学超级计算领域

meanings.meaning_cn: 深奥的, 隐藏的, 晦涩的
meanings.meaning_en: recondite facts or subjects are not known about or understood by many people
meanings.example: Her poems are modishly experimental in style and recondite in subject matter.
meanings.example_cn: 她的诗在风格上时尚朦胧，在主题上深奥难懂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 深不可测的, 无底的
meanings.example: The reunion was an abysmal failure.
meanings.example_cn: 重逢聚会弄得一团糟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 深不可测的, 无法计量, 无法了解的
meanings.meaning_en: impossible to measure or understand
meanings.example: the fathomless depths of the sea
meanings.example_cn: 海洋深不可测之处

meanings.meaning_cn: 深感懊悔的, 由悔悟引起的
meanings.meaning_en: feeling guilty and sorry for something bad that you have done
meanings.example: a contrite apology
meanings.example_cn: 深感悔悟的道歉

meanings.example: The deal ended after a series of rancorous disputes.
meanings.example_cn: 经过一连串充满敌意的争吵，该交易泡汤了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 深刻的, 尖锐的, 激烈的
meanings.meaning_en: showing intelligence and a clear understanding of something
meanings.example: He is a very shrewd operator with an incisive mind.
meanings.example_cn: 他是一位非常精明的经营者，有着敏锐的头脑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 深思熟虑的, 故意的, 预有准备的
meanings.meaning_en: intended or planned
meanings.example: a deliberate attempt to humiliate her
meanings.example_cn: 对她的故意羞辱

meanings.meaning_cn: 神赐能力的, 超凡魅力的
meanings.meaning_en: having charisma
meanings.example: Martin Luther King was a very charismatic speaker.
meanings.example_cn: 马丁•路德•金是个很有感召力的演说家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神的, 宗教的, 庄严的, 神圣的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to a god or religion
meanings.example: a sacred vow
meanings.example_cn: 神圣的誓言

meanings.meaning_cn: 神经紧张的, 不安的, 强健有力的
meanings.meaning_en: worried or frightened about something, and unable to relax
meanings.example: I wish you’d stop looking at me like that. You’re making me nervous.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望你不要再那样看着我了，你让我紧张。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神秘的, 不可思议的
meanings.meaning_en: Something that is arcane is secret or mysterious
meanings.example: Until a few months ago few people outside the arcane world of contemporary music had heard of Gorecki.
meanings.example_cn: 直至几个月前，现代音乐神秘世界之外只有少数人听说过戈莱斯基。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神秘的, 玄妙的, 不可思议的, 超自然的
meanings.meaning_en: magical and mysterious
meanings.example: occult practices
meanings.example_cn: 神秘习俗

meanings.meaning_cn: 神圣的, 不可亵渎的, 不可侵犯的
meanings.meaning_en: an inviolable right, law, principle etc is extremely important and should be treated with respect and not broken or removed
meanings.example: The game had a single inviolable rule: obstacles were to be overcome, not circumvented.
meanings.example_cn: 这个游戏有一个单一的不可违反的规则：困难是被克服的，不是被回避的。

meanings.meaning_en: holy or made holy by religious practices
meanings.example: The bones will be buried in hallowed ground.
meanings.example_cn: 尸骸将被安葬在神圣的土地上。

meanings.meaning_en: from or like an oracle
meanings.example: From voting reform to CCTV, from Trident to the debates, there’s a perfect Orwell quotation, apposite, terse and oracular, just waiting to be plucked out and flourished.
meanings.example_cn: 从选举改革，到闭路监视电视，从战斗机到争论，总有一条完美的奥维尔谏言，适当，简洁，神谕似的，就在那边等着被拔找出来，接着繁华开去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 神志昏迷的, 不省人事的, 发狂的
meanings.meaning_en: Someone who is delirious is unable to think or speak in a sensible and reasonable way, usually because they are very ill and have a fever
meanings.example: I was delirious and blacked out several times.
meanings.example_cn: 我当时神志不清，几次昏过去。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the  kidney s
meanings.example: acute renal failure
meanings.example_cn: 急性肾衰竭

meanings.meaning_en: thinking carefully about something before doing it, in order to avoid risk
meanings.example: The governor was usually circumspect when dealing with the media.
meanings.example_cn: 这位州长和媒体打交道时通常都很谨慎小心。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone is irate, they are very angry about something
meanings.example: The owner was so irate he almost threw me out of the place.
meanings.example_cn: 主人那么生气，他差点儿把我从那个地方赶出去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生气的, 不高兴的, 发怒的, 傲慢的

meanings.meaning_en: sulking, or tending to sulk
meanings.example: a sulky child
meanings.example_cn: 生闷气的孩子

meanings.meaning_cn: 生殖力旺盛的, 多产的, 丰饶的, 肥沃的
meanings.meaning_en: able to produce many children, young animals, or crops
meanings.example: The pampas are still among the most fecund lands in the world.
meanings.example_cn: 这片南美无树大草原仍然是世界上最为肥沃的地方。

meanings.meaning_cn: 声名狼藉的, 破烂不堪的
meanings.meaning_en: considered to be dishonest, bad, illegal etc
meanings.example: disreputable behavior
meanings.example_cn: 不名誉的行为

meanings.meaning_en: famous or well-known for something bad
meanings.example: a notorious computer hacker
meanings.example_cn: 声名狼藉的电脑黑客

meanings.meaning_en: well known for being bad or evil
meanings.example: an infamous killer
meanings.example_cn: 臭名昭著的杀手

meanings.meaning_en: a stentorian voice is very loud and powerful
meanings.example: He bellowed in a stentorian voice.
meanings.example_cn: 他用洪亮的声音大吼。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or coming from a province
meanings.example: a provincial election
meanings.example_cn: 省级选举

meanings.meaning_en: remaining after a process, event etc is finished
meanings.example: the residual effects of drug treatment
meanings.example_cn: 药物治疗的残留作用

meanings.meaning_cn: 失策的, 不得当的, 不审慎的, 没见识的
meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a way that is not careful and that could make people think you are not sensible
meanings.example: It was considered impolitic of him to spend too much time with the party radicals.
meanings.example_cn: 他花太多时间与党内的激进分子在一起，这被认为是不明智的。

meanings.meaning_en: not polite, and not showing respect for other people
meanings.example: It would be discourteous to ignore his request.
meanings.example_cn: 忽视他的请求是失礼的。

meanings.meaning_en: like a lion in character or appearance
meanings.example: ...a tall leonine grey-haired man.
meanings.example_cn: ...一头白发蓬松如狮的高个子男人。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling unpleasantly wet, cold, and sticky
meanings.example: Get your clammy hands off me!
meanings.example_cn: 把你又湿又黏的手拿开，别碰我！

meanings.meaning_cn: 十分简单的, 十分安全的, 极坚固的
meanings.example: a foolproof way of preventing credit card fraud
meanings.example_cn: 防止信用卡诈骗的一个万全之策

meanings.meaning_cn: 时间的, 当时的, 暂时的, 现世的, 世俗的, [解]颞的
meanings.meaning_en: related to or limited by time
meanings.example: the temporal character of human existence
meanings.example_cn: 人生的短促

meanings.meaning_cn: 识别的, 有差别的, 有识别力的
meanings.meaning_en: able to judge what is of good quality and what is not
meanings.example: discriminating readers
meanings.example_cn: 精明的读者

meanings.meaning_cn: 实行的, 执行的, 行政的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the job of managing a business or organization and making decisions
meanings.example: a commission with executive powers
meanings.example_cn: 有执行权的委员会

meanings.meaning_en: Herbivorous animals only eat plants
meanings.example: " Cornett's attorney, Jack Johnston, said the tooth "looks like it would be from a herbivorous rodent of some type.
meanings.example_cn: 科内特的律师杰克·约翰斯顿说，这颗牙“看起来像是某种食草的啮齿类动物的牙。”

meanings.meaning_en: Carnivorous animals eat meat
meanings.example: Snakes are carnivorous.
meanings.example_cn: 蛇都是食肉动物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使恢复的, 有恢复力的
meanings.meaning_en: recuperative powers, abilities etc help someone or something get better again, especially after an illness
meanings.example: a recuperative vacation
meanings.example_cn: 有助于恢复健康的假期

meanings.meaning_cn: 使人感动的, 非常好的
meanings.meaning_en: very good
meanings.example: She looked sensational.
meanings.example_cn: 她看上去漂亮极了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使人难忘的, 壮丽的
meanings.example: an imposing building
meanings.example_cn: 宏伟的建筑

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something, especially food or drink, as delectable, you mean that it is very pleasant
meanings.example: ...delectable wine.
meanings.example_cn: ...美味可口的葡萄酒。

meanings.meaning_en: making someone feel calmer when they have been angry
meanings.example: an emollient reply
meanings.example_cn: 安抚的回答

meanings.meaning_cn: 使用夸张语言的, 华而不实的, 夸张的
氏族的, 宗族排外的, 团结心很强的
meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who are clannish are very close to each other, and seem unfriendly towards strangers
meanings.example: a clannish community
meanings.example_cn: 一个排他的团体

meanings.example: Figure 4 shows the schematic of this version.
meanings.example_cn: 图 4 显示了这个版本的示意图。

meanings.meaning_cn: 世界的, 世俗的, 平凡的
meanings.meaning_en: ordinary and not interesting or exciting
meanings.example: Initially, the work was pretty mundane.
meanings.example_cn: 刚开始，这工作非常乏味。

meanings.meaning_cn: 世界之外的,太阳系之外的,超俗的
meanings.meaning_en: extending beyond the world, this life, or the universe
reasonable and likely to be true or successful
meanings.example: His story certainly sounds plausible.
meanings.example_cn: 他的叙述听上去当然很合理。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a way that shows you think you are better than other people because you are from a higher social class or know more than they do
meanings.example: Her family seems snobbish.
meanings.example_cn: 她家里人好像挺势利的。

meanings.meaning_en: correct or suitable for a particular time, situation, or purpose
meanings.example: The timing of the announcement was particularly appropriate .
meanings.example_cn: 通告发布的时机很合适。

meanings.meaning_en: suitable to what is happening or being discussed
meanings.example: Recent events have made his central theme even more apposite.
meanings.example_cn: 近期发生的事件使他的主题思想显得更为恰当。

meanings.meaning_en: fitting together well
meanings.example: They want to work in an organization whose values are congruent with their own.
meanings.example_cn: 他们想在一家与他们自己的价值观相同的组织里工作。

meanings.example: They aim their advice squarely at nubile girls who have falsely equated romantic love with happiness.
meanings.example_cn: 其目的是如实地建议就要结婚的女孩，不要错误地认为，浪漫的爱情就是幸福。

meanings.meaning_en: potable water is safe to drink
meanings.example: In general, only one third of health facilities have potable water, and just one in four remain linked to the general sewerage system or to a power supply.
meanings.example_cn: 一般而言，近三分之一的卫生设施有适合饮用的水，并且仅仅四分之一仍然与一般排水系统或电源连接。

meanings.meaning_cn: 受到影响的, 受(疾病)侵袭的, 假装的, 做作的
meanings.meaning_en: not sincere or natural
meanings.example: an affected laugh
meanings.example_cn: 假笑

meanings.meaning_cn: 受虐待的, 权利受到不法侵害的, 抱不平的
meanings.meaning_en: having suffered as a result of the illegal actions of someone else
meanings.example: the aggrieved party (=  the person who has suffered  )
meanings.example_cn: 受害方

meanings.meaning_en: criticizing and expressing disapproval
meanings.example: His tone was censorious.
meanings.example_cn: 他语气苛刻。

meanings.meaning_cn: 瘦的, （树等）细长的, （草等）稀疏的, （头发）平直的
meanings.meaning_en: lank hair is thin, straight, and unattractive
extremely thin from lack of food or illness
meanings.example: The prisoners were ill and emaciated.
meanings.example_cn: 囚犯们疾病缠身，骨瘦如柴。

meanings.meaning_cn: 瘦弱的, 凸凹不平的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe a person or animal as scraggy, you mean that they look unattractive because they are so thin
meanings.example: ...his scraggy neck.
meanings.example_cn: ...他那干瘦的脖子。

meanings.meaning_en: a place that is cosy is small, comfortable, and warm
meanings.example: The living room was warm and cosy .
meanings.example_cn: 客厅暖和又舒适。

meanings.meaning_cn: 舒适的, 安逸的, 惬意的

meanings.example: His behavior alienated him and his brother.
meanings.example_cn: 他的行为使他跟哥哥疏远了。

meanings.meaning_en: clever and skilful, especially in the way you use words and arguments
meanings.example: an adroit negotiator
meanings.example_cn: 一个谈判高手

meanings.meaning_en: skilful
good at something that needs care and skill
meanings.example: I’m afraid she’s also an adept liar.
meanings.example_cn: 恐怕她还是一个撒谎专家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 束手无策的；进退两难的
meanings.example: Air travellers were left stranded because of icy conditions.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机乘客因冰冻天气而滞留。

meanings.meaning_cn: 树的, 乔木的, 树栖的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to trees, or living in trees
meanings.example: ...arboreal marsupials which resemble monkeys.
meanings.example_cn: ...类猴树栖有袋动物。

meanings.meaning_en: old and in bad condition
meanings.example: The buildings were in a decrepit state.
meanings.example_cn: 这些建筑物破旧不堪。

meanings.example: More serious consequence is to cause the joint layer between derma and skin to become thinner and thinner, skin can present anile evidence very quickly.
meanings.example_cn: 更严重的后果是造成真皮与表皮间的接合层变得越来越薄，肌肤就会很快呈现衰老的迹象。

meanings.meaning_cn: 双的, 二重的, 双重
meanings.meaning_en: having two of something or two parts
meanings.example: a dual system of education
meanings.example_cn: 二元[双元]教育体系

meanings.example: The hyperbolic surface, which has so-called negative curvature because its surface curves up and down at the same time, like a saddle, just might represent the shape of the universe.
meanings.example_cn: 双曲表面，即通常所称的负曲率，因为它的表面曲线同时有的向上和有的向下，像一个马鞍，也许这样就可以代表宇宙的形状。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone has a snappy style of speaking, they speak in a quick, clever, brief, and often funny way
meanings.example: Each film gets a snappy two-line summary.
meanings.example_cn: 每部影片都配有两行简洁明快的内容提要。

meanings.meaning_cn: 爽朗的, 活泼的, 爽快的
meanings.meaning_en: happy and active
meanings.example: You’re looking very chipper this morning.
meanings.example_cn: 今天早晨你看起来很高兴啊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 水的, 水上的, 水生的, 水栖的
meanings.meaning_en: living or growing in water
meanings.example: an aquatic plant
meanings.example_cn: 水生植物

meanings.meaning_en: occurring, appearing, formed, or used under water
meanings.example: The clay minerals in 65 surface sediment samples from the Changjiang River subaqueous delta were analyzed by using X ray diffraction (XRD) analysis technique.
meanings.example_cn: 采用X射线衍射（XRD）分析技术分析了长江水下三角洲地区65个表层沉积物样品的粘土矿物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 睡眠状态的, 静止的, 隐匿的
meanings.meaning_en: not active or not growing at the present time but able to be active later
meanings.example: a huge dormant volcano
meanings.example_cn: 一座巨大的休眠火山

meanings.meaning_en: always willing to obey someone and never disagreeing with them, even if they are unkind to you
meanings.example: In those days, women were expected to be quiet and submissive.
meanings.example_cn: 那时的妇女都要寡言恭顺。

meanings.meaning_en: willing to do what you are told without arguing
willing to obey or to agree to other people’s wishes and demands
meanings.example: For years I had tried to be a compliant and dutiful wife.
meanings.example_cn: 多年来我都在努力做一个顺从尽职的妻子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 顺从的, 听天由命的
meanings.meaning_en: a resigned look, voice etc shows that you are making yourself accept something that you do not like
meanings.example: ‘We’ll have to leave,’ she said with a resigned sigh.
meanings.example_cn: “我们不得不走啊。”她无奈地叹息道。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for a very short time
meanings.example: There was a momentary pause.
meanings.example_cn: 停顿了片刻。

meanings.meaning_cn: 瞬间的, 即刻的, 即时的
meanings.meaning_en: happening immediately
meanings.example: modern methods of instantaneous communication
meanings.example_cn: 现代的即时通信方法

meanings.meaning_en: an ironic situation is one that is unusual or amusing because something strange happens, or the opposite of what is expected happens or is true
meanings.example: Your car was stolen at the police station! How ironic!
meanings.example_cn: 你的车在警察局被偷！真让人哭笑不得！

meanings.meaning_cn: 说奉承话的, 阿谀的
meanings.meaning_en: praising important or powerful people too much because you want to get something from them – used in order to show disapproval
meanings.example: sycophantic journalists
meanings.example_cn: 好溜须拍马的新闻记者

meanings.meaning_cn: 说话粗鄙恶劣的, 使用低级粗俗语言的, 嘴损的, 下流的
meanings.meaning_en: scurrilous remarks, articles etc contain damaging and untrue statements about someone
meanings.example: a scurrilous attack on his integrity
meanings.example_cn: 对他正直人格的恶意诋毁

meanings.meaning_cn: 说实话的, 诚实的, 准确的, 真实的
meanings.meaning_en: habitually truthful or honest

meanings.meaning_cn: 司法的, 法院的, 公正的, 明断的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to the law, judges, or their decisions
meanings.example: ...an independent judicial system.
meanings.example_cn: …一个独立的司法体系。

meanings.meaning_en: making or being an ‘s’ or ‘sh’ sound
meanings.example: a sibilant whisper
meanings.example_cn: 嘁嘁喳喳的耳语

meanings.meaning_en: if you are hoarse, or if your voice is hoarse, you speak in a low rough voice, for example because your throat is sore
meanings.example: He was hoarse from laughing.
meanings.example_cn: 他笑得嗓子都沙哑了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 死后的, 身后的, 作者死后出版的, 遗腹的
meanings.meaning_en: happening, printed etc after someone’s death
meanings.example: a posthumous collection of his articles
meanings.example_cn: 他身后出版的文集

meanings.example: Up a tower to a defunct revolving restaurant, where I snapped photos of the hazy skyline.
meanings.example_cn: 上了塔，到了一颓败的旋转餐厅，那里我对着朦胧地天空的轮廓，拍了照片。

meanings.meaning_cn: 死气沉沉的, 没生命的, 单调的
meanings.meaning_en: not living
meanings.example: an inanimate object
meanings.example_cn: 无生命的物体

meanings.meaning_cn: 四季不断的, 终年的, 长期的, 永久的, (植物)多年生的
meanings.meaning_en: a plant that is perennial lives for more than two years
meanings.example: Lack of resources has been a perennial problem since the beginning.
meanings.example_cn: 财力不足从最初起就一直是个问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 肆无忌惮的, 无道德的, 不谨慎的
meanings.meaning_en: behaving in an unfair or dishonest way
meanings.example: unscrupulous employers
meanings.example_cn: 无耻的雇主

meanings.meaning_cn: 松的, 松懈的, 不严格的, 腹泻的, 松驰的
meanings.meaning_en: not strict or careful enough about standards of behaviour, work, safety etc
meanings.example: One of the problem areas is lax security for airport personnel.
meanings.example_cn: 其中一个问题是对机场人员的安全措施不严格。

meanings.meaning_cn: 俗丽的, 非常华丽的
meanings.meaning_en: If you describe something such as clothes or decorations as tawdry, you mean that they are cheap and show a lack of taste
meanings.example: ...tawdry jewellery.
meanings.example_cn: ... 廉价而俗丽的珠宝。

meanings.meaning_cn: 酸的, 辛辣的, 尖酸的, 刻薄的
meanings.meaning_en: food that is tart has a sharp sour taste
meanings.example: a tart apple
meanings.example_cn: 酸苹果

meanings.meaning_cn: 损害名誉的, 用言语中伤他人的
meanings.meaning_en: containing untrue written statements about someone which could make other people have a bad opinion of them
meanings.example: libellous gossip
meanings.example_cn: 诽谤性质的流言

meanings.meaning_cn: 损失惨重的, 悲伤的
meanings.example: a disastrous first marriage
meanings.example_cn: 以失败告终的第一次婚姻

meanings.meaning_cn: 所有的, 私人拥有的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to who owns something
meanings.example: They have proprietary rights to the data.
meanings.example_cn: 他们拥有那些数据资料的所有权。

meanings.meaning_en: lacking intelligence, interest, or imagination
meanings.example: vapid conversation
meanings.example_cn: 平淡乏味的对话

meanings.meaning_cn: 琐细的, 价值不高的, 微不足道的
meanings.meaning_en: not serious, important, or valuable
meanings.example: a trivial sum
meanings.example_cn: 一笔极小的金额

meanings.meaning_en: An avaricious person is very greedy for money or possessions
meanings.example: He sacrificed his own career so that his avaricious brother could succeed.
meanings.example_cn: 他牺牲了自己的事业，其目的是让他贪婪的弟弟成功。

meanings.meaning_cn: 贪婪的, 渴望的, 狼吞虎咽的
meanings.example: Amy realized that she had eaten nothing since leaving home that morning, and she was ravenous.
meanings.example_cn: 埃米意识到，她自己从早晨离开家门后什么东西都没有吃，她饿极了。

meanings.meaning_en: having a very strong desire to have something that someone else has
meanings.example: They began to cast covetous eyes on their neighbours’ fields.
meanings.example_cn: 他们开始觊觎邻居的土地。

meanings.meaning_en: willing to use power and influence in a dishonest way in return for money
meanings.example: our venal politicians
meanings.example_cn: 我们腐败的政客

meanings.meaning_cn: 坦白的, 自然的, 直率的
meanings.meaning_en: an ingenuous person is simple, trusting, and honest, especially because they have not had much experience of life
meanings.example: He seemed too ingenuous for a reporter.
meanings.example_cn: 他好像太天真诚实，不适合做记者。

meanings.example: His dreams were senseless and inchoate.

meanings.meaning_en: (of a country or region) on or near a frontier
relating to your stomach
meanings.example: gastric ulcers
meanings.example_cn: 胃溃疡

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is suave is polite, confident, and relaxed, sometimes in an insincere way
meanings.example: a suave and sophisticated gentleman
meanings.example_cn: 温文尔雅、精明练达的绅士

meanings.meaning_cn: 温和的, 柔和的, 乏味的, 冷漠的, 刺激性少的
meanings.example: a few bland comments
meanings.example_cn: 不痛不痒的几句评语

meanings.meaning_cn: 温顺的, 谦恭的, (河流等)和缓的, 驯服的
meanings.meaning_en: very quiet and gentle and unwilling to argue with people
meanings.example: He was always so meek and mild .
meanings.example_cn: 他总是那么温顺。

meanings.example: Many picnics manage without this sophistication , but we like to be couth and feel that the delicacies of gracious living enhance the chancesJohn Gould.
meanings.example_cn: 许多野餐都没有见识地对付过去了，但是我们想做的文雅一些，并且认为体面生活的高雅可以增加这种可能性约翰·古尔德。

meanings.example: When millions watch the same programs, the whole world becomes a village, and society is reduced to the condition which obtain in preliterate communities.
meanings.example_cn: 当数以百万计的人们观看同一电视节目时，整个世界成了一个小村庄，社会退化到文字出现前状况。

meanings.meaning_cn: 文字的, 照字面上的, 无夸张的
meanings.meaning_en: The literal sense of a word or phrase is its most basic sense
meanings.example: In many cases, the people there are fighting, in a literal sense, for their homes.
meanings.example_cn: 多数情况下，那里的人们实际上都是在为他们的家园而战斗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 问候的, 称赞的, 夸奖的, 免费赠送的
meanings.meaning_en: given free to people
meanings.example: There was a complimentary bottle of champagne in the hotel room.
meanings.example_cn: 酒店客房里有一瓶免费赠送的香槟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乌托邦的, 理想化的
meanings.meaning_en: Utopian is used to describe political or religious philosophies which claim that it is possible to build a new and perfect society in which everyone is happy
meanings.example: His was a utopian vision of nature in its purest form.
meanings.example_cn: 他对大自然的看法是一种最纯粹的乌托邦式看法。

meanings.meaning_en: covered with dirt
meanings.example: grimy windows
meanings.example_cn: 落满灰尘的窗子

meanings.meaning_cn: 污秽的, 邪恶的, 肮脏的, 淤塞的, 恶劣的
meanings.meaning_en: very dirty
meanings.example: Refugees in the camps are short of food and at risk from foul water.
meanings.example_cn: 营中难民缺少食物，还面临水源污染的危险。

meanings.meaning_en: having no match or equal; peerless
meanings.example: This paper remains a nonpareil platform for writing a column — not just for its readership, but also for its journalistic freedom.
meanings.example_cn: 它仍然拥有无可匹敌的专栏写作平台——不只为其读者，也为新闻自由。

meanings.meaning_en: Proletarian means relating to the proletariat
meanings.example: ...a proletarian revolution.
meanings.example_cn: ...一场无产阶级革命。

meanings.meaning_en: not sincere and slightly dishonest
meanings.example: Keeping the details of the tax changes vague is disingenuous.
meanings.example_cn: 对税收变革的细节含糊其词并不光明正大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无胆量的, 没勇气的, 没有生气的
meanings.meaning_en: lacking courage or determination
meanings.example: I should have had the support of my team, but they were really gutless.
meanings.example_cn: 我本应该得到我的团队的支持，但他们实在太没胆量了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无定形的, 无组织的
meanings.meaning_en: having no definite shape or features
meanings.example: an amorphous mass of twisted metal
meanings.example_cn: 一堆扭曲变形的金属

meanings.meaning_cn: 无法安慰的, 极为伤心的
meanings.meaning_en: so sad that it is impossible for anyone to comfort you
meanings.example: The boy was inconsolable after the death of his dog.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩因为自己的狗死了而伤心不已。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无法攻取的, 要塞坚固的, 不受影响的, 可以受孕的的
meanings.meaning_en: a building that is impregnable is so strong that it cannot be entered by force
meanings.example: an impregnable fortress
meanings.example_cn: 坚不可摧的堡垒

meanings.meaning_cn: 无法解脱的, 逃脱不掉的, 解不开的
meanings.meaning_en: two or more things that are inextricable are closely related and affect each other
meanings.example: the inextricable connection between language and culture
meanings.example_cn: 语言和文化之间密不可分的联系

meanings.meaning_cn: 无法模仿的, 独特的, 无比的
meanings.meaning_en: You use inimitable to describe someone, especially a performer, when you like or admire them because of their special qualities
meanings.example: He makes his own point in his own inimitable way.
meanings.example_cn: 他以他独有的的方式阐述了自己的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: too unusual or strange to be explained or understood
meanings.example: inexplicable behaviour
meanings.example_cn: 费解的行为

meanings.meaning_cn: 无关的, 鲁莽的, 不相干的
meanings.meaning_en: rude and not respectful, especially to someone who is older or more important
meanings.example: He was always asking impertinent questions.
meanings.example_cn: 他老是问一些唐突的问题。

meanings.example: People have become indifferent to the suffering of others.
meanings.example_cn: 人们已经变得对别人的痛苦漠不关心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无关系的, 外来的, [化]外部裂化, [化]新异反射
meanings.meaning_en: not belonging to or directly related to a particular subject or problem
meanings.example: extraneous noises
meanings.example_cn: 外面传来的噪声

meanings.meaning_cn: 无害的, 无毒的, 无伤大雅的, 不得罪人的
meanings.meaning_en: not offensive, dangerous, or harmful
meanings.example: an innocuous remark
meanings.example_cn: 无恶意的话

meanings.meaning_cn: 无活动的, 惰性的, 迟钝的
meanings.meaning_en: not producing a chemical reaction when combined with other substances
meanings.example: inert gases
meanings.example_cn: 惰性气体

meanings.meaning_cn: 无脊骨的, 没有骨气的, 没有勇气的
meanings.meaning_en: lacking courage and determination – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: a bunch of spineless politicians
meanings.example_cn: 一群怯弱的政客

meanings.meaning_cn: 无脊椎的, 无骨气的
meanings.meaning_en: Invertebrate is also an adjective
meanings.example: ...invertebrate creatures.
meanings.example_cn: ...无脊椎动物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无价的, 极贵重的, 无法清偿的, <口>无与伦比的, 极好的
无价值的, 没有力量的, 无效的
meanings.meaning_en: having no value

meanings.meaning_cn: 无价值的, 没有用的, 垃圾似的
meanings.meaning_en: of extremely bad quality
meanings.example: trashy novels
meanings.example_cn: 垃圾小说

meanings.meaning_cn: 无可名状的, 难以区别的, 无特征的
meanings.example: a rather nondescript suburban house
meanings.example_cn: 很普通的郊区房子

meanings.meaning_cn: 无可争辩的, 无可置疑的, 不可否认的
meanings.meaning_en: clearly true and impossible to disagree with
meanings.example: We had incontestable proof of her innocence.
meanings.example_cn: 我们有她无罪的铁证。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无可指责的, 不可非难的, 无缺点的, 无过失的
meanings.meaning_en: something, such as someone’s behaviour, that is irreproachable is so good that you cannot criticize it
meanings.example: She welcomed her unexpected visitor with irreproachable politeness.
meanings.example_cn: 她以无可指摘的礼仪接待了不速之客。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无礼, 轻率, 浮躁
无礼的, 爱管闲事的, 鲁莽的, 辛辣的, 活跃的, 别致的
meanings.example: Angie gave him one of her pert little glances.
meanings.example_cn: 安吉俏皮地瞥了他一眼。

meanings.meaning_en: used to describe someone’s fingers when they cannot hold something firmly, especially because they have had a shock
meanings.example: The key fell from her suddenly nerveless fingers.
meanings.example_cn: 钥匙从她突然麻木的手上滑落。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无力的, 虚弱的, 无效的, [医]阳萎的
meanings.meaning_en: unable to take effective action because you do not have enough power, strength, or control
meanings.example: Emergency services seem impotent in the face of such a disaster.
meanings.example_cn: 面对这种灾难，应急服务机构似乎无能为力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无气力的, 没精神的, 软弱的, 无用的
meanings.meaning_en: lacking determination, and not achieving anything in your life
meanings.example: Alice’s feckless younger brother
meanings.example_cn: 艾丽斯那个没出息的弟弟

meanings.meaning_cn: 无前例的, 无可比拟的
meanings.example: Hong Band is an important part of Ningbo Band. The plentiful achievements they have made in academic research are unexampled by other groups in Ningbo Band.
meanings.example_cn: 红帮是“宁波帮”的一个重要组成部分，他们在学术研究方面的丰硕成果，是其他“宁波帮”群体无可比拟的。

meanings.meaning_en: strict, cruel, or determined, without ever stopping
meanings.example: her relentless determination to succeed
meanings.example_cn: 她要成功的坚定决心

meanings.meaning_cn: 无情的, 冷淡的, 硬结的, 起老茧的
meanings.meaning_en: not caring that other people are suffering
meanings.example: We were shocked at the callous disregard for human life.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对这种无视人类生命的冷漠感到震惊。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is inexhaustible exists in such large amounts that it can never be finished or used up
meanings.example: She has an inexhaustible supply of funny stories.
meanings.example_cn: 她有讲不完的有趣故事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无穷小的, 极小的, 无限小的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely small
meanings.example: infinitesimal changes in temperature
meanings.example_cn: 气温极其微小的变化

meanings.meaning_cn: 无确定路线, 不稳定的, 奇怪的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is erratic does not follow any pattern or plan but happens in a way that is not regular
meanings.example: His breathing was becoming erratic.
meanings.example_cn: 他的呼吸越来越不均匀。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无生命的, 无生命时代的
meanings.meaning_en: without life; characteristic of the ages that have left no evidence of life in the form of organic remains

meanings.meaning_cn: 无实质的, 无实体的
meanings.meaning_en: existing without a body or separated from a body
meanings.example: disembodied spirits
meanings.example_cn: 游魂

meanings.example: I couldn't go beyond the doorway; that doorway that my father had told us umpteen times was the doorway of love. He had first glimpsed my mother through this door and fallen in love with her.
meanings.example_cn: 走到门口时，我停下了脚步：爸爸曾无数次地告诉我们说，这里是爱之门，他第一次就是通过这扇门瞥了妈妈一眼，然后就爱上了她。

meanings.meaning_en: able to judge a situation fairly because you are not concerned with gaining any personal advantage from it
meanings.example: A lawyer should provide disinterested advice.
meanings.example_cn: 律师应该提供客观公正的建议。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无条件的, 绝对的, 直接了当的(陈述、理论等)
meanings.meaning_en: a categorical statement is a clear statement that something is definitely true or false
a piece of music that is atonal is not based on a particular  key 2 4
meanings.example: The majority always turn an unfavorable attitude towards atonal composition.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数人对无调性作品的态度往往是不能接受的。

meanings.meaning_en: willing to do dangerous things or go to dangerous places – often used humorously
meanings.example: intrepid explorers
meanings.example_cn: 勇敢的探险家

meanings.meaning_cn: 无瑕疵的, 无缺点的, 无裂缝的
meanings.meaning_en: having no mistakes or marks, or not lacking anything
meanings.example: Adrian’s flawless French
meanings.example_cn: 阿德里安无可挑剔的法语

meanings.meaning_cn: 无下颚的, 优柔寡断的

meanings.meaning_en: very long and boring
meanings.example: interminable delays
meanings.example_cn: 无休止的拖延

meanings.meaning_en: not successful or effective
meanings.example: unavailing efforts to make her happy
meanings.example_cn: 想使她快乐的徒劳努力

meanings.meaning_cn: 无懈可击的, 无可指责的, 无过失的, 无可怀疑的
meanings.meaning_en: so good or definite that criticism or doubt is impossible
meanings.example: unimpeachable morals
meanings.example_cn: 无可指摘的品行

meanings.meaning_cn: 无药可救的, 不能被纠正的
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is incorrigible is bad in a way that cannot be changed or improved – often used humorously
meanings.example: "Sunita, you are incorrigible!" he said.
meanings.example_cn: “苏尼塔，你真是屡教不改啊！”，他说道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无依无靠的, 被逐出的
meanings.example: He has been unjustly dispossessed of his country.
meanings.example_cn: 他被无理驱逐出国。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无遗漏的, 彻底的, 详尽的, 无遗的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely thorough and complete
meanings.example: an exhaustive investigation
meanings.example_cn: 彻底的调查

meanings.meaning_en: too careless to save any money or to plan for the future

meanings.meaning_cn: 无政府主义的, 无法无天的
meanings.meaning_en: lacking any rules or order, or not following the moral rules of society
meanings.example: a lawless, anarchic city
meanings.example_cn: 一个没有法纪的混乱城市

meanings.example: In aspermous Patients the reason is the obstruction of spermatogenesis, the most common obstruction occurs in the spermatid level.
meanings.example_cn: 在无精症患者中是由生精阻滞所致，最常见的阻滞发生在精子细胞水平。

meanings.example: There are some relations between musical and orchestic symbols .
meanings.example_cn: 音乐符号和舞蹈符号存在着某种互渗互阐。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a substance) tending to absorb water from the air
meanings.example: Bentonite clay is also hygroscopic and absorbs water
meanings.example_cn: 膨润土也是一种吸湿剂，可以吸收周围空气中的水分。 在包装和搬运时要特别注意上述材料不能碰水，以免浪费。

meanings.meaning_cn: 吸引人的, 哀诉似的, 恳求似的
meanings.meaning_en: attractive or interesting
meanings.example: The city offers an appealing combination of sporting and cultural events.
meanings.example_cn: 这座城市集体育活动和文化活动于一身，颇具吸引力。

meanings.meaning_en: existing only in small amounts
meanings.example: his sparse brown hair
meanings.example_cn: 他那稀疏的棕色头发

meanings.meaning_cn: 稀少的, 细小的, 些须的
meanings.meaning_en: very small in amount
meanings.example: exiguous earnings
meanings.example_cn: 微薄的收入

meanings.meaning_cn: 熙熙攘攘的, 忙乱的
meanings.meaning_en: a bustling place is very busy

meanings.meaning_cn: 熄灭的, 灭绝的, 耗尽的
meanings.meaning_en: an extinct type of animal or plant does not exist any more
meanings.example: Dinosaurs have been extinct for millions of years.
meanings.example_cn: 恐龙已灭绝数千万年了。

meanings.example: a rollicking song
meanings.example_cn: 欢乐喧闹的歌

meanings.meaning_cn: 喜隐居的, 爱孤独的, 隐退性的
meanings.meaning_en: tending to seclude
If you refer to someone's behaviour as histrionic, you are critical of it because it is very dramatic, exaggerated, and insincere
meanings.example: Dorothea let out a histrionic groan.
meanings.example_cn: 多罗西亚发出了一声做作的呻吟。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the performing of plays
meanings.example: a Polish theatrical company
meanings.example_cn: 一家波兰剧团

meanings.meaning_cn: 系统的, 身体组织的, 全身的
meanings.example: a systemic disease
meanings.example_cn: 一种全身性疾病

meanings.meaning_cn: 狭碍的, 偏执的, 吝啬的, 缺乏文化素养的, 粗鄙的
meanings.meaning_en: not generous
meanings.example: illiberal and undemocratic policies
meanings.example_cn: 专制、不民主的政策

meanings.meaning_cn: 狭促的, 难辨的, 难懂的
meanings.meaning_en: a cramped room, building etc does not have enough space for the people in it
meanings.example: The kitchen was small and cramped.
meanings.example_cn: 这间厨房又小又窄。

meanings.meaning_en: hanging down loosely and swinging freely
meanings.example: pendulous breasts
meanings.example_cn: 松垂的乳房

meanings.meaning_en: ribald remarks or jokes are humorous, rude, and about sex
meanings.example: a ribald remark
meanings.example_cn: 粗俗的言论

meanings.meaning_cn: 下流的, 卑鄙的, 无礼的

meanings.meaning_en: When the weather is drizzly, the sky is dull and grey and it rains steadily but not very hard
meanings.example: ...a dull, drizzly afternoon.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个阴沉且下着细雨的午后。

meanings.meaning_cn: 下面的, 下层社会的
meanings.meaning_en: lower down - often used humorously
meanings.example: exploring the nether regions of East Sussex
meanings.example_cn: 探索东萨塞克斯郡南部地区

meanings.meaning_cn: 下意识的, 潜在意识的
meanings.meaning_en: affecting your mind in a way that you are not conscious of
meanings.example: a subliminal message
meanings.example_cn: 潜在的含义

meanings.meaning_en: of or occurring in summer
meanings.example: The difference of the accuracy of three interpolation methods for the aestival relative humidity was not significant.
meanings.example_cn: 对于三种插值方法，相对湿度的插值精度在夏季差异不明显。

meanings.meaning_en: an innate quality or ability is something you are born with
meanings.example: Children have an innate ability to learn language.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童学习语言的能力是与生俱来的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 先验的, 超越的, 超出人类经验的
meanings.meaning_en: transcendental experiences or ideas are beyond normal human understanding and experience
meanings.example: ...the transcendental nature of God.
meanings.example_cn: ...上帝的超验本质。

meanings.meaning_en: very thin and easily broken
meanings.example: In this method, the relationship of risk management and the key project measurements is tenuous.
meanings.example_cn: 在此方法中，风险管理和关键项目测量的关系是纤细的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 闲着的, 怠惰的, 没有用的, 多余的
meanings.meaning_en: unnecessary

meanings.meaning_cn: 贤明的, 明智的, 审慎的
meanings.meaning_en: very wise, especially as a result of a lot of experience
meanings.example: sage advice
meanings.example_cn: 明智的忠告

meanings.meaning_cn: 显赫的, 杰出的, 有名的, 优良的
meanings.meaning_en: an eminent person is famous, important, and respected
meanings.example: an eminent lawyer
meanings.example_cn: 杰出的律师

meanings.meaning_en: very easy to notice
meanings.example: The notice must be displayed in a conspicuous place.
meanings.example_cn: 通告一定要贴在显眼的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel that something evil, dangerous, or illegal is happening or will happen
meanings.example: There is a sinister side to these events.
meanings.example_cn: 这些事件有邪恶的一面。

meanings.meaning_en: inclement weather is unpleasantly cold, wet etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 现存的, 未毁的, <古>突出的, 显著的
meanings.meaning_en: still existing in spite of being very old
meanings.example: Few of the manuscripts are still extant.
meanings.example_cn: 手稿大都散佚无存。

meanings.meaning_cn: 线的, 直线的, 线性的
meanings.meaning_en: consisting of lines, or in the form of a straight line
meanings.example: a linear diagram
meanings.example_cn: 线形图

meanings.meaning_en: simple, old-fashioned, and not spoiled by modern developments, in a way that is typical of the countryside
meanings.example: The village had a certain rustic charm .
meanings.example_cn: 这个村庄有一种迷人的田园风情。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乡下的, 田园的, 乡村风味的, 生活在农村的
meanings.meaning_en: happening in or relating to the countryside, not the city
meanings.example: a rural setting
meanings.example_cn: 乡村环境

meanings.meaning_en: matching something in size, quality, or length of time
meanings.example: Employees are paid salaries commensurate with those of teachers.
meanings.example_cn: 发给雇员的薪水与发给教师的薪水相当。

meanings.meaning_cn: 相等的, 相当的, 同意义的
meanings.meaning_en: having the same value, purpose, job etc as a person or thing of a different kind
meanings.example: I had no dollars, but offered him an equivalent amount of sterling.
meanings.example_cn: 我没有美金，但给了他等值的英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: having the same pattern or features
using or containing too many words
meanings.example: For once, his usually verbose wife was content to listen.
meanings.example_cn: 他那个一贯唠叨的老婆难得一次愿意倾听。

meanings.meaning_cn: 享有声望的, 声望很高的
meanings.meaning_en: admired as one of the best and most important
meanings.example: a prestigious literary award
meanings.example_cn: 享有盛名的文学奖

meanings.meaning_cn: 响朗的, 洪亮的, 夸大的
meanings.meaning_en: (of the voice) resonant; booming

meanings.meaning_cn: 响应的, 作出响应的
meanings.example: a car with highly responsive steering
meanings.example_cn: 方向盘操纵灵活的汽车

meanings.meaning_cn: 想不出办法的, 偷懒的, 无能的
meanings.example: ...a shiftless husband.
meanings.example_cn: ...一位不求上进的丈夫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 想获得的, 有获得可能性的, 可学到的
meanings.example: We live in an acquisitive society.
meanings.example_cn: 我们活在一个贪婪的社会里。

meanings.meaning_en: almost starting to sleep
meanings.example: He lay quiet, somnolent after the day’s exertions.

meanings.meaning_cn: 亵渎神明的, 不敬神的

meanings.example: Then came Yo-Yo Ma ’76, swaying and ecstatic, playing sonorous Bach on his cello. Afterward, President Drew Faust joined him on the tented stage in front of the Memorial Church.
meanings.example_cn: 音乐节目开始了,在一个更加古典的片断前,这片断是由哈佛拉德克利夫管弦乐队演奏的,具有天堂般旋律的声音从霍尔登唱诗班传来.这样,传来了喑喑的玛-76的声音,入迷地摇摆着,从他的大提琴上传来响亮的的声音.之后,德鲁浮士德校长加入了设在纪念教堂前的帐篷舞台.蛋糕在哪儿?

very loud because people are happy and excited

meanings.example_cn: 他们走进商店，那是一所奇怪、摇摇欲坠的房子。

meanings.example_cn: 款式陈旧的连衣裙

meanings.meaning_en: instrumental music is for instruments, not for voices

meanings.example_cn: …一张声乐和器乐光盘。

已获得的, 已成习惯的, 后天通过自己的努力得到的
义不容辞的, 必须的

meanings.example_cn: …散发恶臭的数吨垃圾袋。

meanings.meaning_en: having a strong bad smell
meanings.example: the black fetid water of the lake
meanings.example_cn: 又黑又臭的湖水

meanings.meaning_cn: 有恶意的, 坏心肠的
meanings.meaning_en: a malevolent person wants to harm other people
meanings.example: Fortunately, they can be beaten, as indicated by the liberation of the Procyon people from these malevolent, self centered, self-serving... life draining entities.
meanings.example_cn: 幸运的是，它们被击败，我们被南河三人从这些恶毒的、自私自利的、以自我为中心的......生命枯竭的实体手中解放。

meanings.meaning_en: able to float or keep things floating
meanings.example: Cork is very buoyant.
meanings.example_cn: 软木浮性很好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有感觉力的, 有感情的, 感觉灵敏的, 意识到的
meanings.meaning_en: able to experience things through your senses
meanings.example: Man is a sentient being.
meanings.example_cn: 人是有感知力的生命。

meanings.example: The expected budget announcement today that meritorious teachers will be paid bonuses, based on NAPLAN test results and other criteria, is a step along the path.
meanings.example_cn: 现今基于教学评估计划测试的结果以及其他标准的预期的预算公告：有功的教师会奖以奖金，是走上轨道的一步。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有关的, 相干的, 中肯的
meanings.meaning_en: directly relating to something that is being considered
meanings.example: He asked me a lot of very pertinent questions .
meanings.example_cn: 他问了我许多直接相关的问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有关节的, 发音清晰的
meanings.meaning_en: writing or speech that is articulate is very clear and easy to understand even if the subject is difficult
meanings.example: bright, articulate 17-year-olds
meanings.example_cn: 聪明伶俐的17岁少年

meanings.meaning_cn: 有关声音的, 声学的, 音响学的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to sound and the way people hear things
shining in a soft gentle way
meanings.example: Her hair was beautifully dark and lustrous.
meanings.example_cn: 她的秀发乌黑光亮。

meanings.meaning_en: very harmful or evil, often in a way that you do not notice easily
meanings.example: the pernicious effects of poverty
meanings.example_cn: 贫穷的危害性

meanings.meaning_en: harmful or poisonous
meanings.example: noxious fumes
meanings.example_cn: 有毒烟雾

meanings.meaning_en: causing harm or damage
meanings.example: the detrimental effect of pollution on the environment
meanings.example_cn: 污染对环境的不利影响

meanings.meaning_en: expressing anger, hatred, or a wish to harm someone
meanings.example: a baleful look
meanings.example_cn: 恶狠狠的目光

meanings.meaning_cn: 有害的, 恶作剧的, 淘气的, 为害
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is mischievous likes to have fun, especially by playing tricks on people or doing things to annoy or embarrass them
meanings.example: Their sons are noisy and mischievous.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的几个儿子又吵又淘气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有害的, 使人苦恼的
meanings.meaning_en: evil or bad

meanings.example: noisome smells
meanings.example_cn: 令人生厌的气味

meanings.meaning_en: damaging or harmful
meanings.example: the deleterious effects of smoking
meanings.example_cn: 吸烟的害处

meanings.example: They are abstemious and abstain from most of the modern things that other English people, who are now rarely abstentious, enjoy.
meanings.example_cn: 他们生活节俭，有意避开其他英国人所享用的大部分现代产品。现代生活节俭的英国人实属罕见。

meanings.meaning_en: careful not to have too much food, drink etc
meanings.example: The Norwegian adolescents who said they regularly use alcohol and cigarettes were no more likely to report acne than those who were abstemious.
meanings.example_cn: 说自己长了青春痘的那些经常抽烟喝酒的挪威青少年并不比说自己长了青春痘的有节制的孩子们多。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有节制的, 适度的, 戒酒的, (气候)温和的
meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that is temperate is calm and sensible
meanings.example: The Nile Valley keeps a temperate climate throughout the year.
meanings.example_cn: 尼罗河流域全年气候温和。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有浸透性的, 能透过的
meanings.meaning_en: material that is permeable allows water, gas etc to pass through it
meanings.example: the permeable cell membrane
meanings.example_cn: 渗透性的细胞膜

meanings.meaning_cn: 有精神的, 快活的, 聪明的
meanings.meaning_en: lively; spirited; brisk

meanings.example: It's a very mannered, decorous language.
meanings.example_cn: 是一种非常礼貌且高雅的语言。

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe a person or their remarks or thoughts as perceptive, you think that they are good at noticing or realizing things, especially things that are not obvious
meanings.example: He was one of the most perceptive U.S. political commentators.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾是美国最具洞察力的政治评论员之一。

meanings.meaning_en: actions, reactions, decisions etc that are justifiable are acceptable because they are done for good reasons
meanings.example: justifiable anger
meanings.example_cn: 情有可原的愤怒

meanings.meaning_en: having a very powerful effect or influence on your body or mind
meanings.example: potent drugs
meanings.example_cn: 强效药物

meanings.meaning_en: a job or activity that is lucrative lets you earn a lot of money
meanings.example: Thousands of ex-army officers have found lucrative jobs in private security firms.
meanings.example_cn: 成千上万的退役军官在私人保安公司找到了薪水丰厚的工作。

meanings.meaning_en: an idea, remark etc that is germane to something is related to it in an important and suitable way
meanings.example: ...the suppression of a number of documents which were very germane to the case.
meanings.example_cn: ...对几份与本案密切相关的文件的隐瞒。

meanings.meaning_en: known and admired by a lot of people, especially for a special skill, achievement, or quality
meanings.example: The area is renowned for its Romanesque churches.
meanings.example_cn: 这个地区以其罗马式教堂闻名。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有名无实的, 有资格的, 有头衔的
meanings.meaning_en: A titular job or position has a name that makes it seem important, although the person who has it is not really powerful
meanings.example: He is titular head, and merely signs laws occasionally.
meanings.example_cn: 他是名义上的首长，仅是偶尔签署法律而已。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有木栅的, 隔绝的, 被禁止的
meanings.meaning_en: a barred window, gate etc has bars across it
meanings.example: red barred tail feathers
meanings.example_cn: 有红色条纹的尾羽

meanings.meaning_cn: 有倾向的, 有偏见的
meanings.meaning_en: a tendentious speech, remark, book etc expresses a strong opinion that is intended to influence people
meanings.example: His analysis was rooted in a somewhat tendentious reading of French history.
meanings.example_cn: 他的分析植根于对法国历史带有倾向性的解读。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有绒毛的, 模糊的, 失真的
meanings.meaning_en: if a sound or picture is fuzzy, it is unclear
meanings.example: Some of the photos were so fuzzy it was hard to tell who was who.
meanings.example_cn: 有些照片模糊不清，看不出谁是谁。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有事业心的, 有进取心的, 有魄力的, 有胆量的, 富有进取心
meanings.meaning_en: having the ability to think of new activities or ideas and make them work
meanings.example: Some enterprising students are designing software.
meanings.example_cn: 一些有创业精神的学生在设计软件。

meanings.meaning_en: if something that is said or written is pithy, it is intelligent and strongly stated, without wasting any words
meanings.example: Press releases must be short and pithy.
meanings.example_cn: 新闻稿务必言简意赅。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有条纹的, 有细条的, 有线纹的
meanings.meaning_en: having narrow lines or bands of colour
meanings.example: All striated wires are minus (–) in polarity, and should be connected to the minus (–) speaker terminals.
meanings.example_cn: 所有具有条纹线皮的电线都是负（-）极，须连接到负（-）的扬声器端子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有望的, 乐天的, 面色红润的, 血红色的, 满怀希望的, 指望的
meanings.meaning_en: happy and hopeful about the future
meanings.example: a sanguine view
meanings.example_cn: 乐观的态度

meanings.meaning_en: a man who is chivalrous behaves in a polite, kind, generous, and honourable way, especially towards women
meanings.example: He was handsome, upright, and chivalrous.
meanings.example_cn: 他英俊、正直、对女士彬彬有礼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有些粘的, 缺乏教养或风度的, 俗气的
meanings.example: tacky ornaments
meanings.example_cn: 粗制滥造的饰品

meanings.meaning_en: (of some plants and animals) having or reproducing by gemmae

meanings.meaning_cn: 有延展性的, 可锻的
meanings.meaning_en: something that is malleable is easy to press or pull into a new shape
meanings.example: malleable steel
meanings.example_cn: 展性钢

meanings.meaning_en: a salutary experience is unpleasant but teaches you something
meanings.example: One can only hope that the result will be an equally salutary debate.
meanings.example_cn: 我们只能希望这本书引发是一场同样有益的争论。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有益的, 受益的, [法律]有使用权的
meanings.meaning_en: having a good effect
meanings.example: a drug that has a beneficial effect on the immune system
meanings.example_cn: 有益于免疫系统的一种药物

meanings.example: His features were pretty yet, and his eye and complexion brighter than I remembered them, though with merely temporary lustre borrowed from the salubrious air and genial sun.
meanings.example_cn: 他的相貌挺好看，眼睛和气色也比我所记得的有精神些，虽然那仅仅是从有益健康的空气与和煦的阳光中借来的暂时的光辉。

meanings.meaning_en: careful and sensible in the way you plan things, especially by saving money for the future
Something that is restorative makes you feel healthier, stronger, or more cheerful after you have been feeling tired, weak, or miserable
meanings.example: She opened the door to her bedroom, thinking how restorative a hot bath would feel tonight.
meanings.example_cn: 她打开了卧室的门，想着今晚洗个热水澡将会是多么惬意的事啊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 幼稚的, 孩子气的, 未成熟的, 平庸的
meanings.meaning_en: silly and stupid
meanings.example: a puerile joke
meanings.example_cn: 幼稚的玩笑

meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a woman, who is seductive is sexually attractive
meanings.example: She used all of her seductive charm to try and persuade him.
meanings.example_cn: 她使出浑身魅力来说服他。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迂回的, 转弯抹角的
meanings.meaning_en: a roundabout way of saying something is not clear, direct, or simple
meanings.example: The bus took a very long and roundabout route .
meanings.example_cn: 公共汽车路线很长，绕着圈子走。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迂回的, 转弯抹角的
meanings.meaning_en: employing or involving periphrasis
going from one place to another in a way that is longer than the most direct way
meanings.example: a hard circuitous hike
meanings.example_cn: 一次艰难曲折的徒步旅行

meanings.meaning_en: relating to fishing or people who go fishing
meanings.example: In market economy moving mechanism falls, those who opened piscatorial resource development to use a climax is prelusive.
meanings.example_cn: 在市场经济运行机制下，揭开了渔业资源开发利用高潮的序幕。

meanings.meaning_en: happy and having no worries
meanings.example: a blithe disregard for the facts
meanings.example_cn: 对事实的漠视

meanings.meaning_cn: 愉快的, 美妙的, 悦耳的, <古> 美味的, 有香味的
meanings.example: Basil’s dulcet tones could be heard in the corridor.
meanings.example_cn: 巴兹尔那 “悦耳” 的嗓音在走廊里都听得见。

meanings.meaning_en: silly
meanings.example: a daft idea
meanings.example_cn: 傻主意

meanings.meaning_cn: 愚蠢的, 愚钝的, 呆笨的
愚昧的, 昏庸的, 发呆的, 愚笨的, 自满的
meanings.meaning_en: very silly or stupid
meanings.example: fatuous questions
meanings.example_cn: 愚昧的问题

meanings.meaning_cn: 愚勇的, 有勇无谋的
meanings.example: a foolhardy attempt to capture more territory
meanings.example_cn: 想占领更多地盘的鲁莽行为

meanings.meaning_cn: 与道德无关的, 超道德的
meanings.meaning_en: having no moral standards at all
meanings.example: a completely amoral person
meanings.example_cn: 毫无道德观念的人

meanings.meaning_en: relating to space or the universe
meanings.example: ...the cosmic laws governing our world.
meanings.example_cn: …主宰我们世界的宇宙法则。

meanings.meaning_cn: 羽毛丰满的, 快会飞的, 随时能飞的
雨的, 有雨的, 多雨的, 洪水的
meanings.meaning_en: of, characterized by, or due to the action of rain; rainy
meanings.example: pluvial insurance
Label contents are a mixture of static and dynamic content. Static content is multi-lingual.
meanings.example_cn: 标签内容包括静态内容和动态内容。 静态内容是多语言的。

meanings.meaning_en: bad-tempered, unhappy, and silent
meanings.example: Daniel seems very morose and gloomy.
meanings.example_cn: 丹尼尔好像闷闷不乐，情绪低落。

meanings.meaning_en: intended to prevent disease
meanings.example: prophylactic antibiotics
meanings.example_cn: 预防性抗生素

meanings.example: Finally, Milton has revised and undone the anticipatory logic of the great career narrative.
meanings.example_cn: 最终，弥尔顿完善了这份伟大职业的,预期的解说逻辑的框架。

meanings.meaning_en: You use prospective to describe someone who wants to be the thing mentioned or who is likely to be the thing mentioned
meanings.example: The story should act as a warning to other prospective buyers.
meanings.example_cn: 这篇报道应该可以对其他可能的购买者起到警告作用。

meanings.meaning_en: showing that something important is going to happen, especially something bad
meanings.example: Recent developments are as portentous as the collapse of the Berlin Wall.
meanings.example_cn: 最近的事态发展犹如柏林墙的倒塌，让人有一种山雨欲来风满楼的感觉。

meanings.meaning_en: a premeditated crime or attack is planned in advance and done deliberately
meanings.example: premeditated murder
meanings.example_cn: 预谋杀人

meanings.meaning_cn: 预兆的, 恶兆的, 不吉利的
meanings.meaning_en: making you feel that something bad is going to happen
meanings.example: ‘How long will she be ill?’ he asked. There was an ominous silence.
meanings.example_cn: “她的病多久会好？”他问。大家的沉默让人感觉不妙。

meanings.meaning_en: able to imagine or know what will happen in the future
meanings.example: ...an eerily prescient comedy about a populist multimillionaire political candidate.
meanings.example_cn: ...围绕一位身价数百万的民粹主义政治候选人的一部喜剧，其预见性近乎诡异。

meanings.meaning_cn: 遇热发光的, 白炽的
meanings.meaning_en: producing a bright light when heated
meanings.example: the invention of the incandescent lamp
meanings.example_cn: 白炽灯的发明

meanings.meaning_cn: 寓言中的, 寓言般的, 神话般的, 传统上的, 惊人的, 难以置信的

meanings.meaning_en: existing at the beginning of time or the beginning of the Earth
meanings.example: the primordial seas
meanings.example_cn: 原始海洋

meanings.meaning_en: very ancient
meanings.example: primeval forests
meanings.example_cn: 原始森林

meanings.meaning_cn: 原始的, 远古的, 粗糙的, 简单的
meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a simple way of life that existed in the past and does not have modern industries and machines
meanings.example: a primitive society
meanings.example_cn: 原始社会

meanings.meaning_en: sleek hair or fur is straight, shiny, and healthy-looking
meanings.example: ...sleek black hair.
meanings.example_cn: …乌黑光滑的头发。

meanings.meaning_cn: 圆胖的, 丰满的, 鼓起的
meanings.meaning_en: slightly fat in a fairly pleasant way – used especially about women or children, often to avoid saying the word ‘fat’
meanings.example: The nurse was a cheerful plump woman.
meanings.example_cn: 那护士是个性格开朗、体形丰满的女人。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone is rotund, they are round and fat
meanings.example: A rotund, smiling, red-faced gentleman appeared.
meanings.example_cn: 一位圆滚滚的，面带笑容的，脸色红润的绅士出现了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or living in the deep sea, far from shore
meanings.example: pelagic fish
meanings.example_cn: 深海鱼类

meanings.meaning_en: denoting or relating to euphony; pleasing to the ear
meanings.example: The sound of whistle is euphonious , emotional, and melodic.
meanings.example_cn: 口哨的音色悦耳动听，抒情性极强，极富歌唱性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 越出常轨的, 过度的
运转着的, 有效验的, 手术的, 实施的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to a medical operation
meanings.example: patients undergoing operative procedures
meanings.example_cn: 正在接受手术的病人

meanings.meaning_cn: 愠怒的, 沉沉不乐的, (天气等)阴沉的
meanings.meaning_en: angry and silent, especially because you feel life has been unfair to you
meanings.example: Bill sat in sullen silence and refused to eat his lunch.
meanings.example_cn: 比尔一声不响，闷闷不乐地坐着，不肯吃午饭。

meanings.meaning_en: covered with spots or coloured areas
meanings.example: His red, mottled face showed the effect of too much whisky.
meanings.example_cn: 他那张红红的、满是斑点的脸表明，他威士忌喝得太多了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 杂色的, 斑驳的, 多样化的
meanings.meaning_en: a variegated plant, leaf etc has different coloured marks on it
meanings.example: variegated grasses
meanings.example_cn: 杂色的草

meanings.meaning_cn: 杂色的, 五颜六色的, 穿染色衣的, 混杂的
meanings.meaning_en: You can describe a group of things as a motley collection if you think they seem strange together because they are all very different
meanings.example: ...a motley collection of vans, old buses, cattle trucks, and even a fire engine.
meanings.example_cn: ...杂七杂八的一堆车，有运货车、旧公共汽车、运牛卡车，甚至有一辆消防车。

meanings.meaning_cn: 杂食的, 什么都吃的, 什么都读的, 随手乱拿的
meanings.meaning_en: interested in everything, especially in all books
meanings.example: an omnivorous reader
meanings.example_cn: 兴趣广泛的读者

meanings.meaning_cn: 仔细的, 谨慎的, 吝啬的
meanings.meaning_en: unwilling to risk doing something
meanings.example: I am chary of making too many idiotic mistakes.
meanings.example_cn: 我小心谨慎以免犯太多的愚蠢错误。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在那边的, 较远的, 将来的, 隐蔽的
meanings.example: He’s just being nice. I don’t think he has any ulterior motives.
meanings.example_cn: 他就是好心，我不认为他别有用心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在天下面的, 尘世的
meanings.meaning_en: beneath the heavens; terrestrial
the leeward side of something is the side that is sheltered from the wind
meanings.example: We camped on the leeward side of the mountain.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在山上背风的一面扎营。

meanings.meaning_cn: 暂时的, 临时的, 临时性
meanings.meaning_en: continuing for only a limited period of time
meanings.example: temporary pain relief
meanings.example_cn: 疼痛的暂时缓解

meanings.meaning_en: expressing praise
meanings.example: a laudatory biography
meanings.example_cn: 颂扬有加的传记

meanings.meaning_cn: 早产的, 流产的, 失败的
meanings.meaning_en: an abortive action is not successful
meanings.example: an abortive military coup
meanings.example_cn: 一场未遂的军事政变

meanings.meaning_en: a precocious child shows intelligence or skill at a very young age, or behaves in an adult way – sometimes used to show disapproval in British English
meanings.example: a precocious child who walked and talked early
meanings.example_cn: 走路和说话都早的早熟儿童

meanings.meaning_cn: 造反的, 反叛的, 反抗的, 难于对付的
meanings.meaning_en: deliberately not obeying people in authority or rules of behaviour
meanings.example: rebellious teenagers
meanings.example_cn: 叛逆的青少年

meanings.meaning_en: full of angry and cruel criticism
meanings.example: vituperative comments
meanings.example_cn: 谩骂性的评论

meanings.meaning_cn: 轧轧响的, 刺耳的, 尖锐的
meanings.meaning_en: a strident sound or voice is loud and unpleasant
meanings.example: the strident calls of seagulls
meanings.example_cn: 海鸥尖厉的叫声

meanings.meaning_en: made of or covered with a substance that sticks to surfaces
meanings.example: There’s some sticky stuff in your hair.
meanings.example_cn: 你的头发上有什么黏糊糊的东西。

meanings.meaning_cn: 粘糊糊的, (分泌)粘液的, 泥泞的
meanings.meaning_en: covered with  slime  , or wet and slippery like slime
meanings.example: slimy mud
meanings.example_cn: 黏糊糊的泥巴

meanings.meaning_en: very sticky
meanings.example: glutinous mud
meanings.example_cn: 黏性泥

meanings.meaning_cn: 粘性的, 粘滞的, 胶粘的
meanings.meaning_en: a viscous liquid is thick and sticky and does not flow easily
meanings.example: As the liquid cools, it becomes viscous.
meanings.example_cn: 这液体冷却后会变黏稠。

meanings.meaning_cn: 粘在一起的, 一致的, 连贯的
meanings.meaning_en: if a piece of writing, set of ideas etc is coherent, it is easy to understand because it is clear and reasonable
meanings.example: The three years of the course are planned as a coherent whole.
meanings.example_cn: 这三年的课程是作为连贯的整体来安排的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 占优势的, 主要的, 流行的
meanings.meaning_en: existing or accepted in a particular place or at a particular time
meanings.example: The prevailing mood of public opinion remained hostile.
meanings.example_cn: 公众仍普遍持敌对情绪。

meanings.meaning_cn: 照亮的, 启蒙的, 照明的
meanings.example: a very illuminating book

meanings.example_cn: 他们发现的是一种脂肪，名为褐色脂肪组织，在身体遇到寒冷时燃烧能量方面发挥了非常显著的作用。

meanings.meaning_en: an intuitive idea is based on a feeling rather than on knowledge or facts

meanings.example: Walking through the alleys of this venerable water town, one cannot fail to appreciate its pristine and intoxicating atmosphere.

pleased with a situation, especially something you have achieved, so that you stop trying to improve or change things – used to show disapproval

meanings.example_cn: 赢了几场比赛可能就会变得沾沾自喜。

meanings.example_cn: 全球化将使政治边缘化在过去曾被当作不言自明的真理。

meanings.meaning_cn: 自信的, 得意洋洋的

meanings.meaning_cn: 自由的, 闲散的, 空闲的

meanings.example_cn: 感到沮丧或与家人有隔阂的青少年

meanings.meaning_cn: 自由自在的, 到处走动的

meanings.example: Such initiatives require leadership, learning by doing and the ability to think and plan in an integrative manner.
meanings.example_cn: 这样的措施需要领导能力、边学边做、思考的能力和一个综合性的计划方式。

meanings.meaning_en: clearly wrong and unacceptable

meanings.example_cn: 该公司犯了重大的失职罪。

meanings.meaning_en: an incendiary speech, piece of writing etc is intended to make people angry

meanings.meaning_cn: 足以使人晕倒的, 极好的

meanings.example_cn: 她55岁，仍是个极美的女人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 阻碍的, 令人丧气的, 使困惑的, 令人莫名其妙的, 变幻的, 不可理解的
嘴不干净的, 无礼的, 粗野的, 该骂的, 可耻的
最底下的, 最下面的
meanings.meaning_en: farthest down; lowest
meanings.example: Grandson Chu saw shelf's nethermost film, the wry smile wrote to shake to shake head and wished this store owner also enough bold.
meanings.example_cn: 孙子楚看到了货架最底下的片子，苦笑着摇了摇头，心想这店老板也够大胆的。

meanings.meaning_en: excellent

meanings.meaning_cn: 最高天的, 苍天的, 九天的
最后的, 最终的, 根本的
meanings.meaning_en: someone’s ultimate aim is their main and most important aim, that they hope to achieve in the future

meanings.example_cn: 试验的最后结果无法预测。

meanings.meaning_en: nearest in time, order, or family relationship

meanings.example_cn: 但是，这个假说是最接近的解释，并且与我们重点阐述的最终结论完美地吻合。

meanings.meaning_en: more important than anything else

meanings.example_cn: 高于一切的重要问题

meanings.meaning_en: very drunk

meanings.meaning_en: showing a lot of respect and admiration

meanings.meaning_en: to walk, ride etc next to each other, all facing the same way

meanings.example_cn: 那辆车追上来与杰克并行时，他一下子就认出了驾车的人。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely
