meanings.meaning_cn: (破坏力极大的)巨型炸弹, 一鸣惊人者
meanings.example: the latest Hollywood blockbuster
meanings.example_cn: 好莱坞最新大片

meanings.example: There is also reason to think that our penchant for makingunhealthy choices might be enhanced by the abundance of particularfoods.
meanings.example_cn: 我们也有理由认为，我们做出不健康选择的倾向，也许被大量特定食物加强了。

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow crack in the surface of something, especially in rock
meanings.example: small creatures that hide in crevices in the rock
meanings.example_cn: 藏在岩石缝里的小生物

meanings.meaning_en: a space in the wall of a room, especially for shelves, cupboards etc
meanings.example: the deep recesses of the cave
meanings.example_cn: 洞穴的幽深处

meanings.meaning_en: a situation when you are almost in a new situation, usually a bad one
meanings.example: Their economy is teetering on the brink of collapse.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的经济正摇摆于崩溃的边缘。

meanings.meaning_cn: (全套)马具, 系在身上的绳子, 甲胄
meanings.meaning_en: a set of leather bands used to control a horse or to attach it to a vehicle it is pulling
meanings.example: a safety harness
meanings.example_cn: 安全带

meanings.meaning_cn: (犬, 狼等的)尖牙, 犬牙, (毒蛇的)毒牙, 牙根, 尖端
meanings.meaning_en: a long sharp tooth of an animal such as a snake or wild dog
meanings.example: The cobra sank its venomous fangs into his hand.
meanings.example_cn: 眼镜蛇将毒牙咬进他的手。

meanings.meaning_cn: （日月周围的）晕轮, 光环, 荣光
meanings.meaning_en: a bright circle that is often shown above or around the heads of holy people in religious art
a place with water and trees in a desert
meanings.example: The immaculately tended gardens are an oasis in the midst of Cairo's urban sprawl.
meanings.example_cn: 那些打理得非常整洁的花园是杂乱扩张的开罗市区中的一片绿洲。

meanings.meaning_cn: (商店等的)出纳员, (银行或公司的)司库
meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to receive or pay out money in a shop

meanings.meaning_cn: (蛇的)毒液, 恶意, 怨恨
meanings.meaning_en: great anger or hatred
meanings.example: There was real venom in her voice.
meanings.example_cn: 她的声音非常凶狠。

meanings.meaning_en: A morsel is a very small amount of something, especially a very small piece of food
meanings.example: ...a delicious little morsel of meat.
meanings.example_cn: …一丁点儿好吃的肉。

meanings.meaning_cn: (书面)命令, 训令, 要求, (前国际联盟的)委任托管权
meanings.meaning_en: if a government or official has a mandate to make important decisions, they have the authority to make the decisions because they have been elected by the people to do so
meanings.example: Matters debated in meetings do not become a mandate automatically.
meanings.example_cn: 会议上讨论的事宜并不能自动成为一项指令。

meanings.meaning_cn: (束马鞍用的)肚带, <俗>紧握, <俚>容易做的, 有把握的事情
meanings.meaning_en: something that is very easy
meanings.example: ‘How was the exam?’ ‘Oh, it was a cinch!’
meanings.example_cn: “考试怎么样？”“噢，容易得很！”

meanings.meaning_en: the soft inside part of a fruit or vegetable
meanings.example: Halve the melon and scoop out the pulp.
meanings.example_cn: 把瓜切成两半，挖出瓜瓤。

meanings.meaning_en: a rope with one end tied in a circle, used to catch cattle and horses, especially in the western US
meanings.example: As an engineer, I liked the look of the lasso idea and bought one.
meanings.example_cn: 作为一名工程师，我非常喜欢这个套索的创意和外形，所以立刻就买了一个。

meanings.meaning_cn: （藤本植物的）棚架, 藤架, 绿廊, 凉棚
meanings.meaning_en: a structure made of posts built for plants to grow over in a garden

meanings.meaning_cn: (通常指孵出后不到一年的)小母鸡
meanings.meaning_en: a young chicken that is in its first year of laying eggs
meanings.example: Better an egg today than a pullet .
meanings.example_cn: 今天一个鸡蛋，胜过明天一只小母鸡。

meanings.meaning_cn: (头衔,财产权利等的)剥夺, 脱衣
(涂油漆, 涂药等)抹刀, 压舌板
meanings.meaning_en: a kitchen tool with a wide flat blade, used for spreading, mixing, or lifting soft substances
meanings.example: Spoon the batter into the prepared pan, smoothing over the top with a spatula.
meanings.example_cn: 用勺子把面糊放进准备好的平底锅，用抹刀把顶层涂平。

meanings.meaning_cn: (土地等的)使用和占有, (官职等的)保有, 任期, (土地)使用期限
meanings.meaning_en: the period of time when someone has an important job
meanings.example: The company has doubled in value during his tenure.
meanings.example_cn: 在他的任期内，公司的市值翻了一番。

meanings.meaning_cn: (为查明死因而做的)尸体解剖, 验尸
meanings.meaning_en: an examination of a dead body to discover the cause of death
meanings.example: an autopsy report
meanings.example_cn: 验尸报告

meanings.meaning_cn: (为某种思想, 宗教, 哲学等)辩解, 道歉
meanings.meaning_en: something that you say or write to show that you are sorry for doing something wrong
meanings.example: Edward can’t be here today, but he sends his apologies .
meanings.example_cn: 爱德华今天来不了，他向大家表示歉意。

meanings.meaning_cn: (未满一岁的)小鹿, 小山羊, 小动物, 鹿毛色, 浅黄褐色
meanings.meaning_en: a young  deer
meanings.example: The fawn ran to the top of the ridge.
meanings.example_cn: 那只小鹿跑上山脊。

meanings.example: Between films he often winds up spending every single morning on his psychiatrist's couch.
meanings.example_cn: 在拍电影的间隔期间，他经常是在心理医生的诊察台上度过每一个早晨。

meanings.meaning_cn: (戏剧, 故事, 小说中的)主角, 领导者, 积极参加者
meanings.meaning_en: one of the most important people taking part in a competition, battle, or struggle
meanings.example: the main protagonists in the conflict
meanings.example_cn: 主要的冲突方

meanings.meaning_cn: (戏剧的)最后一场, 结局, 终了, 最后的一个乐章, 终曲
meanings.meaning_en: the last part of a piece of music or of a show, event etc
meanings.example: the finale of a Broadway show
meanings.example_cn: 一出百老汇表演的终场

meanings.meaning_cn: （细）磨（刀）石, 油石, [方言]抱怨, 想念
meanings.meaning_en: a fine whetstone, esp for sharpening razors

meanings.meaning_cn: （相传冬至时能使海平面平静的）翠鸟

meanings.meaning_en: a thick almost solid mass formed when blood or milk dries
meanings.example: He developed a blood clot on his brain and died.
meanings.example_cn: 他脑部出现血凝块，之后死亡。

meanings.meaning_cn: （演讲的）结束语, 演讲高谈阔论
meanings.meaning_en: the last part of a speech, in which the main points are repeated

meanings.meaning_cn: (要人的一批)随行人员, 扈从
meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who travel with someone important to help and support them
meanings.example: Mind trainers are now part of a tennis star's retinue.
meanings.example_cn: 如今，网球明星的随行人员中有些是心理培训师。

meanings.meaning_en: a long loosely wound piece of thread, wool, or  yarn
meanings.example: a skein of lies
meanings.example_cn: 一连串谎言

meanings.meaning_cn: (艺术品的)鉴赏家, 鉴定家, 内行
meanings.meaning_en: someone who knows a lot about something such as art, food, or music
meanings.example: a wine connoisseur
meanings.example_cn: 品酒专家

meanings.meaning_cn: (音乐)速度、拍子, 发展速度
meanings.meaning_en: the speed at which music is played or should be played
meanings.example: ...owing to the slow tempo of change in an overwhelmingly rural country.
meanings.example_cn: …由于一个高度农业化国家变革的缓慢速度。

meanings.meaning_cn: (硬壳果)仁, (去壳的)麦粒, 谷粒, (事物、问题的)核心, 要点, 精髓, 内核
meanings.meaning_en: the part of a nut or seed inside the shell, or the part inside the stone of some fruits
meanings.example: The kernel of that message was that peace must not be a source of advantage or disadvantage for anyone.
meanings.example_cn: 那一信息的核心是和平绝不应该成为对任何人有利或不利的根源。

meanings.meaning_cn: (用鞭)快速的轻打, 轻打声, 弹开
meanings.meaning_en: a short quick sudden movement or hit with a part of your body, whip etc
meanings.example: With a flick of the wrist , Frye sent the ball into the opposite court.
meanings.example_cn: 弗赖伊手腕一甩，把球送到了对方半场。

meanings.meaning_cn: (用复数)营业收入, 取得, 捕获
（尤指）方言, 行话, 隐语
meanings.meaning_en: a language, especially a foreign one
meanings.example: I’d like to go to Greece, but I don’t speak the lingo.
meanings.example_cn: 我想去希腊，可我不会说希腊语。

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指不寻常的人或事)出现, 到来
meanings.meaning_en: the time when something first begins to be widely used
meanings.example: the advent of the computer
meanings.example_cn: 计算机的问世

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指出生不满一个月的)婴儿
meanings.meaning_en: a newborn child, esp in the first week of life and up to four weeks old
meanings.example: “Full, unabashed, total irradiation of a neonate,” Dr. Sclafani said, adding, “This poor, defenseless baby.
meanings.example_cn: “对初生婴儿过量的毫不在乎的辐射，”Sclafani医生说，又接着说，“这些可怜的毫无防护能力的婴儿。”

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指道德或精神方面的)教诲, 启迪, 熏陶
meanings.meaning_en: If something is done for your edification, it is done to benefit you in some way, for example by teaching you about something
meanings.example: Demonstrations, films, and videotapes are shown for your edification.
meanings.example_cn: 做这些示范和播放这些电影与录像带是为了启发你们。

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指对反政府政治犯的)特赦
meanings.meaning_en: an official order by a government that allows a particular group of prisoners to go free
meanings.example: Activists who were involved in crimes of violence will not automatically be granted amnesty.
meanings.example_cn: 参与暴力犯罪的活跃分子不会被自动地给予赦免。

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指法律上的)无效, 无效的行为, 无效的证书
meanings.example: a decree of nullity
meanings.example_cn: 无效判决

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指国际性或全国性的)少年团体大会,喧闹的娱乐会,狂欢活动
meanings.meaning_en: a big noisy party or event

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指沙俄时对犹太人的) 大屠杀
meanings.meaning_en: a planned killing of large numbers of people, usually done for reasons of race or religion
meanings.example: Street-fighting in Osh, the largest city in southern Kyrgyzstan, between ethnic Kyrgyz and minority Uzbeks escalated rapidly into a pogrom.
meanings.example_cn: 在吉尔吉斯斯坦南部第一大城市奥什市，吉尔吉斯族和乌兹别克族的街头冲突迅速升级成为一场大屠杀。

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指沿山崖筑出视界开阔的)滨海路(亦作corniche road)
meanings.meaning_en: a road built along a coast
a small arrangement of flowers
meanings.example: The candlestick was in the form of an angel holding a nosegay, in the centre of which the wax taper was to be placed.
meanings.example_cn: 它的形状是一个抱着花束的安琪儿；而蜡烛就插在这个花束的中央。 这烛台在一张绿色的写字台上佔了一个地位。

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指在战场上的)残杀, 大屠杀, 流血
meanings.meaning_en: when a lot of people are killed and injured, especially in a war
meanings.example: a scene of terrible carnage
meanings.example_cn: 可怕的大屠杀场面

meanings.meaning_en: a hill made of sand near the sea or in the desert
meanings.example: Large dunes make access to the beach difficult in places.
meanings.example_cn: 在有些地方大沙丘使得靠近海滩很难。

meanings.meaning_cn: (由黄麻制的做麻袋等用的)粗麻布
meanings.meaning_en: a type of thick rough cloth

meanings.meaning_cn: (有关一个题目或一个人的)书目, 参考书目
meanings.meaning_en: a list of all the books and articles used in preparing a piece of writing
meanings.example: At the end of this chapter there is a select bibliography of useful books.
meanings.example_cn: 本章末尾附着有用书籍的精选书目。

meanings.meaning_cn: (有条件的)投降, 投降条约
meanings.meaning_en: the act of capitulating

meanings.meaning_cn: (鱼等的)卵, (植物)菌丝, 产物
meanings.meaning_en: Spawn is a soft, jelly-like substance containing the eggs of fish, or of animals such as frogs
meanings.example: ...her passion for collecting frog spawn.
meanings.example_cn: ...她对采蛙卵的热爱。

meanings.meaning_cn: (暂时的)精神狂乱, 精神错乱, 说谵语状态, 狂语, 精神极度兴奋
meanings.meaning_en: extreme excitement
meanings.example: Before she died she had fits of delirium.
meanings.example_cn: 去世前她一阵阵地胡言乱语。

meanings.meaning_cn: (政党的)领导人秘密会议, 核心小组会议
meanings.meaning_en: a meeting of the members of a political party to choose people to represent them in a larger meeting, election etc
meanings.example: the chairman of the Congressional Black Caucus
meanings.example_cn: 国会黑人议员同盟的主席

meanings.meaning_cn: (政府机关等的)腐败行为, 渎职, 贪污, 盗用
(政治组织等的)分裂, 教派
meanings.meaning_en: the separation of a group into two groups, caused by a disagreement about its aims and beliefs, especially in the Christian church
meanings.example: The church seems to be on the brink of schism.
meanings.example_cn: 该教会看来处于分裂的边缘。

meanings.meaning_cn: (织品的)质地, (木材, 岩石等的)纹理, (皮肤)肌理, (文艺作品)结构
meanings.meaning_en: The texture of something, especially food or soil, is its structure, for example, whether it is light with lots of holes, or very heavy and solid
meanings.example: Matured over 18 months, this cheese has an open, crumbly texture with a strong flavour.
meanings.example_cn: 这种奶酪18个月后发酵成熟，气孔多，组织松脆，味道浓郁。

meanings.meaning_cn: (职位、数量、质量等)不一致, 不同, 不等
meanings.meaning_en: a difference between two or more things, especially an unfair one

meanings.meaning_cn: (植物的)木髓, 骨髓, 重要部分, 核心, 意义, 精华, 精力
meanings.meaning_en: a soft white substance that fills the stems of some plants

meanings.example: They tested two types of mucilage — a gelatinous substance produced by the cactus — in contaminated water.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在被污染的水中测试了两种粘液——仙人掌分泌的胶状物质。

meanings.meaning_cn: (植物的)皮层, 树皮, (脑或肾的)皮层, 皮质
meanings.meaning_en: the outer layer of an organ in your body, especially your brain
meanings.example: ...the cerebral cortex.
meanings.example_cn: ...大脑皮层。

meanings.meaning_cn: (止痛或疗伤的)香油, 香膏, 安慰物
meanings.meaning_en: something that gives you comfort
meanings.example: lip balm
meanings.example_cn: 润唇膏

meanings.meaning_en: a steward of the household of a medieval prince or nobleman who took charge of domestic arrangements, etc
meanings.example: Only he, as seneschal, was granted that privilege, particularly while the master lay ill.
meanings.example_cn: 只有他，作为总管，赋有这特权，特别是当总领病卧在床。

meanings.meaning_cn: (准备好演出的)节目, 保留剧目, (计算机的)指令表, 指令系统, <美>(某个人的)全部技能
meanings.meaning_en: all the plays, pieces of music etc that a performer or group knows and can perform
meanings.example: the behavioural repertoire of infants
meanings.example_cn: 婴幼儿的行为能力

meanings.meaning_cn: (宗教)禁忌、避讳, 禁止接近, 禁止使用
meanings.meaning_en: a custom that says you must avoid a particular activity or subject, either because it is considered offensive or because your religion does not allow it
meanings.example: The topic of addiction remains something of a taboo in our family.
meanings.example_cn: 毒瘾在我们家依然是个有些忌讳的话题。

meanings.meaning_cn: (走钢丝的)杂技演员, 随机应变者, 翻云覆雨者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who entertains people by doing difficult physical actions such as walking on their hands or balancing on a high rope, especially at a  circus

meanings.meaning_cn: (阻碍通道的)障碍物, 栅栏, 屏障
meanings.meaning_en: a rule, problem etc that prevents people from doing something, or limits what they can do
meanings.example: He advocated the removal of trade barriers.
meanings.example_cn: 他提倡消除贸易壁垒。

meanings.example: Millions of people have received amalgam fillings, although their popularity has dropped off in recent years.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然近几年他们的普及程度有所减少，还是有数百万的人使用了汞合金填充物。

meanings.meaning_cn: [常用复]脚镣, 羁绊, 束缚

meanings.meaning_en: a sharp piece of broken glass, metal etc
meanings.example: Eyewitnesses spoke of rocks and shards of glass flying in the air.
meanings.example_cn: 目击者们提到了在空中飞舞的石子和玻璃碎片。

meanings.meaning_cn: [地] 地层, [生](组织的)层, 社会阶层
meanings.meaning_en: a layer of rock or earth
meanings.example: people of different social strata
meanings.example_cn: 各个社会阶层的人

meanings.meaning_en: very soft mud, especially at the bottom of a lake or sea
a sudden fall of a lot of earth or rocks down a hill, cliff etc
meanings.example: He won last month's presidential election by a landslide.
meanings.example_cn: 他以绝对优势赢得了上个月的总统选举。

meanings.meaning_cn: [地]台地, 岩石台地, 平顶山
meanings.meaning_en: a hill with a flat top and steep sides, in the southwestern US
an upward slope, esp of the ground
meanings.example: As soon as we descend down the slope of sadness, we accelerate over the ever-feel-good acclivity of happiness.
meanings.example_cn: 一旦我们从痛苦的斜坡滑下去，我们就加速开始有快乐的感觉。

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the composition, origin, structure, and formation of rocks
meanings.example: Alkaline rocks from the Three Rivers region are characterized by unique geology, petrology and Petrochemistry.
meanings.example_cn: 三江地区的碱性岩有其独特的地质、岩石学与岩石化学特征；

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth soft rock which breaks easily into thin flat pieces
a narrow piece of land with water on both sides, that connects two larger areas of land
meanings.example: the Isthmus of Panama
meanings.example_cn: 巴拿马地峡

meanings.meaning_en: any coarse-grained metamorphic rock that is banded and foliated: represents the last stage in the metamorphism of rocks before melting
meanings.example: Baby, you're so gneiss I'll never take you for granite.
meanings.example_cn: 宝贝，你是如此的片麻岩，我永远不会把你当花岗岩的。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a  battery  that collects  electron s  , often a wire or piece of metal with the sign (+)
meanings.example: So the left electrode will be the cathode as I have configured it, and the right electrode will be anode.
meanings.example_cn: 因此左边电极就成了阴极,正如我原来设定的一样，右边的电极就是阳极。

meanings.meaning_cn: [动] 蚝卵, 口角, 掌击
meanings.meaning_en: a larval oyster or similar bivalve mollusc, esp when it settles to the sea bottom and starts to develop a shell
a small American animal similar to a  squirrel  with black lines on its fur
meanings.example: The boy stood motionless, like a mouse or a chipmunk when it knows you're watching.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩一动不动站着，好像一只老鼠或花栗鼠知道有人在盯着它一样。

meanings.meaning_cn: [动] 鸥, 易受骗之人, 笨人
meanings.meaning_en: a large common black and white sea bird that lives near the sea

meanings.meaning_cn: [动](=roe deer)狍(分布于欧亚两洲), (3岁以上的)雌鹿, (还在雌鱼卵巢中的)鱼卵, (充满精液的)雄鱼生殖腺, (木材纵剖面的)鱼卵形黑色斑纹
meanings.meaning_en: fish eggs eaten as a food
meanings.example: ...cod's roe.
meanings.example_cn: ...鳕鱼子。

meanings.meaning_en: a bird that kills and eats other animals and can be trained to hunt
meanings.example: Animals representing mythical powers and military might surrounded him—pumas, a wolf, eagles, a falcon, an owl, and rattlesnakes—some buried alive in cages.
meanings.example_cn: 一些动物作为神和军事的力量的象征置放在他的周围——美洲狮、狼、鹰、隼、猫头鹰、响尾蛇——装在笼子里一起活埋。

meanings.meaning_cn: [动]臭鼬, 臭鼬皮, 讨厌鬼
meanings.meaning_en: a small black and white North American animal that produces a strong unpleasant smell if it is attacked or afraid
a large tropical snake that kills animals for food by winding itself around them and crushing them

meanings.meaning_cn: [天]（日蚀、月蚀或太阳黑子的）半影
meanings.meaning_en: an area of slight darkness
the point in its orbit around the earth when the moon or an artificial satellite is nearest the earth
meanings.example: If this is an ellipse around the Earth, then this would be perigee and this would be apogee.
meanings.example_cn: 如果这是一个围绕,地球的椭圆形轨道,那么这是近地点，这是远地点。

meanings.meaning_cn: [天]星群, 星座, 灿烂的一群
meanings.meaning_en: a group of stars that forms a particular pattern and has a name
meanings.example: a star in the constellation of Orion
meanings.example_cn: 猎户座的一颗恒星

meanings.meaning_cn: [天主教]安灵祢撒, 安灵曲, 挽歌, 悲歌
meanings.meaning_en: a Christian ceremony in which prayers are said for someone who has died
meanings.example: ...a performance of Verdi's Requiem.
meanings.example_cn: ...一场威尔第的《安魂曲》的演奏。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you must do to show that you are sorry for something you have done wrong, especially in some religions
meanings.example: ...a time of fasting, penance, and pilgrimage.
meanings.example_cn: ...斋戒、赎罪和朝圣的一个时代。

meanings.meaning_cn: [微]病毒, 滤过性微生物, 毒害, 恶毒
meanings.meaning_en: a very small living thing that causes infectious illnesses
meanings.example: children infected with the Aids virus
meanings.example_cn: 感染艾滋病病毒的儿童

meanings.meaning_en: advice, criticism etc about how successful or useful something is
meanings.example: How can I provide feedback without making someone angry?
meanings.example_cn: 我怎样才能提出反馈意见又不会得罪人呢？

meanings.meaning_cn: [物](射线的) 轨道, 弹道, 轨线
meanings.meaning_en: the curved path of an object that has been fired or thrown through the air
meanings.example: The decision was certain to affect the trajectory of French politics for some time to come.
meanings.example_cn: 这一决定在未来的一段时间里必将影响法国的政治轨迹。

meanings.meaning_cn: [物]偏振(现象),极化(作用),两极化,分化
[希神] 神酒, 任何美味的饮料, 花蜜, 甘露
meanings.meaning_en: the sweet liquid that bees collect from flowers

meanings.meaning_cn: [希神][罗神]居于山林水泽的仙女, 美丽的少女
meanings.meaning_en: one of the spirits of nature who, according to ancient Greek and Roman stories, appeared as young girls living in trees, mountains, streams etc

meanings.meaning_cn: [希神]哺乳宙斯的羊角, 满装花果象征丰饶的羊角(通常用于绘画或雕刻中), 丰富, 丰饶
meanings.meaning_en: a container in the shape of an animal’s horn, full of fruit and flowers, used to represent a time when there are large supplies of food
meanings.example: ...a table festooned with a cornucopia of fruit.
meanings.example_cn: ...一张摆满各色水果的桌子。

meanings.meaning_cn: [希神]门特(良师益友), 贤明的顾问, 导师, 指导者
meanings.meaning_en: an experienced person who advises and helps a less experienced person
meanings.example: Leon Sullivan was my mentor and my friend.
meanings.example_cn: 利昂·沙利文既是我的导师，也是我的朋友。

meanings.meaning_cn: [希神]狮头, 羊身, 蛇尾的吐火怪物, 妖怪, 狂想
meanings.meaning_en: A chimera is an unrealistic idea that you have about something or a hope that you have that is unlikely to be fulfilled
meanings.example: Religious unity remained as much a chimera as ever.
meanings.example_cn: 宗教统一仍旧是一通幻想。

meanings.meaning_cn: [希神]羊皮盾, 保护, 庇护, 支持
meanings.example: a refugee camp operating under the aegis of the UN
meanings.example_cn: 在联合国保护下的一座难民营

meanings.meaning_en: a serious mental illness in which someone’s thoughts and feelings are not based on what is really happening around them
meanings.example: People with autism or with schizophrenia find it hard to do that – and they respond less to yawns than do most of us.
meanings.example_cn: 患有自闭症或精神分裂症的人很难做到这一点——他们对打哈欠的反应比我们大多数人都少。

meanings.meaning_en: a mental illness that makes someone believe that they are very important and that people hate them and are trying to harm them
meanings.example: They capitalize on panic and paranoia.
meanings.example_cn: 他们利用恐慌和偏执狂。

meanings.meaning_cn: [心]自我中心主义, 孤独症
meanings.meaning_en: a mental  disorder (=  problem  )  that makes people unable to communicate properly, or to form relationships
a way of describing something by saying it is much bigger, smaller, worse etc than it actually is
meanings.example: It was not hyperbole to call it the worst storm in twenty years.
meanings.example_cn: 称它是20年来最大的风暴并不为过。

meanings.meaning_cn: [修辞]明喻, 明喻的说法, 明喻的词语用法
meanings.meaning_en: an expression that describes something by comparing it with something else, using the words ‘as’ or ‘like’, for example ‘as white as snow’
meanings.example: Lister said people should follow the 1946 advice of writer George Orwell: "Never use a metaphor, simile, or other figure of speech which you are used to seeing in print.
meanings.example_cn: 李斯特说人们最好遵循作家乔治·奥威尔1946年提出的建议：“不要使用那些在各种出版物上频繁出现的暗喻、明喻或其他修辞格。”

meanings.meaning_cn: [修辞]隐喻, 暗喻, 比喻说话
meanings.meaning_en: a way of describing something by referring to it as something different and suggesting that it has similar qualities to that thing
meanings.example: She uses some wonderful images and metaphors in her writing.
meanings.example_cn: 她在作品中用了一些绝妙的比喻和暗喻。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious illness that affects your lungs and makes it difficult for you to breathe
meanings.example: She was taken to hospital, suffering from pneumonia.
meanings.example_cn: 她得了肺炎，被送往医院。

meanings.meaning_en: an illness which makes talking difficult because your larynx and throat are swollen
meanings.example: At the moment, there is no reliable means to confirm reflux of gastric juice in patients with suspected reflux laryngitis .
meanings.example_cn: 现在还没有可靠的方法来证实可疑的返流性喉炎患者中存在胃液返流现象。

meanings.meaning_en: a condition that makes it difficult for someone to read and spell
meanings.example: Some children with dyslexia might only have one of these symptoms.
meanings.example_cn: 有的诵读困难者可能只表现出其中的一种症状。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious disease in which there is too much sugar in your blood
meanings.example: You have diabetes, or liver or kidney disease.
meanings.example_cn: 有糖尿病，或者是有肝病或肾病者。

meanings.meaning_en: an injury
meanings.example: the hospital’s trauma unit
meanings.example_cn: 医院的创伤科

meanings.meaning_en: an offensive word for someone who is extremely stupid
meanings.example: No new young cretin has been found during or since the initiation of the Emergency Response Plan in 2007.
meanings.example_cn: 自从2007年紧急反应计划实施以来，还没有发现新的年轻白痴病患者。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you eat or drink in order to make yourself vomit(= bring up food from your stomach )

meanings.meaning_cn: [医]导泻(尤指通便), 泻法, [精神病](精神或心理)疏泄, 宣泄
meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of removing strong or violent emotions by expressing them through writing, talking, acting etc
meanings.example: Music is a means of catharsis for me.
meanings.example_cn: 音乐是我宣泄情感的一种途径。

meanings.meaning_cn: [医]颠狂, 狂躁, 癖好, 狂热
meanings.meaning_en: a strong desire for something or interest in something, especially one that affects a lot of people at the same time
meanings.example: The mania for dinosaurs began in the late 1800s.
meanings.example_cn: 恐龙热兴起于19世纪晚期。

meanings.meaning_en: the orthodox medical method of treating disease, by inducing a condition different from or opposed to the cause of the disease
meanings.example: One who practices or advocates allopathy.
meanings.example_cn: 属于、关于或实施对抗疗法的。

meanings.meaning_cn: [医]恶疾, 萎靡不振, 极瘦弱, 萎靡不振
[医]缝合, 缝合处, 缝合用的线
meanings.meaning_en: A suture is a stitch made to join together the open parts of a wound, especially one made after a patient has been operated on
meanings.example: It's suture.
meanings.example_cn: 那是缝合线。

meanings.meaning_en: Hepatitis is a serious disease which affects the liver
meanings.example: What is hepatitis?
meanings.example_cn: 什么是肝炎？

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to return to life after apparent death; suspended animation
meanings.example: When do you think Euramerican market can anabiosis ?
meanings.example_cn: 你认为欧美市场何时能复苏？

meanings.meaning_en: the skill or job of helping teeth to grow straight when they have not been growing correctly
meanings.example: If baby teeth are lost prematurely, the permanent teeth may erupt malpositioned and require orthodontics later on.
meanings.example_cn: 如果婴儿过早的失去牙齿，恒牙可能会爆发式的错位长出而需要正畸。

meanings.meaning_cn: [医]接种疫苗, 种痘, 牛痘疤

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that stops the effects of a poison
meanings.example: When he returned, he noticed their sickness and prepared an antidote.
meanings.example_cn: 当他返回时，他注意到了他们的病情，准备了解毒药。

meanings.meaning_en: abnormal fear or dread of being at a great height
meanings.example: Many people suffer from very serious acrophobia.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人患有严重的恐高症。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone wants to have a lot of power for themselves and enjoys having control over other people’s lives, sometimes as part of a mental illness
meanings.example: In Germany, the minister of justice, Sabine Leutheusser-Schnarrenberger, complained recently about Google’s instinct for “pressing ahead” and its “megalomania.”
meanings.example_cn: 德国司法部长Sabine Leutheusser-Schnarrenberger最近指责了谷歌“一意孤行”的本性和它的“狂妄自大”。

meanings.meaning_cn: [医]溃疡, [植](树的)癌肿病, 腐败
meanings.meaning_en: A canker or canker sore is a small sore in the mouth or on the lips
meanings.example: the canker of violence in modern society
meanings.example_cn: 现代社会的祸患——暴力行为

meanings.meaning_cn: [医]麻疹, 风疹, 包虫病, 痧子
meanings.meaning_en: an infectious illness in which you have a fever and small red spots on your face and body. People often have measles when they are children.
a medical condition in which you become ill or in which your skin becomes red and painful because you have eaten or touched a particular substance
meanings.example: a food allergy
meanings.example_cn: 食物过敏

meanings.meaning_en: an infection in part of the body, in which  pus  is produced
meanings.example: Treatment should be discontinued for serious infection or sepsis.
meanings.example_cn: 出现严重感染或脓毒症应该中断治疗。

meanings.example: Conclusion EDT can protect PC12 cells from anoxia and ischemic injury.
meanings.example_cn: 结论EDT对PC12细胞缺血缺氧损伤具有保护作用。

meanings.meaning_cn: [医]散光, 因偏差而造成的曲解或错判
meanings.meaning_en: difficulty in seeing clearly that is caused by a change in the inner shape of the eye
a serious infectious disease that is caused by dirty food or drink
meanings.example: a sudden outbreak of typhoid
meanings.example_cn: 伤寒的突然爆发

meanings.example: The compounds "likely have an effecton motor neurons"—responsible for controlling movements—"but that isa hunch at present, based on the type of atrophy we saw, " Hughes said inan email.
meanings.example_cn: 这些化合物“可能对运动神经元（负责控制运动）产生作用”----“根据我们观察到的萎缩症类型，目前这只是个预测，”休斯在一封电子邮件中说。

meanings.meaning_en: an illness which makes the inside of your stomach become swollen, so that you feel a burning pain
meanings.example: Don’t use if you have an ulcer or gastritis.
meanings.example_cn: 但如果你患的是胃溃疡或胃炎，就不能用这招了。

meanings.meaning_en: a problem that your body has in dealing with the food you eat
meanings.example: Finally, it is possible that your symptoms may be caused by functional dyspepsia.
meanings.example_cn: 另外，你的症状也有可能是由功能性消化不良引起的。

meanings.meaning_en: a medical condition that causes difficulties in breathing
meanings.example: We have only asthma.
meanings.example_cn: 我们只有哮喘。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious disease that prevents a person’s blood from becoming thick, so that they lose a lot of blood easily if they are injured
meanings.example: Aspirin should be avoided if you have a stomach (peptic) ulcer, haemophilia or other bleeding disorder, or an allergy to aspirin or to other non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAID).
meanings.example_cn: 如果你有胃（消化道）溃疡，血友病或者其它出血性疾病，或对阿司匹林或其他非甾体抗炎药过敏（类固醇消炎药），应避免服用阿司匹林。

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the eyes and diseases that affect them
meanings.example: Among the people to whom Freud introduced cocaine was his colleague Carl Koller, a young doctor working in the department of ophthalmology.
meanings.example_cn: 在这些弗洛伊德推荐给可卡因的人中，有一位是他的同事卡尔·科勒，他是个年轻的眼科医生。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong fear of being in a small enclosed space or in a situation that limits what you can do
meanings.example: Excess sugar is known to cause claustrophobia, memory loss and other neurotic disorders.
meanings.example_cn: 已知过多的糖会造成幽闭恐怖症、失忆和其他神经疾病。

meanings.meaning_cn: [医]镇定剂, 使镇定的人或物
meanings.meaning_en: a drug used for making someone feel less anxious
meanings.example: The cull of up to 500 animals using tranquillizer darts followed by lethal injection would begin within two weeks, military spokesman Brigadier Andrew Nikolic said.
meanings.example_cn: 即将被捕杀的袋鼠最多有500只。 根据军方发言人Andrew Nikolic的话称，捕杀人员将使用装有镇静剂的投掷物抓捕这些袋鼠，随后再使用致命性注射品，整个杀猎工作将在两周内开始。

meanings.meaning_en: an illness that affects your bronchial tubes and makes you cough
meanings.example: He was in bed with bronchitis.
meanings.example_cn: 他身患支气管炎，卧病在床。

meanings.meaning_en: the attractive and exciting quality of being connected with wealth and success
meanings.example: ...the glamour of show biz.
meanings.example_cn: …演艺业的诱惑力。

meanings.meaning_cn: [亦作mold] 肥土, 壤土, [亦作mold] 霉, 模具
meanings.meaning_en: a hollow container that you pour a liquid or soft substance into, so that when it becomes solid, it takes the shape of the container
meanings.example: Another method, used especially for figures, was to pour the clay into a mould.
meanings.example_cn: 另一个方法是把黏土倒入模具中，尤其用于铸造人像。

meanings.meaning_cn: [音]打击乐器乐手,弹击乐器弹奏者
meanings.meaning_en: A percussionist is a person who plays percussion instruments such as drums
the quality of the sound made by a particular instrument or voice
meanings.example: His voice had a deep timbre.
meanings.example_cn: 他的嗓音深沉。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of music with three or four parts that is written for a piano, or for a piano and another instrument
meanings.example: a piano sonata
meanings.example_cn: 钢琴奏鸣曲

meanings.meaning_cn: [音乐]全音阶, 长音阶, 全音域
meanings.example: As the story unfolded throughout the past week, I experienced the gamut of emotions: shock, anger, sadness, disgust, confusion.
meanings.example_cn: 在过去的一周，随着故事的发展我体会了各种不同的情绪：震惊、愤怒、悲伤、厌恶和困惑。

meanings.meaning_cn: [印]铅版, 陈腔滥调, 老套
[印度教](个人的)宗教老师(或指导), (受下属崇敬的)领袖, 头头
[英史]财物署, 国库, 财源, 财政部
meanings.meaning_en: The Exchequer is the department in the British government responsible for receiving, issuing, and accounting for money belonging to the state

meanings.meaning_cn: [鱼]鲑鱼, 大麻哈鱼, 鲜肉色
meanings.meaning_en: a large fish with silver skin and pink flesh that lives in the sea but swims up rivers to lay its eggs
meanings.example: He gave them a splendid lunch of smoked salmon.
meanings.example_cn: 他款待了他们一顿极好的熏三文鱼午餐。

meanings.example: State authorities have ordered cutbacks in deliveries of water from the delta because of the threat to endangered species of salmon and smelt.
meanings.example_cn: 由于鲑鱼和胡瓜鱼这些濒危物种受到威胁，国家当局已经要求消减从该三角洲往外输水的量。

meanings.meaning_en: a wide net that is pulled along the bottom of the sea to catch fish
meanings.example: The oil industry uses supercomputers to trawl seismic data before drilling wells.
meanings.example_cn: 石油公司可以在钻井之前先拖网分析地震数据。

meanings.meaning_en: a polite word or expression that you use instead of a more direct one to avoid shocking or upsetting someone
meanings.example: ‘Pass away’ is a euphemism for ‘die’.
meanings.example_cn: “去世”是“死”的委婉语。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who believes that people cannot know whether God exists or not
meanings.example: When an atheist or agnostic asks me about Sunday School for their children, I recommend exposing their children to a religion.
meanings.example_cn: 当一个无神论者或不可知论者问我星期天学校的事时，我的建议是让孩子去了解宗教。

meanings.example: Forget taxonomy, ontology, and psychology. Who knows why people do what they do?
meanings.example_cn: 忘记分类，存在论和哲学吧，谁又能知道为什么人们要做他们做的事情？

meanings.meaning_en: the theory of knowledge, esp the critical study of its validity, methods, and scope
meanings.example: The Republic and The Laws, written 2300 to 2400 years ago, dealt not only with philosophy, the theory of knowledge, epistemology, but also with social conditions.
meanings.example_cn: 他在2300～2400年前写就的《理想国》和《法律篇》不仅阐述了哲学、知识论和认识论，而且还研究了社会状况。

meanings.meaning_cn: [哲]虚无主义, 极端怀疑论
meanings.meaning_en: the belief that nothing has any meaning or value
meanings.example: The negation of the infinite leads straight to nihilism.
meanings.example_cn: 对无极的否认会直接导向虚无主义。

meanings.meaning_cn: [植] 兰, 兰花, 淡紫色
meanings.meaning_en: a plant that has flowers which are brightly coloured and usually shaped
meanings.example: Orchids and orchid bees are a classic example of this relationship.
meanings.example_cn: 兰花和兰蜂就是这种关系的典型例子。

meanings.meaning_cn: [植] 向日葵, 天芥菜属植物, 该植物的花香, 淡紫色
meanings.meaning_en: a garden plant with nice-smelling pale purple flowers
a tall tree that produces an oil with a strong smell, used in medicines
meanings.example: For skin under and around noses that are irritated by too much blowing, menthol and eucalyptus can relieve pain.
meanings.example_cn: 鼻子下面和周围发炎的皮肤是由于过度吹风造成的，薄荷和桉树可以减轻疼痛。

meanings.meaning_cn: [植]柏科树的, 柏木属植物(原产北美、欧、亚), 柏树枝(用作哀悼的标志)
meanings.meaning_en: a tree with dark green leaves and hard wood, which does not lose its leaves in winter
the wood from a maple
meanings.example: ...a solid maple worktop.
meanings.example_cn: …一张结实的枫木工作台。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of plant with green leaves shaped like large feathers, but no flowers
meanings.example: A ladder fern springs from a crack in the 1979 lava flows from Kilauea Volcano on the Big Island of Hawaii.
meanings.example_cn: 1979年，夏威夷大岛上蕨类植物生长在基拉韦厄火山所流出的阶梯形的岩浆上。

meanings.meaning_en: a round swollen part on the stem of some plants, such as the potato, that grows below the ground and from which new plants grow
a long thin green vegetable with a point at one end
meanings.example: But then again, so does asparagus.
meanings.example_cn: 但话又说回来，芦笋也是如此。

meanings.meaning_cn: [植]美洲山核桃树, 美洲山核桃
meanings.meaning_en: a long thin sweet nut with a dark red shell, or the tree that it grows on
a type of  moss (= simple plant )  that grows in wet places
meanings.example: That water is typically thought to run off into the ocean and contribute to sea level rise, but Loisel thinks the porous sphagnum moss that makes up most peat may be drinking in the excess moisture.
meanings.example_cn: 通常认为融化产生的水汇入海洋从而造成海平面升高。 但是鲁伊赛却认为，构成泥炭沼泽的渗透性强的泥苔藓也许可以额外吸附大量的水分。

meanings.meaning_en: a large open area, usually with sandy soil and scrubby vegetation, esp heather
meanings.example: This feather was picked up from the heath, the bird was not shot: we saw its nest in the winter, full of little skeletons.
meanings.example_cn: 这根毛是从石南丛生的荒地里拾的，这只鸟儿没打中：我们在冬天看见过它的窝的，满是小骨头。

meanings.meaning_en: a tree such as a  pine  or  fir  that has leaves like needles and produces brown  cones  that contain seeds. Most types of conifer keep their leaves in winter.
meanings.example: Red squirrels cut conifer cones from trees and bury them in plant litter on the forest floor.
meanings.example_cn: 红松鼠会将针叶树上的果实割下来，然后埋在森林地面的落叶中。

meanings.meaning_cn: [植]无花果, 无花果树, 无价值的东西, 少许, 一些, 服装
meanings.meaning_en: a soft sweet fruit with a lot of small seeds, often eaten dried, or the tree on which this fruit grows
a desert plant with sharp points instead of leaves
meanings.example: The giant cactus is the vegetable skycraper.
meanings.example_cn: 高大的仙人掌是植物界巨人。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance used to give a special taste to ice cream, cakes etc, made from the beans of a tropical plant
meanings.example: I added a dollop of vanilla ice cream to the pie.
meanings.example_cn: 我在馅饼中加了一块香草冰淇淋。

meanings.meaning_en: a large tree that is common in northern countries, or the hard wood of this tree
meanings.example: an oak door
meanings.example_cn: 橡木门

meanings.meaning_en: the nut of the  oak  tree
meanings.example: First an acorn; then an oak tree forest.
meanings.example_cn: 先有一颗橡子，然后有了一片橡树森林。

meanings.meaning_cn: [植]杏树, 杏仁, 杏仁壮物

the usual or normal situation, way of doing something etc

meanings.meaning_en: A gauge of someone's feelings or a situation is a fact or event that can be used to judge them
meanings.example: The index is the government's chief gauge of future economic activity.
meanings.example_cn: 这个指数是政府对未来经济活动的主要判断标准。

meanings.meaning_en: the area of hard skin around the base of your nails
a false name, usually used by a criminal
meanings.example: a spy operating under the alias Barsad
meanings.example_cn: 一个化名巴萨德进行活动的间谍

meanings.meaning_cn: 别致的款式(尤指妇女的服饰)
meanings.example: With simple supplies like scrap book paper and paint, you can easily convert them into chic and affordable gift boxes, flower vases or handy dispensers.
meanings.example_cn: 用废书刊剪报或者涂料，你可以很容易地将其转换成别致的并且负担得起的礼品盒，花瓶或简易分类罐。

meanings.meaning_cn: 彬彬有礼, 殷勤, 柔顺
meanings.meaning_en: willingness to do what pleases other people
the handle of a hand tool such as an axe or pick
a long handle on an axe1 or other weapon

meanings.meaning_cn: 柄, 把手, 把柄, 口实, 手感
meanings.meaning_en: the part of a door that you use for opening it
meanings.example: Then he turned the handle and went in.
meanings.example_cn: 然后他转动把手走了进去。

meanings.meaning_en: the handle of a sword or knife, where the blade is attached
meanings.example: The golden hilt is ornamented with three large emeralds, topped by a golden watch with an emerald lid.
meanings.example_cn: 金制的刀柄装饰有三颗大绿宝石，顶部是金色手表和翠绿色的盖子。

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the causes and effects of illnesses
meanings.example: One person may show lots of pathology in their brain while another shows very little, yet both may have had dementia.
meanings.example_cn: 即使两人都患有痴呆症，但一人的大脑可能在病理现象中呈现较多，而另一个人可能较少。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who cannot look after themselves because of illness, old age, or injury
meanings.example: I resented being treated as an invalid.
meanings.example_cn: 我讨厌别人把我当病人看待。

meanings.meaning_cn: 病态, 不健全, 发病率
meanings.meaning_en: the state of being morbid
meanings.example: They do not need a third burden of high morbidity and mortality from crashes, accidents, injuries, and violence.
meanings.example_cn: 它们不需要因撞车、事故、伤害 和暴力造成高度发病率和死亡率的第三种负担。

meanings.meaning_cn: 波特淋菌中毒, 香肠中毒
meanings.meaning_en: serious food poisoning caused by  bacteria  in preserved meat and vegetables
If you suffer deprivation, you do not have or are prevented from having something that you want or need
meanings.example: Millions more suffer from serious sleep deprivation caused by long work hours.
meanings.example_cn: 还有数百万人由于工作时数长导致他们严重睡眠不足。

meanings.meaning_en: a vegetable with large dark green leaves
meanings.example: The spinach is shrivelled up.
meanings.example_cn: 菠菜蔫了。

meanings.meaning_en: a large low boat with a flat bottom, used for carrying goods on a  canal  or river
meanings.example: Carrying goods by train costs nearly three times more than carrying them by barge.
meanings.example_cn: 用火车运货的费用几乎比用货船高出3倍。

meanings.meaning_cn: 博览会, 展览会, 说明, 曝露, [戏]展示部分, [音]呈示部
meanings.meaning_en: a large public event at which you show or sell products, art etc
meanings.example: ...an art exposition.
meanings.example_cn: …一个艺术展览。

meanings.meaning_en: Erudition is great academic knowledge
meanings.example: His erudition was apparently endless.
meanings.example_cn: 他显然学识渊博。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has a lot of knowledge about many different subjects
meanings.example: If Charles I owned a real Leonardo before he was executed in 1649, this means our national love affair with the Renaissance polymath has been going on for almost 400 years.
meanings.example_cn: 若查理一世在1649年被处决前拥有一幅达·芬奇真迹，那意味着我们国家和达·芬奇这位文艺复兴时的博学家有过近400年的渊源。

meanings.meaning_cn: 箔, 金属薄片, [建]叶形片, 烘托, 衬托
meanings.meaning_en: metal sheets that are as thin as paper, used for wrapping food
meanings.example: chocolates in foil wrappers
meanings.example_cn: 箔纸包的巧克力

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is unable to walk properly because their legs are damaged or injured - now considered offensive
meanings.example: I was abandoned by family and friends as a supposedly hopeless cripple.
meanings.example_cn: 我被家庭和朋友当作一个恐怕是毫无希望的跛子抛弃了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 补遗, 补充, 附录, 增刊
meanings.meaning_en: something that you add to something else to improve it or make it complete
meanings.example: vitamins and other dietary supplements
meanings.example_cn: 各种维生素和其他膳食补充剂

meanings.meaning_en: a gift of money, usually from a government, for a special use
meanings.example: The standard for medical subvention is to be set by people's government of province, autonomous region or municipality directly under the Central Government.
meanings.example_cn: 医疗补助金的标准由省、自治区、直辖市人民政府规定。

meanings.meaning_en: money that is paid by a government or organization to make prices lower, reduce the cost of producing goods etc
meanings.example: European farmers are planning a massive demonstration against farm subsidy cuts.
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲的农场主们正在策划一场反对削减农场补贴的大游行。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of animal that drinks milk from its mother’s body when it is young. Humans, dogs, and whales are mammals.
meanings.example: A whale is a kind of mammal.
meanings.example_cn: 鲸是一种哺乳动物。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of anxiety
meanings.example: Also, the apocalyptic and oracular tone provides the spectators with a glimpse of the anxiety and inquietude penetrating current Japanese society.
meanings.example_cn: 其天启式、神谕性的基调让观众一睹渗透整个日本社会的焦虑和不安情绪。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is not loyal to another person who trusts them

meanings.example: "Know" is an answer of affirmation, nonentity the slightest problem.
meanings.example_cn: “知道”是一个肯定的答案，不存在丝毫问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不高兴的人, 心怀不满
meanings.meaning_en: A grouch is someone who is always complaining in a bad-tempered way
meanings.example: He's an old grouch but she puts up with him.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个老牢骚精，但她容忍他。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being very unfair or evil, or something that is very unfair
meanings.example: They were trying to protect their son from iniquity.
meanings.example_cn: 他们竭力保护儿子免受不公正待遇。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不规则, 异常的人或物
meanings.meaning_en: If something is an anomaly, it is different from what is usual or expected
meanings.example: The space shuttle had stopped transmitting data, a very serious anomaly for the mission.
meanings.example_cn: 这架航天飞机已经停止了传输数据，这是这次任务中一个十分严重的反常现象。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不和, (部落或家族间的)世仇, 封地, 争执
meanings.meaning_en: an angry and often violent quarrel between two people or groups that continues for a long time

meanings.example: To be without some of the things you wan is an indispensable part of happiness.
meanings.example_cn: 你追求不到的东西有时也是幸福不可缺少的一部分。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不肯定, 不确定, 无把握
meanings.meaning_en: uncertainty; doubt
Disaffection is the attitude that people have when they stop supporting something such as an organization or political ideal
meanings.example: ...people's disaffection with their country and its leaders.
meanings.example_cn: ...人民对自己国家和领导人的不满。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不满, 生气, 愤怒
meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of being annoyed or upset, especially because someone has ignored you or insulted you
meanings.example: He stormed out in a fit of pique .
meanings.example_cn: 他气呼呼地冲了出去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不名誉, 耻辱, 责骂
meanings.example: His political opinions have attracted the opprobrium of the Left.
meanings.example_cn: 他的政治观点遭到左派的抨击。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不平, 苦诉, [律]控诉要旨
meanings.meaning_en: that part of an accusation weighing most heavily against an accused

meanings.meaning_cn: 不适当, 不适当的事物
meanings.meaning_en: Impropriety is improper behaviour
meanings.example: He resigned amid allegations of financial impropriety.
meanings.example_cn: 他因在财务上不恰当的陈述辞职了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不受惩罚, 免罚, 无患
meanings.example: It’s astonishing that these criminals are free to walk the streets with impunity.
meanings.example_cn: 令人惊讶的是，这些罪犯可以招摇过市却依然逍遥法外。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不调和的, 不适宜的
meanings.meaning_en: the fact that something is strange, unusual, or unsuitable in a particular situation
meanings.example: The incongruity of her situation struck Gina with unpleasant force.
meanings.example_cn: 吉娜猛然意识到自己处境尴尬，心里很不舒服。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不同意者, 非国教派的人, 反对者
meanings.meaning_en: a person or organization that disagrees with an official decision or accepted opinion
meanings.example: Political dissenters were imprisoned.
meanings.example_cn: 持不同政见者遭到监禁。

meanings.example: You can do that, but I find the syntax kind of opaque.
meanings.example_cn: 您可以这样做，但是我发现语法有些不透明。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality that something has when it is difficult to see through
meanings.example: Opacity of the eye lens can be induced by deficiency of certain vitamins.
meanings.example_cn: 眼球晶状体的混浊可由缺乏某些维生素引起。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不妥协态度, 不让步,不调和
不信奉国教(尤指英国国教), 不墨守成规, 不一致
meanings.example: You're deliberately unconventional. Even your choice of clothes is a statement of your nonconformity.
meanings.example_cn: 你故意有悖传统，甚至连着装都在表明你与众不同。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不信上帝者, 异教徒, 野蛮人, 粗野的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not connected with the Christian religion or any of the large established religions – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: They first set out to convert the heathen.
meanings.example_cn: 他们最初打算教化异教徒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不幸, 灾祸, 逆境
meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which you have a lot of problems that seem to be caused by bad luck
meanings.example: his courage in the face of adversity
meanings.example_cn: 他面对逆境的勇气

meanings.meaning_cn: 不学无术的人, 无知识的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who does not know about things that most people know about

meanings.example: If we gave the least expression to our natural repugnance for this meal, no sense of responsibility for our health could prompt him to press it on us a second time.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我们稍稍流露出一点对于这顿早餐的自然的厌恶表情，那么即便他有为我们的健康负责的责任感，也不会使他一再地勉强我们吞咽下去的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不一致, 变化, 变异, 变迁, 分歧, 不和
meanings.meaning_en: the amount by which two or more things are different or by which they change
meanings.example: a price variance of 5%
meanings.example_cn: 5%的价格差异

meanings.meaning_cn: 不一致, 不调和, 不谐和音
meanings.meaning_en: a combination of notes that sound strange because they are not in  harmony
the state of being insufficient
meanings.example: Also called adrenal insufficiency or hypocortisolism, Addison's disease occurs in all age groups and affects both sexes. Addison's disease can be life-threatening.
meanings.example_cn: 阿狄森氏病也称肾上腺机能不足症或低皮质醇症，该病可以在各年龄组群中出现且男女都可发病。阿狄森氏病可危及患者生命。

meanings.meaning_en: a long piece of cloth that soldiers wrapped around each leg from the knee down, as part of their uniform in the past
an official public order made by someone in a position of power
meanings.example: The emperor issued an edict forbidding anyone to leave the city.
meanings.example_cn: 皇帝下令禁止任何人出城。

meanings.meaning_en: soldiers who fight on foot
meanings.example: an infantry regiment
meanings.example_cn: 步兵团

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is walking, especially along a street or other place used by cars
meanings.example: Ingrid was a walker, even in Los Angeles, where a pedestrian is a rare sight.
meanings.example_cn: 英格丽德是个步行者，即使在行人少见的洛杉矶也是如此。

meanings.example: I will cover these transitions in the next installment.
meanings.example_cn: 我将在接下来的部分中讨论这些转移。

meanings.meaning_cn: 部下, 下僚, 下属, 走卒
meanings.meaning_en: an insulting word for someone who has a low rank – often used humorously
meanings.example: ...underlings who do the dirty work.
meanings.example_cn: ...干肮脏勾当的走卒们。

meanings.meaning_en: the work that a particular government official is responsible for
meanings.example: the foreign affairs portfolio
meanings.example_cn: 外交部长职责

meanings.meaning_en: a natural ability to do something very well
meanings.example: Jo has a flair for languages.
meanings.example_cn: 乔有语言天赋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 财产, 所有物, 相关事物, 亲戚
meanings.meaning_en: the things you own, especially things that you can carry with you
meanings.example: an insurance policy that covers your personal belongings
meanings.example_cn: 一张承保个人财物的保单

meanings.meaning_cn: 采石场, (知识、消息等的)来源
meanings.meaning_en: a place where large amounts of stone or sand are dug out of the ground
meanings.example: a slate quarry
meanings.example_cn: 板岩采石场

meanings.meaning_cn: 彩色蜡笔, 彩色蜡笔画
meanings.meaning_en: a small coloured stick for drawing pictures with, made of a substance like  chalk
meanings.example: The lobby is decorated in pastels.
meanings.example_cn: 门厅用柔和的淡色彩装饰。

meanings.example: When America is under stress, as is happening right now with debates about where to pare the budget, we sometimes trample the least powerful and most vulnerable among us.
meanings.example_cn: 当美国正在承受压力，正如当下争论的——在哪些方面削减预算，我们有时会蹂躏那些我们中间力量最弱小、最脆弱的群体。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small room in a house where food is kept

meanings.meaning_cn: 残暴, 暴行, 凶恶
meanings.meaning_en: an extremely cruel and violent action, especially during a war
meanings.example: The killing was cold-blooded, and those who committed this atrocity should be tried and punished.
meanings.example_cn: 这场杀戮非常残酷，那些犯下此暴行的人应该受到审判和惩罚。

meanings.meaning_en: a very cruel act
meanings.example: the medieval barbarity of putting people in prison for debt
meanings.example_cn: 中世纪时把欠债人关进监狱的野蛮做法

meanings.meaning_cn: 残留, 遗物, 宿醉
meanings.meaning_en: a pain in your head and a feeling of sickness that you get the day after you have drunk too much alcohol
meanings.example: I had a terrible hangover the next day.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天我的宿醉反应很厉害。

meanings.meaning_en: cruel and violent behaviour, or an event involving cruel and violent treatment
meanings.example: allegations of police brutality
meanings.example_cn: 对警方暴行的指控

meanings.meaning_en: when a lot of people are killed violently, especially people who cannot defend themselves
meanings.example: the only survivor of the massacre
meanings.example_cn: 这场大屠杀的唯一幸存者

meanings.meaning_cn: 残余, 剩余, 零料, 残迹
meanings.meaning_en: a small part of something that remains after the rest of it has been used, destroyed, or eaten
meanings.example: Beneath the present church were remnants of Roman flooring.
meanings.example_cn: 在目前的这座教堂下面还有残余的古罗马地板。

meanings.meaning_cn: 残余, 剩余物, 其他的人, [数]余数
meanings.meaning_en: the part of something that is left after everything else has gone or been dealt with
meanings.example: The remainder must be paid by the end of June.
meanings.example_cn: 剩余款项必须在6月底之前支付。

meanings.meaning_cn: 残余, 遗迹, 遗体
meanings.meaning_en: the parts of something that are left after the rest has been destroyed or has disappeared
meanings.example: extensive Roman remains (= of ancient buildings ) at Arles
meanings.example_cn: 阿尔勒的一大片古罗马遗迹

meanings.meaning_cn: 残余, 渣滓, 滤渣, 残数, 剩余物
meanings.meaning_en: a substance that remains on a surface, in a container etc and cannot be removed easily, or that remains after a chemical process
meanings.example: The flies leave a sticky residue on crops.
meanings.example_cn: 苍蝇在庄稼上留下黏糊糊的分泌物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 惨败, 大失败, 可耻的下场
meanings.meaning_en: an event that is completely unsuccessful, in a way that is very embarrassing or disappointing
meanings.example: The first lecture I ever gave was a complete fiasco .
meanings.example_cn: 我第一次讲课糟得一塌糊涂。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of doing something too quickly in a way that is not sensible
something that contains a lot of information etc
meanings.example: The local archives service offers a storehouse of material.
meanings.example_cn: 当地的档案馆提供大量的资料。

meanings.meaning_en: the broad bottom part of a ship
a V-shaped cut or hole in a surface or edge
meanings.example: Cut a notch near one end of the stick.
meanings.example_cn: 在手杖的一端刻一个V形记号。

meanings.meaning_en: an established method for connecting computers so that they can exchange information
meanings.example: ...a computer protocol which could communicate across different languages.
meanings.example_cn: …一个可以在不同的语言之间传递信息的计算机协议。

meanings.meaning_en: a field with wild grass and flowers
meanings.example: The meadow has been ploughed up.
meanings.example_cn: 那片草地已用犁翻过。

meanings.meaning_en: food supplies for horses and cattle
meanings.example: Such forage fish already account for nearly a fifth of the world’s total annual catch; another fifth goes to feed pigs and poultry.
meanings.example_cn: 这样的饲料鱼已经差不多占每年世界总捕鱼量的五分之一；另有五分之一被用于喂猪和家禽。

meanings.meaning_en: a dark image, shadow, or shape that you see against a light background
meanings.example: silhouette pictures of snowmen and reindeer
meanings.example_cn: 雪人和驯鹿的剪影画

meanings.meaning_cn: 策略, 趣味, 工作
meanings.example: Christmas should be a time of excitement and wonder, not a cynical marketing ploy.
meanings.example_cn: 圣诞节应该是激动人心的奇妙时刻，而不是自私牟利的营销计谋。

meanings.example: You have probably heard of this tactic before.
meanings.example_cn: 你以前也可能听说过这个策略。

meanings.example: We need two new Classes at either end of the inheritance hierarchy to do this.
meanings.example_cn: 在继承层次的每个端点，我们需要两个新类来完成这个。

meanings.meaning_cn: 插, 戳, 刺, 推力, 猛推, 口头攻击
meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong movement in which you push something forward
meanings.example: He jumped back to avoid another thrust of the knife.
meanings.example_cn: 他往后一闪，躲避再次捅来的一刀。

meanings.meaning_en: something interposed
meanings.example: The interposition of fresco art in the city environment can just satisfy with the requirement of people.
meanings.example_cn: 壁画艺术对城市环境的介入正好能够满足人们的这种审美和精神的渴求。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of putting something inside something else
meanings.example: Sometimes the insertion of one word can change the meaning of a whole sentence.
meanings.example_cn: 有时插入一个字可以改变全句的意义。

meanings.meaning_cn: 插入语, 附带, 插曲, 圆括号
meanings.meaning_en: a round  bracket
meanings.example: In parenthesis, I should add that the results have not yet been proven.
meanings.example_cn: 插一句，我想补充的是这些结果还未得到证实。

meanings.meaning_cn: 察觉, 发觉, 侦查, 探测, 发现
meanings.meaning_en: when something is found that is not easy to see, hear etc, or the process of looking for it
meanings.example: ...the early detection of breast cancer.
meanings.example_cn: …乳腺癌的早期发现。

meanings.meaning_cn: 差事, 差使, 使命
meanings.example: They can view a list of errands that match their interest profile, and, by entering a price, can bid to perform the errand.
meanings.example_cn: 他们可以查看与他们的兴趣简档匹配的差事列表，并且，通过输入价格，可以为执行差事投标。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of including many different types of people or things
meanings.example: ...the cultural diversity of Latin America.
meanings.example_cn: …拉丁美洲文化的多样性。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of medical science that deals with the birth of children
meanings.example: ...the American College of Obstetrics and Gynecology.
meanings.example_cn: ...美国产科和妇科学院。

meanings.meaning_en: pleasant but untrue things that you say to someone in order to trick or persuade them

meanings.meaning_cn: 谄媚者, 拍马屁的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who pretends to like an important person and does things for them, so that that person will help them – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: They work as drivers or nannies, or blend into a businessman's coterie looking like a secretary, a briefcase carrier or a toady.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的工作看似司机、保姆，或者以秘书，、拎公文包者、拍马屁者的形象出现在商务圈里。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool with a rounded blade and a long handle used for moving earth, stones etc
meanings.example: ...a coal shovel.
meanings.example_cn: …一把煤铲。

meanings.example: And all those everyday consumer products, which owe their existence, in no small part, to manufacturing methods that wouldn’t work without Einstein’s enunciation of the atomic theory of matter.
meanings.example_cn: 还有所有那些日常消费品。 其存在在很大程度上都得归功于那样一些制造方法，没有爱因斯坦对物质的原子理论的阐明，就不会有这些制造方法。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of tasting or the faculty of taste
meanings.example: Through Jia Bao-Yu's olfaction and gustation, his spiritual love and facultative desire was emphasized.
meanings.example_cn: 通过賈宝玉的嗅觉与味觉，进入他的深层意識与美感触觉，突显他的精神戀爱与官能欲望。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality or characteristic of being conventional, esp in behaviour, thinking, etc

meanings.example: He gave her in requital of all things else, which ye had taken from me.
meanings.example_cn: 他把她给了我是为了补偿你们从我手中夺走的一切。

meanings.meaning_cn: 偿清, 解除, 寂灭, 死

meanings.meaning_cn: 唱诗班, 唱诗班的席位
meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who sing together for other people to listen to
meanings.example: He joined a church choir at the age of eight.
meanings.example_cn: 他八岁时加入了一个教堂唱诗班。

meanings.example: But it is impossible to predict the reaction of a man accosted by another with the words "you rat" without referring to the meaning that the man spoken to attaches to the epithet.
meanings.example_cn: 但是，当你不带意识地，说出别人的绰号“老鼠”的时候，你还是无法预测这个人会有怎样的反应。

meanings.meaning_cn: 超凡魅力, 感召力, 教皇般的指导力
meanings.meaning_en: a natural ability to attract and interest other people and make them admire you
meanings.example: He lacks charisma.
meanings.example_cn: 他缺乏个人魅力。

meanings.meaning_en: the nest in which insects or spiders deposit their eggs

meanings.meaning_cn: 嘲笑, 嘲弄的话, 嘲弄的对象, 愚弄, 笑柄, 食品
meanings.meaning_en: an expression of derision

meanings.meaning_cn: 嘲笑, 讥讽, 戏弄
吵闹声, 呐喊声, 叫嚷声
meanings.meaning_en: a mixture of loud noises, especially the noise of a lot of people talking at the same time
meanings.example: the hubbub from the market
meanings.example_cn: 市场的嘈杂声

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that shapes wood or metal, by turning it around and around against a sharp tool

meanings.meaning_cn: 车辙, 常轨, 定例, 惯例
meanings.meaning_en: a deep narrow track left in soft ground by a wheel
meanings.example: I don't like being in a rut – I like to keep moving on.
meanings.example_cn: 我不喜欢一成不变–我喜欢不断前进。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of revoking a law, decision, or agreement
meanings.example: However, this object lacks the methods needed for run-time role assignment and revocation.
meanings.example_cn: 不过，这个对象缺少运行时角色分配和撤销所需的方法。

meanings.meaning_cn: 撤回, 退回, 退后, 工商业之衰退, 不景气
meanings.meaning_en: a difficult time when there is less trade, business activity etc in a country than usual

meanings.example_cn: 20世纪80年代初的经济衰退

meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of dust
a solid substance that has been chemically separated from a liquid
solid substances that settle at the bottom of a liquid
meanings.example: a thick layer of sediment
meanings.example_cn: 一层厚厚的沉积物

meanings.meaning_cn: 沉积作用, 沉积物, 革职, 废王位, 免职
meanings.meaning_en: the natural process of depositing a substance on rocks or soil

meanings.example_cn: 海洋沉积物的沉积

meanings.meaning_en: the action of immersing something in liquid, or the state of being immersed
meanings.example: ...long-term assignments that allowed them total immersion in their subjects.
meanings.example_cn: ...可使他们能潜心钻研自己课题的长期任务。

meanings.meaning_en: the need to take a harmful drug regularly, without being able to stop
meanings.example: She helped him fight his drug addiction.
meanings.example_cn: 她帮助了他对抗自己的毒瘾。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沉着, 泰然, 垂直
meanings.meaning_en: If you do something with aplomb, you do it with confidence in a relaxed way
meanings.example: Ms Sharpe handled their questions with great aplomb.
meanings.example_cn: 夏普女士镇定自若地回答了他们的问题。

meanings.example: No, there aren’t, so in all likelihood I will have to plod across those green meadows with a herd of American tourists, disgruntled that everything is so ancient and small.
meanings.example_cn: 不，没有这种人，因此我十之八九会和这群美国游客沉重而缓慢地走过那片绿色的草地，对一切都这么古老和渺小而感到不悦。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement that has been made many times before and is not interesting or clever – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: His excuse was the platitude ‘boys will be boys.’
meanings.example_cn: 他还是那一套理由:“男孩总归是男孩。”

meanings.meaning_cn: 称呼他人姓名, 姓名
称赞, 恭维, 致意, 问候, 道贺
meanings.meaning_en: a remark that shows you admire someone or something
meanings.example: All the guests paid her extravagant compliments.
meanings.example_cn: 所有客人都对她赞不绝口。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the foods that you use to make a particular food or dish
meanings.example: Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl.
meanings.example_cn: 把所有食材都放在一个大碗里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 成热, 完备, (票据)到期, 成熟
meanings.meaning_en: the quality of behaving in a sensible way like an adult
meanings.example: Beth shows a maturity way beyond her 16 years.
meanings.example_cn: 贝丝表现出一种远远超出她16岁年龄的成熟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 成皱, 起皱, 皱状
meanings.example: The two kinds of flaws, namely breakage and corrugation, which were caused by the design proposal under initial condition were discovered by analyzing the forming limit chart after the simulation.
meanings.example_cn: 通过对仿真后的成形极限图进行分析，发现初始条件下的设计方案导致破裂和起皱这两种缺陷。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is allowed to use a house, building, land etc for a period of time in return for payment to the owner
meanings.example: A lease is a rental agreement between the lessee and the lessor.
meanings.example_cn: 租赁契约是出租人和承租人之间达成的租用协议。

meanings.meaning_en: a castle or large country house in France
meanings.example: I followed him to this island chateau where he's holding a party.
meanings.example_cn: 我跟踪他来到这座岛上城堡。他将在这里举办宴会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 程度, 斜度, 树脂, 投掷, 定调, (船只)前后颠簸, 倾斜, 沥青
meanings.meaning_en: a throw of the ball, or a way in which it can be thrown
meanings.example: His first pitch was high and wide.
meanings.example_cn: 他的第一投又高又偏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 惩罚, 苛责, 修订

meanings.meaning_en: the act of making something clearer or easier to understand, or an explanation that makes something clearer
meanings.example: There have been a number of official changes and clarifications.
meanings.example_cn: 官方有过数次修改和说明。

meanings.meaning_en: Chuckle is also a noun
meanings.example: He gave a little chuckle.
meanings.example_cn: 他轻声一笑。

meanings.meaning_en: a meal or party during which food is cooked on a metal frame over a fire and eaten outdoors
meanings.example: We had a barbecue on the beach.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在海滩上烧烤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 吃力的工作, 疲劳, 苦工

meanings.meaning_en: Simper is also a noun
meanings.example: "Thank you doctor," said the nurse with a simper.
meanings.example_cn: “谢谢你，医生，”护士傻笑着说。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迟钝, 无感觉, 不活泼
meanings.meaning_en: a state of being not active because you are lazy or sleepy
meanings.example: She tried to rouse him from the torpor into which he had sunk.
meanings.example_cn: 她试图把他从迷迷糊糊的状态中唤醒。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who publicly criticizes the government in a country where this is punished
meanings.example: a political dissident
meanings.example_cn: 持不同政见者

meanings.meaning_en: the length of time that something continues
meanings.example: The course is of three years’ duration.
meanings.example_cn: 该课程为期三年。

meanings.meaning_en: an event or situation that makes you feel ashamed or embarrassed, especially in public
meanings.example: ...the ignominy of being fired.
meanings.example_cn: ...被开除的羞辱。

meanings.meaning_en: the difference between the amount of something that you have and the higher amount that you need
meanings.example: the country’s widening budget deficit
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家日益严重的预算赤字

meanings.meaning_en: a large violent attack by an army
meanings.example: plants that will survive the onslaught of winter
meanings.example_cn: 熬得过严冬侵袭的植物

meanings.meaning_en: a failure
meanings.example: The picnic was a total washout – nobody turned up!
meanings.example_cn: 野餐彻底失败——根本没人来！

meanings.meaning_cn: 冲突, 打架, 争论, (织物等)磨损处
meanings.meaning_en: an argument or fight
meanings.example: Three civilians were injured during the fray.
meanings.example_cn: 三个平民在冲突中受伤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冲突, 撞击声, 抵触
meanings.meaning_en: a short fight between two armies or groups – used in news reports
meanings.example: a scheduling clash on TV
meanings.example_cn: 电视节目时间安排上的冲突

meanings.meaning_cn: 冲压机, 冲床, 打孔机
meanings.meaning_en: a metal tool for cutting holes or for pushing something into a small hole
meanings.example: Make two holes with a hole punch.
meanings.example_cn: 用打孔器打两个孔。

meanings.meaning_en: completeness or fullness
meanings.example: Life breeds both plenitude and void, exuberance and depression.
meanings.example_cn: 生活同时孕育充足与空虚，繁荣与萧条。

meanings.meaning_cn: 充实, 充满, 全体会议, 高压
meanings.meaning_en: A plenum is a meeting that is attended by all the members of a committee or conference

meanings.meaning_cn: 崇拜, 爱慕, 受崇拜(或爱慕)的对象
meanings.meaning_en: great love and admiration
meanings.example: the look of adoration in his eyes
meanings.example_cn: 他爱慕的眼神

meanings.meaning_en: a game used to make money for a state or a  charity  in which people buy tickets with a series of numbers on them. If their number is picked by chance, they win money or a prize.
meanings.example: a lottery ticket
meanings.example_cn: 彩票

meanings.meaning_cn: 抽筋, 腹部绞痛, 月经痛

meanings.example_cn: 有几名球员抽筋了。

meanings.meaning_en: a picture made by sticking other pictures, photographs, cloth etc onto a surface

meanings.example_cn: …用杂志上的词语和图片做成的拼贴画。

meanings.meaning_en: strong dislike or hatred

meanings.example_cn: 当我也有了其他外国人那样的感受时，我意识到在自己内心，我的感受更像是憎恶。

meanings.meaning_en: strong fear or dislike of people from other countries
meanings.example: ...a just and tolerant society which rejects xenophobia and racism.
meanings.example_cn: …一个不容排外情绪和种族歧视的公正宽容的社会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 愁容, 怒容, 暴风雨前的阴沉晦暗
踌躇, 犹豫, 微量, 吩, 审慎
丑行,丑闻,诽谤,耻辱,流言蜚语
meanings.meaning_en: an event in which someone, especially someone important, behaves in a bad way that shocks people
meanings.example: It caused quite a scandal when he left his wife.

meanings.meaning_en: the act of leaving a building or place, or the right to do this
meanings.example: Traditionally, the physical infrastructure providers control the underlying hardware; they provide the cloud tenant with egress and ingress at the most fundamental level.
meanings.example_cn: 传统上，物理设备供应商控制底层硬件； 它们提供给租户基础层上的出口和入口；

meanings.meaning_en: birth or origin, esp in relation to the circumstances surrounding it
meanings.example: The broadcast will show the queen, wearing a green outfit, chatting to schoolchildren as she helps them make a collage of a nativity scene.
meanings.example_cn: 人们将在电视上看到女王身着绿色套装，一边和小学生们谈心，一边教他们拼贴“耶稣降生”的场景。

meanings.meaning_cn: 出血(尤指大出血), 溢血
meanings.meaning_en: a serious medical condition in which a person bleeds a lot, sometimes inside their body

meanings.meaning_cn: 出众, 显赫, 崇高
meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being famous and important
meanings.example: Many of the pilots were to achieve eminence in the aeronautical world.
meanings.example_cn: 其中的很多飞行员后来在航空界都取得了显赫的声名。

meanings.meaning_en: a young rich  upper-class  woman who starts going to fashionable events as a way of being introduced to upper-class society
a tube that contains explosive and is used to fire a gun or explode a bomb
meanings.example: ...the language used in reading primers.
meanings.example_cn: ...初级读物中使用的语言。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who is learning the alphabet or the rudiments of a subject
a chemical substance that you put on the skin under your arms to stop you from smelling bad
meanings.example: Maybe he should go without deodorant?
meanings.example_cn: 也许他应该不用除臭剂？

meanings.meaning_cn: 除外, 例外, 反对, 异议

meanings.example_cn: 天气一直寒冷，但今天是个例外。

meanings.meaning_cn: 厨房烹调法, 烹饪, 烹调风格
meanings.meaning_en: a particular style of cooking
meanings.example: French cuisine
meanings.example_cn: 法式烹饪

meanings.meaning_cn: 储备(物), 储藏量, 预备队
meanings.meaning_en: a supply of something kept to be used if it is needed

meanings.example_cn: 1,000万美元的现金储备

meanings.meaning_en: a punishment for breaking a law, rule, or legal agreement
meanings.example: No littering. Penalty $500.
meanings.example_cn: 禁止乱扔垃圾。 违者罚款500美元。

meanings.meaning_en: a fairly small enclosed area where cattle, horses etc can be kept temporarily, especially in North America

meanings.meaning_cn: 穿过, 渗透, 突破
meanings.meaning_en: when something or someone enters or passes through something, especially when this is difficult
meanings.example: Cover the entire device to prevent water penetration.
meanings.example_cn: 把整台设备都罩住以免进水。

meanings.meaning_en: a written order to come to a court of law and be a  witness
meanings.example: He has been served with a subpoena to answer the charges in court.
meanings.example_cn: 他被送达了一张出庭应诉的传票。

meanings.example: Our saga, and my experiment, was over.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的“传奇”，我的实验，结束了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 传染, 传染病, 蔓延, 歪风, 腐化
meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which a disease is spread by people touching each other
meanings.example: There is some danger of contagion.
meanings.example_cn: 有接触传染的危险。

meanings.meaning_cn: 传说, 伟人传, 图例联想集团，中国最大的国有品牌微机制造商之一
meanings.meaning_en: an old, well-known story, often about brave people, adventures, or magical events
meanings.example: Local legend has it that (= says that ) the island was the original Garden of Eden.
meanings.example_cn: 当地传说这个岛就是伊甸园的原型。

meanings.meaning_cn: 船, 容器, 器皿, 脉管, 导管
meanings.meaning_en: a ship or large boat
meanings.example: a fishing vessel
meanings.example_cn: 渔船

meanings.meaning_cn: 船首三角帆, 起重机的臂, 挺杆
meanings.meaning_en: a small sail in front of the large sail on a boat
meanings.example: This is popularly called sailing under “jib and jigger”—the jigger being an old square-rigger term for the aft-most mast flying a triangular sail.
meanings.example_cn: 这种航行法常被叫做“jib and jigger”——jigger是对于船尾桅杆上的三角帆的古老叫法。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the large sloping pieces of wood that form the structure of a roof
meanings.example: The club was packed to the rafters (= very full ) .
meanings.example_cn: 俱乐部里挤满了人。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of things of the same kind that are very close together
meanings.example: a diamond cluster ring
meanings.example_cn: 群镶钻戒

meanings.meaning_en: a series of events or things joined together one after another
meanings.example: Listing 2 shows a sample algorithm which creates such a key by string concatenation.
meanings.example_cn: 清单 2 显示了一个通过字符串串联创建此类键的示例算法。

meanings.meaning_cn: 床垫, 空气垫, (用以护堤等的)沉床
meanings.meaning_en: the soft part of a bed that you lie on
when someone does something, or something happens, that affects your private life or activities in an unwanted way
meanings.example: the unwelcome intrusion of the press
meanings.example_cn: 不受欢迎的新闻界的侵扰

meanings.meaning_en: when something is completely new and different from anything that anyone has thought of before
meanings.example: Her earlier work shows a lot of originality.
meanings.example_cn: 她的早期作品显示出丰富的独创性。

meanings.meaning_en: boastful talk, bragging, or bluster
meanings.example: Honesty and frankness do more for the public's confidence … than extravagant boasting or supercilious gasconade.
meanings.example_cn: 诚实和率直比言过其实的吹嘘或者高傲的自夸更能增加公众的信心。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is always talking too proudly about what they own or have done
meanings.example: Her father was an old unmarried professor of mathematics, a brutal man and a braggart, who went out to give lessons in spite of his age.
meanings.example_cn: 她的父亲是个性情粗暴、爱吹牛的老数学教师，从没正式结过婚，虽然上了年纪，却还靠替人补课度日。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin pointed piece of ice hanging from a roof or other surface
meanings.example: Missis walked in', she said, `as chill as an icicle, and as high as a princess.
meanings.example_cn: “夫人走进来了，”她说，“跟个冰柱似的，冷冰冰的，又像个公主似的高不可攀。

meanings.meaning_en: a small hammer that the person in charge of a meeting, court of law, auction etc hits on a table in order to get people’s attention
meanings.example: A judge bangs his gavel.
meanings.example_cn: 一位法官敲响他的小木槌。

meanings.meaning_en: a wooden hammer with a large end
meanings.example: I even have a wooden mallet that was used by a judge over 300 years ago during condemnation proceedings in Salem.
meanings.example_cn: 我甚至还有一把300多年前的木槌。

meanings.meaning_cn: 纯洁, 贞节, 简洁
meanings.meaning_en: the principle or state of not having sex with anyone, or not with anyone except your husband or wife
meanings.example: He took a vow of chastity and celibacy.
meanings.example_cn: 他发下了守贞和独身的誓。

meanings.meaning_en: all the words and phrases used in a language or that a particular person knows
meanings.example: a lexicon of geographical terms
meanings.example_cn: 地理学术语词汇表

meanings.example: In Britain, a lexicographer (dictionary author) named Samuel Johnson, who lived in the 18th century, coined the word “gray” and supported its use.
meanings.example_cn: 十八世纪的英国有一个叫塞缪尔.约翰逊的词典编撰人（词典作者）。 他杜撰了“gray”这个单词，并提倡使用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 词语误用, 用词错误可笑
meanings.meaning_en: an amusing mistake that you make when you use a word that sounds similar to the word you intended to say but means something completely different
meanings.example: However , the five basic principles set up here on the basis of the theory of information equivalence , are available for translating English malapropism .
meanings.example_cn: 然而，如果以信息等效理论为基础，我们仍然能提出一些适用于英语误用词翻译的基本原则。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard shiny white substance that is used for making expensive plates, cups etc
meanings.example: a porcelain vase
meanings.example_cn: 瓷花瓶

meanings.meaning_en: a book in which words are put into groups with other words that have similar meanings
meanings.example: The most extensive approach is a full thesaurus.
meanings.example_cn: 最广泛使用的方法是完整的辞典。

meanings.meaning_cn: 辞职, 辞职书, 放弃, 顺从
meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when you officially announce that you have decided to leave your job or an organization, or a written statement that says you will be leaving
meanings.example: Illness forced his resignation.
meanings.example_cn: 他不得不因病辞职。

meanings.meaning_cn: 慈善, 施舍, 慈善团体
meanings.meaning_en: an organization that gives money, goods, or help to people who are poor, sick etc
meanings.example: Several charities sent aid to the flood victims.
meanings.example_cn: 有几家慈善机构已向洪灾灾民送去了救援物资。

meanings.meaning_en: a rich person who gives a lot of money to help poor people
meanings.example: A philanthropist is someone who donates to charity. So Harper was admitting that he views "the environment" as a charity case.
meanings.example_cn: 慈善家是一些热衷于慈善事业的人，因此，哈珀算是承认他认为“保护环境”是一项慈善事业。

meanings.meaning_cn: 磁, 磁力, 吸引力, 磁学
meanings.meaning_en: the physical force that makes two metal objects pull towards each other or push each other apart
meanings.example: his personal magnetism
meanings.example_cn: 他的个人魅力

meanings.meaning_cn: 雌狐, 唠叨的女人, 坏心眼的女人, 刁妇, 泼妇
meanings.meaning_en: a female fox

meanings.meaning_cn: 刺, 戳, 懒汉, 袋子
meanings.meaning_en: Poke is also a noun
meanings.example: John smiled at them and gave Richard a playful poke.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰冲他们笑了笑，还顽皮地捅了理查德一下。

meanings.meaning_cn: 刺, 刺伤的伤口, 一阵突然而强烈的感觉, 中伤, 伤痛
meanings.meaning_en: an act of stabbing or trying to stab someone with a knife
meanings.example: severe stab wounds
meanings.example_cn: 严重的刺伤

meanings.meaning_cn: 刺, 刺痛, 柳条篮子
meanings.meaning_en: a long thin sharp point on the skin of some animals or the surface of some plants

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of great happiness and excitement

meanings.example_cn: 他的支持者们听到这个消息后兴高采烈。

meanings.meaning_cn: 低沉连续的声音, 咕哝, 怨言, 低语

meanings.example_cn: 她轻轻地柔声回答。

meanings.meaning_en: a musical instrument like a very long wooden tube, that produces a low sound. You hold it upright and play it by blowing into a thin curved metal pipe.
meanings.example: A clarinet and bassoon and other instruments start playing.
meanings.example_cn: 随后，单簧管，低音管和其它乐器也开始了演奏。

meanings.meaning_en: a wide wall of earth or stones built to stop water from flooding an area, or to support a road or railway

meanings.meaning_en: your opponent in a competition, battle, quarrel etc

meanings.example_cn: 斯帕斯基以前从未败给过他的敌手。

meanings.example_cn: 他的老对手

meanings.meaning_cn: 敌意, 恶意, 不友善, 敌对, 对抗, 反对

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of strong dislike or hatred

meanings.example: I think there is an historic enmity between them.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为他们之间存在着宿怨。

meanings.meaning_cn: 涤罪, 炼狱, 暂时受苦的地方
meanings.meaning_en: in Roman Catholic belief, a place where the souls of dead people suffer until they are pure enough to enter heaven

meanings.example: The bank refused to accept any mortgage on land.
meanings.example_cn: 银行拒绝接受任何土地抵押。

meanings.meaning_en: the frame on which the body, engine, wheels etc of a vehicle are built
meanings.example: The new Focus will be built on one platform and will have the same engine, transmission, chassis and main body in all the markets where it is sold.
meanings.example_cn: 新款福克斯将会在一个制造平台生产，在所有销售市场所在地配备相同的引擎，动力传送器，底盘与车身。

meanings.meaning_cn: 底土, 下层土壤地基

meanings.example_cn: 这就是我对这片动荡之地的调查，在调查中制图师完全不能确定起义发生和结束的界限范围。

someone whose business is to lend people money in exchange for valuable objects. If the money is not paid back, the pawnbroker can sell the object.

meanings.example_cn: 剩下的故事中比较优秀的有，《十月》，讲述一个秘鲁的典当商，不情愿地发现自己成了一个女婴（女儿）的监护人，接着跟女护士，他交杂出新的浪漫。

a dark purple-blue colour
statues

the best and highest level of something

a small uncomfortable room at the top of a house, just under the roof
