meanings.meaning_en: a remark or action that offends or insults someone
meanings.example: It's an affront to human dignity to keep someone alive like this.
meanings.example_cn: 让一个人如此活着是对人类尊严的一种侮辱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 公平, 公正, 公平的事物, 资产净值, [律]平衡法
meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which all people are treated equally and no one has an unfair advantage
meanings.example: a society run on the principles of equity and justice
meanings.example_cn: 以公平、正义为原则的社会

meanings.meaning_cn: 公务印章, 私人印戳, 标记, 威望, 纪念邮戳
meanings.meaning_en: If someone or something has a certain cachet, they have a quality which makes people admire them or approve of them
meanings.example: A Mercedes carries a certain cachet.
meanings.example_cn: 奔驰汽车久负盛名。

meanings.meaning_en: a military attack to take control of a place controlled by the enemy
meanings.example: The refugee camp came under assault again last night.
meanings.example_cn: 昨晚难民营再次遭袭。

meanings.meaning_en: a roof or ceiling that consists of several arches that are joined together, especially in a church

meanings.meaning_cn: 共鸣, 回声, 反响, 中介, 谐振, 共振, 共振子, 极短命的不稳定基本粒子
meanings.meaning_en: the special meaning or importance that something has for you because it relates to your own experiences
meanings.example: a tradition that has little resonance in the 21st century
meanings.example_cn: 在21世纪难以引起共鸣的传统

meanings.meaning_en: a secret agreement that two or more people make in order to do something dishonest
meanings.example: He found no evidence of collusion between record companies and retailers.
meanings.example_cn: 他找不出唱片公司与零售商互相勾结的证据。

meanings.meaning_en: a secret plan made by two or more people to do something that is harmful or illegal
meanings.example: There were many conspiracy theories (= beliefs that something is the result of a conspiracy ) surrounding Princess Diana’s death.
meanings.example_cn: 围绕戴安娜王妃之死有许多阴谋论。

meanings.meaning_cn: 贡品, 礼物, 颂词, 殷勤, 贡物
meanings.meaning_en: something that you say, do, or give in order to express your respect or admiration for someone
meanings.example: The players wore black armbands as a tribute to their late teammate.
meanings.example_cn: 球员们戴着黑纱悼念已故的队友。

meanings.meaning_cn: 供应, (一批)供应品, 预备, 防备, 规定
meanings.meaning_en: when you provide something that someone needs now or in the future
meanings.example: He made provisions for his wife and his children in his will.
meanings.example_cn: 在遗嘱里他为妻子和孩子都做好了安排。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沟壑, 峡谷, 溪谷
meanings.meaning_en: a deep narrow valley with steep sides
meanings.example: The bus overturned and fell into a ravine.
meanings.example_cn: 这辆公共汽车翻了车，掉进了一处深谷。

meanings.meaning_en: An aqueduct is a large pipe or canal that carries a water supply to a city or a farming area
meanings.example: ...a nationwide system of aqueducts to carry water to the arid parts of this country.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个将水输送到该国干旱地区的全国性输水系统。

meanings.meaning_cn: 沟渠, 堑壕, 管沟, 电缆沟, 战壕
meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow hole dug into the surface of the ground
meanings.example: Workers dug a trench for gas lines.
meanings.example_cn: 工人们挖了一条沟来铺设煤气管道。

meanings.meaning_en: a curved piece of metal or plastic that you use for hanging things on
meanings.example: Tom hung his coat on the hook behind the door.
meanings.example_cn: 汤姆把外套挂在门后的衣钩上。

meanings.meaning_en: Crochet is a way of making cloth out of cotton or wool by using a needle with a small hook at the end
meanings.example: ...crochet artwork.
meanings.example_cn: ...钩针编织的艺术品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 钩状物, (河、道的)弯处, <美口>骗子
meanings.meaning_en: the part of your arm where it bends
meanings.example: The crooks got away across the park.
meanings.example_cn: 那些骗子穿过公园跑掉了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 狗窝, 狗屋, 阴沟
meanings.meaning_en: a small building made for a dog to sleep in

meanings.meaning_cn: 构造, 结构, 配置, 外形
meanings.meaning_en: the shape or arrangement of the parts of something
meanings.example: Prices range from $119 to $199, depending on the particular configuration.
meanings.example_cn: 价格根据配置的不同从119美元到199美元不等。

meanings.meaning_en: when you are alone, especially when this is what you enjoy
meanings.example: the solitude of her house on the lake
meanings.example_cn: 她湖边那所房子的清静

meanings.meaning_en: the central and most important part of an area, system, activity etc, which all the other parts are connected to
meanings.example: the commercial hub of the region
meanings.example_cn: 该地区的商业中心

meanings.meaning_cn: 箍, 铁环, 戒指, 篮
meanings.meaning_en: a large ring made of wood, metal, plastic etc
meanings.example: A boy came towards them, rolling an iron hoop.
meanings.example_cn: 一个男孩滚着一个铁环朝他们走来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 古代的天体观测仪, 星盘
meanings.meaning_en: an instrument used by early astronomers to measure the altitude of stars and planets and also as a navigational aid
a small object that is interesting because it is beautiful or rare
meanings.example: Red and blue spectacles, it was imagined, would be routinely employed to watch a film. Flat projection would be a historical curio.
meanings.example_cn: 当时人们认为那种红蓝3D眼镜将是未来观影必备物品，平板投射技术将成为历史古董。

meanings.meaning_cn: 古罗马城镇的广场(或市场), 论坛, 法庭, 讨论会
meanings.meaning_en: a group of computer users who are interested in a particular subject and discuss it using  email  or the Internet
meanings.example: Members of the council agreed that was an important forum for discussion.
meanings.example_cn: 理事会成员们一致认为那是一个用于讨论的重要论坛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 古罗马公开表演的格斗者(通常都是奴隶和俘虏), 精于辩论和格斗的人, 职业拳击者
古罗马军团(约有3000至6000步兵,辅以数百名骑兵), <书>众多, 大批
meanings.meaning_en: a large group of soldiers, especially in ancient Rome
meanings.example: ...the Sudan-based troops of the Libyan Islamic Legion.
meanings.example_cn: …在苏丹驻扎的利比里亚伊斯兰教军团部队。

meanings.example: Courses include Latin, paleography, as well as courses in the history and literature of these periods.
meanings.example_cn: 课程包括拉丁语、古文字学和那些时期的历史文学。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where grain, especially wheat, is stored
meanings.example: The Mid-West is the granary of the U.S.
meanings.example_cn: 中西部是美国的粮仓。

meanings.meaning_en: the outer seed covers that are separated from grain before it is used as food
a breakfast food made from grain and usually eaten with milk
meanings.example: a bowl of breakfast cereal
meanings.example_cn: 一碗早餐麦片

meanings.meaning_en: someone who owns shares in a company or business
meanings.example: Shareholders have been told to expect an even lower result next year.
meanings.example_cn: 股东们被告知明年的业绩还会更差。

meanings.example: He deplored religious bigotry.
meanings.example_cn: 他谴责了宗教偏执的行为。

meanings.meaning_en: If you snub someone, your behaviour or your remarks can be referred to as a snub
meanings.example: Ryan took it as a snub.
meanings.example_cn: 瑞安视其为对他的怠慢。

meanings.meaning_en: the crime of deliberately damaging things, especially public property
meanings.example: ...a 13-year-old boy whose crime file includes violence, theft, vandalism and bullying.
meanings.example_cn: …一个犯罪档案中包括暴力、偷窃、破坏公物和恃强凌弱的13岁男孩。

meanings.meaning_en: a fault in the way a machine or part of someone’s body works
meanings.example: a malfunction in one of the engines
meanings.example_cn: 其中一个引擎的失灵

meanings.meaning_cn: 刮, 擦, 擦痕, 刮擦声, 困境
meanings.meaning_en: a mark or slight injury caused by rubbing against a rough surface
meanings.example: I came away from the accident with only cuts and scrapes.
meanings.example_cn: 这次事故我只受了点皮外伤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 寡头政治, 寡头政治的执政团
meanings.meaning_en: a small group of people who run a country or organization, or a country that is run by a small group of people
meanings.example: Eventually oligarchy took over from democracy.
meanings.example_cn: 最终寡头政治取代了民主制度。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乖戾的(老)人, 脾气坏的人, 爱争吵的(老)家伙
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is often annoyed or angry, especially an old person
meanings.example: ...such a terrible old curmudgeon.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个脾气如此糟糕的老头。

meanings.meaning_cn: 怪诞的思想、行动或事件, 畸形人, 畸形的动物或植物, 反复无常
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is considered to be very strange because of the way they look, behave, or think
meanings.example: These glasses make me look like a freak.
meanings.example_cn: 我戴这副眼镜看上去像个怪人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 怪念头, 奇想, 任意
meanings.example: a sense of fancy and whimsy
meanings.example_cn: 稀奇古怪的想象力

meanings.meaning_en: an imaginary or ancient creature that is large, ugly, and frightening
meanings.example: the remains of a prehistoric monster
meanings.example_cn: 史前怪兽的遗骸

meanings.meaning_en: when a factory, school, hospital etc has to close permanently
meanings.example: Several military bases are threatened with closure .
meanings.example_cn: 几处军事基地面临关闭。

meanings.meaning_en: a disease that causes the joints of your body to become swollen and very painful
meanings.example: I have a touch of arthritis in the wrist.
meanings.example_cn: 我的手腕有轻微关节炎。

meanings.meaning_cn: 关税, 关税表, 税则, (旅馆, 饭店等的)价目表、价格表
meanings.meaning_en: a tax on goods coming into a country or going out of a country
meanings.example: America wants to eliminate tariffs on items such as electronics.
meanings.example_cn: 美国想要取消电子类产品的关税。

meanings.meaning_cn: 官方批准, 认可, 嘉许
meanings.meaning_en: official praise or approval

meanings.meaning_cn: 官僚, 官僚作风, 官僚机构
meanings.meaning_en: a complicated official system that is annoying or confusing because it has a lot of rules, processes etc
meanings.example: the reduction of unnecessary bureaucracy
meanings.example_cn: 消除不必要的官僚体制

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is in charge of a  museum  or zoo
meanings.example: He’s Curator of Prints at the Metropolitan.
meanings.example_cn: 他是大都会艺术博物馆印刷品馆部的主管。

meanings.meaning_en: a part that is fitted to the end of a hose, pipe etc to direct and control the stream of liquid or gas pouring out
meanings.example: If he put his finger over the nozzle he could produce a forceful spray.
meanings.example_cn: 如果他把手指按在喷嘴上，就可以产生强力的喷射。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is responsible for looking after something important or valuable
meanings.example: ...the custodian of the holy shrines in Mecca and Medina.
meanings.example_cn: …在麦加和麦地那的圣地的管理员。

meanings.meaning_en: Regimentation is very strict control over the way a group of people behave or the way something is done
meanings.example: Democracy is incompatible with excessive, bureaucratic regimentation of social life.
meanings.example_cn: 民主与受到过度的、官僚化的管制的社会生活是不相容的。

meanings.meaning_en: the force that keeps an object in the same position or keeps it moving until it is moved or stopped by another force
meanings.example: Galileo and Descartes replaced that with the idea of inertia.
meanings.example_cn: 伽利略和笛卡尔用惯性的概念将其取代。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of bushes and small trees
meanings.example: One day he was fishing with another boy when a gamekeeper suddenly darted forth from a thicket.
meanings.example_cn: 有一天他正和另一个男孩在那边钓鱼，突然从灌木丛里窜出一个看守。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of putting a new feeling or quality into something
meanings.example: He brought a tremendous infusion of hope to the people.
meanings.example_cn: 他给人们带来极大的希望。

meanings.meaning_cn: 光, 光谱, 型谱频谱
meanings.meaning_en: the set of bands of coloured light into which a beam of light separates when it is passed through a  prism
meanings.example: the electromagnetic spectrum
meanings.example_cn: 电磁（波）谱

meanings.meaning_en: an attractive shiny appearance
meanings.example: Her thick, black hair shone with lustre.
meanings.example_cn: 她那一头乌黑浓密的秀发闪动着光泽。

meanings.meaning_cn: 光彩, 壮观, 杰出

meanings.meaning_en: the production by a green plant of special substances like sugar that it uses as food, caused by the action of sunlight on  chlorophyll (= the green substance in leaves )
meanings.example: It has at least one gene necessary for photosynthesis—so far it’s the only animal known with this ability.
meanings.example_cn: 它有至少一个基因是光合作用所必需的——到目前为止这是唯一被发现具有此项能力的动物。

meanings.meaning_en: a soft smooth shiny appearance
meanings.example: Her hair had a lovely coppery sheen.
meanings.example_cn: 她的头发闪着美丽的紫铜色光泽。

meanings.example: By the reappearance of the different types, different symbols torii in Huizhou, it posts the refulgence and heaviness of the traditional culture of Huizhou.
meanings.example_cn: 通过徽州大地上不同类型、不同象徵意义牌坊的再现，揭示了徽州这一传统文化形态的辉煌与沉重。

meanings.example: Trust us! Work together, We'll be effulgence in the future path of cooperation.
meanings.example_cn: 相信我们！在未来携手合作的事业道路上，我们一定风光无限、灿烂辉煌！

meanings.meaning_cn: 光辉, 闪烁, 辐射率, 深粉红色
meanings.meaning_en: a soft gentle light
meanings.example: the moon’s radiance
meanings.example_cn: 月光

meanings.meaning_cn: 光泽的表面, 光彩, 欺人的表面, 假象, 注释
meanings.meaning_en: a bright shine on a surface
meanings.example: This gel will add gloss to even the dullest hair.
meanings.example_cn: 用了这种发胶，即使最干枯的头发也会增添光泽。

meanings.meaning_cn: 广场, 露天汽车停车场, 购物中心
meanings.meaning_en: a public square or market place surrounded by buildings, especially in towns in Spanish-speaking countries
meanings.example: Across the busy plaza, vendors sell hot dogs and croissant sandwiches.
meanings.example_cn: 忙碌的露天广场对面，小贩们在卖热狗和新月形面包三明治。

meanings.meaning_cn: 广场, 走廊, 露天市场
meanings.meaning_en: a large square open area between the houses in a town or city, where people often meet or sit together
meanings.example: ...a piazza dotted with fountains.
meanings.example_cn: ...布满喷泉的广场。

meanings.meaning_cn: 广大, 巨大, 无限, 浩瀚
meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize the great size of something, especially something that cannot be measured
the act of giving back something that was lost or stolen to its owner, or of paying for damage
meanings.example: The offender must make restitution for the hurt that he or she has caused.
meanings.example_cn: 违法者必须为其所造成的伤害作出赔偿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 归还, 复位, 交换, 代替者, 补充兵员, 置换, 移位
meanings.meaning_en: when you get something that is newer or better than the one you had before
meanings.example: Our old car is badly in need of replacement.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的旧车急需更换。

meanings.example: And this brings us to the notion of attribution.
meanings.example_cn: 这就要我们了解归因这个概念了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 归罪, 归咎, 归因, 非难, 诋毁, 罪名, 污名
规律严肃的人, 严格的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is very strict and makes people obey rules exactly
meanings.example: The woman in charge was a martinet who treated us like children.
meanings.example_cn: 那管事的女人严格执行纪律，拿我们当孩子对待。

meanings.meaning_en: a rule on which a way of thinking or behaving is based
meanings.example: basic moral precepts
meanings.example_cn: 基本的道德准则

meanings.meaning_cn: 规则, 规章, 调节, 校准
meanings.meaning_en: an official rule or order
meanings.example: There seem to be so many rules and regulations these days.
meanings.example_cn: 如今好像条条框框很多。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been persuaded to change their beliefs and accept a particular religion or opinion
the clever use of reasons or explanations that seem correct but are really false, in order to deceive people
meanings.example: Political selection is more dependent on sophistry and less on economic literacy.
meanings.example_cn: 政治竞选更多取决于诡辩之术而非对经济是否懂行。

meanings.meaning_en: an instance of sophistry
meanings.example: It is sophism to connect physiological needs with morality.
meanings.example_cn: 片面地把生理问题与所谓“道德”混同起来，根本上就是诡辩。

meanings.meaning_en: a clever trick used to deceive someone
meanings.example: Agnes tried to think of a ruse to get Paul out of the house.
meanings.example_cn: 阿格尼丝试图想个办法把保罗从屋子里骗出来。

meanings.example: They arehearersof their Origin, but not servants of machination.
meanings.example_cn: 人是自身本源的倾听者，然而并非是诡计者的仆人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 诡计, 阴谋, 欺骗
meanings.meaning_en: trickery, cunning, or craftiness
a  ghost
meanings.example: I suppose the first time I encountered the word “wraith” was in the 70’s when I read JRR Tolkien’s Lord of the Rings.
meanings.example_cn: 我第一次读到wraith(鬼魂)这个词应该是在70年代，它当时出现在JRR·托尔金的《指环王》中。

meanings.meaning_en: A patrician is a person who comes from a family of high social rank
meanings.example: Cameron was a rich man, a patrician.
meanings.example_cn: 卡梅隆曾经是个有钱的贵族子弟。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who belongs to the highest social class
meanings.example: ...a wealthy southern aristocrat.
meanings.example_cn: …一位富有的南方贵族。

meanings.meaning_cn: 滚下, 落下, 依次, 相传, 转移, 委付
meanings.meaning_en: Devolution is the transfer of some authority or power from a central organization or government to smaller organizations or government departments
meanings.example: ...the devolution of power to the regions.
meanings.example_cn: …权力下放到地方。

meanings.meaning_cn: 裹尸布, 寿衣, 覆盖物, 船的横桅索
meanings.meaning_en: a cloth that is wrapped around a dead person’s body before it is buried
meanings.example: The fog rolled in, and a grey shroud covered the city.
meanings.example_cn: 大雾滚滚而来，一张灰色的天幕笼罩着这个城市。

meanings.meaning_en: the condition of feeling that you have had enough of something, for example food
meanings.example: physical feelings of hunger and satiety
meanings.example_cn: 饥饿和饱足等生理感觉

meanings.meaning_cn: 过错, 缺点, 故障, 毛病
meanings.meaning_en: if something bad that has happened is your fault, you should be blamed for it, because you made a mistake or failed to do something
meanings.example: I’m really sorry - it’s all my fault.
meanings.example_cn: 我真的很抱歉——都是我的错。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过道, (剧场, 火车等)座间通道, (美国作aisle)舷侧门, 舷梯, 通路, 跳板
meanings.meaning_en: a space between two rows of seats in a theatre, bus, or train

meanings.meaning_cn: 过冬, 冬眠, 避寒
meanings.example: Heart rate tracking for three of the Alaska bears showed a drop from 55 beats per minute on average before hibernation to 14 erratic ones per minute in winter.
meanings.example_cn: 对三头阿拉斯加的黑熊的心率追踪显示出它们在冬眠前的平均每分钟 55 下降低到了冬天里每分钟飘忽不定的 14 下。

meanings.example: I'll take her in black any day. Finally, I discovered a whole other level of luxury – or, shall we say, nimiety.
meanings.example_cn: 我会全天都开着黑色的这款车。最后，我发现了全新的奢华级轿车– 或者应该说是过度的奢华–。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过分讲究, 过于细心
meanings.meaning_en: fastidiousness or affectation, esp in speech or manners

meanings.meaning_cn: 过分讲究衣饰或举动的人, 花花公子
meanings.meaning_en: a man who is very interested in his clothes and appearance - used to show disapproval

meanings.example: These pillars were known as the Straits of Gibraltar in bygone times.
meanings.example_cn: 这些石柱在过去被称为是直布罗陀海峡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过剩, 过多, 多血症
meanings.meaning_en: A plethora of something is a large amount of it, especially an amount of it that is greater than you need, want, or can cope with
meanings.example: A plethora of new operators will be allowed to enter the market.
meanings.example_cn: 过多的新经营者将获准进入市场。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过失, 出丑, 失态
meanings.meaning_en: an embarrassing mistake made in a social situation or in public
meanings.example: The consul’s comments were a major diplomatic gaffe.
meanings.example_cn: 领事的评论是一次重大的外交失言。

meanings.meaning_en: a fault or a lack of something that means that something or someone is not perfect
meanings.example: All the cars are tested for defects before they leave the factory.
meanings.example_cn: 所有汽车在出厂前都经过品质检验。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过失, 罪过, 侵入
meanings.meaning_en: something you have done that is morally wrong

meanings.meaning_cn: 过食, 过度, 恶心
meanings.meaning_en: A surfeit of something is an amount which is too large
meanings.example: Rationing had put an end to a surfeit of biscuits long ago.
meanings.example_cn: 定量供应很久以前就结束了饼干过剩的情况。

meanings.meaning_cn: 过于琐碎的工作, 麻烦事

meanings.meaning_en: a  shellfish  you can eat that has a shell in two parts that open up
meanings.example: clam chowder (= a type of soup )
meanings.example_cn: 蛤蜊杂烩汤

meanings.meaning_cn: 海滨浴场,海滨游乐场(尤指远洋客轮上的),露天游泳池
meanings.meaning_en: an outdoor public area, often at a beach, lake etc, for swimming and lying in the sun

meanings.meaning_cn: 海盗, 盗印者, 盗版者, 侵犯专利权者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who sails on the seas, attacking other boats and stealing things from them
meanings.example: Computer game pirates cost the industry twenty million pounds a year.
meanings.example_cn: 电脑游戏盗版者每年要给该行业带来两千万英镑的损失。

meanings.meaning_cn: 海盗行为, 侵犯版权, 非法翻印盗版
meanings.meaning_en: the crime of illegally copying and selling books, tapes, videos, computer programs etc
meanings.example: software piracy
meanings.example_cn: 软件盗版

meanings.example: All the battleships can refresh in this harbor.
meanings.example_cn: 所有战舰都能在这个港口装上补充供应品。

meanings.meaning_en: a picture of the sea
meanings.example: Opponents say a unique landscape or seascape is being overshadowed, to the detriment of tourists and residents alike.
meanings.example_cn: 反对者认为，风能技术会遮挡独特的风景或海景，对当地居民及游客都不公平。

meanings.meaning_en: a North American animal that has thick fur and a wide flat tail, and cuts down trees with its teeth
meanings.example: ...a coat with a huge beaver collar.
meanings.example_cn: …一件带有大海狸毛皮领的大衣。

meanings.meaning_cn: 海市蜃楼, 雾气, 幻想, 妄想
meanings.meaning_en: an effect caused by hot air in a desert, which makes you think that you can see objects when they are not actually there
meanings.example: Perhaps we are just chasing a mirage.
meanings.example_cn: 也许我们只是在追逐一个梦。

meanings.meaning_en: a black and white sea bird
meanings.example: The petrel came winnowing in from afar on the sea.
meanings.example_cn: 海燕从海上遥远的地方振翅飞来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 害虫, 寄生虫, 害兽, 害鸟, 歹徒
meanings.meaning_en: small animals, birds, and insects that are harmful because they destroy crops, spoil food, and spread disease
meanings.example: The beds were filthy and full of vermin.
meanings.example_cn: 那些床铺肮脏不堪，而且爬满了虫子。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being unclear, confusing, or not certain, or things that produce this effect
meanings.example: legal ambiguities
meanings.example_cn: 法律上含混不清的地方

meanings.meaning_cn: 含蓄, 储蓄的东西(词、语等), 内涵
meanings.meaning_en: The connotations of a particular word or name are the ideas or qualities which it makes you think of
meanings.example: It's just one of those words that's got so many negative connotations.
meanings.example_cn: 它只是那些有很多负面内涵意义的词之一。

meanings.meaning_cn: 寒冷, 冷淡, [医]性感缺失

meanings.meaning_en: a soft metal, usually a mixture of  lead  and  tin  , which can be melted and used to join two metal surfaces, wires etc
meanings.example: Each sculptural planter is made-to-order with handmade glass and lead-free solder and comes with everything you need but the plants.
meanings.example_cn: 每个艺术花盆都是定制的。 它们由手工制作的玻璃和无铅焊料接合而成，交付使用时，万事俱备，只欠花卉。

meanings.meaning_en: words and expressions used in a particular profession or by a particular group of people, which are difficult for other people to understand – often used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Keep it simple and avoid the use of jargon.
meanings.example_cn: 简单点，避免使用术语。

meanings.meaning_en: a line of people or vehicles moving slowly as part of a ceremony
meanings.example: They marched in procession to the Capitol building.
meanings.example_cn: 他们列队向国会大厦行进。

meanings.meaning_cn: 行列, 长队, 队列
meanings.meaning_en: a line of people waiting to enter a building, buy something etc, or a line of vehicles waiting to move
meanings.example: You’ll have to join the queue.
meanings.example_cn: 你得排队。

meanings.meaning_en: the way that someone behaves in public
meanings.example: One peculiarity of the child's deportment remains yet to be told.
meanings.example_cn: 这孩子的举止上还有一个特点也要说一说。

meanings.meaning_cn: 行为, 事实, 功绩, 实行, 契约
meanings.meaning_en: something someone does, especially something that is very good or very bad
meanings.example: After the morning’s good deeds he deserved a rest.
meanings.example_cn: 上午做了好事之后，他理应休息一下。

meanings.meaning_en: illegal or immoral behaviour or actions, especially by young people
meanings.example: the ever-rising statistics of delinquency and crime
meanings.example_cn: 青少年违法犯罪不断增加的统计数字

meanings.meaning_cn: 航海事业, 水手工作
航行日志, 原木, 园形木材, 园木
meanings.meaning_en: a thick piece of wood from a tree
meanings.example: a roaring log fire
meanings.example_cn: 原木燃烧的熊熊大火

meanings.meaning_en: the science of designing and flying planes
meanings.example: If we in fact had the right level of investment in aeronautics, we would not currently be competing with Airbus.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我们真的在航空领域投入了足够多的资金，现在就绝不会还在与空中客车缠斗了。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large, expensive, and comfortable car, driven by someone who is paid to drive
meanings.example: When Summers travelled by limousine or airplane, Sandberg gave up her seat next to him to make sure that other officials and staffers got time with the boss.
meanings.example_cn: 当萨默斯乘坐豪华轿车或飞机时，桑德伯格会放弃紧挨着他的位置，留给别的官员和职员与这位老板接触的时间。

meanings.meaning_en: Pugnacity is the quality of being pugnacious
meanings.example: He is legendary for his fearlessness and pugnacity.
meanings.example_cn: 他以无畏及好斗而名扬四海。

meanings.meaning_cn: 好客, 宜人, 盛情
meanings.meaning_en: friendly behaviour towards visitors
meanings.example: Thanks for your hospitality over the past few weeks.
meanings.example_cn: 感谢你几周来的热情款待。

meanings.meaning_en: Prurience is a strong interest in sexual matters
meanings.example: Nobody ever lost money by overestimating the public's prurience.
meanings.example_cn: 没有人在高估公众的色欲上输过钱。

meanings.example: The relationship between the old Duke and the young woman was put down to the salacity which is frequently found in rich old men. People imagined all manner of things, except the truth.
meanings.example_cn: 贪淫好色，这是有钱的老头儿常犯的毛病，人们对他们的关系有各种各样的猜测，就是未猜到真情。

meanings.meaning_cn: 好色, 淫荡, 纵欲
meanings.meaning_en: sexual desire or pleasure that is considered bad because it is not part of a romantic relationship
meanings.example: There was a hint of lechery in his eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 他的眼神里带着一丝淫欲。

meanings.example: To be fair, though, I understand from the Times that whenever I mention in my column that WWII ended the Great Depression, the paper gets a lot of mail accusing me of being a warmonger.
meanings.example_cn: 公平地说，我从泰晤士报理解到无论何时我在我的专栏提及正是二战终结了最大的经济危机的看法，报社方面都会受到许多指责我是一名好战者的邮件。

meanings.example: The blare of the car horn alerted the members of the Story family who realised 17-year-old Ben's Toyota was no longer parked in the driveway of their home in Larkspur near Denver.
meanings.example_cn: 汽车喇叭的嘟嘟声惊动了Story一家，他们意识到17岁Ben的丰田车不再停在他们家的车道上了。 Story一家住在丹佛附近的拉克斯博(Larkspur)。

meanings.meaning_cn: 耗尽枯竭, 疲惫, 筋疲力尽, 竭尽, 详尽无遗的论述
meanings.meaning_en: extreme tiredness
meanings.example: Sheer exhaustion forced him to give up.
meanings.example_cn: 他疲惫不堪，只好放弃。

meanings.meaning_cn: 合并, 接合, 联合
meanings.meaning_en: a union of two or more political parties that allows them to form a government or fight an election together
meanings.example: the centre-right coalition government
meanings.example_cn: 政治上中间偏右的联合政府

meanings.meaning_cn: 合唱, 合唱队, 齐声
meanings.meaning_en: a large group of people who sing together
meanings.example: I sing with the university chorus.
meanings.example_cn: 我在大学合唱队里唱歌。

meanings.meaning_cn: 合计, 总计, 集合体
meanings.meaning_en: the total after a lot of different figures or points have been added together
meanings.example: (=  as a group or in total  ) , women outlive men by 7 or more years.
meanings.example_cn: 总体来看，女性比男性多活七年或以上。

meanings.meaning_en: a metal that consists of two or more metals mixed together
meanings.example: Brass is an alloy of copper and zinc.
meanings.example_cn: 黄铜是铜和锌的合金。

meanings.meaning_cn: 合同, 公约, 协定
meanings.meaning_en: a formal agreement between two groups, countries, or people, especially to help each other or to stop fighting
meanings.example: the Warsaw pact
meanings.example_cn: 华沙条约

meanings.meaning_cn: 合同, 契约, 婚约
meanings.meaning_en: an official agreement between two or more people, stating what each will do
meanings.example: Employees who refuse to relocate are in breach of contract (= have done something not allowed by their contracts ) .
meanings.example_cn: 员工拒绝调动岗位是违反合约的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 和解, 调和, 顺从
meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which two people, countries etc become friendly with each other again after quarrelling
meanings.example: Her ex-husband had always hoped for a reconciliation.
meanings.example_cn: 她的前夫一直想和她重归于好。

meanings.example: There have been growing signs of a rapprochement with Vietnam.
meanings.example_cn: 同越南恢复友好关系的迹象日益明显了。

meanings.example: And last but not least, people with whom you can build a rapport and camaraderie with.
meanings.example_cn: 一直到最后、并非最不重要的一个人，与你建立起和谐融洽的友谊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 和谐, 一致, 和睦
meanings.meaning_en: the state of having a friendly relationship, so that you agree on things and live in peace
meanings.example: They expressed the hope that he would pursue a neutral and balanced policy for the sake of national concord.
meanings.example_cn: 他们希望他能为国家的和谐而追求一种中立而平衡的政策。

meanings.meaning_en: the wide part of a river where it goes into the sea
meanings.example: the Thames estuary
meanings.example_cn: 泰晤士河河口

meanings.meaning_en: a large grey African animal with a big head and mouth that lives near water
meanings.example: Still, now we knew for sure where whales came from and that the hippopotamus theory wasn't complete science fiction.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然，我们现在已肯定知道鲸来自何处，但是我们也清楚了，河马之说还不够完整。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance produced by your body that influences its growth, development, and condition
meanings.example: ...the male sex hormone testosterone.
meanings.example_cn: …男性性激素睾酮。

meanings.meaning_cn: 荷兰古代小铜币, 几文钱
meanings.meaning_en: a former small copper coin of the Netherlands

meanings.meaning_cn: 荷兰石竹, 康乃馨, 粉红色
meanings.meaning_en: a flower that smells sweet. Men often wear a carnation on their jacket on formal occasions.
the track of footmarks or solid waste that a wild animal leaves as it moves along
meanings.example: According to the spot-checking just now, we have found the spoor that the container door had been prized and the shortages of the cargo were probably caused by theft during the transport.
meanings.example_cn: 根据刚才现场勘查的情况，我们发现集装箱的箱门有撬过的痕迹，货物的短少有可能是运输中被偷盗所致。

meanings.meaning_en: the condition or quality of being malign, malevolent, or deadly
meanings.example: Scorn, bitterness, unprovoked malignity, gratuitous desire of ill, ridicule of whatever was good and holy, all awoke, to tempt, even while they frightened him.
meanings.example_cn: 轻蔑、狠毒、无缘无故的恶言秽行和歹意；对善良和神圣的事物妄加嘲弄，这一切全都绘唤醒起来，虽说把他吓得要命，却仍在诱惑着他。

meanings.meaning_cn: 横杆, 围栏, 扶手, 铁轨
meanings.meaning_en: one of the two long metal tracks fastened to the ground that trains move along
meanings.example: Several passengers were leaning against the ship’s rail.
meanings.example_cn: 几名乘客斜靠在轮船的栏杆上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 横贯, 横断, 横木, 障碍, 否认, 反驳, (建筑)通廊

meanings.meaning_en: a dark reddish purple colour
meanings.example: Green and red light mix to produce yellow, red and blue light mix to produce magenta, green and blue mix to produce cyan.
meanings.example_cn: 绿光和红光叠加可产生黄色，红光与蓝光叠加可产生品红色，绿光与蓝光叠加可产生青绿色。

meanings.meaning_en: a large complicated system such as the whole universe or a society, considered as a single unit
meanings.example: The macrocosm of the universe is mirrored in the microcosm of the mind.
meanings.example_cn: 宏观宇宙在人的心灵宇宙中得以反映。

meanings.example: Through these comparisons we can not only test to see if our experimental data are accurate, but find the most effective and efficient way to model tsunami inundation and loading.
meanings.example_cn: 通过对比，我们不仅能看到是否我们的实验数据是准确的，而且发现最有效和最高效的方法是建立海啸洪水模型。

meanings.meaning_en: a large flood, or period when there is a lot of rain
meanings.example: Even so, the data deluge is already starting to transform business, government, science and everyday life (see our special report in this issue).
meanings.example_cn: 尽管如此，数据洪水正在开始改变商业、政府、科学和人们的日常生活。

meanings.meaning_en: when you are sorry for something you have done
meanings.example: They showed no repentance during their trial.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在受审期间没有表现出任何悔悟。

meanings.meaning_en: If you refer to the logistics of doing something complicated that involves a lot of people or equipment, you are referring to the skilful organization of it so that it can be done successfully and efficiently
meanings.example: The skills and logistics of getting such a big show on the road pose enormous practical problems.
meanings.example_cn: 这样的一个大型节目进行巡演在技术和后勤方面都会面临大量实际问题。

meanings.meaning_en: the babies of animals or plants
meanings.example: ...the freed slaves and their progeny.
meanings.example_cn: ...被释放的奴隶和他们的后代。

meanings.meaning_en: a layer, fold, or thickness, as of cloth, wood, yarn, etc
meanings.example: a sweater in four-ply yarn
meanings.example_cn: 四股毛线织成的毛衣

meanings.meaning_cn: 厚木板, 支架, (政党的)政纲条款
meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow piece of wooden board, used especially for making structures to walk on
meanings.example: a long plank of wood
meanings.example_cn: 一长条厚木板

meanings.meaning_cn: 厚皮类动物, 迟钝的人
meanings.meaning_en: an animal with thick skin, such as an  elephant
meanings.example: A Thai architect took his love for elephants and designed a luxury residence and office building in the shape of a pachyderm.
meanings.example_cn: 一个泰国建筑师将其对大象的热爱兑现于以此厚皮类动物设计了这个住宅办公综合楼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 厚平板, 厚片, 混凝土路面, 板层
meanings.meaning_en: a thick flat piece of a hard material such as stone
meanings.example: a concrete slab
meanings.example_cn: 水泥板

meanings.meaning_cn: 厚颜无耻, 厚颜无耻的行为
meanings.meaning_en: rude behaviour that shocks you because it is so confident
meanings.example: The man had the effrontery to be sarcastic.
meanings.example_cn: 那个男人有冷嘲热讽的放肆劲。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who goes to live in another area or country, especially in order to find work
meanings.example: The government divides asylum seekers into economic migrants and genuine refugees.
meanings.example_cn: 政府将寻求政治庇护的人划分为经济移民和真正的难民。

meanings.meaning_cn: 候选人的地位, 候选人资格

meanings.meaning_en: the process of breathing
meanings.example: His respiration grew fainter throughout the day.
meanings.example_cn: 一天当中，他的呼吸越来越微弱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 胡闹, 开玩笑, 恶作剧
meanings.meaning_en: a trick, especially one which is played on someone to make them look silly
meanings.example: a childish prank
meanings.example_cn: 孩子气的恶作剧

meanings.meaning_en: talk or writing that is silly nonsense
meanings.example: In this section, Katherine's terrible hysteria and balderdash feels she seems to be in a state of insanity.
meanings.example_cn: 在这一片段中，凯瑟琳可怕的歇斯底里和胡言乱语让人感觉她似乎是处于一种精神错乱状态中。

meanings.meaning_en: a round fruit whose outer shell can be used as a container, or the container made from this fruit
meanings.example: I refused the last but washed down the fruit and vegetables with clear, cold water from a hollowed gourd.
meanings.example_cn: 我没有动第三碗，只就着一只葫芦里干净的凉水，把水果和蔬菜风卷残云地吃了下去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 糊, 面团, 黏土团
meanings.meaning_en: a soft thick mixture that can easily be shaped or spread
meanings.example: Mix the powder with enough water to make a smooth paste.
meanings.example_cn: 把粉末和足够的水混合调成均匀的糊状。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which two people, groups, or countries give each other similar kinds of help or special rights
meanings.example: They said they would press for reciprocity with Greece in the issuing of visas.
meanings.example_cn: 他们说，他们将会对希腊施压，以达成签证发放的互惠。

meanings.meaning_en: a deep wide hole, usually filled with water, dug around a castle as a defence
meanings.example: Certainly no one in the media would deny the attraction of living behind a deep moat, even if it is filled with sharks.
meanings.example_cn: 当然，在媒体业，没有人会否认围在深深的护城河里面过日子的吸引力，即使那河里满是鲨鱼在游来游去。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of jewellery worn to protect against bad luck, disease etc
meanings.example: When the farmer opened the tightly sealed amulet a dog jumped out and ran away, along with his successful crops.
meanings.example_cn: 当农民打开了紧紧密封的护身符，一只小狗狗跳出来，跑了，一并带走的还有他丰收的好运。

meanings.meaning_cn: 护身符, 辟邪物, 能产生奇迹的东西, 法宝
meanings.meaning_en: an object that is believed to have magic powers to protect the person who owns it
a group of vehicles or ships travelling together, sometimes in order to protect one another
meanings.example: a military convoy
meanings.example_cn: 军方的护送舰队

meanings.meaning_cn: 护卫(队), 护送, 陪同(人员), 护卫队
meanings.meaning_en: a person or a group of people or vehicles that go with someone in order to protect or guard them
meanings.example: a police escort
meanings.example_cn: 警察护卫队

meanings.meaning_cn: 花边, 花边般的透花工艺品
meanings.meaning_en: lace, or something that looks like lace

meanings.meaning_cn: 花朵, 花束, 铭文
meanings.meaning_en: a small  bunch  of flowers
meanings.example: There was a very small posy of flowers at my aunt's flat.
meanings.example_cn: 我姑姑的公寓里有很小一束花。

meanings.meaning_en: a fine powder produced by flowers, which is carried by the wind or by insects to other flowers of the same type, making them produce seeds
meanings.example: So how do you train them to respond to TNT the way they respond to pollen?
meanings.example_cn: 那么你如何才能训练它们，使得它们对TNT炸药的反应与对花粉的反应一样呢？

meanings.meaning_en: a very hard grey rock, often used in building
meanings.example: He was very skilled at pointing down the blocks of granite.
meanings.example_cn: 他善于把花岗岩石凿平。

meanings.example: Change places and handy dandy, which is the justice, which is the thief?
meanings.example_cn: 改变地方和随处可见的花花公子，哪个是正义，哪个是窃贼？

meanings.meaning_en: a ring of flowers or leaves, worn on your head or around your neck for decoration or for a special ceremony
meanings.example: I saw that my garland of overnight was still hanging loose from your hair.
meanings.example_cn: 我看见，昨夜我为你编结的花环依然松松地垂在你的发上。

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement of flowers, especially one that you give to someone
meanings.example: The woman carried a bouquet of dried violets.
meanings.example_cn: 那个女子拿着一束干紫罗兰花。

meanings.meaning_en: a mixture of pieces of dried flowers and leaves kept in a bowl to make a room smell pleasant
meanings.example: ...a potpourri of architectural styles from all over the world.
meanings.example_cn: ...一种世界各地建筑风格的荟萃。

meanings.example: Therefore, its floral language is flamboyance.
meanings.example_cn: 因此，它的花语就是-华丽。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment consisting of a wheel over which a rope or chain is pulled to lift heavy things
meanings.example: They reeved the rope through the pulley.
meanings.example_cn: 他们把绳索穿过滑轮。

meanings.meaning_en: a light plane that flies without an engine
meanings.example: And go for a ride on a glider airplane, because who says planes need motors?
meanings.example_cn: 她会去坐滑翔机，因为没人说过飞机一定要有发动机吧？

meanings.meaning_cn: 滑稽的动作, 古怪的姿态
meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that seems strange, funny, silly, or annoying
meanings.example: We’re all growing tired of his childish antics.
meanings.example_cn: 我们都厌倦了他那些幼稚的滑稽举动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 滑稽的转写, 漫画, 滑稽模仿
滑稽诙谐之事, 笑谈, 笑话
meanings.meaning_en: humour; comedy
a substance such as oil that you put on surfaces that rub together, especially parts of a machine, in order to make them move smoothly and easily
meanings.example: Its nozzle was smeared with some kind of lubricant.
meanings.example_cn: 它的喷嘴上涂了种润滑油。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is a perfect example of a quality because they have a lot of it
meanings.example: He became the personification of the financial excess of the 1980s.
meanings.example_cn: 他成了20世纪80年代金融过热时期的一个典型。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal dance or party where people wear  mask s  and unusual clothes
a wooden frame that you put a painting on while you paint it

meanings.example_cn: 在这个房间你也可以发现亚历山大的画架和调色板。

meanings.meaning_en: a tree with smooth  bark (=  outer covering  )  and thin branches, or the wood from this tree
meanings.example: In Finland purists insist that only birch bark should be added.
meanings.example_cn: 在芬兰，纯化论者坚持说只能加白桦树皮。

meanings.meaning_en: when a woman is pregnant (= has a baby growing inside her body )
meanings.example: This drug should not be taken during pregnancy.

meanings.meaning_cn: 怀孕, 酝酿, 妊娠
meanings.meaning_en: the process by which a new idea, piece of work etc is developed, or the period of time when this happens
meanings.example: The gestation period of a horse is about 11 months.
meanings.example_cn: 马的妊娠期为11个月左右。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欢呼, 喝彩, (以欢呼、鼓掌等表示的)拥护, 赞成
meanings.meaning_en: a loud expression of approval or welcome

meanings.example_cn: 这条新闻迎来了相当广泛的喝彩。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of satisfaction and excitement, often because something bad has happened to someone else
meanings.example: Manufacturers are rubbing their hands with glee as they prepare to cash in.
meanings.example_cn: 厂家准备收钱的时候高兴得直搓手。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欢乐的歌, 颂歌, (尤指)圣诞节颂歌
meanings.meaning_en: a traditional Christmas song
meanings.example: The singing of Christmas carols is a custom derived from early dance routines of pagan origin.
meanings.example_cn: 唱圣诞歌这一传统源自异教早期的舞蹈仪式。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欢乐的精神, 欢乐的气氛作乐, 乐事
meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something is cheerful and fun
meanings.example: Lars enjoyed the warmth and gaiety of these occasions.
meanings.example_cn: 拉斯喜欢这类场合温馨而欢乐的气氛。

meanings.meaning_en: a happy song of praise, thanks, or victory
meanings.example: ...a paean to deep, passionate love.
meanings.example_cn: ...一首对深切而富有激情的爱情的颂歌。

meanings.meaning_en: laughter, or a feeling of fun
meanings.example: Eva joined in the hilarity as much as anyone.
meanings.example_cn: 伊娃和其他人一样尽情欢笑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欢跳, 雀跃, 嬉戏

meanings.meaning_en: happiness and laughter
meanings.example: Her body began to shake with mirth.
meanings.example_cn: 她笑得浑身直颤。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that has black and white fur, lives in holes in the ground, and is active at night

meanings.meaning_cn: 环, 线(绳)圈, 弯曲部分, 回路, 回线, (铁路)让车道, (飞机)翻圈飞行
meanings.meaning_en: a shape like a curve or a circle made by a line curving back towards itself, or a piece of wire, string etc that has this shape
meanings.example: Mrs. Morrell reached for a loop of garden hose.
meanings.example_cn: 莫雷尔夫人伸手去拿一圈橡胶软管。

meanings.meaning_cn: 环锯, 钻孔机, 陷阱
meanings.meaning_en: an instrument resembling a carpenter's brace and bit formerly used to remove circular sections of bone (esp from the skull)

meanings.example: One suggestion is that blushing started out as a simple appeasement ritual: a way to show dominant members of the group that we submit to their authority.
meanings.example_cn: 有一种看法是：脸红一开始是以一种简单的缓和性礼节出现的：它表示为人们屈服于郡体统治者权力的一种方法。

meanings.example: Would tardiness or being too talkative affect your grades?
meanings.example_cn: 说得太慢或说得太多会不会影响你的分数？

meanings.meaning_cn: 缓刑(尤指缓期执行死刑), 缓刑令, (痛苦, 烦恼等的)暂缓
meanings.meaning_en: a delay before something bad happens or continues to happen
a state of imagining or thinking about pleasant things, that is like dreaming
meanings.example: She was startled out of her reverie by a loud crash.
meanings.example_cn: 哗啦一声巨响把她从幻想中惊醒。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of music that does not have a regular form or style
something that exists only in your imagination
meanings.example: Indeed, pain itself is an illusion, a phantom in the brain.
meanings.example_cn: 实际上疼痛本身就是一个幻觉，一个脑中的幽灵。

meanings.example: The catalytic oxidation ability of 13 metal ion-exchanged montmorillonites are investigated in oxidative removal of the sulfides which are the main pollutant in the moult and alkali swell waste water.
meanings.example_cn: 在氧化法去除含硫脱毛碱膨胀废水内主要污染物硫化物的过程中，考察了13种金属离子交换蒙脱石的催化氧化能力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 换毛, 脱皮, 换毛期
meanings.example: Like other penguins, it undergoes an annual molt, replacing all its feathers in a few weeks.
meanings.example_cn: 和其他企鹅一样，它也经历一年一次的脱毛，在几周时间里替换掉所有的羽毛。

meanings.example: More to the point, her father would be apoplectic at the idea.
meanings.example_cn: 还有，孩子他爸可能会被女儿的这个主意引发中风的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 荒废, 崩塌, 破损

meanings.example: What are we when confronted with the interior vortex which swallows us into absurdity?
meanings.example_cn: 当面对内心的漩涡，把我们卷入荒谬的漩涡时，我们是什么呢？

meanings.meaning_cn: 慌乱, 狼狈, 混乱, 激动
meanings.meaning_en: nervous and confused because you are trying to do things quickly
members of a royal family
meanings.example: At school the other children treated them like royalty .
meanings.example_cn: 在学校里，其他孩子将他们奉若王族。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who spends money carelessly, even when they do not have a lot of it
meanings.example: Inflation was tamed, and spendthrift local and federal governments were required by law to rein in their debts.
meanings.example_cn: 通胀得到抑制，挥霍无度的地方和中央政府被法律要求严格控制他们的债务。

meanings.example: We do not pursue one resplendence but development for ever.
meanings.example_cn: 我们不求一时之辉煌，但求永远的发展。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of metal, cloth, or plastic with a picture or words on it, worn to show rank, membership of a group, support for a political idea etc
meanings.example: We were each handed a badge with our name on it.
meanings.example_cn: 我们每个人都拿到一个徽章，上面有我们的名字。

meanings.meaning_en: thinking back to a time in the past, especially with the advantage of knowing more now than you did then
meanings.example: In retrospect, I wonder if we should have done more.
meanings.example_cn: 回过头看，我在想我们是否应该做得更多些。

meanings.meaning_en: an unkind or unfriendly answer to a friendly suggestion or offer of help
meanings.example: He received a humiliating rebuff from his manager.
meanings.example_cn: 他遭到经理的断然拒绝，十分丢脸。

meanings.example: Deposit any random checks you get - like rebate, rewards or reimbursement checks - into this fund.
meanings.example_cn: 把你挣的随机钱——比如像回扣，鉴赏，或偿款等——存到这个基金里。

meanings.meaning_en: a covered passage that surrounds one side of a square garden in a church,  monastery  etc
meanings.example: What you beheld was the interior of a cloister.
meanings.example_cn: 你所看见的是一个修道院的内部。

meanings.meaning_cn: 回想, 记忆力, 怀旧
meanings.example: Here I am boring you with my reminiscences.
meanings.example_cn: 我的这些陈年老事让你烦了吧。

meanings.meaning_en: deeply felt remorse; penitence

meanings.example_cn: 布兰克费恩显然在尽力抚慰德国人，并表现出一定的悔悟。

meanings.meaning_en: the place where two or more rivers flow together

meanings.example_cn: 这处160米的瀑布是维拉河和维里诺河壮观的汇合处的标志。

meanings.meaning_cn: 汇款, 汇寄之款, 汇款额
meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that you send to pay for something
meanings.example: Please enclose your remittance, making checks payable to Valley Technology Services.
meanings.example_cn: 请随信附上您的汇款，支票收款方为瓦利科技服务公司。

meanings.meaning_en: a discussion in which enemies try to achieve peace

meanings.example_cn: 为了交换俘虏我们必须派一名可靠的军官去与他们的领导人谈判。

meanings.meaning_en: a state in which you cannot think, speak, see, or hear clearly, usually because you have drunk too much alcohol or taken drugs
meanings.example: We found him lying at the bottom of the stairs in a drunken stupor .
meanings.example_cn: 我们发现他躺在楼梯口，醉得不省人事。

meanings.example_cn: 她昏迷了七周。

meanings.meaning_en: Someone's nuptials are their wedding celebrations

meanings.example_cn: 她一门心思筹备她的婚礼。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing, music, film etc that is deliberately made in the style of someone or something else

meanings.example_cn: 他的浴室是高档室内设计的集大成之作。

meanings.example: Salt and sugar intermingle with each other.
meanings.example_cn: 糖和盐相互混合在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: unnecessary noise and activity

meanings.example_cn: 随后就引发一场小型外交动乱，因为美白乳是从越南非法进口的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 混乱, 断层, 脱臼
meanings.meaning_en: Dislocation is a situation in which something such as a system, process, or way of life is greatly disturbed or prevented from continuing as normal
meanings.example: Millions of refugees have suffered a total dislocation of their lives.
meanings.example_cn: 几百万难民饱受生活颠沛流离之苦。

meanings.example_cn: 这个国家陷入了经济大混乱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 混乱, 杂乱, 尤指男女乱交
混杂的人群, 杂乱的一团, 混合物, 杂录, [音]集成曲

meanings.meaning_en: energy

meanings.example_cn: 她精力旺盛。

meanings.meaning_en: liveliness and excitement

meanings.meaning_cn: 火花, 火星, 闪光, 情郎, 花花公子, 活力, 电信技师, 瞬间放电
meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of burning material produced by a fire or by hitting or rubbing two hard objects together

meanings.meaning_en: a high pile of wood on which a dead body is placed to be burned in a funeral ceremony

meanings.example_cn: 火葬柴堆

meanings.example_cn: 他说俄罗斯正“以大约百分之八十的幅度”削减新武器的补给。

meanings.meaning_cn: 击剑者, 剑术家, 篱笆匠

a railway engine

meanings.meaning_cn: 机灵, 独创性, 精巧, 灵活性
机智, 手法, 老练, 角觉
肌肉, 精力, 体力, 原动力, [解]腱

meanings.example: The sinews on his neck stood out like knotted string.
meanings.example_cn: 他颈部的肌腱像打结的绳般凸出。

meanings.example_cn: 主要症状为发热、寒战、头痛、倦怠和肌痛。

meanings.example_cn: ...这条偷牛贼和逃犯曾走过的古老的怀俄明小路。

meanings.example: However, the rationale for such initiatives is not, of course, solely economic.
meanings.example_cn: 但是，这些积极行动的根本原因当然不全是出于经济目的。

meanings.meaning_en: A pedestal is the base on which something such as a statue stands
meanings.example: ...a larger than life-sized bronze statue on a granite pedestal.
meanings.example_cn: …在花岗岩基座上的一尊比真人大的铜像。

meanings.example: Whitlock was perched on the sill of the room's only window.

meanings.example: A hard-money advocate, suspicious of personal debt, Jackson viewed the Bank as a monstrosity that gave power over the people's money to a few unelected private bankers.
meanings.example_cn: 作为一个珍惜血汗钱、怀疑个人借债的倡导者，杰克逊视银行为少数未经选举的私人银行家支配人民财富的畸形产物。

meanings.meaning_en: a small amount of damage to the brain that makes you lose consciousness or feel sick for a short time, usually caused by something hitting your head

meanings.example_cn: 我脑部遭受了震荡，还有许多擦伤和瘀伤。

meanings.meaning_en: public argument or action for social or political change

meanings.example: When comic Michael Richards was unnerved by an African American heckler at a comedy club several years ago, he responded with a racial-slur-laced tirade.
meanings.example_cn: 当喜剧演员迈克尔·理查德斯几年前在一个喜剧俱乐部被一位美国黑人质问者搞得懊恼不安时，他用了一大段带种族侮辱色彩的话作回应。

meanings.meaning_cn: 激怒, 刺激, 挑衅, 挑拨
meanings.meaning_en: an action or event that makes someone angry or upset, or is intended to do this
meanings.example: He was accused of deliberate provocation .
meanings.example_cn: 他被指责故意挑衅。

meanings.meaning_cn: 极烫的东西, 炎热天

the state of having either a positive or negative electric charge
meanings.example: Whether you want to call it magnetism, polarity,electricity, thought, intelligence or charisma, it's still attraction, and it invests everything—animal, vegetable or mineral.
meanings.example_cn: 不论你管它叫磁性、极性、活力、体贴、智慧还是魅力，它们都是吸引力，而且它适用于一切------动物、蔬菜或矿物。

meanings.example: It was the improvisation of the ebullition.
meanings.example_cn: 它是激情迸发的即兴创作。 哟！

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of music, or part of one, that is played or sung very quickly

meanings.meaning_cn: 急转, 遁词, 怪癖
meanings.meaning_en: a strange habit or feature of someone’s character, or a strange feature of something
meanings.example: Like every computer, this one has its little quirks.
meanings.example_cn: 就像所有电脑一样，这台也有它的小毛病。

meanings.meaning_cn: 疾病(尤指微恙), 不宁, 不安
meanings.meaning_en: an illness that is not very serious
meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["minor ailments"]}
meanings.example_cn: 小恙

meanings.meaning_en: a very fast speed
meanings.example: I was forced to attempt a gallop.
meanings.example_cn: 我被迫尝试一次骑马疾驰。

meanings.example: At one point you hear a rattling noise, assume its an enemy only for a rat to jump out and scutter away.
meanings.example_cn: 比如，你听到了嘎嘎声，以为是个敌人结果发现只是只老鼠跳了出来然后逃走了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 集合, 集合体, 聚合
meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of aggregating
a group of people gathered together in a church
meanings.example: The congregation knelt to pray.
meanings.example_cn: 会众跪下祈祷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 集合, 阅, 样品, 清单, 一群
meanings.meaning_en: a gathering together of soldiers so that they can be counted, checked etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 集会, 召集, 教士会议
meanings.meaning_en: a large formal meeting of a group of people, especially church officials
meanings.example: ...a convocation of the American Youth Congress.
meanings.example_cn: ...“美国青年国会”的大会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 集市, 市场, 杂货店, 百货店
meanings.meaning_en: a market or area where there are a lot of small shops, especially in India or the Middle East
meanings.example: Kamal was a vendor in Cairo's open-air bazaar.
meanings.example_cn: 卡莫尔曾是开罗露天集市的摊贩。

meanings.meaning_cn: 集水, 集水处(水库或集水盆地)
meanings.meaning_en: In geography, catchment is the process of collecting water, in particular the process of water flowing from the ground and collecting in a river. Catchment is also the water that is collected in this way.
meanings.example: But the world is also scattered with tales of roof catchment failures — and academics who say its potential for ending water insecurity is oversold.
meanings.example_cn: 但是全世界也存在着屋顶集水失败的故事——而且也有学术人士说它结束水不安全的潜力被夸大了。

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of collecting stamps for pleasure
A philatelist is a person who collects and studies postage stamps
meanings.example: He is a philatelist; part of his collection is rare sets of postage stamps of the Qing Dynasty.
meanings.example_cn: 他是一位集邮家。他藏品的一部分是罕见的套头的大清国邮票。

meanings.meaning_en: a living creature that has a backbone
meanings.example: Because these cells are among the largest in the vertebrate brain, they were the first neurons to be identified.
meanings.example_cn: 由于这些细胞是脊椎动物大脑中最大的细胞，它们是最早被识别出来的神经元。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of calculating or the result of calculating
meanings.example: the computation of the monthly statistics
meanings.example_cn: 每月统计数字的计算

meanings.meaning_en: a very exact clock, used for scientific purposes
meanings.example: Solomon Gills is in the act of seeing what time it is by the unimpeachable chronometer.
meanings.example_cn: 所罗门·吉尔斯那时正在看他那只完美无缺的精密计时表，看看是什么时候了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 记事本, 备忘录, 使人发痒的人

meanings.meaning_en: the art or practice of improving or of aiding the memory
meanings.example: When encountering information such as this, your goal should be to compress it. Find ways to group information into smaller chunks of memory through pictures or mnemonics.
meanings.example_cn: 当你遇到类似问题的时候，你应该采用压缩的方法，找出一种方法把他们分类成一些小组，然后通过图片或者联想的方式辅助记忆。

meanings.meaning_en: an object that you buy or keep to remind yourself of a special occasion or a place you have visited
meanings.example: a souvenir shop
meanings.example_cn: 纪念品商店

meanings.meaning_en: a small thing that you keep to remind you of someone or something
meanings.example: More anglers are taking cameras when they go fishing to provide a memento of catches.
meanings.example_cn: 更多的垂钓者去钓鱼时带上照相机，以便钓上鱼后留个纪念。

meanings.meaning_cn: 纪念物, 纪念馆, 纪念议事, 请愿书
meanings.meaning_en: something, especially a stone with writing on it, that reminds people of someone who has died
meanings.example: Building a memorial to Columbus has been his lifelong dream.
meanings.example_cn: 建一座哥伦布纪念碑一直是他一生的梦想。

meanings.meaning_en: Artifice is the clever use of tricks and devices
meanings.example: Weegee's photographs are full of artfulness, and artifice.
meanings.example_cn: 维加的照片充满了奇技妙想。

meanings.meaning_cn: 技巧, 手法, 诡计, 熟练
meanings.meaning_en: skill; dexterity

meanings.meaning_cn: 技艺, 功绩, 武艺, 壮举, 技艺表演
meanings.meaning_en: something that is an impressive achievement, because it needs a lot of skill, strength etc to do
meanings.example: A racing car is an extraordinary feat of engineering.
meanings.example_cn: 赛车是工程学的一项非凡业绩。

meanings.meaning_cn: 季候风, (印度等地的)雨季, 季风
meanings.meaning_en: the season, from about April to October, when it rains a lot in India and other southern Asian countries
meanings.example: ...the end of the monsoon.
meanings.example_cn: …雨季的结束。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of a medicine or a drug that you should take
meanings.example: I quite like Jamie in small doses (= in limited amounts but not a lot or often ) .
meanings.example_cn: 如果偶尔在一起的话，我还是蛮喜欢杰米的。

meanings.meaning_en: the person who has the legal right to receive the property or title of another person when they die
meanings.example: Jonson was his political heir as leader of the party.
meanings.example_cn: 琼森是他的政治接班人，他将担任该党派的领袖。

meanings.meaning_en: a gift that is offered to God or a god, or the act of offering the gift
meanings.example: Then the king Nebuchadnezzar fell upon his face, and worshipped Daniel, and commanded that they should offer an oblation and sweet odours unto him.
meanings.example_cn: 当时，尼布甲尼撒王俯伏在地，向但以理下拜，并且吩咐人给他奉上供物和香品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 祭坛, (基督教教堂内的)圣坛, 祈祷祭拜的地方
meanings.meaning_en: a holy table or surface used in religious ceremonies
meanings.example: a crucifix above the high altar
meanings.example_cn: 主圣坛上方的耶稣受难像

meanings.example: The first impulse to write this novel is described as a throb.
meanings.example_cn: 写这本小说的第一冲动就被描绘成悸动。

meanings.meaning_en: a plant or animal that lives on or in another plant or animal and gets food from it
meanings.example: Kangaroos harbour a vast range of parasites.
meanings.example_cn: 袋鼠身上有各种各样的寄生虫。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who pays rent for a room in someone’s house
meanings.example: We have decided totake in lodgersto help pay the mortgage.
meanings.example_cn: 我们决定收几个房客帮助偿还抵押贷款。

meanings.meaning_en: the ceremony at which someone is officially made king or queen
meanings.example: When they first saw each other in royal clothing, the fine robes and shining crowns for their coronation, that was when they fell in love.
meanings.example_cn: 当他们第一次看到对方穿着王室的衣服——为他们的加冕礼而穿戴的精美的袍子和华丽的王冠——时，那就是他们坠入爱河的时候。

meanings.meaning_en: a  chap
a man
meanings.example: Dave’s a nice guy when you get to know him.
meanings.example_cn: 戴夫是个好人，你了解他后就知道了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 家庭生活, 专心于家务, 对家庭的挚爱, 家庭生活
meanings.meaning_en: life at home with your family
meanings.example: a scene of happy domesticity
meanings.example_cn: 一个幸福家庭生活的场景

meanings.meaning_cn: 家务总管, 杂役, 打杂的人, [印]特大型花体大写字母
meanings.meaning_en: a servant or worker who has to do many different kinds of jobs for someone
a dwelling house together with its outbuildings, curtilage, and the adjacent land appropriated to its use
meanings.example: From curtilage (messuage sits south, the gate is northern) the sitting room is unfavorable take too much space, draw on fire and lawsuit easily otherwise.
meanings.example_cn: 离宅（家宅坐南，大门向北）的客厅不宜留太多空间，否则轻易招来火灾和官司。

meanings.meaning_en: a social system in which the oldest man rules his family and passes power and possessions on to his sons
meanings.example: The main cause of women's and children's oppression is patriarchy.
meanings.example_cn: 妇女及儿童受欺压的主要根源在于父权制度。

meanings.meaning_cn: 夹子, 夹具, 夹钳
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment for holding things together
meanings.example: Many openers have a magnet or set of clamps to grip the open lid.
meanings.example_cn: 许多开启器是用磁铁或夹具来夹紧要开启的盖子。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard shell on the outside of some animals such as a  crab  or  tortoise
a long narrow piece of land which sticks out into the sea
meanings.example: a rocky promontory
meanings.example_cn: 石岬

meanings.meaning_en: something that you think is true because it is very likely
meanings.example: ...the presumption that a defendant is innocent until proved guilty.
meanings.example_cn: …在被证明有罪之前被告为无罪的假定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 假定, 基本条件, 基本原理
meanings.meaning_en: something believed to be true, on which an argument or scientific discussion is based

meanings.meaning_cn: 假定, 想象, 推测, 推想
meanings.meaning_en: something that you think is true, even though you are not certain and cannot prove it
meanings.example: His version of events is pure supposition .
meanings.example_cn: 他对事情的说法纯属推测。

meanings.meaning_en: artificial hair that you wear on your head
meanings.example: Jo wore a long wig that made her look very sexy.
meanings.example_cn: 乔带着一头长长的假发，使她看起来很性感。

meanings.meaning_en: the practice of making private profit out of a public office; corruption or graft
meanings.example: To overdo anything public may lead to jobbery, while appropriate selfishness may promote the growth.
meanings.example_cn: “公”字过头可能假公济私，私心适度也会促进发展。

meanings.meaning_en: a copy of a valuable object, painting etc that is intended to deceive people
meanings.example: The painting was judged a fake.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅画被鉴定为赝品。

meanings.meaning_en: an invented name that a writer, artist etc uses instead of their real name
meanings.example: Both plays were published under the pseudonym of Philip Dayre.
meanings.example_cn: 两个剧本都是以菲利普·戴尔的笔名发表的。

meanings.meaning_en: an unofficial title or name
meanings.example: From his staff he earned the sobriquet "Mumbles."
meanings.example_cn: 他的员工们给了他“嘟囔”的绰号。

meanings.meaning_en: an idea that is suggested as an explanation for something, but that has not yet been proved to be true
meanings.example: One hypothesis is that the victim fell asleep while driving.
meanings.example_cn: 一种假设是受害人开车时睡着了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 假象, 伪装, 假装, 假托, 佯攻, 虚击
meanings.meaning_en: a movement or an attack that is intended to deceive an opponent, especially in  boxing

meanings.meaning_cn: 假装, 虚饰, 做作
meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone's attitude or behaviour is an affectation, you disapprove of the fact that it is not genuine or natural, but is intended to impress other people
meanings.example: I wore sunglasses all the time and people thought it was an affectation.
meanings.example_cn: 我一直戴着墨镜，别人认为是做作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 假装不见, 纵容, 默许
meanings.meaning_en: Connivance is a willingness to allow or assist something to happen even though you know it is wrong
meanings.example: The deficit had grown with the connivance of the banks.
meanings.example_cn: 在银行纵容下，赤字增加。

meanings.meaning_cn: 架, 行李架, 拷问台, 小步跑, 烧酒, 破坏
meanings.meaning_en: a frame or shelf that has bars or hooks on which you can put things
meanings.example: a wine rack
meanings.example_cn: 酒架

meanings.meaning_cn: 嫁接, (接技用的)嫩枝, (皮肤等的)移植, 赎职
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of healthy skin or bone taken from someone’s body and put in or on another part of their body that has been damaged
meanings.example: Martha had to have several skin grafts .
meanings.example_cn: 玛莎不得不进行了多处皮肤移植。

meanings.meaning_en: a roof that rises steeply to a point on top of a tower, especially on a church
meanings.example: ...a church spire poking above the trees.
meanings.example_cn: …伸出树梢的教堂尖顶。

meanings.meaning_en: a tall pointed tower on the roof of a church
meanings.example: One witness called it “the most frightening thing of my entire life,” And television footage showed a person clinging to a window in the cathedral’s steeple.
meanings.example_cn: 一位目击者说这是他有生以来遇到的最恐怖事件。 电视录像显示一人此时紧贴在尖塔的窗户上。

meanings.meaning_en: a tall thin tower on a  mosque  , from which Muslims are called to prayer
meanings.example: They blasted a minaret too.
meanings.example_cn: 他们还朝一个尖塔开了炮。

meanings.example: Let every declamation turn upon the beauty of liberty and virtue, and the deformity, turpitude, and malignity of slavery and vice.
meanings.example_cn: 让每一篇演讲都来谈自由和道德之美，都来谈奴役和邪恶之丑陋、卑鄙和恶毒。

meanings.meaning_en: If you describe someone as a profiteer, you are critical of them because they make large profits by charging high prices for goods that are hard to get
meanings.example: ...a new social class composed largely of war profiteers and gangsters.
meanings.example_cn: ...主要由战争投机商和强盗组成的一个新的社会阶层。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奸诈, 狡猾, 搞两面派, 口是心非, 不诚实, 表里不一
meanings.meaning_en: dishonest behaviour that is intended to deceive someone
meanings.example: Malcolm believed he was guilty of duplicity in his private dealings.
meanings.example_cn: 马尔科姆相信他在为其私底下行为的奸诈内疚着。

meanings.meaning_en: when you demand that something should happen and refuse to let anyone say no
meanings.example: ...her insistence on personal privacy.
meanings.example_cn: …她对个人隐私权的坚持。

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚持己见的人, 困难的问题
meanings.meaning_en: If you are a stickler for something, you always demand or require it
meanings.example: Lucy was a stickler for perfection, and everything had to be exactly right.
meanings.example_cn: 露西曾是个追求完美的人，凡事都得完全正确。

meanings.example: Their innate tenacity is one of their greatest assets, though.
meanings.example_cn: 其内在的韧性是他们最大的资产之一。

meanings.meaning_en: courage shown when you are in great pain or experiencing a lot of trouble
meanings.example: Winnie is a woman of quiet fortitude who has endured a lot of suffering.
meanings.example_cn: 温妮是个坚强寡言的女子，她忍受了许多痛苦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 坚硬, 僵化, 刻板, 严格, 刚性, 硬度

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of secretly finding out secret information and giving it to a country’s enemies or a company’s competitors
meanings.example: a campaign of industrial espionage against his main rival
meanings.example_cn: 针对他主要竞争对手展开的商业间谍活动

meanings.meaning_en: a short period of time between the parts of a play, concert etc
meanings.example: It was the first time Hanna had been to the theater, and she loved all of it, from the performance to the champagne at intermission.
meanings.example_cn: 我们曾去过一次附近另一座城市的剧院看席勒的《阴谋与爱情》。 这是汉娜头一次去戏院看戏，从观看表演到幕间休息时喝香槟酒，她高兴得不得了。

meanings.meaning_en: a natural spring that sends hot water and steam suddenly into the air from a hole in the ground
when you are taught or looked after by someone
meanings.example: parental tutelage
meanings.example_cn: 父母的监护

meanings.meaning_cn: 监狱, 收容所, 教养所
meanings.meaning_en: a prison – used especially in the names of prisons
meanings.example: the North Carolina state penitentiary
meanings.example_cn: 北卡罗来纳州立监狱

meanings.meaning_en: an official visit to a building or organization to check that everything is satisfactory and that rules are being obeyed
meanings.example: An inspection was carried out at the school.
meanings.example_cn: 有人来学校视察了一遍。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to examine books, films, letters etc and remove anything considered to be offensive, morally harmful, or politically dangerous
meanings.example: The report was cleared by the American military censors.
meanings.example_cn: 这篇报道被美国军方审查员删掉了。

meanings.meaning_en: In some countries, a prosecutor is a lawyer or official who brings charges against someone or tries to prove in a trial that they are guilty
meanings.example: I was the first to go before the prosecutor.
meanings.example_cn: 我是第一个被带到检察官面前的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 检疫, 隔离, (政治或商业上的)封锁, 检疫期间
meanings.meaning_en: a period of time when a person or animal is kept apart from others in case they are carrying a disease
meanings.example: She was sent home and put in quarantine.
meanings.example_cn: 她被送回家实施隔离。

meanings.example: Becausetumor response to cytotoxic chemotherapy has been poor, chemotherapy is used only for palliation.
meanings.example_cn: 因为肿瘤对细胞毒性化学治疗反应差，化疗仅用于减轻症状。

meanings.meaning_en: a small, roughly built hut made from thin sheets of wood,  tin  , plastic etc that very poor people live in
meanings.example: Workers were living in tents and shanties.
meanings.example_cn: 工人们住在帐篷和棚屋里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 建议者, 支持者, [律]提出认证遗嘱者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who supports something or persuades people to do something
meanings.example: Halsey was identified as a leading proponent of the values of progressive education.
meanings.example_cn: 哈尔西被认为是进步教育价值观的首要支持者。

meanings.example: First, simply, it was a matter of face, of reducing its pariah-state image —a tangible symbol of being welcomed back into the global community.
meanings.example_cn: 首先，简单地说，这是面子问题，可以弱化它的贱民国家形象——一个欢迎它回归国际社会的切实象征。

meanings.example: He is a natural raconteur, good-looking, athletic, intellectually curious, financially successful, and wittily self-deprecating.
meanings.example_cn: 他是一个天生的健谈者，相貌英俊、体格健壮、求知好学、经济成功，并且风趣地自我嘲弄。

meanings.example: We tend to think that a person who is a complete victim of amnesia is still the same person as before.
meanings.example_cn: 我们倾向于认为，一个彻底的健忘症患者，他与以前没有患病时仍然是同一个人。

meanings.meaning_en: An armada is a large group of warships
meanings.example: This armada of robots will be our eyes, ears, arms and legs in space, in the air, and on the ground, capable of responding to their environment without us, to explore and embrace the unknown.
meanings.example_cn: 这个机器人舰队将是我们的眼睛、耳朵、手臂和腿，它们分布在太空中、大气层内，以及地面上，在没有我们的情况下也可以对自身所处的环境做出反应，接近并探测未知世界。

meanings.meaning_cn: 舰队, 水兵, 海运业
meanings.example: A small number of Marines were wounded.
meanings.example_cn: 几名海军陆战队士兵受了伤。

meanings.meaning_en: a dishonest person who tricks and deceives people
meanings.example: The two children, picked up by some policeman and placed in the refuge, or stolen by some mountebank, or having simply strayed off in that immense Chinese puzzle of a Paris, did not return.
meanings.example_cn: 那两个孩子，也许是被什么警察收留关进拘留所了，或是被什么江湖艺人拐走了，或者压根儿就是迷失在这个无边无际的巴黎迷宫里了，他们没有回来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 将就, 凑合, 权宜之计
姜, 生姜, 有姜味, 活泼, 元气, 精力, 淡赤黄色(的)～
meanings.meaning_en: a root with a very strong hot taste, or the powder made from this root, that is used in cooking
a situation in which it seems impossible to settle an argument or disagreement, and neither side can get an advantage
meanings.example: an attempt to break the stalemate
meanings.example_cn: 打破僵局的努力

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which it is impossible to continue with a discussion or plan because the people involved cannot agree
meanings.example: Negotiations seemed to have reached an impasse.
meanings.example_cn: 谈判似乎陷入了僵局。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缰绳, 统治, 支配
meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow band of leather that is fastened around a horse’s head in order to control it
meanings.example: Cord held the reins while the stallion tugged and snorted.
meanings.example_cn: 当那匹牡马使劲挣扎，打着响鼻的时候，科德勒紧了缰绳。

meanings.meaning_en: a small  platform  that you stand on when you are making a speech or  conduct ing  musicians
meanings.example: As he stood on the winner's rostrum, he sang the words of the national anthem.
meanings.example_cn: 当他站在领奖台上，他唱起了国歌中的词句。

meanings.meaning_en: the skill of making powerful speeches
meanings.example: He displayed determination as well as powerful oratory.
meanings.example_cn: 他既展示了雄辩的演讲术又显示了决心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奖章, 勋章, 纪念章
meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of metal, usually shaped like a coin, that is given to someone who has won a competition or who has done something brave
meanings.example: She won a gold medal at the last Olympics.
meanings.example_cn: 她在上届奥运会上赢得一枚金牌。

meanings.meaning_en: a long pole with a wide flat blade at one end, used for rowing a boat
meanings.example: Cold worlds shake from the oar.
meanings.example_cn: 冰冷的世界从桨上摇落。

meanings.meaning_en: bullets from two or more opposite directions that pass through the same area
meanings.example: Doctors who tried to help the wounded were caught in the crossfire .
meanings.example_cn: 试图去帮助伤员的医生遭遇了交叉火力。

meanings.meaning_en: a process by which two or more things affect each other
meanings.example: But you only get the maximum benefit if you implement all of them, because their power comes from their interaction.
meanings.example_cn: 但您只有在实现所有方法的情况下才能获得最多的收益，因为它们的力量来自于它们之间的相互作用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 交通工具, 车辆, 媒介物, 传达手段
meanings.meaning_en: a machine with an engine that is used to take people or things from one place to another, such as a car, bus, or truck
meanings.example: a description of the stolen vehicle
meanings.example_cn: 对被盗车辆的描述

meanings.meaning_cn: 骄傲 , 傲慢, （狂妄自大）
meanings.meaning_en: too much pride
meanings.example: ...a tale of how an honourable man pursuing honourable goals was afflicted with hubris and led his nation toward catastrophe.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个有关追求崇高目标的磊落君子如何因自高自大、而将自己的国家引向灾难的故事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 焦虑, 悬念, 悬而不决
meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of excitement or anxiety when you do not know what will happen next
meanings.example: Come on then, tell me what happened; the suspense is killing me (= I feel very excited or anxious because I do not know what will happen next ) .
meanings.example_cn: 快来，告诉我发生了什么事。急死我了。

meanings.example: He retained his wildness and wiliness.
meanings.example_cn: 他保留这自己的野性与狡诈。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure used for killing criminals by hanging from a rope
meanings.example: There's a thief hanging on the gallows out there, and I'll cut his hand off; which hand was it?
meanings.example_cn: 我想办法帮你渡过难关.外面绞刑架上吊着一个小偷.我去把他的手切下来.哪只手呢?""

meanings.meaning_en: a curved piece of wood or metal with a hook on top, used for hanging clothes on
meanings.example: She took off her jacket and hung it on a hanger.
meanings.example_cn: 她脱下夹克挂在衣架上。

meanings.meaning_en: Podiatry is the professional care and treatment of people's feet

meanings.meaning_cn: 脚后跟, 踵, 跟部
meanings.meaning_en: the curved back part of your foot
meanings.example: black boots with high heels
meanings.example_cn: 有高跟的黑靴子

meanings.meaning_en: a dance movement in which the dancer turns very quickly, standing on one toe or the front part of one foot
meanings.example: To picture this, imagine an ice skater doing a pirouette.
meanings.example_cn: 为了更加形象化，想像一下溜冰时旋转的场景吧。

meanings.meaning_en: an object that is designed to beat something
meanings.example: an egg beater
meanings.example_cn: 打蛋器

meanings.meaning_cn: 教皇的职位, 主教的地位
meanings.meaning_en: the position or period of being Pope
meanings.example: Pope Formosus died after a pontificate of four and a half years.
meanings.example_cn: 教皇福尔摩苏斯上任四年半后去世。

meanings.meaning_cn: 教会法教规, 教规, (基督教的)正典圣经(简称正经), 一个作家的真作日本佳能公司
meanings.meaning_en: an established law of the Christian church
meanings.example: ...a canon of accepted literary texts.
meanings.example_cn: …一本公认的真作文集。

meanings.meaning_en: the art or science of teaching
meanings.example: This article reviews the applications of heuristic didactics to pharmacology teaching.
meanings.example_cn: 对启发式教学法在药理学教学中的应用进行了论述。

meanings.example: Today’s economists tend to be open-minded about content, but doctrinaire about form.
meanings.example_cn: 目前经济学家对内容更包容，但教条主义者却关心形式。

meanings.meaning_cn: 教学, 教授, 教育学
meanings.meaning_en: the practice of teaching or the study of teaching
meanings.example: I’ve learned as much about teaching from learning about marketing as I have from studying pedagogy – maybe more.
meanings.example_cn: 我从销售上学到的有关教育的东西和我研究教育学时候学到的一样多——可能更多。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of fungus used for producing alcohol in beer and wine, and for making bread rise

meanings.meaning_cn: 酵素, 发酵, 动乱
meanings.meaning_en: a situation of great excitement or trouble in a country, especially caused by political change
meanings.example: The whole country has been in a state of political ferment for some months.
meanings.example_cn: 整个国家几个月来一直处在政治骚动的状态中。

meanings.meaning_cn: 酵素, 酵母, 潜移默化的影响
meanings.meaning_en: a substance, especially yeast, that is added to a mixture of flour and water so that it will swell and can be baked into bread

meanings.meaning_cn: 接触, 接近, 邻近
接缝, 线缝, 缝合线, 衔接口, 伤疤, 层
meanings.meaning_en: a line where two pieces of cloth, leather etc have been stitched together
meanings.example: She was repairing Billy’s trousers, where the seam had come undone.
meanings.example_cn: 她在补比利裤子的开线处。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of being near someone or something, or of being related to someone
nearness in distance or time
meanings.example: Here the rich and the poor live in close proximity (= very near to each other ) .
meanings.example_cn: 在这里，富人和穷人比邻而居。

Asceticism is a simple, strict way of life with no luxuries or physical pleasures

meanings.example: His eyes, blue as the summer sky, gave away his fierce devotion to his friends, even when he tried to feign nonchalance.
