meanings.meaning_cn: 名望, 荣誉, 声誉
meanings.meaning_en: the state of being admired and respected for being important or for doing something important
meanings.example: He acquired kudos just by appearing on television.
meanings.example_cn: 他上电视后就出名了。

meanings.meaning_en: the opinion that people have about someone or something because of what has happened in the past
meanings.example: Alice Munro has a reputation for being a very depressing writer.
meanings.example_cn: 艾丽斯•门罗有文风抑郁的名声。

meanings.meaning_en: the skill of ringing bells, and the study of bells
an official order or rule

meanings.meaning_cn: 命令, 法令, 许可, 批准
meanings.meaning_en: an official order given by someone in a position of authority, without considering what other people want
meanings.example: He has tried to impose solutions to the country's problems by fiat.
meanings.example_cn: 他已经试图采取强制性法令来解决该国的问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 命令, 诫命, 需要, 规则, 祈使语气
meanings.meaning_en: the form of a verb that expresses an order. For example, in the order ‘Come here’, ‘come’ is in the imperative.

meanings.meaning_cn: 命令, 指令, [律]禁令(法院强制被告从事或不得从事某项行为的正式命令)
meanings.meaning_en: an order given by a court, which tells someone not to do something
meanings.example: The judge refused to grant an injunction.
meanings.example_cn: 法官拒绝发出禁令。

meanings.example: There are 24 books in the Hebrew Bible, or Tanakh—and depending upon the denomination, between 66 and 84 more books in Christian Bibles, divided between the Old and New Testaments.
meanings.example_cn: 希伯来《圣经》共有24卷，又名塔纳赫（即《旧约》的源头——译者注）——而且，基督教圣经由于教派的不同，要多出66至84卷，分为《旧约》和《新约》。

meanings.meaning_en: a system of naming things, especially in science
meanings.example: zoological nomenclature
meanings.example_cn: 动物命名法

meanings.meaning_cn: 命运决定的事物, 不幸, 灾祸, 天命
meanings.meaning_en: the feeling that you cannot control what happens to you
meanings.example: a 50% increase in the number of traffic fatalities
meanings.example_cn: 交通事故死亡人数50%的增长

meanings.meaning_en: a false idea or belief, especially one that a lot of people believe is true
meanings.example: It’s a common fallacy that a neutered dog will become fat and lazy.
meanings.example_cn: 说阉割过的狗会变得又胖又懒，这是普遍的谬见。

meanings.meaning_en: an exact copy of a picture, piece of writing etc
meanings.example: ...a facsimile edition of Beethoven's musical manuscripts.
meanings.example_cn: ...一份贝多芬音乐手稿的摹本版。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of plastic, metal, or paper in which designs or letters have been cut out, that you put over a surface and paint over, so that the design is left on the surface
someone who is perfect or is extremely brave, good etc – often used humorously
meanings.example: We don't expect candidates to be paragons of virtue.
meanings.example_cn: 我们不指望候选人都是道德完人。

meanings.meaning_en: Mimicry is the action of mimicking someone or something
meanings.example: One of his few strengths was his skill at mimicry.
meanings.example_cn: 他为数不多的强项之一就是他的模仿技巧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 模仿滑稽作品, 拙劣的模仿
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing, music etc or an action that copies someone or something in an amusing way
meanings.example: Her performance contains a strong element of self-parody (= when someone makes fun of their own style ) .
meanings.example_cn: 她的表演包含了强烈的自嘲元素。

meanings.example: The plastic was poured into the mold and left to set until it was firm.
meanings.example_cn: 塑料被注入模子后， 便放在一边让它慢慢凝结硬化。

meanings.meaning_en: a very thin piece of skin that covers or connects parts of your body
meanings.example: Loud noise can damage the delicate membrane in the ear.
meanings.example_cn: 很响的噪声会损伤脆弱的耳膜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 磨坊主, 面粉厂主, 碾磨工, 铣工, [昆]蛾
meanings.meaning_en: someone who owns or works in a mill which makes flour

meanings.meaning_cn: 磨光, 光泽, 上光剂, 优雅, 精良
meanings.meaning_en: an act of polishing a surface to make it smooth and shiny
meanings.example: An occasional polish will keep wall tiles looking good.
meanings.example_cn: 偶尔擦拭一下能使墙砖保持美观。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of rubbing a surface very hard so that it becomes damaged or disappears
meanings.example: extra protection against abrasion
meanings.example_cn: 防止磨损的额外保护

meanings.meaning_cn: 魔鬼, 魔王, 撒旦, 邪神, 能手, 成癖者
meanings.meaning_en: an evil spirit
meanings.example: A tearful husband repeated calls for help in catching the fiend who battered his wife.
meanings.example_cn: 泪流满面的丈夫再三呼吁协助抓住殴打他妻子的那个恶棍。

meanings.meaning_cn: 魔力, 入迷, 魅力, 迷恋, 强烈爱好
meanings.meaning_en: the state of being very interested in something, so that you want to look at it, learn about it etc
meanings.example: The fascination lay in the mystery of what was inside the box.
meanings.example_cn: 吸引力就在于这神秘感——不知道盒子里是什么东西。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who entertains people by performing clever tricks in which things seem to appear, disappear, or change by magic
meanings.example: They were watching me as they would watch a conjurer about to perform a trick.
meanings.example_cn: 他们也望着我，就像是在等着看什么魔术师施展戏法。

meanings.meaning_cn: 末端, 极端, 极度, 穷困, 绝境, 临死, 非常手段, 手足
meanings.meaning_en: one of the parts of your body that is furthest away from the centre, for example your fingers and toes
meanings.example: The committee was uncomfortable about the extremity of the proposal.
meanings.example_cn: 委员会因该建议太极端而感到不安。

meanings.meaning_cn: 默认(值), 缺省(值), 食言, 不履行责任, [律]缺席
meanings.meaning_en: Default is also a noun
meanings.example: The corporation may be charged with default on its contract with the government.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司可能会被指控违反了与政府签订的合同。

meanings.meaning_cn: 母马, 母驴, 月球或火星等表面阴暗区
meanings.meaning_en: a female horse or  donkey
a large female animal that is kept on farms and used to produce milk or meat
meanings.example: a herd of cows
meanings.example_cn: 一群牛

meanings.meaning_en: wood used for building or making things
meanings.example: a bench made of timber
meanings.example_cn: 木制长椅

meanings.meaning_en: a strong fence made of pointed posts
meanings.example: protected from spring tides by a palisade
meanings.example_cn: 为了抵御大潮，围了一排栅栏

meanings.meaning_en: The beholder of something is the person who is looking at it
meanings.example: In some ways, clean code -- like beauty -- is in the eye of the beholder.
meanings.example_cn: 在一定程度上，干净的代码——像漂亮一样——就是在旁观者眼中所留下的印象。

meanings.meaning_cn: 目录, 名单, 列表, 序列, 数据清单, 明细表, 条纹, [总称]各种上市证券
meanings.meaning_en: a set of names, numbers etc, usually written one below the other, for example so that you can remember or check them
meanings.example: We are making a list of the top ten men we would not want to be married to.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正在列一个我们最不想嫁的10种男人的名单。

meanings.meaning_en: a pastoral or idyllic poem, usually in the form of a conversation or soliloquy

meanings.meaning_cn: 牧歌, 田园文学, 田园诗

meanings.meaning_en: a Christian priest in some Protestant churches
meanings.example: the pastor of Carr’s Lane Congregational church
meanings.example_cn: 卡尔里公理会教堂的牧师

meanings.meaning_en: a man who looks after a herd of animals
meanings.example: You don't need a humanistic education in order to become a herdsman.
meanings.example_cn: 要成为一个牧人，你不需要接受人文主义的教育。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of land, usually not belonging to a church, in which dead people are buried
meanings.example: Her father was laid in a cemetery.
meanings.example_cn: 她父亲安葬在一处公墓。

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of writing on the stone over someone’s grave(= place in the ground where someone is buried )
meanings.example: His epitaph for himself would have well suited man as he wanted him to be.
meanings.example_cn: 他为自己写的墓志铭非常适合像他所期望成为的那种人。

meanings.meaning_en: the rubber part on a baby’s bottle that the baby sucks milk from
meanings.example: ...a white plastic bottle with a rubber teat.
meanings.example_cn: …一个带橡皮奶嘴的白色塑料奶瓶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 男爵(英国世袭的最低级的贵族爵位)
meanings.meaning_en: a man who is a member of a low rank of the British  nobility  or of a rank of European  nobility
meanings.example: I once carried a letter to a baron of that sort.
meanings.example_cn: 有一次，我送一封信给一个男爵，他便是这样的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 男女平等主义者, 女权扩张论者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who supports the idea that women should have the same rights and opportunities as men
meanings.example: She’s been an outspoken feminist for over twenty years.
meanings.example_cn: 20多年来，她一直是个直言不讳的女权主义者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 男士无尾半正式晚礼服
meanings.meaning_en: a man’s  jacket  that is usually black, worn on formal occasions
A toupee is a piece of artificial hair worn by a man to cover a patch on his head where he has lost his hair
meanings.example: How much did you spend on that bad toupee?
meanings.example_cn: 你在那个劣质的假发上花了多少钱？

meanings.meaning_cn: 男子气, 生殖力,男子特点,刚强有力
meanings.meaning_en: the typically male quality of being strong, brave, and full of energy – used to show approval

meanings.meaning_cn: 南瓜, 易压烂的物品, 拥挤的人群, 壁球
meanings.meaning_en: a game played by two people who use  rackets  to hit a small rubber ball against the walls of a square court
meanings.example: a squash court
meanings.example_cn: 壁球场

meanings.meaning_en: something that is difficult to understand or explain
meanings.example: The meaning of the poem has always been a puzzle.
meanings.example_cn: 那首诗的含义始终是个谜。

meanings.meaning_en: when you feel annoyed because someone continues to do something that is upsetting you
meanings.example: Carol sighed in exasperation.
meanings.example_cn: 卡罗尔恼怒地叹了口气。

meanings.meaning_cn: 恼怒, 烦恼, 着急, 苦恼的原因
meanings.meaning_en: when you feel worried or annoyed by something
meanings.example: He kicked the broken machine in vexation.
meanings.example_cn: 他懊恼得踢了这台坏机器一脚。

meanings.meaning_en: swelling of the brain
meanings.example: Encephalitis still attacks one child in 1,000 who catches measles.
meanings.example_cn: 每1000位患麻疹的儿童中仍会有一位患上脑炎。

meanings.meaning_cn: 内部的人, 会员, 知道内情的人, 权威人士
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has a special knowledge of a particular organization because they are part of it
meanings.example: an insider’s view of the way that a Japanese company works
meanings.example_cn: 业内人士对日本公司运作方式的看法

meanings.meaning_cn: 内地, 穷乡僻壤, 内地贸易区, 腹地
meanings.meaning_en: an area of land that is far from the coast, large rivers, or the places where people live
meanings.example: the rural hinterland
meanings.example_cn: 内地乡村

meanings.example: Located near the base of the neck, the thyroid is a large endocrine gland that produces hormones that help control growth and metabolism.
meanings.example_cn: 甲状腺位于颈部的底部附近，是一个很大的内分泌腺体，它产生激素，协助控制生长和新陈代谢。

meanings.example: ...a prospectus for a new issue of stock.
meanings.example_cn: …新发行股票的招股说明书。

meanings.meaning_cn: 内省, 反省, 自省
meanings.meaning_en: the process of thinking deeply about your own thoughts, feelings, or behaviour
meanings.example: He had always had his moments of quiet introspection.
meanings.example_cn: 他总有安静自省的时候。

meanings.meaning_cn: 内脏, 肠, (物体的)内部
meanings.meaning_en: the inside parts of an animal’s or person’s body, especially their intestines
meanings.example: All the alien innards in the film were actually sheep brains, raspberry jam and chicken entrails.
meanings.example_cn: 照片中所有的外星人内脏，其实是羊脑，木莓酱和鸡肠。

meanings.example: When spring is coming all trees begin to burgeon .
meanings.example_cn: 当春天到来的时候，所有树开始发芽。

meanings.meaning_cn: 嫩枝, 小枝, 末梢
meanings.meaning_en: a small very thin stem of wood that grows from a branch on a tree
meanings.example: There is the bird, sitting on a twig halfway up the tree.
meanings.example_cn: 鸟儿在那里，栖息在树中段的一根细枝上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 能精选品评美食、美酒的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who knows a lot about food and wine and who enjoys good food and wine
meanings.example: The seafood here is a gourmet's delight.
meanings.example_cn: 这儿的海鲜是美食家的一大享受。

meanings.meaning_en: a garden tool like a very small  spade
deep mud
meanings.example: The wheels got stuck in the mire.
meanings.example_cn: 轮子陷入泥潭里了。

meanings.meaning_en: A mason is a person who is skilled at making things or building things with stone or bricks

meanings.meaning_cn: 泥沼, 蜕的皮, 腐肉
meanings.meaning_en: an area of land covered in deep dirty water or mud

meanings.meaning_cn: 匿名, 作者不明(或不详)
meanings.meaning_en: when other people do not know who you are or what your name is
meanings.example: Every step will be taken to preserve your anonymity.
meanings.example_cn: 将采取各种措施确保你的姓名保密。

meanings.meaning_cn: 年轻女人, 闺女, 处女
meanings.meaning_en: A damsel is a young, unmarried woman
meanings.example: He keeps coming to the aid of this damsel in distress.
meanings.example_cn: 他经常去帮助这位处于痛苦中的少女。

meanings.meaning_en: a boy who is almost a young man – sometimes used humorously about a man who is quite old
meanings.example: ...a stripling of 20.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个20岁的毛头小伙子。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of birds
meanings.example: After graduating from Cornell with a degree in ornithology in 1932, he went to work, at $17 a week, for Margaret Bourke-White, developing film and assisting on location.
meanings.example_cn: 1932年从康奈尔拿到鸟类学学位毕业之后，他开始工作。 起初周薪只有17块钱，为玛格丽特伯克怀特做事，开拍电影以及预订场地。

meanings.meaning_en: A bird's plumage is all the feathers on its body
meanings.example: the parrot’s brilliant blue plumage
meanings.example_cn: 那只鹦鹉亮丽的蓝色羽毛

meanings.meaning_en: the yellow liquid waste that comes out of the body from the bladder
meanings.example: The doctor took a urine sample and a blood sample.
meanings.example_cn: 医生取了尿样和血样。

meanings.meaning_cn: 捏, 撮, 收缩, 紧急关头, 匮乏, 压力
meanings.meaning_en: when you press someone’s skin between your finger and thumb
meanings.example: She gave him a playful pinch.
meanings.example_cn: 她开玩笑地捏了他一把。

meanings.meaning_en: the final state of complete knowledge and understanding that is the aim of believers in Buddhism
meanings.example: Entering the realm of Nirvana is only possible for those who have become pure.
meanings.example_cn: 心无杂念，方可入涅。

meanings.meaning_en: a medical instrument used for picking up and holding things
meanings.example: a pair of forceps
meanings.example_cn: 一把镊子

meanings.meaning_cn: 凝固, 凝固物, 具体化, [地]固结(作用), [医]结石

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that aids or produces coagulation
meanings.example: Therefore, people with bleeding disorders or taking anti-coagulant medication should consult with their doctor before taking fish oil supplements.
meanings.example_cn: 因此，出血失调或者进行抗凝血治疗的人群，在使用鱼油补充剂前，需要先咨询他们的医生。

meanings.meaning_en: a farm building in which cattle are kept
meanings.example: We discovered the floor of the byre when we excavated so effectively we had put back what was originally there.
meanings.example_cn: 原来别墅边上有一个牛棚，我们挖掘的时候发现了牛棚的地板，所以我们恢复了别墅原来的模样。

meanings.meaning_cn: 牛蝇, 形似苍蝇, 讨厌的人
meanings.meaning_en: someone who annoys other people by criticizing them
the force or power that makes something turn around a central point, especially in an engine
meanings.example: In rotation, force becomes torque, mass becomes moment of inertia, and acceleration becomes angular acceleration.
meanings.example_cn: 在旋转时，力变成力矩，质量变成转动惯量，加速度变成角加速度。

meanings.meaning_cn: 扭弯, 扭歪, 歪曲
meanings.meaning_en: when something is twisted so that it does not have its normal shape
meanings.example: involuntary muscle contortion
meanings.example_cn: 不由自主的肌肉扭曲

meanings.meaning_cn: 农民, 粗野的人, 不懂礼貌的人, (Boor)波尔人
meanings.meaning_en: a man who behaves in a very rude way

meanings.meaning_cn: 农业工人,乡下人,粗野的人, 吝啬鬼

meanings.meaning_en: An agronomist is someone who studies the growing and harvesting of crops

meanings.meaning_cn: 弄虚作假, 串改, 伪造, 歪曲

meanings.example: Don’t fall into the trap of becoming a mindless minion.
meanings.example_cn: 不要掉进陷阱，成了没脑子的奴才。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奴隶, 束缚, 奴役
meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone is in thrall to a person or thing, you mean that they are completely in their power or are greatly influenced by them
meanings.example: He is not in thrall to the media.
meanings.example_cn: 他不受制于媒体。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奴隶贩子, 奴隶贩卖船, 诱骗女子为娼者, 唾液
meanings.meaning_en: someone who sells slaves

meanings.meaning_cn: 努力, 为达成目标的冲劲

meanings.meaning_en: a contemptible sneaking coward

meanings.meaning_cn: 懦夫, 胆小鬼, 怯懦者

meanings.meaning_en: a female ballet dancer

meanings.example: Every girl needs a chaperon. Cosette could not have come without M. Fauchelevent.
meanings.example_cn: 女孩子都需要一个年长的人陪伴，没有割风先生，珂赛特就不可能来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 女裁缝师, 做针线工的
meanings.meaning_en: a woman whose job is sewing and making clothes
a very high singing voice belonging to a woman or a boy, or a singer with a voice like this
meanings.example: She sings soprano .
meanings.example_cn: 她唱女高音。

meanings.meaning_cn: 女家长制, 女族长制
meanings.example: She was the main authority-figure in the home. Jeb describes it as having been, "A kind of matriarchy... when we were growing up, dad wasn't at home.
meanings.example_cn: 她是家中主要的权威人物.杰布曾这样描述道, “一种女家长制------我们成长的时候,爸爸不在家,妈妈就分发糖果和发号施令.”

meanings.meaning_en: the making and selling of women’s hats
meanings.example: ...her aunt's modest millinery shop.
meanings.example_cn: ...她姑姑的小女帽店。

meanings.meaning_cn: 女人的会客室或化妆室, 闺房
meanings.meaning_en: a woman’s bedroom or private sitting room

meanings.meaning_cn: 女巫, 女算命师, (古罗马或古希腊的)女预言家
meanings.meaning_en: (in ancient Greece and Rome) any of a number of women believed to be oracles or prophetesses, one of the most famous being the sibyl of Cumae, who guided Aeneas through the underworld
a woman who will receive or has received a lot of money or property after the death of an older member of her family
meanings.example: ...the heiress to a jewellery empire.
meanings.example_cn: …一家大型珠宝公司的女继承人。

meanings.meaning_en: a convent
meanings.example: Unsure whether I have been understood, I put in a brisk spurt to the nunnery.
meanings.example_cn: 不知道他是否明白我的意思，我快步冲刺般地朝尼姑庵跑去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 女妖, 妓女, 魔鬼
meanings.meaning_en: a female devil that in the past was believed to have sex with a sleeping man
meanings.example: The succubus is the female counterpart of the incubus. She is a demon seductress who preys on sleeping men, draining them of their “vitality.”
meanings.example_cn: 女淫妖与男淫妖相对应，指的是一种以入睡男子为猎物，吸收他们精元的妖魔。

meanings.meaning_en: someone from the western part of the world

meanings.meaning_cn: 呕吐, 呕吐物, 吐剂
meanings.meaning_en: food brought back up from your stomach through your mouth
meanings.example: Whether you call it spit-up, puke or barf mulch, there’s simply no denying the fact that every article of clothing you own will eventually start to smell like baby vomit.
meanings.example_cn: 不管你管他叫吐出来的东西还是呕吐物什么的，不可否认的是你身上的每件东西都开始闻起来像婴儿呕吐物。

meanings.meaning_cn: 偶然, 可能性, 意外事故, 可能发生的附带事件
meanings.meaning_en: an event or situation that might happen in the future, especially one that could cause problems
meanings.example: a contingency plan
meanings.example_cn: 应变计划

meanings.meaning_cn: 偶像, 崇拜物, 幻象, [逻]谬论
meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that you love or admire very much
meanings.example: a pop idol
meanings.example_cn: 流行乐偶像

meanings.meaning_cn: 偶像崇拜者, 崇拜者, 皈依者, 追星族
偶像破坏者, 提倡打破旧习的人
爬行, 攀缘, 抢夺, 混乱
meanings.meaning_en: a difficult climb in which you have to use your hands to help you
meanings.example: The village was a 20-minute scramble away.
meanings.example_cn: 村子离这里有20分钟的攀登路程。

meanings.meaning_en: a farming machine with sharp metal blades, used to break up the earth before planting crops

meanings.meaning_cn: 拍马屁的人, 谄媚者, 奉承者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who praises powerful people too much because they want to get something from them – used in order to show disapproval
meanings.example: a dictator surrounded by sycophants
meanings.example_cn: 被阿谀奉承者包围的独裁者

meanings.meaning_en: a public meeting where land, buildings, paintings etc are sold to the person who offers the most money for them
meanings.example: The painting is expected to fetch up to $400,000 at auction.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅画预计在拍卖会上能卖到40万美元。

meanings.meaning_cn: 排成等级, 分类, 任命, [宗]神职授任, 颁布法令
meanings.meaning_en: When someone's ordination takes place, they are made a minister, priest, or rabbi
meanings.example: ...supporters of the ordination of women.
meanings.example_cn: …女性担任圣职的支持者们。

meanings.example: And although a modified waterfall approach does not preclude the use of feedback, it does not facilitate, accommodate, or encourage it.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然一个改进的瀑布型开发方法并不排除反馈的使用，但是它并没有促进、支持和鼓励反馈的使用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 排除, 除外, 被排除在外的事物
meanings.meaning_en: when someone is not allowed to take part in something or enter a place
meanings.example: Your essays tend to concentrate on one theme to the exclusion of everything else.
meanings.example_cn: 你的文章往往会集中于一个主题而不顾及其他各个方面。

meanings.meaning_en: liquid that appears on your skin when you are hot or nervous
meanings.example: He wiped the beads of perspiration (= drops ) from his brow.
meanings.example_cn: 他擦去了额头的汗珠。

meanings.meaning_cn: 排水, 排泄, 排水装置, 排水区域, 排出物, 消耗
meanings.meaning_en: the process or system by which water or waste liquid flows away
meanings.example: A handful of pebbles in the bottom of a flowerpot will help drainage.
meanings.example_cn: 在花盆底下放一把鹅卵石能够帮助排水。

meanings.meaning_cn: 排演, 演习, 预演, 试演
meanings.meaning_en: a time when all the people in a play, concert etc practise before a public performance
meanings.example: a wedding rehearsal
meanings.example_cn: 婚礼的预演

meanings.meaning_cn: 派别, 小集团, 派系斗争, 小派系, 内讧
meanings.meaning_en: a small group of people within a larger group, who have different ideas from the other members, and who try to get their own ideas accepted
meanings.example: struggles between the different factions within the party
meanings.example_cn: 党内的派系斗争

meanings.meaning_en: the ability and right to decide exactly what should be done in a particular situation
meanings.example: Promotions are left to the discretion of the supervisor.
meanings.example_cn: 晋升由主管决定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 叛逆, 通敌, 背信, 叛国罪
meanings.meaning_en: the crime of being disloyal to your country or its government, especially by helping its enemies or trying to remove the government using violence
meanings.example: The defendant was convicted of high treason (= treason of the worst kind ) and sentenced to death.
meanings.example_cn: 被告被判犯有严重叛国罪，并处以死刑。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not loyal to their country, friends, or beliefs
meanings.example: Some say he's a traitor to the peace movement.
meanings.example_cn: 一些人说他是和平运动的背叛者。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is involved in a mutiny
meanings.example: Mr Fini was ostensibly a high-minded mutineer.
meanings.example_cn: 菲尼明显是一个高调的反叛者。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who watches something happening without being involved in it
meanings.example: A crowd of onlookers had gathered at the scene of the accident.
meanings.example_cn: 一群旁观者围聚在事故现场。

meanings.meaning_en: an operation to direct blood through new  vein s (=  blood tubes  )  outside the heart because the veins in the heart are blocked or diseased
meanings.example: a triple heart bypass operation
meanings.example_cn: 心脏三重旁通管手术

meanings.meaning_en: a ball of air or gas in liquid
meanings.example: When water boils, bubbles rise to the surface.
meanings.example_cn: 水烧开时，水面会冒泡泡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 炮的总称, 炮兵的总称
meanings.meaning_en: large guns, either on wheels or fixed in one place
meanings.example: Using tanks and heavy artillery, they seized the town.
meanings.example_cn: 他们使用坦克和重炮攻下了这座城市。

meanings.meaning_cn: 胚胎, 胎儿, 胚芽
meanings.meaning_en: an animal or human that has not yet been born, and has just begun to develop
meanings.example: The system already exists in embryo.
meanings.example_cn: 该体系已具雏形。

meanings.meaning_cn: 培养的器具, 孵卵器, 早产儿保育器
meanings.meaning_en: a heated container for keeping eggs warm until they hatch(= the young birds are born )
meanings.example: a high-tech incubator on the east coast
meanings.example_cn: 位于东海岸的高科技企业扶持机构

meanings.meaning_cn: 赔偿, 救济, 矫正
meanings.meaning_en: money that someone pays you because they have caused you harm or damaged your property
meanings.example: The only hope of redress is in a lawsuit.
meanings.example_cn: 获得赔偿的唯一希望就是打官司。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赔偿, 弥补, 恢复, 修理
meanings.meaning_en: money paid by a defeated country after a war, for all the deaths, damage etc it has caused
meanings.example: The government agreed to pay reparations to victims.
meanings.example_cn: 政府同意向受害者支付赔款。

meanings.meaning_en: too much of a drug taken at one time
meanings.example: She took an overdose and died two days later.
meanings.example_cn: 她服药过量，两天后死了。

meanings.meaning_en: a place in the ground where oil or water comes out very forcefully, so that a pump is not needed
meanings.example: And, at this particular moment, we are confronted by the picture of an uncontrolled gusher of oil spewing destruction into the gulf.
meanings.example_cn: 在这个特殊时期，我们面对的是一副这样的景象——海湾内的石油喷井无法控制下来，石油不停的流向海岸。

meanings.meaning_cn: 喷管, 喷口, 水柱, 喷流, 管口
meanings.meaning_en: A spout is a long, hollow part of a container through which liquids can be poured out easily
meanings.example: She lifted the kettle a little and tilted its spout over the tea-pot.
meanings.example_cn: 她稍稍提起烧水壶，将壶嘴向茶壶倾斜。

meanings.meaning_cn: 砰然而有效的一击, 妙计, 出乎意料的行动, 政变
meanings.meaning_en: a sudden and sometimes violent attempt by citizens or the army to take control of the government
meanings.example: Haiti’s first elected President was deposed in a violent military coup .
meanings.example_cn: 海地的第一位民选总统在一场动荡的军事政变中被废黜。

meanings.meaning_en: Distension is abnormal swelling in a person's or animal's body
a swelling up, as with blood or other fluid
meanings.example: Approximate solutions were found for the rate of growth of a bubble in the process of intumescence.
meanings.example_cn: 得到了膨胀过程中气泡生长速率的近似解。

meanings.meaning_en: an accident in which two or more people or vehicles hit each other while moving in different directions
meanings.example: Two people were killed in a head-on collision (= between two vehicles that are moving directly towards each other ) on highway 218.
meanings.example_cn: 218号公路上有两辆汽车迎面相撞，两人死亡。

meanings.meaning_en: the business of selling goods in large quantities at low prices to other businesses, rather than to the general public
meanings.example: He does wholesale business, while his brother is engaged in retail business.
meanings.example_cn: 他经营批发生意， 他弟弟则经营零售生意。

meanings.meaning_cn: 批准, 同意, 支持, 制裁, 认可
meanings.meaning_en: official orders or laws stopping trade, communication etc with another country, as a way of forcing its leaders to make political changes
meanings.example: a resolution to impose sanctions (= start using sanctions ) on DPRK
meanings.example_cn: 对朝鲜实施制裁的决议

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of cloth, in a square or  triangular  shape, that is worn around the shoulders or head, especially by women
meanings.example: She muffled up her face in her shawl.
meanings.example_cn: 她用围巾蒙住了脸。

meanings.meaning_en: a difference between two people or things that often causes problems or arguments

meanings.meaning_cn: 皮肤的硬结组织, 胼胝, (植物伤口的)愈合组织, 老茧
meanings.meaning_en: an area of thick hard skin
meanings.example: the calluses on his hands
meanings.example_cn: 他手上的老茧

meanings.meaning_cn: 皮肤医学, 皮肤病学
meanings.meaning_en: the part of medical science that deals with skin diseases and their treatment

meanings.meaning_cn: 皮匠, 补鞋匠, 工匠
meanings.meaning_en: someone who makes and repairs shoes
meanings.example: The difference does not, for example, coincide with the difference between a manual and a mental job; a gardener or a cobbler may be a worker, a bank clerk a laborer.
meanings.example_cn: 这个区别不同于体力劳动和脑力劳动之间的区别；一个园艺工人或一个补鞋匠可能是工作者，一个银行职员可能是劳作者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 皮条客, 骗徒, 催促者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who tries to trick people into giving them money
meanings.example: ...an insurance hustler.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个保险诈骗者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 毗邻, 并置, 并列
meanings.meaning_en: The juxtaposition of two contrasting objects, images, or ideas is the fact that they are placed together or described together, so that the differences between them are emphasized
meanings.example: This juxtaposition of brutal reality and lyrical beauty runs through Park's stories.
meanings.example_cn: 残酷的现实和抒情诗般的美并存贯穿于帕克的故事之中。

meanings.meaning_en: tiredness and lack of energy or interest
meanings.example: Symptoms of anaemia include general fatigue and lassitude.
meanings.example_cn: 贫血症状包括全身疲劳和困乏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 疲乏, 疲劳, 累活, [军]杂役
meanings.meaning_en: very great tiredness
meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["metal fatigue"]}
meanings.example_cn: 金属疲劳

meanings.meaning_en: unfair support of one person or one group against another
meanings.example: the problem of partiality in news reporting
meanings.example_cn: 新闻报道中有失公正的问题

meanings.example: The algorithm of dichotomy was applied to find the optimum declination value when the construction of inner and outer envelopment was designed.
meanings.example_cn: 该算法使用点对合并的聚合方法来减少点元的数量；构造内外包络时，使用二分法寻找最佳偏移值。

meanings.meaning_cn: 偏袒, 起用亲戚, 裙带关系
meanings.meaning_en: the practice of unfairly giving the best jobs to members of your family when you are in a position of power
meanings.example: allegations of nepotism and corruption
meanings.example_cn: 对任人唯亲和腐败行为的指控

meanings.meaning_cn: 偏斜, 偏转, 偏差
meanings.meaning_en: the action of making something change its direction
meanings.example: ...the deflection of light as it passes through the slits in the grating.
meanings.example_cn: ... 光线穿过栅栏缝隙的折射。

meanings.meaning_cn: 偏心, 古怪, [数]离心率
meanings.meaning_en: Eccentricity is unusual behaviour that other people consider strange
meanings.example: She is unusual to the point of eccentricity.
meanings.example_cn: 她与众不同到了古怪的地步。

meanings.meaning_cn: 偏移量, 抵销, 弥补, 分支, 平版印刷, 胶印
片, 补缀, 碎片, 斑纹, 斑点, 小块地, 眼罩, 傻瓜
meanings.meaning_en: a small area of something that is different from the area around it
meanings.example: Look out for icy patches on the road.
meanings.example_cn: 小心路上结冰的地方。

meanings.meaning_cn: 骗子, 卑鄙勾当, 赝品, 假珠宝
骗子, 诈欺者, 伪君子

meanings.meaning_en: when someone uses another person’s words, ideas, or work and pretends they are their own
meanings.example: The journal accused the professor of plagiarism.
meanings.example_cn: 那份刊物指控该教授剽窃。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拼缝物, 拼缀物, 拼凑物
meanings.meaning_en: a type of sewing in which many coloured squares of cloth are stitched together to make one large piece
meanings.example: a patchwork quilt
meanings.example_cn: 拼布被，百衲被

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being very poor
meanings.example: He died in penury in 1644.
meanings.example_cn: 1644年他穷困潦倒而死。

meanings.example: Interference with the normal production of heme or globin leads to anemia.
meanings.example_cn: 血红素或球蛋白的正常产生收到干扰会导致贫血。

meanings.meaning_en: If you refer to the mediocrity of something, you mean that it is of average quality but you think it should be better
meanings.example: ...the mediocrity of most contemporary literature.
meanings.example_cn: …大多数当代文学作品的平庸。

meanings.meaning_cn: 平底锅, 盘子, 面板
meanings.meaning_en: a round metal container that you use for cooking, usually with one long handle and a lid
meanings.example: a frying pan
meanings.example_cn: 炒锅

meanings.meaning_en: a small single-masted flat-bottomed fishing boat

meanings.example: It is a mass-producer of banality.
meanings.example_cn: 这是陈腐平庸的大规模制造者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 平衡, 均衡, 姿势, 镇静, 砝码
meanings.meaning_en: If someone has poise, they are calm, dignified, and self-controlled
meanings.example: What amazed him even more than her appearance was her poise.
meanings.example_cn: 比她的长相更让他惊讶的是她的沉着镇定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 平衡, 平静, 均衡, 保持平衡的能力, 沉着, 安静
meanings.meaning_en: a balance between different people, groups, or forces that compete with each other, so that none is stronger than the others and a situation is not likely to change suddenly
meanings.example: The government is anxious not to upset the economic equilibrium.
meanings.example_cn: 政府急切希望不要打乱经济平衡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 平面, 飞机, 水平, 程度, 刨
meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle that flies in the air and has wings and at least one engine
meanings.example: It is a big airline with a large fleet of planes.
meanings.example_cn: 这是一家大航空公司，拥有庞大的机群。

meanings.meaning_en: the people who live in a country
meanings.example: the effects of the war on the local populace
meanings.example_cn: 战争对当地百姓的影响

meanings.meaning_cn: 平民, 公务员, 文官
meanings.meaning_en: anyone who is not a member of the military forces or the police
meanings.example: Many innocent civilians were killed during the war.
meanings.example_cn: 许多无辜的平民在战争中丧生。

meanings.meaning_en: an insulting word for someone who is from a low social class
meanings.example: This displacement, which places the "elegant" name on the plebeian and the rustic name on the aristocrat, is nothing else than an eddy of equality.
meanings.example_cn: “高雅”的名字移到平民身上，村野的名字移到贵人身上，那样的交流只能说是平等思想激荡的后果。

meanings.meaning_en: an alcoholic drink made from apples, or a glass of this drink
meanings.example: At the bar he ordered a cider.
meanings.example_cn: 他在酒吧点了一杯苹果汁。

meanings.meaning_cn: 瓶, 长颈瓶, 细颈瓶, 烧瓶, 小水瓶
meanings.meaning_en: a special type of bottle that you use to keep liquids either hot or cold, for example when travelling
meanings.example: He took out a metal flask from a canvas bag.
meanings.example_cn: 他从帆布袋里拿出了一个金属水瓶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 泼妇, 好吵架的女人
meanings.meaning_en: a shrewish woman; scold
Persecution is cruel and unfair treatment of a person or group, especially because of their religious or political beliefs, or their race
meanings.example: ...the persecution of minorities.
meanings.example_cn: …对少数派的迫害。

meanings.example: The town itself is believed to be largely deserted after many of its inhabitants fled the impending crackdown, some of them crossing the border to nearby Turkey.
meanings.example_cn: 据信，许多居民逃离即将发生的镇压活动之后，这个城镇大部分已经被遗弃，其中一些人穿越边境逃往附近的土耳其。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迫切, 急迫,迫近的危险(或祸患)

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being unable to pay your debts
meanings.example: In 1999 it was revealed that he was close to bankruptcy.
meanings.example_cn: 1999年他被披露几近破产。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has officially said that they cannot pay their debts
meanings.example: In total, 80% of bankrupts are men.
meanings.example_cn: 总体来看，有80%的破产者为男性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 破坏, 毁坏, 毁坏之遗迹
meanings.meaning_en: The demolition of a structure, for example, a building, is the act of deliberately destroying it, often in order to build something else in its place
meanings.example: The project required the total demolition of the old bridge.
meanings.example_cn: 这项工程要求那座旧桥的彻底拆除。

meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of destroying something or of being destroyed
meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["weapons of mass destruction"]}
meanings.example_cn: 大规模杀伤性武器

meanings.meaning_cn: 破坏及反罢工的人, 告发人, 密告人, 乞丐
meanings.meaning_en: someone who tells the police, a teacher, or a parent when someone else breaks a rule or a law

meanings.example: He had a laceration on his head.
meanings.example_cn: 他头上也有一道口子。

meanings.meaning_en: a crack or broken part in a bone or other hard substance
meanings.example: a stress fracture in his left knee
meanings.example_cn: 他左膝上的应力性骨折

meanings.meaning_cn: 剖面, 侧面, 外形, 轮廓
meanings.meaning_en: a side view of someone’s head
meanings.example: Dani has a lovely profile.
meanings.example_cn: 达尼的侧面轮廓很好看。

meanings.meaning_cn: 扑动, 闪烁, 闪光, 颤动
meanings.meaning_en: an unsteady light that goes on and off quickly
meanings.example: Looking through the window I saw the flicker of flames.
meanings.example_cn: 透过窗子望出去，我看到了闪烁的火光。

meanings.meaning_en: a dried  grape
meanings.example: ...homemade oatmeal with brown sugar and raisins.
meanings.example_cn: …自家煮的放有红糖和葡萄干的麦片粥。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys and sells wines
meanings.example: You don't have to buy a vineyard to be a vintner or winemaker.
meanings.example_cn: 你不必非要拥有葡萄园才能成为葡萄酒商或酿酒师。

meanings.meaning_en: a natural form of sugar that exists in fruit
meanings.example: The doctor injects glucose into the patient's vein.
meanings.example_cn: 医生把葡萄糖注射入病人的静脉。

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow structure that slopes down, so that things or people can slide down it from one place to another
meanings.example: a rubbish chute
meanings.example_cn: 垃圾滑槽

meanings.meaning_cn: 栖木, 栖息所, 卧室
meanings.meaning_en: a place where birds rest and sleep
meanings.example: Something disturbed the bird on its roost.
meanings.example_cn: 什么东西惊扰了那只栖息的鸟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 栖木, 人所居的高位, 有利的地位, 杆, 河鲈
meanings.meaning_en: a branch or stick where a bird sits
meanings.example: She watched the parade from her perch on her father’s shoulders.
meanings.example_cn: 她骑在父亲的肩上观看游行。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who uses their strength or power to frighten or hurt someone who is weaker
meanings.example: Bullies are often cowards.
meanings.example_cn: 恃强凌弱者往往是懦夫。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of tricks to deceive or cheat people
meanings.example: Yet there is no cheating involved in any of the photographs. No steel rods, no magnets, no computer trickery. The only glue he uses is Nature's. Gravity.
meanings.example_cn: 然而，其中任何一张照片都没有涉及到欺骗。那里没有钢条、没有磁铁也没有电脑欺骗。他使用的唯一粘合剂是大自然的重力。

meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that is intended to make someone believe something that is not true
meanings.example: an atmosphere of hypocrisy and deceit
meanings.example_cn: 充满虚伪和欺骗的氛围

meanings.meaning_cn: 欺骗, 欺诈行为, 诡计, 骗子, 假货
meanings.meaning_en: the crime of deceiving people in order to gain something such as money or goods
meanings.example: {"COLLOINEXA":["electoral fraud"]}
meanings.example_cn: 选举欺诈

meanings.meaning_cn: 欺骗, 作假, 使诈, 诡计
meanings.meaning_en: secretly dishonest or illegal activity – also used humorously
meanings.example: ...accusations of political skulduggery.
meanings.example_cn: ...政治欺诈的控告。

meanings.meaning_en: the act or an instance of deceiving others, esp by assuming a false identity
meanings.example: This new resource discovery algorithm can effectively restrain the imposture and pseudo service of P2P network, improve the reliability and security and decrease network load.
meanings.example_cn: 仿真试验表明，该算法有效的抑制了P2P网络中恶意节点的欺诈行为，降低了系统的消息负载，保证了请求节点获得服务和资源的可靠性和安全性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奇特行为, 奇想, 反复无常的行为
meanings.meaning_en: Vagaries are unexpected and unpredictable changes in a situation or in someone's behaviour that you have no control over
meanings.example: ...the perplexing vagaries of politics.
meanings.example_cn: ...令人费解、变化莫测的政坛风云。

meanings.meaning_en: An invocation is a request for help or forgiveness made to a god
meanings.example: ...an invocation for divine guidance.
meanings.example_cn: ...求神引导的一个祷告。

meanings.meaning_en: an offensive word or phrase, used when someone is very angry
meanings.example: Let I not imprecation I of pain and sufferings will stop.
meanings.example_cn: 让我不祈求我的痛苦会停止。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of an army that fights on horses, especially in the past
meanings.example: The Black Prince led a cavalry charge against them.
meanings.example_cn: 黑王子带领骑兵向他们冲去。

meanings.meaning_en: the study and practice of riding and horsemanship
meanings.example: We can admire the grassland scenery, equitation and watch the sunset.
meanings.example_cn: 我们可以一起欣赏草原风光，骑马，看日落。

meanings.meaning_cn: 骑士, 武士, 对女人献殷勤, 有礼貌的绅士
骑士精神, 骑士制度
meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that is honourable, kind, generous, and brave, especially men’s behaviour towards women
meanings.example: ...the age of chivalry.

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of cloth with a coloured pattern or picture on it that represents a country or organization

meanings.example_cn: 孩子们挥舞着旗帜，欢迎俄罗斯领导人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 旗, 军舰旗, 军旗, 徽章, <美>海军少尉
meanings.meaning_en: a flag on a ship that shows what country the ship belongs to

meanings.meaning_en: a system of sending messages using two flags, which you hold in different positions to represent letters and numbers

meanings.meaning_cn: 旗帜, 横幅, 标语

meanings.example_cn: 观众挥动着横幅，又是叫喊又是欢呼。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is successful in business or industry and has a lot of money and power

meanings.example_cn: …一个靠自己奋斗成功的爱尔兰裔美国房地产大亨。

meanings.meaning_en: Enlightenment means the act of enlightening or the state of being enlightened

meanings.meaning_cn: 起诉者, 求婚者, 请愿者

meanings.meaning_en: an attempt by a large group of people within a country to take control using force and violence

meanings.meaning_en: the beginning or origin of something

meanings.meaning_en: the place where something originally came from

meanings.example_cn: 这些画出处不详。

meanings.meaning_cn: 气魄, 神韵, 活力, 热情

meanings.example_cn: 他追求画面的表现力—就像这幅画里的落日—而且创作时充满激情。

meanings.meaning_cn: 气味, 香味, 香水, 线索, 嗅觉, 臭迹

meanings.meaning_cn: 气质, 道义, 民族精神, 社会思潮, 风气

meanings.meaning_cn: 汽笛, 警报器, 空袭警报, 妖妇

meanings.example_cn: 再次，论文阐述了农业虚拟研发组织的生命周期，并论述了基于动态网契约的农业虚拟研发组织的运行模式。

meanings.meaning_en: a legal agreement in which someone promises to pay a person or organization an amount of money regularly

meanings.example_cn: …公民权利和政治权利国际公约。

meanings.meaning_en: a thing such as a knife, spoon etc that you use when you are cooking

meanings.meaning_cn: 牵连, 含意, 暗示

meanings.example_cn: 它们被称作“超级电车”，这是暗指它们比先前的型号更先进。

meanings.meaning_en: a  puppet  whose arms and legs are moved by pulling strings
meanings.example: Then slowly slide down the wall, falling forward from the waist—like a marionette with slack strings.
meanings.example_cn: 然后缓慢顺墙滑身而下，而腰部向前落——就像是松紧线牵动的木偶。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of treating a broken bone with special medical equipment that pulls it

meanings.example_cn: 以上一系列操作会让你的车子尽可能在陡坡上保持住牵引力，因为此时变速箱和制动器都起到了锁定车辆的作用。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of not being too proud about yourself – use this to show approval

meanings.example_cn: …深深的谦卑感。

meanings.meaning_cn: 谦虚, 硬要人家领情的态度
前锋, 先锋, 领导者

meanings.example: It is prodrome respectively period, foreboding period, convulsion period, atony lethargy period and recognizant convalescence.

meanings.meaning_en: when you behave in a way that shows respect for your religion

meanings.meaning_en: someone who collects and studies coins and medals
money or wealth, esp if dishonestly acquired; lucre

meanings.example: Crabs have two sharp and large pincers.

meanings.meaning_en: a tool that you use to lift up small objects. It has two bars joined at one end, that you press together to lift objects.
a small tool made of two crossed pieces of metal, used to hold small things or to bend and cut wire

meanings.example: They have to lurk.

meanings.meaning_en: a long tube with mirrors fitted in it, used to look over the top of something, especially to see out of a  submarine

meanings.meaning_en: a pale yellow-brown colour

meanings.example_cn: 在她衣服的袖子和暗黄色软皮手套之间，看得见有一截裸露的胳膊露在外面；这一天慢慢过去了，女孩儿圆润的胳膊也被麦茬刺破了，流出了鲜血。

a natural tendency to behave in a particular way

meanings.meaning_en: a general tendency in the way a situation is changing or developing

meanings.meaning_cn: 倾斜, 倾斜度, 倚靠, 倾向

meanings.meaning_en: a downward slope, esp of the ground

meanings.meaning_cn: 倾斜, 斜坡, 斜面

meanings.meaning_cn: 清唱剧, 康塔塔, 大合唱
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of religious music for singers and instruments
the clarity of a piece of writing, law, argument etc is its quality of being expressed clearly

meanings.example: He struck at one with his knife lashed to the end of an oar and watched the scavenger sliding down into deep water.

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid or powder used for washing clothes, dishes etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 清漆, 凡立水, 光泽面, 掩饰

meanings.meaning_en: the act of closing a company by selling the things that belong to it, in order to pay its debts

meanings.example_cn: 数以百计的小公司破产了。

meanings.example_cn: 约翰也有清醒的时候，但总是重拾酗酒的老习惯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 伤害罪之一种, 故意的伤害罪

meanings.meaning_en: a large shop

meanings.example_cn: 现在的勐海，新开张的六层大百货商场十分冷清，它原本为数以百计的商家而建。

meanings.meaning_en: goods that are being sold

meanings.meaning_en: the upper level of soil in which most plants have their roots

meanings.meaning_cn: 上升, (地位, 声望等的)提高, 攀登, 上坡路

meanings.meaning_en: a very small amount of money, especially wages, that is less than someone needs or deserves

meanings.meaning_en: a small amount of something, especially a good quality

meanings.example: Police formed a cordon between the two crowds.

meanings.meaning_en: The enactment of a law is the process in a legislature by which the law is agreed upon and made official

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is well known for going to many fashionable parties, and who is often rich

meanings.example_cn: 一位华盛顿的社会名流

meanings.meaning_en: an object that is thrown at someone or is fired from a gun or other weapon, such as a bullet, stone, or  shell
meanings.example: Then they started to look and discovered that it was some kind of projectile, but they didn't know what it was.
meanings.example_cn: 然后他们开始检查，发现那是某种类似弹丸的东西，但他们不知道那究竟是什么。

meanings.meaning_cn: 射手, 弓术家, [天]人马星座
摄生法, 政权, 政体
meanings.meaning_en: a special plan of food, exercise etc that is intended to improve your health

meanings.meaning_en: someone who governs instead of a king or queen, because the king or queen is ill, absent, or still a child
Reprimand is also a noun
meanings.example: He has been fined five thousand dollars and given a severe reprimand.
meanings.example_cn: 他被罚款5000美元，并且受到严厉的训斥。

meanings.meaning_cn: 身份, 地位, 情形, 状况

meanings.example: These documents have no legal status in Britain.
meanings.example_cn: 这些文件在英国并无法律效力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 身高, 身材, (精神、道德等的)高度
meanings.meaning_en: someone’s height or size
meanings.example: Bernard was short in stature, with a large head.
meanings.example_cn: 伯纳德个子矮，头很大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 呻吟, 哀悼, 呼啸

meanings.example: She gave a little moan of pleasure.

meanings.example: Give us the ballot and we will quietly and nonviolently, without rancor or bitterness, implement the Supreme Court's decision of May 17, 1954.
meanings.example_cn: 给我们选举权，我们就会平静非暴力，不引起怨恨和苦难，使1954年5月17日最高法院的决议生效

meanings.meaning_cn: 深度, 深处, 深奥, 深刻

meanings.meaning_en: a deep empty hole in the ground

meanings.meaning_en: a god or  goddess

meanings.example_cn: 这些病人不是神经官能症患者。

the study of religion and religious ideas and beliefs

meanings.example_cn: 她饰演一个抛弃所有财产的严谨的审美家，同时还是个连环杀手；她第一次担任主演是在“真爱的故事”。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of the world in which animals, plants etc can live

meanings.example: Set in small-town Iowa in 1956, Gilead is a quiet, slow-moving but ultimately majestic avowal of the redemptive power of love. LA

meanings.example: Deanes writes and lectures about teenage delinquents.

meanings.example_cn: 1个湿度计（属于菲茨罗伊）

meanings.example_cn: 原油蒸馏过程是大型炼油厂和石化企业的龙头工序。

something that exists as a single and complete unit

meanings.example_cn: …一位实习医生。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of dealing with problems in a sensible practical way instead of following a set of ideas

meanings.example_cn: 以务实闻名的政治家

meanings.example: And sometimes like a gleaner thou dost keep
meanings.example_cn: 有时候你又像过河的拾穗农人

meanings.meaning_en: food - used especially when talking about the business of producing or selling food

meanings.example_cn: 基本食品短缺

meanings.meaning_cn: 食人者, 吃同类的动物

meanings.example_cn: …一个居住着食人族的热带岛屿。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal that eats flesh

meanings.example_cn: 这是一道肉食者们都喜欢的美味素食。

meanings.meaning_en: food that people or animals need in order to live

meanings.meaning_en: food
meanings.example: In the long history of inspirational pabulum, "follow your passion" has got to be the worst.
meanings.example_cn: 在精神粮食的悠久历史中，“追随你的激情”肯定要算是最糟糕的一句话。

meanings.example_cn: 她丈夫向来胃口极大。

meanings.meaning_en: a mental illness that makes someone stop eating

meanings.example: While tentative, this science is telling us that each of us is a package composed of Mommy's genes, Daddy's genes and the bacterial genes that have moved in and stayed.

meanings.meaning_en: a  sailor

meanings.meaning_cn: 四角形, 四边形, 方院, 方庭(尤指牛津大学等学院中者)
meanings.meaning_en: a square open area with buildings all around it, especially at a school or college

meanings.meaning_cn: 四肢伸开的躺卧姿势, 蔓生
meanings.example: The whole urban sprawl of Ankara contains over 2.6 million people.
meanings.example_cn: 整个安卡拉城区总共容纳了260万以上的人口。

meanings.meaning_cn: 四重奏, 四重唱, 四部合奏(唱)曲
meanings.meaning_en: four singers or musicians who sing or play together
meanings.example: a string quartet
meanings.example_cn: 弦乐四重奏组

meanings.meaning_cn: 祀为神, 神格化, 奉若神明
meanings.meaning_en: If you talk about the deification of someone or something, you mean that they are regarded with very great respect and are not criticized at all
meanings.example: ...the deification of science in the 1940s.
meanings.example_cn: ...二十世纪四十年代科学神圣化。

meanings.meaning_cn: 饲料, 草料, (创作的)素材, 弹药
meanings.meaning_en: food for farm animals
meanings.example: ...fodder for horses.
meanings.example_cn: …马的饲料。

meanings.meaning_cn: 松弛, 放宽, 缓和, 减轻, 娱乐
meanings.meaning_en: a way of resting and enjoying yourself
meanings.example: I play the piano for relaxation.
meanings.example_cn: 我弹钢琴自娱。

meanings.example: Just as there are foods that enhance skin health, such as fresh fruits and vegetables, there are ones that can harm skin and increase the risk of skin laxity and wrinkling.
meanings.example_cn: 就像一些食物可以增强皮肤健康，如新鲜的水果 和蔬菜，相对的也会存在一些食物，可以伤害和增加肌肤老化，让皮肤松弛和产生皱纹。

meanings.meaning_en: a small bird that is hunted and shot for food and sport, or the flesh of this bird
meanings.example: the grouse shooting season
meanings.example_cn: 捕猎松鸡的季节

meanings.meaning_en: a tall tree with long hard sharp leaves that do not fall off in winter
meanings.example: an ancient pine forest
meanings.example_cn: 一片古老的松树林

meanings.meaning_en: a movement of your shoulders upwards and then downwards again that you make to show that you do not know something or do not care about something
meanings.example: "I suppose so," said Anna with a shrug.
meanings.example_cn: “我想是这样，”安娜耸耸肩说道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 讼棍, 奸诈之徒(尤指政客)

meanings.meaning_en: a speech or piece of writing that praises someone or something a lot
meanings.example: The book is a panegyric on the intoxicating effects of marijuana.
meanings.example_cn: 该书是一篇对大麻兴奋陶醉效应的颂词。

meanings.meaning_en: a poem or song written in order to praise a person or thing
meanings.example: ...Keats' "Ode to a Nightingale."
meanings.example_cn: ...济慈的《夜莺颂》。

meanings.meaning_en: the reappearance and growth of something that was common in the past
meanings.example: Police say drugs traffickers are behind the resurgence of violence.
meanings.example_cn: 警方说毒贩是暴力事件增加的原因。

meanings.example: Thus, his preaching was directed at not only the laity, but the clergy as well.
meanings.example_cn: 因此，他的讲道面向的不只是世俗之人，也面向神职人员。

meanings.meaning_en: an order of a judge dismissing a suit when the plaintiff fails to show he has a good cause of action or fails to produce any evidence
meanings.example: I ever and Hao brother propose want help he cover mathematics and nature, butted Hao brother very fierce nonsuit, he say behave want dinkum, not can make breach oneself's conscience de matter.
meanings.example_cn: 我曾经和豪哥提议要帮他罩数学和自然，可是被豪哥很凶的驳回，他说做人要正大光明，不可以做出违背自已良心的事。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is making a claim against someone or defending themselves against a claim in a court of law
meanings.example: How can I as a private litigant seek redress for defamation that ruins my business?
meanings.example_cn: 做为私人诉讼当事人，我怎么对毁了我的事业的诽谤寻求补救呢？

meanings.meaning_en: The clientele of a place or organization are its customers or clients
meanings.example: This pub had a mixed clientele.
meanings.example_cn: 这家酒吧有混杂的顾客群。

meanings.meaning_cn: 速度, 速率, 迅速, 周转率
meanings.meaning_en: the speed of something that is moving in a particular direction
meanings.example: the velocity of light
meanings.example_cn: 光速

meanings.meaning_en: a fast way of writing in which you use special signs or short forms of words, used especially to record what someone is saying
meanings.example: She knew no more shorthand than if she had been a graduate in stenography just let slip upon the world by a business college.
meanings.example_cn: 她并不太精通速记，就像是刚刚走出商学院速记专业的毕业学生，来闯荡世界。

meanings.meaning_cn: 塑胶, 可塑体, 塑料制品, 整形
meanings.meaning_en: a light strong material that is produced by a chemical process, and which can be made into different shapes when it is soft
meanings.example: children’s toys made of plastic
meanings.example_cn: 塑料儿童玩具

meanings.meaning_en: a frame with small balls that can be slid along on thick wires, used for counting and calculating
meanings.example: In English we call it an abacus.
meanings.example_cn: 在英语里我们叫它为一个算盘。

meanings.meaning_en: the science of numbers involving adding, multiplying etc
meanings.example: ...teaching the basics of reading, writing and arithmetic.
meanings.example_cn: …教授读、写、算的基本知识。

meanings.meaning_cn: 髓, 骨髓, 精华, 活力, <苏格兰>配偶
meanings.meaning_en: the soft fatty substance in the hollow centre of bones
meanings.example: a bone marrow transplant
meanings.example_cn: 骨髓移植

meanings.meaning_en: torn or ragged pieces, esp of material
meanings.example: When I wake, a tatter of blue and green beneath my nails.
meanings.example_cn: 我醒来的时候，我指甲下有一缕蓝绿相间的碎布纤维。

meanings.meaning_en: a splinter or chip of ore, rock, or stone
the pieces of something that are left after it has been destroyed in an accident, explosion etc
meanings.example: She was hit by flying debris from the blast.
meanings.example_cn: 她被爆炸产生的飞散碎片击中。

meanings.meaning_cn: 碎片, 破布, 少量剩余, 最少量
meanings.meaning_en: a small thin piece that is torn or cut roughly from something
meanings.example: Cut the cabbage into fine long shreds.
meanings.example_cn: 把这棵卷心菜切成细长条。

meanings.meaning_en: If something is blown or smashed to smithereens, it breaks into very small pieces
meanings.example: She dropped the vase and smashed it to smithereens.
meanings.example_cn: 她失手将花瓶摔得粉碎。

meanings.meaning_en: broken stones or bricks from a building or wall that has been destroyed
meanings.example: Brick rubble is useful as the base for paths and patios.
meanings.example_cn: 碎砖可用作道路和天井的基石。

meanings.meaning_en: pieces of waste that remain after something has been broken up or used
meanings.example: In the distance, the detritus of a century of oil exploration lines the horizon.
meanings.example_cn: 在远方地平线上，矗立着一个世纪以来开采石油产生的碎石堆。

meanings.meaning_cn: 碎石, 卵石, 满布石块的山, 遍地小石的山的斜坡
meanings.meaning_en: an area of loose soil and broken rocks on the side of a mountain
meanings.example: a scree slope
meanings.example_cn: 碎石坡

meanings.meaning_en: a road surface made of a mixture of broken stones and  tar  or  asphalt
meanings.example: Surface with macadam , of a road.
meanings.example_cn: 在路的表面用碎石覆盖。

meanings.meaning_cn: 碎屑, 残渣, 废弃物, 垃圾, (猪、牛、羊等屠宰后的)头, 尾, 下水
meanings.meaning_en: the inside parts of an animal, for example the heart, liver, and kidneys used as food
meanings.example: ...all the blood and offal the butchers shove down in the gutters.
meanings.example_cn: …屠夫们倒入下水道的所有血和杂碎。

meanings.meaning_cn: 碎屑, 面包屑, 少许
meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of dry food, especially bread or cake
meanings.example: She stood up to brush the crumbs off her uniform.
meanings.example_cn: 她站起来拂去制服上的面包屑。

meanings.meaning_en: threads tied together at one end and hung as a decoration on clothes, curtains etc
meanings.example: She crafted a version of the black-and-white tassel dress Oscar de la Renta sent down the runway last month by hand-sewing store-bought tassels onto a tank top.
meanings.example_cn: 她缝制了奥斯卡•德拉伦塔（Oscar de la Renta）上个月在服装展示中推出的黑白两色的穗裙，把商店里买来的穗子缝到吊带背心上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 穗, 长钉, 钉鞋, 女高跟鞋, 道钉
meanings.meaning_en: shoes with metal points on the bottom, worn by people who run races, play golf etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 损害, 身体上的伤害
meanings.meaning_en: damage to someone’s skin or part of their body such as their stomach or brain, caused by injury or illness
meanings.example: acute gastric lesions
meanings.example_cn: 急性胃损伤

meanings.meaning_en: harm or damage

meanings.example: Overfishing not only causes depletion in individual fish stocks, but also disruption to entire ecosystems and food webs in the ocean.
meanings.example_cn: 过度捕捞不仅引起个别鱼种的消耗，而且还引起海洋中整个生态系统和食物网的崩溃。

meanings.example: I also have a feather from another species making a comeback against the odds, the peregrine falcon.
meanings.example_cn: 我还有一支游隼羽毛，这是另一个被挽救的生物种类。

meanings.meaning_en: a hole cut in a piece of wood or stone so that the shaped end of another piece will fit there firmly

meanings.meaning_cn: 缩进, 契约, 订货单, 凹痕
meanings.meaning_en: an official order for goods or equipment

meanings.meaning_cn: 缩排, 呈锯齿状, 缺口, 印凹痕
meanings.meaning_en: a cut into the surface or edge of something
meanings.example: Make an indentation in the center of each cookie.
meanings.example_cn: 在每块甜饼干的中间挖一个缺口。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缩小的模型, 缩图, 缩影
meanings.meaning_en: exactly like something or someone but much smaller
meanings.example: She’s her mother in miniature.
meanings.example_cn: 她是她母亲的缩影。

meanings.meaning_en: a short form of a word or expression
meanings.example: The abbreviation for Kansas is KS.
meanings.example_cn: 的缩写是。

meanings.meaning_cn: 所愿望之物, 迫切需要之物
索具装备, 钻探设备, 钻探平台, 钻塔
meanings.meaning_en: a large structure that is used for getting oil from the ground under the sea
meanings.example: ...a supply vessel for oil rigs in the Gulf of Mexico.
meanings.example_cn: …一艘墨西哥湾石油钻塔的供给船。

meanings.meaning_en: unimportant or useless details
meanings.example: meaningless trivia
meanings.example_cn: 毫无意义的琐事

meanings.meaning_cn: 琐事, 少量, 蛋糕, 小事
meanings.meaning_en: something unimportant or not valuable
meanings.example: There’s no point in arguing over trifles.
meanings.example_cn: 为琐事争吵毫无意义。

meanings.meaning_en: work or a way of life that seems very boring because you always have to do the same things
meanings.example: the treadmill of working in the office
meanings.example_cn: 单调枯燥的办公室工作

meanings.meaning_en: a baby or young animal before it is born
meanings.example: In this chapter we will look at what happens when a human foetus receives too much or too little male hormone.
meanings.example_cn: 在这一章里，我们将看看当一个人类胎儿接收了过多或过少的雄性激素会发生什么。

meanings.meaning_en: A fetus is an animal or human being in its later stages of development before it is born
meanings.example: Pregnant women who are heavy drinkers risk damaging the unborn fetus.
meanings.example_cn: 酗酒的孕妇冒有伤害胎儿的危险。

meanings.meaning_en: a desire to have a lot of money that is considered to be too strong
meanings.example: He paid a month's rent in advance, just enough to satisfy the landlord's avarice.
meanings.example_cn: 他预交了一个月的房租，正好满足了房东的贪心。

meanings.meaning_en: Rapacity is very greedy or selfish behaviour
meanings.example: He argued that the overcrowded cities were the product of a system based on "selfishness" and "rapacity."
meanings.example_cn: 他辩称说，过分拥挤的城市是建立在“自私”和“贪婪”基础上的制度造成的。

meanings.example: For me, this value is to be sought on a much less elevated plane than might be supposed, namely, in that which is the true function of the organ of the eye, the eye filled with voracity, the evil eye.
meanings.example_cn: 对我而言，这个价值的寻找位置，应该是在我们以为不甚崇高的层面，换言之，应该是在眼睛这个器官的真实功用，充满贪婪的眼睛，邪恶之眼。

meanings.meaning_en: very strong desire for something, especially money or property
meanings.example: the cupidity of some businessmen
meanings.example_cn: 一些商人的贪婪

meanings.meaning_en: the loss of the ability to move all or part of your body or feel things in it
meanings.example: paralysis of the lower body
meanings.example_cn: 下半身瘫痪

meanings.meaning_cn: 谈判, 交涉, 闲聊

meanings.meaning_en: a fast dance from South America, or a piece of music for this dance
meanings.example: A tango was playing on the jukebox.
meanings.example_cn: 自动点唱机播放着一首探戈舞曲。

meanings.meaning_en: A probe is a long thin instrument that doctors and dentists use to examine parts of the body
meanings.example: ...a fibre-optic probe.
meanings.example_cn: …一根光纤探针。

meanings.meaning_cn: 探险, 踏勘, 探测, [医](伤处等的)探查, 探察术
meanings.meaning_en: the act of travelling through a place in order to find out about it or find something such as oil or gold in it
meanings.example: oil exploration facilities in the North Sea
meanings.example_cn: 北海的石油勘探设施

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin metal instrument that doctors and scientists use to examine parts of the body
meanings.example: ...a federal grand-jury probe into corruption within the FDA.
meanings.example_cn: …联邦大陪审团对食品及药品管理局内部腐败的一次调查。

meanings.meaning_cn: 糖果, 蜜饯, 调制, [药]糖膏(剂), 精制工艺品
meanings.example: ...a confection made with honey and nuts.
meanings.example_cn: ...一种蜂蜜和坚果制成的甜食。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance that tastes sweet and is used instead of sugar in drinks
meanings.example: The saccharin-fed animals, on the other hand, showed no such rise in temperature.
meanings.example_cn: 另一方面，食用糖精的小白鼠并没有出现体温升高的现象。

meanings.meaning_cn: 糖蜜, 甜蜜, 过分甜蜜的声调
meanings.meaning_en: a thick sweet black sticky liquid that is obtained from raw sugar and used in cooking
a mixture made from very fine light sugar and liquid, used to cover cakes
meanings.example: Paul made five-year-old Michelle a birthday cake with yellow icing.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗给5岁的米歇尔做了一个裹了黄色糖霜的生日蛋糕。

meanings.meaning_en: a burn on your skin caused by hot liquid or steam
meanings.example: Scalds, burns and poisoning can all be life-threatening.
meanings.example_cn: 烫伤、烧伤和中毒都有可能危及生命。

meanings.meaning_en: when students deliberately stay away from school without permission
meanings.example: the school’s truancy rate
meanings.example_cn: 学校的旷课率

meanings.meaning_cn: 桃子, 桃树, 桃色, <美俚>受人喜欢的人(或物)
meanings.meaning_en: a round juicy fruit that has a soft yellow or red skin and a large, hard seed in the centre, or the tree that this fruit grows on
meanings.example: Anderton scored a peach of a goal.
meanings.example_cn: 安德顿射入一个好球。

meanings.meaning_en: cups, dishes, plates etc
meanings.example: a stack of dirty crockery
meanings.example_cn: 一大堆脏碗碟

meanings.meaning_en: a  conference
meanings.example: In this context, I am very grateful to President Havel for having organized a colloquium for dialogue recently here in Prague.
meanings.example_cn: 我非常感谢哈韦尔总统最近在布拉格组织的一次对话式的讨论会。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal meeting in which people who know a lot about a particular subject have discussions about it
meanings.example: He had been taking part in an international symposium on population.
meanings.example_cn: 他那时在参加一个有关人口的国际研讨会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 套索, 束缚, 陷阱, (the noose)绞刑
meanings.meaning_en: A noose is a circular loop at the end of a piece of rope or wire. A noose is tied with a knot that allows it to be tightened, and it is usually used to trap animals or hang people.
meanings.example: ...a horrifying videotape of a man swinging from a noose.
meanings.example_cn: …一盘一名男子吊在绞索上的恐怖录像带。

meanings.meaning_en: a right that someone has, especially because of their importance or social position
meanings.example: Arriving late is a woman’s prerogative .
meanings.example_cn: 迟到是女人的特权。

meanings.meaning_cn: 特权, 特别待遇, 基本公民权力, 特免
meanings.meaning_en: a special advantage that is given only to one person or group of people
meanings.example: He had no special privileges and was treated just like every other prisoner.
meanings.example_cn: 他不享受特权，待遇和任何其他犯人一样。

meanings.meaning_en: an unusual or unexpected feature that something has
meanings.example: one of the many idiosyncrasies of English spelling
meanings.example_cn: 英语拼写的众多特点之一

meanings.meaning_cn: 藤条, 薄木条, 薄金属片, (外科用的)夹板
meanings.meaning_en: a flat piece of wood, metal etc used for keeping a broken bone in position while it mends

meanings.meaning_cn: 梯田的一层, 梯田, 房屋之平顶, 露台, 阳台, 倾斜的平地
meanings.meaning_en: a flat outdoor area next to a building or on a roof, where you can sit outside to eat, relax etc
meanings.example: Some guests recline in deck chairs on the sea-facing terrace.
meanings.example_cn: 有些客人斜躺在朝海露台的躺椅上。

meanings.meaning_en: something said or written that mentions a subject, person etc indirectly
meanings.example: This last point was understood to be an allusion to the long-standing hostility between the two leaders.
meanings.example_cn: 这最后一点曾被理解为对这两位领导人之间长久敌意的一种影射。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提升, 提高, 兴奋, 得意洋洋
meanings.meaning_en: a very strong feeling of happiness
meanings.example: The city was swept up in the mood of exaltation.
meanings.example_cn: 该城被兴奋的情绪给席卷了。

meanings.meaning_en: a movement that lifts something up
meanings.example: Give me a hoist onto your shoulders.
meanings.example_cn: 你把我扛到肩膀上吧。

meanings.meaning_en: a sign on a computer screen which shows that the computer has finished one operation and is ready to begin the next
a piece of writing inscribed on a stone, in the front of a book etc
meanings.example: a Latin inscription on the memorial stone
meanings.example_cn: 纪念碑上的拉丁语碑文

meanings.meaning_en: the hard foot of an animal such as a horse, cow etc
meanings.example: The horses' hooves often could not get a proper grip.
meanings.example_cn: 这些马的蹄子经常踩不稳。

meanings.meaning_cn: 体现, 具体化, 化身
meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that represents or is very typical of an idea or quality
meanings.example: He is the embodiment of evil.
meanings.example_cn: 他是邪恶的化身。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool with a sharp blade, used to remove hair from your skin
meanings.example: an electric razor
meanings.example_cn: 电动剃须刀

meanings.meaning_cn: 天窗, 舱室小孔, 煤桶, 急速逃走

meanings.example: With a pool and patio outside and a working fireplace and spiral staircases inside, the seven-bedroom house should have buyers lining up.
meanings.example_cn: 外面有游泳池和院子，里面有壁炉和旋转楼梯，这个拥有七间卧室的房子本来应该有很多买家的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 天空, 太空, 苍天
meanings.meaning_en: the sky or heaven
meanings.example: There are no stars in the firmament.
meanings.example_cn: 天空没有星星。

meanings.meaning_cn: 天蓝色, 苍天, 碧空

meanings.meaning_en: the leaves and branches of trees, that make a kind of roof in a forest
meanings.example: the forest canopy
meanings.example_cn: 森林的树冠层

meanings.meaning_cn: 天然磁石, 吸引人的东西
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of iron that acts as a magnet
meanings.example: There, copper plates near the entrance bear snippets of Morse code, and a naturally magnetized lodestone sits by a compass rose etched in granite.
meanings.example_cn: 这面铜板离入口很近，在入口的地方刻有一段莫尔斯电码，旁边还有一块天然磁石摆放在一块刻有罗盘刻度的花岗岩上。

meanings.meaning_en: a wire  rod  etc used for receiving radio and television signals
meanings.example: television antennas
meanings.example_cn: 电视机天线

meanings.meaning_cn: 天真烂漫, 无邪的行为

meanings.meaning_en: A Catholic is a member of the Catholic Church
meanings.example: At least nine out of ten Mexicans are baptized Catholics.
meanings.example_cn: 至少十分之九的墨西哥人是受过洗礼的天主教徒。

meanings.example: She finds that the sleepy town she moves to isn't the rural idyll she imagined.
meanings.example_cn: 她发现，她要搬入的这个宁静小镇并不是自己想象的那种乡村田园。

meanings.meaning_en: a vegetable that sugar is made from
meanings.example: ...fields of sweet corn and beet.
meanings.example_cn: …甜玉米和甜菜地

meanings.meaning_cn: 调合, 混合, 调合物
meanings.example: He sipped the concoction cautiously.
meanings.example_cn: 他小心翼翼地啜着调配出来的酒。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin curved board that an artist uses to mix paints, holding it by putting his or her thumb through a hole at the edge
meanings.example: The painter's right hand holds the brush, the left the palette.
meanings.example_cn: 那位画家的右手握着画笔，左手拿着调色盘。

meanings.meaning_en: a thick cold red sauce made from tomatoes that you put on food
meanings.example: a bottle of tomato ketchup
meanings.example_cn: 一瓶番茄酱

meanings.meaning_en: a substance used to give something a particular flavour or increase its flavour
meanings.example: artificial flavourings
meanings.example_cn: 人工调味品

meanings.meaning_en: a powder or liquid, such as salt or  ketchup  , that you use to give a special taste to food
meanings.example: Fact: Apparently this condiment can reinstate shine to your small change.
meanings.example_cn: 事实：这显然是调味品的小改变让事物恢复光芒。

meanings.meaning_en: salt, pepper, spices etc that give food a more interesting taste
meanings.example: Mix the meat with the onion, carrot, and some seasoning.
meanings.example_cn: 将肉、洋葱、胡萝卜及一些佐料拌在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: If two people have a brief romantic relationship, you can say that they have a dalliance with each other, especially if they do not take it seriously
meanings.example: In Jordan, this is a shortcut to signal interest in a dalliance.
meanings.example_cn: 在约旦，这个是一个调情的手势。

meanings.meaning_en: a short jumping or dancing movement
meanings.example: Pearl, looking at this bright wonder of a house, began to caper and dance, and imperatively required that the whole breadth of sunshine should be stripped off its front, and given her to play with.
meanings.example_cn: 珠儿望着这幢灿烂而奇妙的住宅，开始雀跃起来，使劲要求从住宅前腿上把整整一层阳光给剥下来，好让她玩个痛快。

meanings.meaning_en: An audition is a short performance given by an actor, dancer, or musician so that a director or conductor can decide if they are good enough to be in a play, film, or orchestra
meanings.example: ...an audition for a Broadway musical.
meanings.example_cn: …一部百老汇歌舞剧的试演。

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument that a doctor uses to listen to your heart or breathing
meanings.example: Listening to a purring cat through a stethoscope is also a great relaxation technique.
meanings.example_cn: 用听诊器听猫发出呼噜呼噜的声音，也是很好的放松技巧。

meanings.example: "We went into a market and established a kiosk in that market out of a butcher's shop," Kalanda says.
meanings.example_cn: 卡兰达说，“由于一家肉店，我们进入这个市场，在那个市场我们建立了一个公用电话亭”

meanings.meaning_en: the place where a ship or boat is moored
meanings.example: a temporary mooring
meanings.example_cn: 临时泊位

meanings.meaning_cn: 停泊处, 卧铺(口语)职业
meanings.meaning_en: a place where a ship can stop and be tied up
meanings.example: Goldring booked a berth on the first boat he could.
meanings.example_cn: 戈德林在第一艘他能订到卧铺的船上订了个位子。

meanings.meaning_en: a building or room, for example in a hospital, where dead bodies are kept before they are buried or  cremate d
meanings.example: If you try any monkey tricks with me, I will shoot you right away, and your family can come and collect your body in the mortuary.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你们谁敢跟我耍花样，我现在就枪毙了他，他的家人可以等着到太平间里认领他的尸体。

meanings.meaning_en: an agreement to stop fighting
meanings.example: Finally, the Bolsheviks signed an armistice with Germany.
meanings.example_cn: 布尔什维克最终与德国签署了停战协议。

meanings.meaning_en: cessation or intermission
a pause or stop
meanings.example: He would not agree to a cessation of hostilities.
meanings.example_cn: 他不会同意敌对状态的停止。

meanings.meaning_cn: 停止, 暂停, 中断
meanings.meaning_en: a stop or pause
meanings.example: Heavy snowfalls brought traffic to a halt (= made it stop moving ).
meanings.example_cn: 大雪使得交通陷于停顿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 通风孔, 出烟孔, 出口, (感情等的)发泄
meanings.meaning_en: a hole or pipe through which gases, liquid etc can enter or escape from an enclosed space or container
meanings.example: a blocked air vent
meanings.example_cn: 堵塞的通风口

meanings.meaning_cn: 通路, 访问, 入门
meanings.meaning_en: the way you use to enter a building or reach a place
meanings.example: Access is by means of a small door on the right.
meanings.example_cn: 入口是右边的一扇小门。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is employed by a newspaper or a television station etc to report news from a particular area or on a particular subject
meanings.example: Our correspondent in South Africa sent this report.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的驻南非记者发来这份报道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 通知猎物已死的号角声, 大量, 许多
meanings.meaning_en: a call blown on a hunting horn to signify the death of the animal hunted
the value of a  stock  or  bond  that is printed on it when it is first sold
meanings.example: bonds sold at 97% of their par value
meanings.example_cn: 以面值的97%销售的债券

meanings.meaning_en: If there is equivalence between two things, they have the same use, function, size, or value
meanings.example: ...the equivalence of science and rationality.
meanings.example_cn: ...科学和理性的相等。

meanings.meaning_en: your peers are the people who are the same age as you, or who have the same type of job, social class etc
meanings.example: American children did less well in math than their peers in Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 美国儿童的数学成绩不如日本的同龄儿童。

meanings.meaning_cn: 同行, 圈内人, 伙伴

meanings.meaning_en: a person who helps someone such as a criminal to do something wrong
meanings.example: Witnesses said the gunman immediately ran to a motorcycle being ridden by an accomplice.
meanings.example_cn: 证人们说该枪手立即向由一名同犯驾驶的摩托车跑去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 同谋者, 阴谋者, 反叛者
meanings.meaning_en: A conspirator is a person who joins a conspiracy
meanings.example: Julius Caesar was murdered by a group of conspirators famously headed by Marcus Junius Brutus.
meanings.example_cn: 尤利乌斯·凯撒被以人所共知的马库斯·朱尼厄斯·布鲁特斯为首脑的一伙谋反者谋杀了。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of sympathy for someone who is suffering, and a desire to help them
meanings.example: I was shocked by the doctor’s lack of compassion .
meanings.example_cn: 我对这个医生如此缺乏同情心感到震惊。

meanings.example: When you mount the file system with this command, all its files use concurrent I/O.
meanings.example_cn: 当您使用这个命令装入文件系统时，其中所有的文件都使用并发 I/O。

meanings.meaning_en: a word that is spelled the same as another, but is different in meaning, origin, grammar, or pronunciation. For example, the noun ‘record’ is a homograph of the verb ‘record’.
meanings.example: In the third chapter, identical words have been divided into synonymy and homograph from semanteme.
meanings.example_cn: 第三章从词义的角度出发，将同形词分为同形同义词和同形异义词。

meanings.meaning_en: an offensive word for a homosexual person, especially a man. Do not use this word.

meanings.meaning_cn: 同意, 一致, 协定, 协议
meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement or promise to do something, made by two or more people, companies, organizations etc
meanings.example: It is easier for two parties to reach agreement than for three.
meanings.example_cn: 两方达成一致比三方达成一致容易。

meanings.meaning_en: a system of medicine in which a disease is treated by giving extremely small amounts of a substance that causes the disease
meanings.example: Do you think there's something to homeopathy as well?
meanings.example_cn: 你认为你的工作也有些顺势疗法的意思？

meanings.meaning_cn: 铜绿, 碱性碳酸铜, 碱性醋酸铜

meanings.meaning_cn: 铜绿, 绿锈, 薄层, 光泽, 古色
meanings.meaning_en: a greenish layer that forms naturally on the surface of  copper  or  bronze

meanings.example_cn: 他任由马克杯里积上一层薄薄的咖啡垢。

meanings.meaning_cn: 统治, 管理, 统辖

meanings.example: ...he will meet with officials from several countries to discuss ways to promote good governance.
meanings.example_cn: ...他将与诸国官员会面，讨论如何促进对国家的良性管理。

meanings.meaning_cn: 痛苦, 感伤, 悲怅, 哀婉

meanings.example_cn: 那个女人试图留住爱侣的哀婉之情

meanings.meaning_en: mental or physical suffering caused by extreme pain or worry

meanings.example_cn: 由于不知道她发生了什么事而痛苦不堪

meanings.meaning_en: something that causes pain or suffering, especially a medical condition

meanings.meaning_cn: 痛饮, 大喝(尤指从瓶口喝的)

meanings.example: Brian took a swig of his beer.
meanings.example_cn: 布赖恩喝了一大口啤酒。

meanings.meaning_en: A stowaway is a person who hides in a ship, aeroplane, or other vehicle in order to make a journey secretly or without paying

meanings.example_cn: 船员们在航行大约两天后发现了那名偷乘者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 偷懒者, 懒鬼, 游手好闲的人

meanings.meaning_cn: 头带, 带子, 肉片, 鱼片
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of meat or fish without bones

meanings.example_cn: …洋葱牛肉片。

meanings.meaning_cn: 头巾, 兜帽, 车蓬, 引擎罩

meanings.example_cn: 她把披风上的风帽向后甩去。

meanings.example_cn: 剑劈开了骑士的头盔并致命地刺进他。

meanings.meaning_en: the bones of a person’s or animal’s head

meanings.example_cn: 她丈夫后来因颅骨碎裂而接受治疗。

meanings.example_cn: ...女性选举权运动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 凸版印刷术, 排印印刷样式

meanings.meaning_cn: 突然倾斜, 挫折, 举步蹒跚, 徘徊, 困境
meanings.meaning_en: Lurch is also a noun

meanings.example_cn: 房地产业是利率突然提高的又一受损行业。

meanings.meaning_cn: 突然说出, 射精, 射出
图标, 肖像, 偶像
meanings.meaning_en: a small sign or picture on a computer screen that is used to start a particular operation
meanings.example: To open a new file, click on the icon.
meanings.example_cn: 要打开新文档，点击该图标。

meanings.meaning_cn: 土地之所有, 领地, 私有地

meanings.meaning_cn: 土壤, 土地, 国土, 国家, 温床, 粪便, 务农

meanings.meaning_cn: 土著居民(尤指澳大利亚土著居民)

a large group of soldiers, usually consisting of several  battalion s
loyalty and general agreement between all the people in a group, or between different groups, because they all have a shared aim

meanings.example_cn: 团结的表示

meanings.meaning_cn: 推动, 刺激, 冲动, 推动力

meanings.example_cn: 激情是音乐创作的主要动力。

meanings.meaning_en: an influence that makes something happen or makes it happen more quickly

meanings.example_cn: 这个发现为研究带来新动力。

meanings.example: But magnetic propulsion has some drawbacks.
meanings.example_cn: 但是磁力推进有一些缺陷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 推进者, 推进物, 尤指轮船, 飞机上的螺旋推进器

meanings.example_cn: …一个固定的三叶螺旋桨。

meanings.example: Mr Bush is a convert to an evangelical Christianity that emphasises emotion—particularly the intensely emotional experience of being born again—over ratiocination.
meanings.example_cn: 布什皈依基督教福音派，该派强调主观情绪，尤其是狂热的再生体验，要凌驾于推理之上。

meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that shows that someone has low moral standards and is more concerned with pleasure than serious matters

meanings.example_cn: 美国是唯一一个直接从野蛮进入颓废、中间没有经过文明阶段的社会。

meanings.example: Soon after we arrived, we learned Hillary would have to give birth by cesarean section because the baby was in breech, upside down in the womb.
meanings.example_cn: 我们抵达医院后不久，就听说希拉里需要做剖腹产，因为孩子是“臀位”，也就是说，孩子在子宫里的姿势是上下颠倒的。

meanings.meaning_en: Subterfuge is a trick or a dishonest way of getting what you want

meanings.example_cn: 大多数人一眼就能看穿这种遁词。

meanings.example: Further up the coast in Ofunato, the port’s tugboat still sits in someone’s backyard about a kilometer from the water.
meanings.example_cn: 沿着海岸北行到大渡船市，原来在港湾里的拖船，如今还留在距离港湾一公里远的内陆居民住家的后院。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拖着脚走, 混乱, 蒙混, 洗纸牌
meanings.meaning_en: a slow walk in which you do not lift your feet off the ground

meanings.example_cn: 她注意到了自己得意的步伐已变成了拖着脚走。

meanings.meaning_cn: 脱字符号( ^ 文章中插字使用)

meanings.example_cn: 以脱字符号 (^) 为开头的集合将匹配集合中不包括的所有字符。

meanings.meaning_en: a wheel that spins inside a frame and is used for keeping ships and aircraft steady. It can also be a child’s toy.

meanings.meaning_cn: 驼峰, 驼背, 小园丘, 峰丘
meanings.meaning_en: a raised part on the back of a  camel

meanings.example_cn: 小道越过树旁的一个大圆丘，然后延伸至公路附近。

meanings.meaning_en: a large African bird with long legs, that runs very quickly but cannot fly
an agreement that is achieved after everyone involved accepts less than what they wanted at first, or the act of making this agreement
meanings.example: Compromise is an inevitable part of marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 妥协是婚姻生活中必不可少的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 挖掘, 发掘, 挖掘成的洞, 出土文物

meanings.example: ‘Good of you to arrive on time,’ George said, with heavy sarcasm (= very clear sarcasm ) .
meanings.example_cn: “你到得真准时啊。”乔治不加掩饰地挖苦道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 挖泥机, 挖泥船, 捞网
meanings.meaning_en: a machine, in the form of a bucket ladder, grab, or suction device, used to remove material from a riverbed, channel, etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 挖泥机, 挖泥船, 捞网, 撒粉器
meanings.meaning_en: a machine or ship used for digging or removing mud and sand from the bottom of a river, lake etc
If there is a semblance of a particular condition or quality, it appears to exist, even though this may be a false impression
meanings.example: At least a semblance of normality has been restored to parts of the country.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家的部分地区至少在表面上已恢复正常。

meanings.meaning_cn: 外表美观, 华而不实, 徒有其表, 似是而非
外出, 开支, 流出

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not trained in a particular subject or type of work, especially when they are being compared with someone who is
meanings.example: To the layman (= laymen in general ) all these plants look pretty similar.
meanings.example_cn: 对外行的人来说，这些植物看起来都很相似。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is sent to another country as an official representative
meanings.example: The United Nations is sending a special envoy to the area.
meanings.example_cn: 联合国将向该地区派遣一位特使。

meanings.meaning_en: the thick outer skin of some types of fruit, such as oranges

meanings.meaning_en: the edge of an area
