meanings.example_cn: 处于动物权利运动边缘的极端分子

meanings.meaning_cn: 外衣, 制服, 衣服, 法衣, 祭坛布
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing worn by priests during church services

meanings.meaning_cn: 弯曲, 歪曲, 乖僻, 偏差, 乖戾, 偏见
meanings.meaning_en: a part of something that has become bent or twisted from its original shape

meanings.meaning_cn: 弯腰, 屈背, 屈服
meanings.meaning_en: if you have a stoop, your shoulders are bent forward
meanings.example: Mr Hamilton was an odd, quiet man who walked with a stoop.
meanings.example_cn: 汉密尔顿先生是个怪人，不爱说话，走路时弓着背。

meanings.meaning_cn: 完成, 圆满成功, 成就
meanings.meaning_en: when people make a marriage or relationship complete by having sex
meanings.example: the consummation of his ambitions
meanings.example_cn: 他雄心壮志的实现

meanings.meaning_en: an object for children to play with
meanings.example: some toys for the baby
meanings.example_cn: 宝宝玩的一些玩具

meanings.meaning_cn: 顽皮的人, 爱开玩笑的人

meanings.example_cn: 但是他也觉得最终一切的现实看上去似乎只是一个爱开玩笑的造物主构造出来的而已。

meanings.meaning_en: a slow sad song sung at a funeral
the practice of using too many words to express an idea, instead of saying it directly

meanings.meaning_cn: 万神殿, 罗马万神殿, 伟人祠
meanings.meaning_en: all the gods of a particular people or nation
meanings.example: the Roman pantheon

meanings.example: EDI components will be a certain number of EDI unit with reticulation , forming strong water Chambers separated.
meanings.example_cn: EDI组件中将一定数量的EDI单元间用网状物隔开，形成浓水室。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of not being grateful
meanings.example: I’ve never seen such ingratitude!
meanings.example_cn: 我从未见过这样的忘恩负义！

meanings.meaning_en: an ungrateful person
meanings.example: She gathered her belongings and headed to the gate, refusing to look back at the ingrate thief.
meanings.example_cn: 她收拾好了行李，走向登机口，根本不想再看一眼那忘恩负义的小偷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 危害, 损害, 损伤
meanings.meaning_en: harm
meanings.example: Flood control decision supporting system is a non-project measure that can efficiently lessen the scathe of flood disaster and reduce the damage of flood, it is become more and more important .
meanings.example_cn: 防洪决策支持系统作为有效减轻洪灾的危害程度、降低损失的非工程措施，在现代的防洪减灾工作中发挥着越来越重要的作用。

meanings.meaning_en: great danger, especially of being harmed or killed
meanings.example: a voyage that was fraught with peril
meanings.example_cn: 历尽艰险的旅程

meanings.meaning_en: in danger of being lost or harmed
meanings.example: Thousands of jobs are in jeopardy.
meanings.example_cn: 数千个工作岗位岌岌可危。

meanings.example: With its prowess, Hezbollah can now blackmail the government into giving it more political power.
meanings.example_cn: 真主党展示了自己的威力，如今可以勒索政府赋予它更多的政权。

meanings.meaning_en: something that makes someone less likely to do something, by making them realize it will be difficult or have bad results
meanings.example: The small fines for this type of crime do not act as much of a deterrent .
meanings.example_cn: 对于这种罪行，小额罚金起不到多大的威慑作用。

meanings.example: Do not look that powerful nation individual contestant impulse feet and so on Indonesia, Malaysia, their minacity and the destructive power are limited.
meanings.example_cn: 别看印尼、马来西亚等强国个别选手冲劲足，她们的威胁性和破坏力都有限。

meanings.meaning_en: something or someone that is dangerous
meanings.example: the growing menace of oil pollution at sea
meanings.example_cn: 日益严重的海洋石油污染

meanings.meaning_cn: 微不足道的东西, 琐事, 小事, 弹子球戏的一种, (指钢琴的)小曲
meanings.meaning_en: something of little value or significance; trifle

meanings.meaning_cn: 微不足道的事物（或人）, 小人物, 无, 零, 无价值之物
meanings.meaning_en: nothing at all
meanings.example: ‘How much money is left?’ ‘Zilch.’
meanings.example_cn: “还剩多少钱？”“一分也没有了。”

meanings.meaning_en: Shimmer is also a noun
meanings.example: ...a shimmer of starlight.
meanings.example_cn: …星光的闪烁。

meanings.meaning_cn: 微弱的闪光, 一丝光线, 瞬息的一现
meanings.meaning_en: a small pale light, especially one that shines for a short time
meanings.example: Rose looked at me with a furious gleam in her eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 罗丝看着我，眼中闪着怒火。

meanings.meaning_en: an extremely small living thing which you can only see if you use a  microscope  . Some microbes can cause diseases.
meanings.example: ...a type of bacteria that include the microbes responsible for tuberculosis and leprosy.
meanings.example_cn: …包括引起结核病和麻风病的微生物在内的一类细菌。

meanings.meaning_cn: 微小的东西, <口>小孩, 力所能及的微小贡献
meanings.meaning_en: a small child, especially one that you feel sorry for
meanings.example: Poor mite! You must be starving!
meanings.example_cn: 可怜的小家伙！你一定是饿坏了！

meanings.meaning_cn: 为死者所诵的晚祷词, 安慰剂
meanings.meaning_en: when someone feels better after taking a placebo, even though it has not had any effect on their body
meanings.example: Or it could be that the needles caused a “super placebo” effect, triggering a real reaction in the brain that changes the way the body perceives and responds to pain.
meanings.example_cn: 或者是因为针灸造成了一种“超级安慰剂”效应，并触发了大脑内的一个反应，这种反应能改变身体对疼痛信号的感知和回应。

meanings.meaning_cn: 违背, 破坏, 破裂, 裂口
meanings.meaning_en: an action that breaks a law, rule, or agreement
meanings.example: She wanted to help heal the breach between them.
meanings.example_cn: 她想帮助他们修复破裂的关系。

meanings.meaning_cn: 违法交易, 违禁品, 走私
meanings.meaning_en: goods that are brought into a country illegally, especially to avoid tax
meanings.example: a cargo of contraband
meanings.example_cn: 一批走私货

meanings.meaning_en: An infringement is an action or situation that interferes with your rights and the freedom you are entitled to
meanings.example: ...infringement of privacy.
meanings.example_cn: …对隐私的侵犯。

meanings.meaning_en: An infraction of a rule or law is an instance of breaking it
meanings.example: ...an infraction of school rules.
meanings.example_cn: ...一次对校规的违犯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 违反, 违背, 矛盾
meanings.meaning_en: when someone does something that is not allowed by a law or rule

meanings.meaning_cn: 围巾, 头巾领巾, 嵌接, 嵌接处, 切口
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of cloth that you wear around your neck, head, or shoulders, especially to keep warm
meanings.example: He reached up to loosen the scarf around his neck.
meanings.example_cn: 他伸出手松开围在脖子上的围巾。

meanings.meaning_cn: 围裙, 外表或作用类似围裙的东西, [机]挡板, 护坦
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing that covers the front part of your clothes and is tied around your waist, worn to keep your clothes clean, especially while cooking

meanings.meaning_cn: 围住, 围栏, 四周有篱笆或围墙的场地
meanings.meaning_en: an area surrounded by a wall or fence, and used for a particular purpose
meanings.example: the bear enclosure at the zoo
meanings.example_cn: 动物园中的熊园

meanings.meaning_cn: 桅, 桅杆, 柱, 旗杆, 天线竿
meanings.meaning_en: a tall pole on which the sails or flags on a ship are hung
meanings.example: a radio mast
meanings.example_cn: 无线电发射塔

meanings.meaning_en: when someone pretends to have certain beliefs or opinions that they do not really have – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: It would be sheer hypocrisy to pray for success, since I’ve never believed in God.
meanings.example_cn: 我从不相信上帝，因此为获成功而祈祷是纯粹的虚伪之举。

meanings.meaning_cn: 伪善之言, 黑话, 隐语, 斜面, 角落
meanings.meaning_en: insincere talk about moral or religious principles by someone who is pretending to be better than they really are

meanings.example_cn: 小偷的黑话

meanings.meaning_en: the crime of telling a lie after promising to tell the truth in a court of law, or a lie told in this way
meanings.example: Hall was found guilty of perjury.
meanings.example_cn: 霍尔被判犯有伪证罪。

meanings.meaning_cn: 伪造物, 伪造罪, 伪造
meanings.meaning_en: the crime of copying official documents, money etc
meanings.example: The painting was a very clever forgery.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅画是件很巧妙的赝品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 伪造者, 铁匠, 赝造者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who illegally copies documents, money, paintings etc and tries to make people think they are real
meanings.example: Okay he is actually a convicted forger and embezzler but does that mean his books are worthless?
meanings.example_cn: 他是实际上一个信服的伪造者和迷惘者,但是这意味着他的书毫无价值吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a way of behaving which is intended to make people believe something that is not true
meanings.example: It was all an elaborate pretence .
meanings.example_cn: 这一切都是精心的伪装。

meanings.meaning_cn: 纬度, 范围, (用复数)地区, 行动或言论的自由(范围)
meanings.meaning_en: the distance north or south of the equator(= the imaginary line around the middle of the world ), measured in degrees
meanings.example: The birds breed in northern latitudes.
meanings.example_cn: 这些鸟在北纬地区繁殖。

meanings.meaning_cn: 委屈, 冤情, 不平
meanings.meaning_en: a belief that you have been treated unfairly, or an unfair situation or event that affects and upsets you
meanings.example: anyone who has a legitimate grievance against the company
meanings.example_cn: 凡是有正当理由对公司感到不满的人

meanings.meaning_cn: 委托事项, 许诺, 承担义务
meanings.meaning_en: a promise to do something or to behave in a particular way
meanings.example: Are you ready to make a long-term commitment ?
meanings.example_cn: 你是否准备好作出长久的承诺？

meanings.meaning_en: the protection of public health by removing and treating waste, dirty water etc
meanings.example: Overcrowding and poor sanitation are common problems in prisons.
meanings.example_cn: 过度拥挤和卫生状况差是监狱里的普遍问题。

meanings.meaning_en: the practice of keeping yourself and the things around you clean in order to prevent diseases
meanings.example: the importance of personal hygiene
meanings.example_cn: 个人卫生的重要性

meanings.meaning_en: a small ball made of a strong-smelling chemical, used for keeping moths away from clothes

meanings.meaning_cn: 未离巢的雏鸟, 婴儿
meanings.meaning_en: a very young bird that cannot leave its nest because it is not yet able to fly

meanings.meaning_cn: 畏缩, 后退, 弹回, 反作用, 后座力
meanings.meaning_en: Recoil is also a noun
meanings.example: ...his small body jerking in recoil from the volume of his shouting.
meanings.example_cn: …他小小身体在他大声的叫喊中畏缩地抽搐着。

meanings.meaning_en: the organ inside your body where food begins to be  digested
meanings.example: I was so hungry my stomach hurt.
meanings.example_cn: 我饿得胃都痛了。

meanings.meaning_en: a liquid in your stomach that changes food into a form that your body can use
meanings.example: The impressively named chief cells secrete pepsinogen which, when it mixes with stomach acid, becomes an enzyme called pepsin.
meanings.example_cn: 而令人印象深刻的主细胞则分泌胃蛋白酶原，当它与胃酸混合时，就形成一种酶，叫做胃蛋白酶。

meanings.meaning_en: a small brown European animal whose body is round and covered with sharp needle-like  spines
meanings.example: So she went in search of her hedgehog.
meanings.example_cn: 因此她就走了，找她的刺猬去了。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where a lot of a particular type of activity, especially bad or violent activity, happens
meanings.example: The university was a hotbed of radical protest.
meanings.example_cn: 那所大学是激进抗议活动的温床。

meanings.meaning_cn: 温和, 仁慈, 和蔼
meanings.meaning_en: forgiveness and less severe punishment for a crime
a glass building used for growing plants that need warmth, light, and protection
meanings.example: But these two countries are responsible for almost half of all greenhouse gas emissions.
meanings.example_cn: 但是这两个国家的温室气体排放量几乎占了全世界的一半。

meanings.meaning_en: a room with glass walls and a glass roof, where plants are grown, that is usually added on to a house
gentleness or mildness

meanings.meaning_cn: 瘟疫, 麻烦, 苦恼, 灾祸
meanings.meaning_en: a disease that causes death and spreads quickly to a large number of people

meanings.example_cn: 瘟疫和饥荒造成的人口水平下降

meanings.example_cn: 我们将把你的详细资料存档。

meanings.meaning_en: paper for writing letters, usually with matching envelopes

meanings.example_cn: 用酒店信纸写的信

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has not learned to read or write

meanings.example_cn: …文盲阶层。

meanings.meaning_en: a small group of people in a society who know a lot about literature
meanings.example: ...the Australian storyteller who was loved by readers but disdained by the literati.
meanings.example_cn: ...受读者喜爱而遭文学界蔑视的那位澳大利亚小说作家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 文书, 正式文件, 书面命令
meanings.meaning_en: a document from a court that orders someone to do or not to do something
meanings.example: He issued a writ against the newspaper.
meanings.example_cn: 他签发了传讯这家报纸的令状。

meanings.meaning_cn: 文职官员, 地方官员
meanings.meaning_en: someone, not usually a lawyer, who works as a judge in a local court of law, dealing with less serious crimes
the place where a wild animal hides and sleeps
meanings.example: ...a fox's lair.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个狐狸窝。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乌合之众, 下层社会, 拨火棍

meanings.example_cn: 他似乎吸引了一群忠于他个人超过忠于事业的乱糟糟的拥护者。

meanings.example_cn: 每一件都经过仔细检查，如果上面有哪怕最微小的瑕疵，都会被拒绝。

meanings.example_cn: 用温和的漂白溶液浸泡以去除污渍。

meanings.meaning_cn: 污秽, 污物, 不洁, 猥亵
meanings.meaning_en: dirt, especially a lot of it
meanings.example: a mound of filth and rubbish
meanings.example_cn: 一堆脏东西和垃圾

meanings.meaning_en: a mark; smudge
meanings.example: It contained macromolecule which can remove the smutch of oil, water or others on the leather, plastic or pottery. At the same time, it can prevent water, mildew and keep bright.
meanings.example_cn: 本品含有丰富的离分子材料，能迅速去除油迹、铜、铁锈迹、水迹等，并具有同时放水、防霉、保持亮泽等多种作用。

meanings.meaning_en: magic, especially evil magic

meanings.example_cn: 现在，藉著他的致命镰刀与死灵术，杜丁成为了反刍者中最危险的战士之一。

meanings.meaning_en: magic that uses the power of evil forces
meanings.example: Since a name was considered an integral part of a person, it could be an effective target for sorcery.
meanings.example_cn: 因为名字被认为是一个人的重要组成部分，就有可能成为巫术的有效攻击靶子。

meanings.meaning_en: the edges of a roof that stick out beyond the walls
meanings.example: Birds had nested under the eaves.
meanings.example_cn: 鸟儿在屋簷下筑了巢。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无边女帽, 童帽, 烟囱帽, 阀帽
无盖货车, 平台货车
meanings.meaning_en: a railway carriage without a roof or sides, used for carrying goods
meanings.example: One more detail: one of the railroad branch lines ran not far from the hospital. There was a heavy gun on a specially equipped open flatcar connected to a locomotive.
meanings.example_cn: 有一个细节：离医院不远的一条铁路支线上有一列列车，上边有一节开放式的货车连着机车，货车上安放有一门重炮。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无价值之物, 无聊的作品, 垃圾, 废物
meanings.meaning_en: things that you throw away, such as empty bottles, used papers, food that has gone bad etc
meanings.example: Will someone take out the trash (= take it outside the house ) ?
meanings.example_cn: 谁把垃圾拿出去好吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 无礼, 傲慢, 侮辱
meanings.meaning_en: scornful or insulting language or behaviour
lack of the ability to do things or to do something
meanings.example: temporary incapacity through illness
meanings.example_cn: 因病暂时不能正常生活和工作

meanings.meaning_en: the belief that God does not exist
meanings.example: In 1666 the English parliament cited his atheism as the probably cause of the plague and the fire of London.
meanings.example_cn: 可能是由于瘟疫的爆发和伦敦的火灾,1666年英国国会开始引用他的无神论。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无树木的山地, 荒野
无数, 无数的人或物, <诗>一万
meanings.meaning_en: a very large number of things
meanings.example: We’re still studying a myriad of options.
meanings.example_cn: 我们仍在研究各种备选方案。

meanings.example: Due to his intrepidity he may be the last hope of the village.
meanings.example_cn: 因为由于他的无畏他可能是村幸免的最后一个希望。

meanings.meaning_en: a space or distance without limits or an end
meanings.example: the infinity of space
meanings.example_cn: 太空的无边无际

meanings.meaning_cn: 无信用, 疑惑, 不名誉, 耻辱

meanings.meaning_cn: 无以匹敌的人, 典范
meanings.meaning_en: a matchless person or thing; nonpareil
meanings.example: We have to face to a challenge that how to resolve the problems of Chinese development nicely and China could become the progressional nonesuch of the human's civilization.
meanings.example_cn: 如何更好地解决自身发展面临的问题，同时成为人类文明进步的标准和典范，这是我们这个时代面临的挑战。

meanings.meaning_cn: 无益, 无用, 轻浮的言行
meanings.meaning_en: Futility is a total lack of purpose or usefulness
meanings.example: Brown's article tells of the tragedy and futility of war.
meanings.example_cn: 布朗的文章讲述了战争的悲剧性和无谓性。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which there is no effective government in a country or no order in an organization or situation
meanings.example: The prison is close to anarchy.
meanings.example_cn: 那所监狱几乎一片混乱。

meanings.meaning_en: lack of knowledge or information about something
meanings.example: Excuse my ignorance, but how does it actually work?
meanings.example_cn: 请原谅我的无知，它究竟是如何运作的？

meanings.meaning_cn: 五行打油诗（一种通俗幽默短诗，有五行组成，韵式为aabba）

meanings.example: Or God will toss off a limerick for your pleasure.
meanings.example_cn: 或者上帝为了使你高兴而抛出一首五行打油诗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 五体投地的人, 卑恭屈节的人

meanings.example: They proceeded in silence along the gravel walk that led to the copse; Elizabeth was determined to make no effort for conversation with a woman who was now more than usually insolent and disagreeable.
meanings.example_cn: 两人默默无声地沿着一条通到小树林的鹅卵石铺道往前走。 伊丽莎白只觉得这个老妇人比往常更傲慢，更其令人讨厌，因此拿定主张，决不先开口跟她说话。

meanings.meaning_en: a dancer
meanings.example: She is a gifted terpsichorean.
meanings.example_cn: 她是一个天才的舞蹈家。

meanings.meaning_en: the art of arranging how dancers should move during a performance
meanings.example: The choreography of Eric Hawkins is considered radical by ballet audiences.
meanings.example_cn: 埃里克·霍金斯的舞蹈编排被芭蕾舞剧的观众认为是不同凡响的。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large room used for dancing on formal occasions

meanings.meaning_cn: 物品交换, 实物交易
meanings.meaning_en: Barter is also a noun
meanings.example: Overall, barter is a very inefficient means of organizing transactions.
meanings.example_cn: 总的说来，物物交换是一种非常低效的组织交易的方式。

meanings.meaning_cn: 物神, 迷信, 偶像
meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone has a fetish for doing something, you disapprove of the fact that they do it very often or enjoy it very much
meanings.example: What began as a postwar fetish for sunbathing is rapidly developing into a world health crisis.
meanings.example_cn: 始于战后对日光浴的迷恋快速发展成世界健康危机。

meanings.meaning_en: heavy mist or fog

meanings.example_cn: 赶早看日出，但天有云雾，只能看到小许阳光穿透云彩！气温只有3摄氏度左右，但一大班影友还是围湖寻找独特的风景。

meanings.meaning_cn: 夕幕, 薄明, 黄昏
meanings.meaning_en: the time in the early evening when it is becoming dark

meanings.meaning_cn: 西班牙小币, 不值钱东西

meanings.meaning_en: a soft gentle wind
meanings.example: There was silence now except for the distant sea, a slight zephyr stirring the trees.
meanings.example_cn: 现在，除了遥远的海浪以外，一片寂静，一阵微风摇曳着树林。

meanings.meaning_en: in stories, a dead person that sucks people’s blood by biting their necks
meanings.example: What about the vampire bats?
meanings.example_cn: 那吸血蝙蝠怎么样啊？

meanings.meaning_cn: 希腊语字母第 9位, 极微小
稀薄, 微妙, 精明
meanings.meaning_en: a thought, idea, or detail that is important but difficult to notice or understand
meanings.example: The play lacks subtlety.
meanings.example_cn: 这部戏不够精细。

meanings.meaning_cn: 稀释, 稀释法,冲淡物
meanings.meaning_en: A dilution is a liquid that has been diluted with water or another liquid, so that it becomes weaker
meanings.example: "Aromatherapy oils" are not pure essential oils but dilutions.
meanings.example_cn: “香薰精油”不是纯精油，而是稀释油。

meanings.meaning_en: a fun enjoyable game or activity
meanings.example: Everyone joined in the Saturday night frolics.
meanings.example_cn: 大家都参加了星期六晚上的欢乐聚会。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of thick rough material which covers part of a floor
meanings.example: Wipe your feet on the mat.
meanings.example_cn: 在地垫上蹭蹭你的鞋底。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden attack into an area that belongs to other people
meanings.example: ...armed incursions into border areas by rebel forces.
meanings.example_cn: ...叛军武装入侵边境地区。

meanings.example: Even if such, I return clear feel there individual bring my warmth with love, after all is I am dreaming or live in the persiflage?

meanings.meaning_cn: 细节, 琐事, 细目

meanings.meaning_en: weather that is a combination of light rain and mist

meanings.example_cn: 我们走的时候，天已经开始下毛毛雨了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 狭长的景色, 街景, 展望, 回想

meanings.meaning_cn: 仙女, 精灵, <美俚>漂亮姑娘

meanings.meaning_en: an advance taste or sample; foretaste
precedence; priority

meanings.example_cn: 研究方法：GM（1，1）模型、贝叶斯方法及先行指标法。

meanings.meaning_en: the act or power of foreseeing; prescience

meanings.example_cn: 对于风险的预知、化解是企业家所应具备的第一素质。

meanings.meaning_en: something that happened or existed before something else and influenced its development

meanings.example_cn: …一台在某些方面是现代直升飞机的前身的机器。

meanings.example_cn: 11月的空气刺痛了我的脸颊，这是冬天要来的先兆。

meanings.meaning_cn: 闲逛, 休闲室, 长沙发

meanings.example: Once there is a failed test then it requires sapience on the part of the tester to understand what really happened.

meanings.meaning_en: the state or quality of being notable

meanings.example_cn: …报刊报道与广播报道之间的差异。

meanings.example: The idea is create an organisation embracing mutuality as well as free market capitalism.

small flat blocks of wood fitted together in a pattern that cover the floor of a room

meanings.meaning_cn: 小钩, 怪想, 奇想, 反复无常

meanings.meaning_en: a tale or short story, esp of adventure

meanings.example_cn: 这个金发的小娃娃，温顺而友好，对世界充满了兴趣。

meanings.example_cn: 做溪流边最棒的一棵小树;

meanings.example: This is cliquism in a magnified form.

a small hole made accidentally in a tyre

meanings.meaning_en: a small hard piece of something

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of paper, cloth etc
meanings.example: a rug made out of old scraps of material
meanings.example_cn: 用旧零碎材料拼做的一块小地毯

meanings.meaning_en: a small steep  waterfall  that is one of several together

meanings.example: God is too niggard to give a person all benefits , he may give you good looks instead of wisdom , money instead of health , talent instead of opportunities ….
meanings.example_cn: 上帝太小气不会给一个人所有的好处，他给你外表就不给你睿智，给你钱财就不给你健康，给你天资就不给你机会…

meanings.meaning_cn: 小器具, 小配件, 小玩意, 诡计
meanings.meaning_en: A gadget is a small machine or device which does something useful. You sometimes refer to something as a gadget when you are suggesting that it is complicated and unnecessary.
meanings.example: ...sales of kitchen gadgets including toasters, kettles, and percolators.
meanings.example_cn: …厨房小用品的销售，包括烤面包机、水壶和咖啡渗滤壶。

meanings.meaning_en: A madrigal is a song sung by several singers without any musical instruments. Madrigals were popular in England in the sixteenth century.

meanings.meaning_cn: 小圈, 小环, 卷发
meanings.meaning_en: Ringlets are long curls of hair that hang down
a small round hill
meanings.example: Right about here, Seidler said, pointing to a gap of sage between our knoll and the houses, is where most of the pronghorn seem to cross through.
meanings.example_cn: 塞德勒指着我们所在小山和房屋间的鼠尾草豁口说，看起来大多数叉角羚就从这里通过。

meanings.example: For half an hour, up and down the streets, around corners and into alleyways, Karen Lodrick, frightened but determined, pursued the woman with the suede coat.
meanings.example_cn: 接近半个小时在大街上跑来跑去，串街走巷，凯伦虽然害怕却很坚定，一直追着穿仿麂皮外套的女人不放。

meanings.meaning_en: a small open boat used for pleasure, or for taking people between a ship and the shore
meanings.example: ...a rubber dinghy.
meanings.example_cn: …一条橡皮艇。

meanings.meaning_en: a small building that has not been built very well
meanings.example: a tin shack
meanings.example_cn: 铁皮棚屋

meanings.meaning_en: a circular musical instrument consisting of a frame covered with skin or plastic and small pieces of metal that hang around the edge. You shake it or hit it with your hand.
meanings.example: She stood biting her lip, watching, for nearly an hour, until Joseph put his tambourine down and opened his eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 她咬着嘴唇站在那里，等着，等了将近一个小时，约瑟夫才放下手鼓、睁开眼睛。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of land with trees growing on it
meanings.example: ...an olive grove.
meanings.example_cn: …一片橄榄树丛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 小说,剧本或乐谱等冗长而枯燥无味的章节
小塔, 塔楼, 炮塔
meanings.meaning_en: a small tower on a large building, especially a  castle
a small suitcase
meanings.example: He opened the valise and drew from it Cosette's outfit.
meanings.example_cn: 他把手提箱打开，又把珂赛特的服装拿出来。

meanings.meaning_en: a young  swan
meanings.example: A cygnet is hovered by a duck.
meanings.example_cn: 野鸭孵化出的小天鹅

meanings.example: To David, this was not just one more bauble in an already overcrowded jewelry box. Rather, this was his love displayed on my arm for all the world to see.
meanings.example_cn: 对戴维来说，这个不仅仅是一个装在拥挤的首饰盒中的小玩意，而是一个向世界宣布他对我的爱，戴在我手臂的爱。

meanings.meaning_en: a small part of a room that is separated from the rest of the room
meanings.example: a shower cubicle
meanings.example_cn: 淋浴间

meanings.meaning_cn: 小屋, 鸡(兔)笼, 拘留所, <俗>监狱
meanings.meaning_en: a building for small animals, especially chickens
meanings.example: ...a chicken coop.

meanings.meaning_en: a small stream
meanings.example: a babbling brook
meanings.example_cn: 潺潺的小溪

meanings.meaning_cn: 小溪, 小河, <主英>小港, 小湾
meanings.meaning_en: a small narrow stream or river
meanings.example: Follow Austin Creek for a few miles.
meanings.example_cn: 沿着奥斯汀河走上几英里。

meanings.meaning_en: a small horse
meanings.example: Seeing him coming,the pony began to fling out.
meanings.example_cn: 那匹小马看到他进来就开始又踢又跳。

meanings.meaning_cn: 小羊, 小山羊, 小绵羊
meanings.meaning_en: the young of a goat or sheep
a small book or piece of paper advertising something or giving information on a particular subject
meanings.example: Campaigners handed out leaflets on passive smoking.
meanings.example_cn: 发起人分发了关于被动吸烟的传单。

meanings.meaning_en: a song sung to someone, especially one that a man performs for the woman he loves while standing below her window at night
meanings.example: Placido Domingo sang his serenade of love.
meanings.example_cn: 普拉西多·多明戈演唱他的爱情小夜曲。

meanings.example: As the last Ice Age came to an end, somebody picked a pebble out of a small river not far from Bethlehem.
meanings.example_cn: 随着最后一个冰河时代宣告结束，有人从伯利恒附近流水淙淙的小溪边，捡起了一枚鹅卵石。

meanings.meaning_cn: 小枝, 小枝状饰物, 子孙, 年青人, 图钉
meanings.meaning_en: a small stem or part of a branch with leaves or flowers on it

meanings.meaning_cn: 小蜘蛛网, 蛛丝, 薄纱, 轻而弱者
meanings.meaning_en: a very light thin material
a light boat used for rowing in shallow water
meanings.example: Like a directionless shallop, I am seeking my eternal steersman .
meanings.example_cn: 像一只没有方向的小舟，在寻找着永远的舵手。

meanings.meaning_cn: 小舟摆渡船, 单人乘的小舟, 划艇, 平底货船
meanings.meaning_en: any of certain kinds of half-decked commercial boats, such as barges, used in Britain

meanings.meaning_cn: 小装饰品, 琐物,无关紧要的小事

meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of collating
meanings.example: However, the collation would be wrong when the number of digits changed, so leading zeroes are provided.
meanings.example_cn: 不过，如果数字的位数发生了变化，整理就会发生错误， 所以要给出前导的零。

meanings.meaning_en: A jest is something you say that is intended to be amusing
meanings.example: It was a jest rather than a reproach.
meanings.example_cn: 这是个玩笑而非指责。

meanings.meaning_en: something you say that is intended to be funny, not serious
meanings.example: I wasn’t sure whether to treat her words as a jest.
meanings.example_cn: 我吃不准是否该把她的话当成玩笑。

meanings.meaning_en: the use of movements to express what you want to say without using words, or a play where the actors use only movements
meanings.example: The children learn through role-play, dance and mime.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童通过角色表演、舞蹈和哑剧来学习。

meanings.meaning_cn: 笑剧, 闹剧, 滑稽剧, 胡闹
meanings.meaning_en: a humorous play or film in which the characters are involved in complicated and silly situations, or the style of writing or acting that is used
meanings.example: She admitted that the interview had been a complete farce from start to finish.
meanings.example_cn: 她承认，采访从头到尾完全是一场闹剧。

meanings.example: Sara had not changed a whit.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉一点也没变。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of wood, metal etc that has one thick edge and one pointed edge and is used especially for keeping a door open or for splitting wood
meanings.example: Garnish with lemon wedges.
meanings.example_cn: 用几角柠檬片作装饰。

meanings.meaning_cn: 歇斯底里, 不正常的兴奋, 癔病
meanings.meaning_en: extreme excitement that makes people cry, laugh, shout etc in a way that is out of control
meanings.example: In a fit of hysteria, Silvia blamed me for causing her father’s death.
meanings.example_cn: 西尔维娅一阵歇斯底里，指责我害死了她父亲。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of  classical  music, usually for one instrument and an  orchestra
meanings.example: ...Tchaikovsky's First Piano Concerto.
meanings.example_cn: …柴可夫斯基的《第一钢琴协奏曲》。

meanings.meaning_cn: 携鹰打猎者, 叫卖小贩
meanings.meaning_en: someone who carries goods from place to place and tries to sell them
a shoe fastening, such as a thong or lace
meanings.example: He it is, who coming after me is preferred before me, whose shoe's latchet I am not worthy to unloose.
meanings.example_cn: 就是那在我以后来的，我给他解鞋带，也不配。

meanings.meaning_en: a woman who uses her sexual attractiveness to make men do what she wants
offensive words or religious words used in a way that shows you do not respect God or holy things
meanings.example: To desecrate a holy spring is considered profanity.
meanings.example_cn: 圣泉俗用被认为是亵渎神灵的行为。

meanings.meaning_en: something you say or do that is insulting to God or people’s religious beliefs
meanings.example: He has acted out every kind of blasphemy, including dressing up as the pope in Rome.
meanings.example_cn: 他做过各种亵渎行为，包括在罗马装扮成教皇。

meanings.meaning_en: medical treatment that involves talking to someone about their life, feelings etc in order to find out the hidden causes of their problems
meanings.example: WE SHOULD congratulate the Science Museum for setting up an exhibition on psychoanalysis.
meanings.example_cn: 我们应该庆贺科学博物馆成立一个关于精神分析的展览。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of communicating in which thoughts are sent from one person’s mind to another person’s mind
meanings.example: You never tell me what you're thinking. Am I supposed to use telepathy?
meanings.example_cn: 你从来不告诉我你在想什么。我是不是该用心灵感应术呢？

meanings.meaning_cn: 心乱, 狼狈, 不安
meanings.example: THE discomposure of spirits which this extraordinary visit threw Elizabeth into, could not be easily overcome; nor could she, for many hours, learn to think of it less than incessantly.
meanings.example_cn: 这不速之客去了以后，伊丽莎白很是心神不安，而且很不容易恢复宁静。 她接连好几个钟头不断地思索着这件事。

meanings.meaning_en: the condition of being mentally healthy
meanings.example: I began to doubt his sanity.
meanings.example_cn: 我开始怀疑他是否神志正常。

meanings.meaning_en: a difficult or unpleasant situation, or very tiring work
meanings.example: The team, despite their recent travails, are still in the game.
meanings.example_cn: 这支运动队，尽管近来遇到了难题，但还没有出局。

meanings.meaning_cn: 辛苦, 苦工, 网, 罗网, 圈套
meanings.meaning_en: hard unpleasant work done over a long period
meanings.example: a life of toil
meanings.example_cn: 辛劳的一生

meanings.meaning_cn: 辛酸(事) 强烈, 尖刻, 辛辣
meanings.meaning_en: Poignancy is the quality that something has when it affects you deeply and makes you feel very sad
meanings.example: The film contains moments of almost unbearable poignancy.
meanings.example_cn: 电影中有几段令人无法承受的辛酸情节。

meanings.example: I personally haven't tasted any entomological specimens lately, but I am still rejoicing in the limitless curiosity, the draws me to books and people and places.I hope I never lose it.
meanings.example_cn: 我个人最近并未品尝任何昆虫的标本，但我仍欣喜于自己无限的好奇心，它促使我博览群书、乐于与人交往和四处旅行。 我希望永远拥有好奇心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 新兵, 新分子, 新会员
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has just joined the army, navy, or  air force
meanings.example: New recruits are sent to the Atlanta office for training.
meanings.example_cn: 新成员被送到亚特兰大办事处接受培训。

meanings.meaning_en: the chemical processes by which food is changed into energy in your body
meanings.example: This drug speeds up your metabolism.
meanings.example_cn: 这种药物会加快你的新陈代谢。

meanings.meaning_cn: 新纪元, 时代, 时期, 时间上的一点, [地质]世
meanings.meaning_en: a period of history
meanings.example: the Victorian epoch
meanings.example_cn: 维多利亚时代

meanings.meaning_en: a new member of a religious group
meanings.example: ...the self-proclaimed political neophyte Ross Perot.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个自命为政治新手的叫罗斯·佩罗的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 新生, 转生, 轮回
meanings.example: I never believe palingenesis, but this Ah Q was really the copy of the old one.
meanings.example_cn: 我不相信转世轮回之说，但这个阿Q简直就是老阿Q的复制品。

meanings.meaning_en: A tenderfoot is a newcomer to a place or activity, especially a newcomer to the mines or ranches of the western United States
meanings.example: I may look like a tenderfoot, but I think I can follow a trail or carry a pack if necessary.
meanings.example_cn: 我也许看起来像个新手，不过有必要的话我认为我也能跟着上路或扛包。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has just started doing a job and has little experience
meanings.example: rookie cops
meanings.example_cn: 新手警察

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has no experience in a skill, subject, or activity
meanings.example: The computer course is ideal for novices.
meanings.example_cn: 这门计算机课程非常适合初学者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 新颖, 新奇, 新鲜, 新奇的事物
meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being new, unusual, and interesting
meanings.example: Many toys have no attraction beyond their novelty value.
meanings.example_cn: 许多玩具除了有些新奇感之外，别无吸引力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 新语, 创造或使用新语
meanings.example: The newspaper used the neologism "dinks," Double Income No Kids.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报纸使用了新词汇"dinks"—双收入无小孩的家庭。

meanings.meaning_cn: 薪金, 定期生活津贴
meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money paid regularly to someone, especially a priest, as a salary or as money to live on
Emoluments are money or other forms of payment that a person receives for doing work
meanings.example: He could earn up to a million dollars a year in salary and emoluments from many directorships.
meanings.example_cn: 他每年可赚高达一百万美金的薪水另加担任多个董事职位的酬金。

meanings.meaning_en: the acceptance of something as true
meanings.example: Good studies are needed to lend credence to the notion that genuine progress can be made in this important field.
meanings.example_cn: 要有优秀的研究才能使人相信在这一重大领域能取得真正的进步。

meanings.meaning_cn: 信任, 信心, 依靠, 依靠的人或物
meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something is dependent on someone or something else
meanings.example: the country’s heavy reliance on trade
meanings.example_cn: 该国对贸易的严重依赖

meanings.meaning_en: a set of beliefs or principles
meanings.example: It has never been weaker as a political creed .
meanings.example_cn: 作为一种政治信条，它从来没有像现在这样衰微过。

meanings.meaning_cn: 信徒, 弟子, 门徒
meanings.meaning_en: someone who believes in the ideas of a great teacher or leader, especially a religious one
meanings.example: ...a major intellectual figure with disciples throughout Europe.
meanings.example_cn: …一位信徒遍布欧洲的重要知识分子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 信徒, 追随者, 拥护者
meanings.meaning_en: someone who supports a particular belief, plan, political party etc
meanings.example: This idea is gaining adherents.
meanings.example_cn: 这个想法正得到拥护者的支持。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who regularly practises a particular religion
meanings.example: The organismic, "what you can do for your country" implies that government is the master or the deity, the citizen, the servant or the votary.
meanings.example_cn: 而后半句" 你能为你的国家做些什么"则意味着政府是主人，或者是神祗，公民只是仆人或者信徒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 星系, 银河, 一群显赫的人, 一系列光彩夺目的东西
meanings.meaning_en: one of the large groups of stars that make up the universe
meanings.example: Astronomers have discovered a distant galaxy.
meanings.example_cn: 天文学家们发现了一个遥远的星系。

meanings.meaning_en: a mass of gas and dust among the stars, which often appears as a bright cloud in the sky at night
meanings.example: As the nebula collapsed because of its gravity, it spun faster and flattened into a disk.
meanings.example_cn: 随着由于重力引起的星云坍缩，它旋转得越来越快，并变成了盘状。

meanings.meaning_cn: 形而上学, 玄学, 纯粹哲学, 宇宙哲学
meanings.meaning_en: the part of  philosophy  that is concerned with trying to understand and describe the nature of truth, life, and  reality

meanings.meaning_cn: 形容枯槁(或脾气暴躁)的老妇人,名声不好的老泼妇
meanings.meaning_en: If you call a woman a harridan, you mean that she is unpleasant and speaks too forcefully
meanings.example: She was a mean old harridan.
meanings.example_cn: 她是个刻薄的老泼妇。

meanings.meaning_cn: 幸福, 幸运, 福气, (措辞等)恰当, 巧妙, 幸福, 幸运
meanings.meaning_en: happiness
meanings.example: domestic felicity
meanings.example_cn: 家庭幸福

meanings.meaning_cn: 性感, 性的魅力, 精神, 精力
meanings.meaning_en: a quality that makes something attractive and exciting and that shows energy
meanings.example: It’s not a bad song, but it needs more oomph.
meanings.example_cn: 这首歌还不错，但还需要更多的活力。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is active and confident, and who enjoys spending time with other people
meanings.example: Her sister was always more of an extrovert.
meanings.example_cn: 她妹妹总是更外向些。

meanings.meaning_cn: 性情古怪的人, 急推, 猛拉, 肌肉抽搐, (生理)反射, 牛肉干
meanings.example: He gave a sudden jerk of his head.
meanings.example_cn: 他突然把头一扭。

meanings.meaning_cn: 性欲, 性的冲动, 生命力
meanings.meaning_en: someone’s desire to have sex
meanings.example: Yes there are women AND men who may have physiological or psychological problems that may affect their libido but I’m not talking about these.
meanings.example_cn: 的确，有些男性、女性或许会有生理、心理上的问题以致于性欲冷淡，不过他们并非在我的谈论之列。

meanings.meaning_cn: 凶猛, 残忍, 暴行
meanings.meaning_en: the state of being extremely violent and severe
meanings.example: The armed forces seem to have been taken by surprise by the ferocity of the attack.
meanings.example_cn: 武装部队好像被猛烈的进攻给镇住了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 兄弟, 姐妹, 同胞, 同属
meanings.meaning_en: a brother or sister
meanings.example: Most young smokers are influenced by their friends’ and older siblings’ smoking habits.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数年轻的吸烟者都是因为他们的朋友或者哥哥姐姐有吸烟习惯而受影响的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 兄弟关系, 友爱, 互助会, 兄弟会
meanings.meaning_en: a club at an American college or university that has only male members
meanings.example: fraternity between nations
meanings.example_cn: 国与国之间的情谊

meanings.meaning_cn: 胸甲, 装甲板, 铁甲
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of armour, of leather or metal covering the chest and back

meanings.meaning_cn: 雄辩, 口才, 修辞
meanings.example: He carried his audience along with his eloquence.
meanings.example_cn: 他雄辩的口才吸引住听众。

meanings.meaning_en: Elocution is how clearly someone speaks or sings
meanings.example: When I was 11 my mother sent me to elocution lessons.
meanings.example_cn: 在我11岁的时候，妈妈把我送去学习演说技巧课程。

meanings.meaning_cn: 雄鹅, 呆子, 笨蛋
meanings.meaning_en: a male goose1

meanings.meaning_cn: 雄蜂, 嗡嗡的声音, 懒惰者, 靶标
meanings.meaning_en: a continuous low dull sound
a male chicken
meanings.example: The cock (or rooster) bristled his crest.
meanings.example_cn: 公鸡竖起了鸡冠。

meanings.meaning_en: land treated in this way
meanings.example: Farmers know that soil needs rest, so they rotate their crops and systematically leave a portion of their land fallow.
meanings.example_cn: 农夫们知道土地是需要休息的，因此他们轮流种植农作物并系统地留一部分土地休耕。

meanings.example: It was the third time the prime minister had employed the prorogue in as many years.
meanings.example_cn: 这是多年以来首相第三次实施休会。

meanings.example: Mr Harper turned a customary recess into prorogation .
meanings.example_cn: 会期内的惯例休会被哈珀拖成了会期间休会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 休假, 暂时解雇, 放假
meanings.meaning_en: a period of time when a soldier or someone working in another country can return to their own country
meanings.example: a young soldier home on furlough
meanings.example_cn: 回国休假的年轻士兵

meanings.meaning_cn: 休息, 睡眠, 静止
meanings.meaning_en: a state of calm or comfortable rest
meanings.example: He had a still, almost blank face in repose.
meanings.example_cn: 他休息时面部平静，几乎毫无表情。

meanings.meaning_en: a room or hall at the entrance to a public building
meanings.example: I went and waited in the foyer.
meanings.example_cn: 我去了，在门厅里等着。

meanings.meaning_cn: 休战, 休战协定, 休止
meanings.meaning_en: an agreement between enemies to stop fighting or arguing for a short time, or the period for which this is arranged
meanings.example: They agreed to call a truce .
meanings.example_cn: 他们同意宣布休战。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where  monk s  live
meanings.example: He has cloistered himself in a monastery for more than thirty years.
meanings.example_cn: 他隐居于修道院中已三十余年。

meanings.meaning_cn: 修道院生活, 修道院制度
meanings.meaning_en: the monastic system, movement, or way of life

meanings.meaning_cn: 修订, 校正, 修正

meanings.meaning_en: strong scissors used for cutting plant stems
meanings.example: a pair of secateurs
meanings.example_cn: 一把修枝剪

meanings.meaning_cn: 羞辱, 禁欲, 动物体组织局部的坏死
meanings.example: The chairman tried to disguise his mortification.
meanings.example_cn: 主席试图掩饰自己的极度窘迫。

meanings.example_cn: 这在日本上下引起了不小的骚动，他们不得不因此改变主意。

meanings.example_cn: 一块松动的岩石从悬崖上滚落下来。

meanings.meaning_en: a twisting circular pattern

the study of how people vote in elections

meanings.meaning_cn: 穴居人, 隐居者,老顽固,类人猿

meanings.meaning_cn: 学会, 学院, 协会

meanings.meaning_cn: 学生, 小学生, 瞳孔

meanings.example_cn: 白色雪花石膏的墙壁，到处贴着蓝色绿色的瓷砖。

研究枯燥乏味问题的学者, 无趣而好卖弄学问的演讲人或作家

meanings.meaning_en: water that contains a lot of salt and is used for preserving food

meanings.example_cn: 一名推销员开始夸夸其谈，向我们推销人寿保险。

meanings.example: ...a brief funeral oration.
meanings.example_cn: ...一篇简短的葬礼悼词。

meanings.example: These squabbling Tolstoys and their stilted histrionics were conceited and exasperating.

meanings.example: Cut out the tedium of converting your photos manually by using automation features in your photo editing software.

meanings.meaning_en: a loud noise made by a  goose
a young plant or tree grown from a seed

meanings.example_cn: 这两个物种结合起来，能有效地分解水稻的幼苗作为它们的营养来源，并造成水稻幼苗的枯萎。

meanings.example_cn: 在亚洲缅甸、孟加拉国和印度，养蜂业是一项重要的生产。

meanings.example_cn: 我们去了一个养蜂场，得到真正的张用于蜜蜂蜡。

meanings.example_cn: 从多少岁可以开始领取养老金？

meanings.example_cn: 你知道的，妖怪。

meanings.example_cn: 我不会在意，这只不过是传闻而已。

meanings.example: The charge that Harding was a political stooge may be a canard.

meanings.example_cn: 她说，在他的生日或者忌日并不会更难过，这种痛苦是持续的，每天你都感觉到失去他的刻骨的痛。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that you put on sore skin to make it less painful

meanings.example_cn: 润唇膏

meanings.meaning_en: a soft cream that you rub into your skin, especially as a medical treatment
meanings.example: A range of ointments and creams is available for the treatment of eczema.
meanings.example_cn: 有一系列的药膏和乳剂可用于湿疹的治疗。

meanings.example_cn: 这位药理学教授的儿子在他这一代人中并不特别。

meanings.meaning_en: Pharmaceuticals are medicines
meanings.example: Antibiotics were of no use, neither were other pharmaceuticals.
meanings.example_cn: 抗生素没有用，其他药物也没有用。

meanings.example: Don’t worry about all the details as long as you get the gist (= understand the main meaning ) of it.

meanings.meaning_en: a person, usually someone famous or important

meanings.example_cn: 王室要人

meanings.meaning_cn: 野蛮, 粗野, 残酷, 好战, 致命性

meanings.meaning_en: the meat of a deer

meanings.example_cn: 他们吃了一顿很棒的午餐，有鲑鱼沙拉和烤鹿肉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 业余性质的洞窟探勘者
