meanings.example_cn: 具有混合风格的建筑

meanings.meaning_en: A mishap is an unfortunate but not very serious event that happens to someone
meanings.example: After a number of mishaps she did manage to get back to Germany.
meanings.example_cn: 发生了几次小的不幸之后，她设法回到了德国。

meanings.meaning_en: a terrible and unexpected event that causes a lot of damage or suffering
meanings.example: It will be a calamity for farmers if the crops fail again.
meanings.example_cn: 如果再次歉收，将会给农民带来灾难。

meanings.meaning_cn: 灾难, 大洪水, 地震, (社会政治的)大变动
meanings.meaning_en: a violent or sudden event or change, such as a serious flood or  earthquake

meanings.meaning_cn: 灾难, 天灾, 灾祸
meanings.meaning_en: a sudden event such as a flood, storm, or accident which causes great damage or suffering
meanings.example: One hundred and twenty people died in China’s worst air disaster .
meanings.example_cn: 有120人在中国这起最惨烈的空难事故中丧生。

meanings.meaning_en: a list of passengers or goods carried on a ship, plane, or train
meanings.example: the ship’s cargo manifest
meanings.example_cn: 船的载货清单

meanings.meaning_en: a second marriage contracted after the termination of the first by death or divorce

meanings.meaning_cn: 再投胎, 化身, 再生
meanings.meaning_en: the person or animal that contains the soul of a dead person or animal
meanings.example: Many African tribes believe in reincarnation.
meanings.example_cn: 很多非洲部落相信转世再生。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在灰泥的墙壁上作的水彩画, 壁画
meanings.meaning_en: a painting made on a wall while the  plaster  is still wet
a short time when something bad stops happening, so that the situation is temporarily better
meanings.example: a brief respite from persecution
meanings.example_cn: 暂时停止迫害

meanings.meaning_cn: 暂时无效, 中止, 归属待定
meanings.meaning_en: something such as a custom, rule, or system that is in abeyance is not being used at the present time
approval or agreement from someone who has authority
meanings.example: a nod of assent
meanings.example_cn: 首肯

meanings.meaning_cn: 赞词, 颂词, 歌功颂德的话
meanings.meaning_en: a speech or piece of writing in which you praise someone or something very much, especially at a funeral
meanings.example: The minister delivered a long eulogy.
meanings.example_cn: 部长致长篇悼词。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赞辞, 赞美, 称赞
meanings.meaning_en: the expression of a lot of praise

meanings.meaning_cn: 赞美, 称赞, 颂歌
meanings.example: And again, Praise the Lord, all ye Gentiles; and laud him, all ye people.
meanings.example_cn: 又说，外邦阿，你们当赞美主。万民哪，你们都当颂赞他。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赞美, 骑士爵位的授予, 连谱号

meanings.meaning_en: a song of praise to God
meanings.example: He liked to sing hymns as he worked.
meanings.example_cn: 他工作时喜欢唱赞美诗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赞美诗, 圣歌, 赞歌

meanings.meaning_en: a funeral ceremony
meanings.example: Hundreds paid their last respects at his obsequies.
meanings.example_cn: 数百支付其最后的敬意在他的葬礼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 造船工人, 造船木匠
meanings.meaning_en: someone who builds or repairs ships
meanings.example: What is he that builds stronger than either the mason, the shipwright, or the carpenter?
meanings.example_cn: 能比石匠、船匠和木匠建造出更坚固的建筑的人，他是谁？

meanings.example: For if our heart reprehend us, God is greater than our heart, and knoweth all things.
meanings.example_cn: 纵然我们的心责备我们，我们还可以安心，因为天主比我们的心大，他原知道一切。

meanings.meaning_en: the responsibility for something
meanings.example: The onus is on companies and consumers to keep up with anti-virus updates.
meanings.example_cn: 公司和用户有责任跟上杀毒软件的更新。

meanings.meaning_cn: 责任, 义务, 倾向, 债务, 负债, 与assets相对
meanings.meaning_en: legal responsibility for something, especially for paying money that is owed, or for damage or injury
meanings.example: The company had assets of $138 million and liabilities of $120.5 million.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司有1.38亿美元资产和1.205亿美元的负债。

meanings.meaning_cn: 责任, 义务, 任职, 压
meanings.meaning_en: the state of holding an official position, especially in politics, or the time when someone holds an official position
the act of augmenting or the state of being augmented
meanings.example: However, it is more interesting and fun studying with digital textbooks, which has augmentation contents and videos.
meanings.example_cn: 然而，电子教科书增加了内容和视频，用它来学习更令人感兴趣也更有乐趣。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount by which a number, value, or amount increases
meanings.example: The average yearly increment in productivity was 4.5 per cent.
meanings.example_cn: 生产率的年平均增长量是4.5%。

meanings.example: Progressive enhancement helps us to do that because it forces us to focus on the content and build out from there.
meanings.example_cn: 渐进增强能够帮助我们做到这一点，因为它让我们关注内容并且从内容开始构建。

meanings.meaning_en: a gradual process by which new things are added and something gradually changes or gets bigger
Odium is the extreme disapproval or hatred that people feel for a particular person, usually because of something that the person has done
meanings.example: The complainant has been exposed to public odium, scandal, and contempt.
meanings.example_cn: 原告遭到了公众的憎恶、流言和蔑视。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赠物, 贺仪, 赏钱
meanings.meaning_en: a small gift of money given to someone for a service they provided

meanings.example: The chirps of the garden birds sounded distant.
meanings.example_cn: 花园的鸟鸣听上去那样的遥远。

meanings.meaning_en: not polite an offensive expression used to describe the people that you consider are the least important or useful in society
meanings.example: He sees dissidents as the dregs of society.
meanings.example_cn: 他视与他政见相左的人为社会渣滓。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that makes a vehicle go more slowly or stop
meanings.example: Test your brakes after driving through water.
meanings.example_cn: 车子涉水之后要检验一下刹车。

meanings.meaning_cn: 栅栏, 篱笆, 围墙, 剑术, 辩论, 买卖
meanings.meaning_en: the sport of fighting with a long thin sword
meanings.example: ...the amateur fencing champion.
meanings.example_cn: …业余击剑冠军。

meanings.meaning_en: a fence built from long thick pieces of wood pushed into the ground, used to defend a place
meanings.example: ...the inner stockade.
meanings.example_cn: ...内层围栏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 炸药, <俚> 能产生不凡效果的人或物
meanings.meaning_en: a powerful explosive used especially for breaking rock
meanings.example: a dynamite blast
meanings.example_cn: 炸药爆炸

meanings.meaning_cn: 摘要, 概略, <美> 履历
meanings.meaning_en: a short account of something such as an article or speech which gives the main points but no details
meanings.example: a brief résumé of the day’s events
meanings.example_cn: 当天活动的概述

meanings.meaning_cn: 摘要, 概要, 抽象
meanings.meaning_en: a short written statement containing only the most important ideas in a speech, article etc
meanings.example: Talking about crime in the abstract just isn’t enough.
meanings.example_cn: 抽象地谈论犯罪根本不足以说明问题。

meanings.meaning_en: A showpiece is something that is admired because it is the best thing of its type, especially something that is intended to be impressive
meanings.example: The factory was to be a showpiece of Western investment in the East.
meanings.example_cn: 这家工厂将成为西方在东方投资的样板。

meanings.meaning_cn: 占星术, 占星学(以观测天象来预卜人间事务的一种方术)
meanings.meaning_en: the study of the positions and movements of the stars and how they might influence people and events
meanings.example: Astronomy inherits from astrology.
meanings.example_cn: 天文学的前身是占星术。

meanings.meaning_cn: 占兆, 占卜, 预言
meanings.meaning_en: An augury is a sign of what will happen in the future
meanings.example: The auguries of death are fast gathering around his head.
meanings.example_cn: 死亡的凶兆迅速展现在他的脑海中。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you keep to prove your success in something, especially in war or hunting
meanings.example: A lion’s head was among the trophies of his African trip.
meanings.example_cn: 他非洲之行的战利品之一是个狮头。

meanings.meaning_en: a trick or plan to deceive an enemy or gain an advantage
meanings.example: Trade discounts may be used as a competitive stratagem to secure customer loyalty.
meanings.example_cn: 商业折扣可以用作保持顾客忠诚度的一种竞争策略。

meanings.meaning_cn: 战争, 作战, 冲突, 竞争
meanings.meaning_en: the activity of fighting in a war – used especially when talking about particular methods of fighting
meanings.example: the realities of modern warfare
meanings.example_cn: 现代战争的真实面貌

meanings.meaning_cn: 长柄镰刀, 镰(古兵器)
meanings.meaning_en: a farming tool that has a long curved blade attached to a long wooden handle, and is used to cut grain or long grass
to be something that you do well or are skilled at
meanings.example: He found that running long distances was not his forte .
meanings.example_cn: 他发现长跑并不是他的强项。

meanings.meaning_cn: 长官的职位, 地方行政长官
meanings.meaning_en: the official position of a magistrate, or the time during which someone has this position
a silk or cotton material with a thick soft surface
meanings.example: plush curtains
meanings.example_cn: 长毛绒窗帘

meanings.meaning_cn: 长命, 寿命，供职期限，资历
meanings.meaning_en: the amount of time that someone or something lives
meanings.example: The ancient Chinese claimed that garlic promoted longevity.
meanings.example_cn: 中国古人说蒜能延寿。

meanings.meaning_cn: 长袍, 罩衣, 礼服, 制服
meanings.meaning_en: a long loose piece of clothing, especially one worn for official ceremonies
meanings.example: a priest’s robes
meanings.example_cn: 牧师的长袍

meanings.example: Now I fully recognize that I’m sitting here, a nobody myself, spouting off in what could be considered a hypocritical tirade, guilty of the same thing Ms. Barr is.
meanings.example_cn: 现在，我完全意识到我正坐在这儿，只有我自己，进行着一次被认为是伪善的长篇演讲，对同巴尔遇到的同样的事儿感到内疚。

meanings.example: In the space of all possible lifes, life on Earth is but a tiny sliver -- one attempt at creativity.
meanings.example_cn: 在所有可能有生命存在的空间里，地球上孕育的生命只占那么一小条――创造性的一次努力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 长牙, 獠牙, 尖牙
meanings.meaning_en: one of a pair of very long pointed teeth, that stick out of the mouth of animals such as  elephants

meanings.meaning_cn: 涨潮, 变迁, [物]流量, 通量
meanings.example: So without having to repeat all those parameters just assume that when I write down flux it represents these variables.
meanings.example_cn: 所以，不需要重复，所有那些几何,假设当我们写下流量时,它表现了这些变量。

meanings.meaning_cn: 胀大, 夸张, 通货膨胀, (物价)暴涨
meanings.meaning_en: a continuing increase in prices, or the rate at which prices increase
meanings.example: Inflation is now at over 16%.
meanings.example_cn: 通货膨胀率现已超过16%。

meanings.meaning_en: something that makes it difficult to achieve some­thing
meanings.example: The tax puts obstacles in the way of companies trying to develop trade overseas.
meanings.example_cn: 这项税收为想在海外发展贸易的公司设置了障碍。

meanings.meaning_en: a word or phrase used at the beginning of a letter or speech, such as ‘Dear Mr Smith’
meanings.example: Jackson nodded a salutation.
meanings.example_cn: 杰克逊点头打了个招呼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 招展, 招摇, 炫耀, 飘扬

meanings.meaning_en: a sharp powerful curved nail on the feet of some birds that catch animals for food
meanings.example: Deinonychus, or "terrible claw" after the sickle-shaped talon on each hind foot, stood about 11 feet from head to tail and was a lithe predator.
meanings.example_cn: 这种被称为恐爪龙（Deinonychus）的恐龙后足上存在镰刀般的利爪，从头到尾的身长约为3.3米，是一种非常敏捷的掠食者。

meanings.meaning_en: a wild open area of high land, covered with rough grass or low bushes and  heather  , that is not farmed because the soil is not good enough
meanings.example: They went grouse shooting up on the moors.
meanings.example_cn: 他们去荒野射猎松鸡。

meanings.meaning_en: a dangerous area of soft wet ground
meanings.example: But in the morass of all this minutiae, we seem to be missing the point.
meanings.example_cn: 但在一切细节的沼泽中，我们似乎漏掉了一点。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of soft wet muddy ground
meanings.example: In the rainy season the roads become a quagmire.
meanings.example_cn: 在雨季，道路变得一片泥泞。

meanings.meaning_cn: 照明, 阐明, 启发, 灯彩(通常用复数)
meanings.meaning_en: lighting provided by a lamp, light etc
meanings.example: White candles, the only illumination, burned on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 白蜡烛作为唯一的照明在桌子上燃烧着。

meanings.meaning_en: a sheet of material outside a shop, tent etc to keep off the sun or the rain
meanings.example: Karen followed the pair onto the patio and watched as they settled at a round table under a burgundy window awning.
meanings.example_cn: 凯伦跟随这两个人来到庭院，看着他们在一个酒红色遮阳篷下的圆桌旁坐下。

meanings.meaning_cn: 折, 羊栏, 折痕, 信徒
meanings.meaning_en: a line made in paper or material when you fold one part of it over another
meanings.example: Bend back the card and cut along the fold.
meanings.example_cn: 打开折好的卡纸，然后沿折痕剪开。

meanings.meaning_en: Creases are lines that are made in cloth or paper when it is crushed or folded
meanings.example: She stood up, frowning at the creases in her silk dress.
meanings.example_cn: 她站起来，看着丝裙上的折痕皱起了眉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 折磨, 痛苦, 拷问, 拷打
meanings.meaning_en: an act of deliberately hurting someone in order to force them to tell you something, to punish them, or to be cruel
meanings.example: He died after five days of excruciating torture.
meanings.example_cn: 遭受了五天的严刑拷打之后，他死了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 折衷主义, 折衷主义的运动
meanings.meaning_en: Eclecticism is the principle or practice of choosing or involving objects, ideas, and beliefs from many different sources
meanings.example: ...her cultural eclecticism.
meanings.example_cn: ...她的文化折中主义。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat narrow fold in a skirt, a pair of trousers, a dress etc
meanings.example: Her skirt hangs in perfect wide pleats.
meanings.example_cn: 她的裙子打着漂亮的宽褶自然下垂。

meanings.meaning_en: a very thin, pointed steel tube at the end of a syringe, which is pushed into your skin to put a drug or medicine into your body or to take out blood
meanings.example: She carried hypodermic needles and syringes in her bag.
meanings.example_cn: 她包里带着皮下注射针和针筒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 侦察, 搜索, 勘测
meanings.meaning_en: the military activity of sending soldiers and aircraft to find out about the enemy’s forces
meanings.example: reconnaissance aircraft
meanings.example_cn: 侦察机

meanings.example: And trust in rising home value as a truism as reliable as a sunrise was a major contributor to the catastrophic collapse of the economy.
meanings.example_cn: 并且对于家庭价值作为真实性而信任，认为它和日出一样的可靠，这份信任是经济灾难性崩溃的主要贡献者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 阵风, 一阵狂风, (雨、冰雹、烟、火、声音等的)突然一阵，（感情的）迸发，汹涌
meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong movement of wind, air, rain etc
meanings.example: A gust of wind drove down the valley.
meanings.example_cn: 一阵狂风掠过山谷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 振动, 振动性, 活跃, 响亮

meanings.meaning_en: If an event causes a tremor in a group or organization, it threatens to make the group or organization less strong or stable
meanings.example: News of 160 lay-offs had sent tremors through the community.
meanings.example_cn: 裁员160人的消息在社区中引起了波动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 震动, 颤抖, 箭袋, 箭袋中的箭
meanings.meaning_en: a slight trembling
meanings.example: I recognized it instantly and felt a quiver of panic.
meanings.example_cn: 我立刻认出它了，感到一阵惊恐的颤抖。

meanings.meaning_cn: 震动, 刺耳声, 震惊, 争吵, 罐, 广口瓶
meanings.example: a jam jar
meanings.example_cn: 果酱罐

meanings.meaning_cn: 震撼, 动乱, 震动, 惊厥, 痉挛
meanings.meaning_en: a shaking movement of your body that you cannot control, which happens because you are ill
meanings.example: His temperature was very high and he went into convulsions .
meanings.example_cn: 他的体温很高并开始抽搐。

meanings.meaning_en: calmness in the way that you react to things, which means that you do not become upset or annoyed
meanings.example: He received the news with surprising equanimity.
meanings.example_cn: 他得到消息时显得异常镇静。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of feeling or seeming calm
meanings.example: He has lost his composure under the pressure of the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 他不堪形势的压力，失去了冷静。

meanings.meaning_cn: 争夺, 争论, 争辩, 论点
meanings.meaning_en: a strong opinion that someone expresses
meanings.example: It is my contention that death and murder always lurk as potentials in violent relationships.
meanings.example_cn: 我的观点是，在暴力关系中总是潜伏着死亡和谋杀的可能。

meanings.example: I had a slight altercation with some people who objected to our filming.
meanings.example_cn: 我和一些反对我们拍电影的人之间发生了一点点小争执。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who argues; contestant
meanings.example: A mediator should not guarantee results, especially if such guarantee could be perceived as favoring one type of disputant or industry over another.
meanings.example_cn: 特别是如果这样保证可能被察觉象倾向争论者或产业的一种类型在别的的斡旋人不应该保证结果。

meanings.meaning_en: when a person or a group of people are controlled by a government or by another person
meanings.example: the subjection of women
meanings.example_cn: 妇女的从属地位

meanings.meaning_en: Enlistment is the period of time for which someone is a member of one of the armed forces
meanings.example: At the end of my term of enlistment I decided to return to civilian life.
meanings.example_cn: 在服役期末，我决定复员过平民生活。

meanings.meaning_cn: 征收, 征税, 征兵
meanings.meaning_en: A levy is a sum of money that you have to pay, for example, as a tax to the government
meanings.example: ...an annual levy on all drivers.
meanings.example_cn: …向所有司机征收的年税。

meanings.meaning_en: a sign or warning that something is going to happen
meanings.example: The savage civil war there could be a portent of what's to come in the rest of the region.
meanings.example_cn: 那里的野蛮战争可能预示着该地区将要发生什么事情。

meanings.meaning_cn: 蒸馏, 蒸馏法, 蒸馏物, 精华, 精髓

meanings.meaning_en: something that prevents or saves someone or something from danger, loss, or failure
meanings.example: The church's message of salvation has changed the lives of many.
meanings.example_cn: 这个教会的灵魂得救的训诫已经改变了很多人的一生。

meanings.meaning_en: the front of a building, especially a large and important one
meanings.example: an impressive building with a red brick facade
meanings.example_cn: 正面为红砖的雄伟建筑

meanings.meaning_en: a large structure that has many rows of seats where people sit and watch sports competitions, games, or races
meanings.example: The grandstand was filled with men in seersucker suits, braces and pocket squares.
meanings.example_cn: 看台上的男士都身着泡泡纱西服，配着背带和西服袋巾。

meanings.meaning_cn: 正式请求, 申请, 需要, 命令, 征用, 通知单
meanings.meaning_en: A requisition is a written document which allows a person or organization to obtain goods
meanings.example: ...a requisition for a replacement photocopier.
meanings.example_cn: ...一份更换复印机的授权书。

meanings.meaning_cn: 正文, 原文, 课文, 课本
meanings.meaning_en: the writing that forms the main part of a book, magazine etc, rather than the pictures or notes
meanings.example: There should not be too much text in children’s books.
meanings.example_cn: 儿童书籍里不应该有太多的文字。

meanings.meaning_en: complete honesty
meanings.example: I have always found Bentner to be a model of probity in our dealings.
meanings.example_cn: 在我们的交往中，我一贯认为班特纳是诚实的典范。

meanings.meaning_cn: 正直, 诚实, 完整, 完全, 完整性
meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being honest and strong about what you believe to be right
meanings.example: the territorial integrity of the country
meanings.example_cn: 国家的领土完整

meanings.meaning_cn: 正直, 公正, 清廉, 笔直
meanings.meaning_en: behaviour that is honest and morally correct
meanings.example: ...people of the utmost moral rectitude.
meanings.example_cn: ...道义上极度正直的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 证词(尤指在法庭所作的), 宣言, 陈述
meanings.meaning_en: a formal statement saying that something is true, especially one a  witness  makes in a court of law
meanings.example: Barker’s testimony is crucial to the prosecution’s case.
meanings.example_cn: 巴克的证词对控方的指控起到了关键作用。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal written statement describing someone’s character and abilities
meanings.example: She could hardly expect her employer to provide her with testimonials to her character and ability.
meanings.example_cn: 她几乎不指望老板会给她写证明她的人品和能力的证明书。

meanings.meaning_cn: 政体, 政权, 政权制度
meanings.meaning_en: a government, especially one that was not elected fairly or that you disapprove of for some other reason
meanings.example: The regime got rid of most of its opponents.
meanings.example_cn: 该政权清除了大多数反对者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 支持者, 倚靠人, 道具, 螺旋桨
meanings.meaning_en: a small object such as a book, weapon etc, used by actors in a play or film
meanings.example: Anna looks after costumes and props.
meanings.example_cn: 安娜管理服装和道具。

meanings.meaning_en: the total amount of money that a government, organization, or person spends during a particular period of time
meanings.example: huge cuts in public expenditure
meanings.example_cn: 大幅度削减公共开支

meanings.meaning_en: Disbursement is the paying out of a sum of money, especially from a fund
meanings.example: Let's switch the talk to disbursement.
meanings.example_cn: 咱们换个话题，谈一谈款项支出吧。

meanings.meaning_cn: 支柱, 带子, 振作精神

meanings.meaning_en: a word made up from the first letters of the name of something such as an organization. For example, NATO is an acronym for the North Atlantic Treaty Organization.
an arm or leg
meanings.example: She would be able to stretch out her cramped limbs and rest for a few hours.
meanings.example_cn: 她将可以伸开蜷缩的四肢，休息几个小时。

meanings.meaning_en: a frame or machine on which thread is woven into cloth
meanings.example: And then they pointed to the empty loom, for they believed the other could doubtless see the cloth.
meanings.example_cn: 然后他们指着空的纺织机，因为他们相信别人无疑能看到那织物。

meanings.meaning_en: a large piece of heavy cloth on which coloured threads are woven to produce a picture, pattern etc
meanings.example: a colourful tapestry depicting a hunting scene
meanings.example_cn: 描绘狩猎场面的彩色壁毯

meanings.meaning_cn: 织品, 织物, 布, 结构, 建筑物, 构造
meanings.meaning_en: cloth used for making clothes, curtains etc
meanings.example: our new range of fabrics and wallpapers
meanings.example_cn: 我们新的织物和墙纸系列

meanings.meaning_cn: 执照, 许可证, 特许
meanings.meaning_en: an official document giving you permission to own or do something for a period of time
meanings.example: The dealers applied for an export licence.
meanings.example_cn: 经销商申请了出口许可证。

meanings.meaning_en: the longest side of a  triangle  that has a  right angle
meanings.example: I want to compute the length of the hypotenuse of a right triangle.
meanings.example_cn: 我想计算下,直角三角形的斜边。

meanings.example: It erects a barrier that severs the pleasure and immediacy of visceral experience.
meanings.example_cn: 它在单纯的直接的快乐经历和我们之间竖起屏障。

meanings.meaning_cn: 职员, 官员, 负责人员
meanings.meaning_en: someone who has a job doing unimportant or boring official duties
meanings.example: Liberal Party functionaries
meanings.example_cn: 自由党职员

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of plants
meanings.example: To what degree are you interested in botany?
meanings.example_cn: 你对植物学的兴趣达到什么程度?

meanings.meaning_en: a medicine that reduces pain
a band of cloth that is twisted tightly around an injured arm or leg to stop it bleeding
meanings.example: That will work as a tourniquet.
meanings.example_cn: 就和止血带的功用一样了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 指示, 规定, 命令, 处方, 药方
meanings.meaning_en: a piece of paper on which a doctor writes what medicine a sick person should have, so that they can get it from a  pharmacist
meanings.example: We are trying to cut the price of prescription drugs .
meanings.example_cn: 我们正努力降低处方药的价格。

meanings.meaning_cn: 指示, 指定, 选派, 名称
meanings.meaning_en: the act of choosing someone or something for a particular purpose, or of giving them a particular description
meanings.example: Her official designation is Systems Manager.
meanings.example_cn: 她的正式头衔是系统经理。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin piece of metal that points to a number or direction on a piece of equipment, for example on a measuring instrument
meanings.example: The pointer was between 35 and 40 pounds.
meanings.example_cn: 指针位于35和40磅之间。

meanings.meaning_cn: 指责, 谴责, 非难
meanings.meaning_en: Rebuke is also a noun
meanings.example: His statements drew a stinging rebuke from the chairman.
meanings.example_cn: 他的申明受到了主席严厉的谴责。

meanings.meaning_en: supreme blessedness or happiness
meanings.example: This beatitude is as vast as the Bible itself.
meanings.example_cn: 这个祝福，如同圣经本身一样广阔。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to make animal skin into leather by  tanning
things that are made this way
meanings.example: an exhibition of ceramics
meanings.example_cn: 陶瓷器展览

meanings.meaning_cn: 质问, 询问, 怀疑, 疑问
meanings.meaning_en: a question that you ask to get information, or to check that something is true or correct
meanings.example: Staff are always available to answer your queries.
meanings.example_cn: 员工随时为您解答疑问。

meanings.meaning_en: the treatment of an illness or injury over a fairly long period of time
meanings.example: new drug therapies
meanings.example_cn: 新的药物疗法

meanings.meaning_en: death caused by not being able to breathe
meanings.example: Death was due to asphyxia through smoke inhalation.
meanings.example_cn: 死亡是由烟尘吸入导致窒息引起的。

meanings.example: I think we can all appreciate the relevance of that now.
meanings.example_cn: 我想，我们大家现在都能领会这句话中肯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 中立者, 中立国, 非彩色, 齿轮的空档
meanings.meaning_en: a country, person, or group that is not involved in an argument or disagreement
meanings.example: It was a good game to watch for the neutrals.
meanings.example_cn: 对于中立观众来说，这是一场精彩的比赛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 中央广场, 车轮的中心部
meanings.meaning_en: the long central part of a church

meanings.meaning_cn: 忠实, 诚实, 忠诚, 保真度, (收音机, 录音设备等的)逼真度, 保真度, 重现精度
meanings.meaning_en: when you are loyal to your husband, girlfriend etc, by not having sex with anyone else
meanings.example: the importance of marital fidelity
meanings.example_cn: 对婚姻忠贞的重要性

meanings.meaning_cn: 忠实的追随者, 党羽, 跟随者

meanings.meaning_en: loyalty to a leader, country, belief etc
meanings.example: an oath of allegiance
meanings.example_cn: 效忠宣誓

meanings.meaning_cn: 终点, [建]界标, 终点站
meanings.meaning_en: the station or stop at the end of a railway or bus line
a long metal stick with a weight at the bottom that swings regularly from side to side to control the working of a clock
meanings.example: After several years of Republican government, the pendulum will undoubtedly swing back and voters will elect a Democrat.
meanings.example_cn: 由共和党执政数年后，选民无疑会掉过头来，选出一位民主党人。

meanings.meaning_en: the art or science of making timepieces or of measuring time
meanings.example: The appearance of radio-controlled clock is a revolution in the history of the horology.
meanings.example_cn: 电波钟表技术和产品的出现是人类计时历史上的又一次革命。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people or things that are all of the same type
meanings.example: people in the over-45 age category
meanings.example_cn: 属45岁以上年龄组的人

meanings.meaning_en: the person who makes sure that the players obey the rules in sports such as tennis, baseball, and cricket
meanings.example: The umpire's decision is final.
meanings.example_cn: 裁判的判决是不可更改的。

meanings.example: The award rendered by: the arbitrator (s) shall be final and binding upon both parties.
meanings.example_cn: 仲裁人所作的裁定应是决定性的，并对双方有约束力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 仲裁人, 调解人, [体]裁判员
meanings.meaning_en: someone who makes sure that the rules of a sport such as football,  basketball  , or  boxing  , are followed
meanings.example: His headmaster agreed to act as his referee.
meanings.example_cn: 他的校长同意做他的推荐人。

meanings.example: The European Court of Justice will be the final arbiter (=  make the final decision  ) in the dispute.
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲法庭将对这宗争端作出最终裁决。

meanings.meaning_cn: 仲裁者, 调解者, 中间物
meanings.meaning_en: a person or organization that tries to help two other people or groups to agree with each other
meanings.example: Jackson acted as an intermediary between the two parties.
meanings.example_cn: 杰克逊充当双方的调解人。

meanings.meaning_en: part of a song or poem that is repeated, especially at the end of each  verse
meanings.example: Our proposal met with the constant refrain that the company could not afford it.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的提议所得到的答复就是那句说了一遍又一遍的老话——“公司负担不起费用”。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重罪人, 蛇头, 瘭疽
meanings.meaning_en: someone who is guilty of a serious crime
meanings.example: By law, convicted felons (= criminals who are sent to prison ) may not own or use guns.
meanings.example_cn: 按照法律，已判刑的重罪犯不能持有或使用枪支。

meanings.meaning_en: the things and people that surround you and influence the way you live and think
meanings.example: Proust’s work reflected his own social and cultural milieu.
meanings.example_cn: 普鲁斯特的作品反映了其所在的社会和文化背景。

meanings.meaning_en: the imaginary line around which a large round object, such as the Earth, turns
meanings.example: The Earth rotates on an axis between the north and south poles.
meanings.example_cn: 地球绕着南北两极之间的地轴自转。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin long piece of metal in an engine or machine, that turns and passes on power or movement to another part of the machine
meanings.example: a drive shaft
meanings.example_cn: 驱动轴

meanings.meaning_en: a wish that something bad will happen to someone
a word you say when you do a magic trick, which is supposed to make it successful
wrinkles are lines on your face and skin that you get when you are old
meanings.example: Her face was a mass of wrinkles.
meanings.example_cn: 她的脸上布满皱纹。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin fold, especially in your skin or on cloth, paper etc
meanings.example: The first crinkles of age were beginning to appear round her eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 她的眼睛周围开始出现显示她年龄的细纹。

meanings.meaning_en: a very offensive word for someone who is very short because their body has not grown normally. Do not use this word.
meanings.example: "G’wan, midget, get out of here before I catch your cold!" the gatekeeper growled.
meanings.example_cn: “赶紧出去，你这个侏儒，别让我染上你的感冒！”门卫低声咆哮着。

meanings.meaning_cn: 侏儒, 人体模型, 时装模特
meanings.meaning_en: a model of the human body, used for teaching art or medicine

meanings.meaning_cn: 诸侯, 封臣, 附庸, 诸侯
meanings.meaning_en: In feudal society, a vassal was a man who gave military service to a lord, in return for which he was protected by the lord and received land to live on
meanings.example: Opponents of the treaty argue that monetary union will turn France into a vassal of Germany.
meanings.example_cn: 协定的反对者认为货币联盟会使法国沦为德国的附庸国。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who behaves very rudely or unpleasantly
meanings.example: Leave her alone, you filthy swine!
meanings.example_cn: 不许你再缠着她，你这无耻的下流坯！

meanings.meaning_en: A pigsty is an enclosed place where pigs are kept on a farm
white fat from pigs that is used in cooking
meanings.example: Ok so it goes against the grain to spend £20 on moisturiser when you have saddle soap and an old packet of lard in the cupboard, but buy it you must.
meanings.example_cn: 这样做就像当你的柜橱中只有脊肉汤和一袋旧猪油时你却花费20英镑去买保湿霜一样不合常情，你必须得放弃这样的想法。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of stopping someone from going to the school where they were studying or from being part of the organization where they worked
meanings.example: The headmaster threatened the boys with expulsion.
meanings.example_cn: 校长警告这几名男生说要开除他们。

meanings.meaning_en: the length of time a person spends getting well after an illness
meanings.example: a long and painful convalescence
meanings.example_cn: 漫长且痛苦的康复期

meanings.meaning_en: the basic SI unit of luminous intensity; the luminous intensity in a given direction of a source that emits monochromatic radiation of frequency 540 × 1012 hertz and that has a radiant intensity in that direction of () watt per steradian
meanings.example: Luminous intensity is indicated with the symbol I and its unit of measurement is the candela.
meanings.example_cn: 其定义符号为I 以及其测量单位表示为烛光。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who introduces the people who are performing in a television programme, theatre show etc
meanings.example: Oscars organizers have already confirmed one change by announcing Australian actor Hugh Jackman as the host of the show, a departure from the recent tradition of popular comedians acting as  compere.
meanings.example_cn: 奥斯卡的主办者已经证实了一项改变，就是这次的主持将由澳大利亚人休·杰克曼担任。 以往都是由知名的喜剧演员担任这一职务的。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to make decisions and take action without waiting for someone to tell you what to do
meanings.example: I wish my son would show more initiative.
meanings.example_cn: 我希望我的儿子能表现得再主动一些。

meanings.meaning_cn: 主人, 旅馆招待 许多
meanings.meaning_en: someone at a party, meal etc who has invited the guests and who provides the food, drink etc
meanings.example: Our host greeted us at the door.
meanings.example_cn: 主人在门口迎接我们。

meanings.meaning_cn: 主题, 主旨, 动机, 图形
meanings.meaning_en: an idea, subject, or image that is regularly repeated and developed in a book, film, work of art etc
meanings.example: The theme of creation is a recurrent motif in Celtic mythology.
meanings.example_cn: 天地万物的创造是凯尔特神话中反复出现的主题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 主战论, 武力外交政策,沙文主义,侵略主义
meanings.meaning_en: a strong belief that your own country is better than others – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: a mood of warlike jingoism
meanings.example_cn: 好战的沙文主义情绪

meanings.meaning_cn: 主张, 断言, 抗议
meanings.meaning_en: something that you do to show publicly that you think that something is wrong and unfair, for example taking part in big public meetings, refusing to work, or refusing to buy a company’s products
meanings.example: Five thousand employees came out on strike in protest at the poor working conditions.
meanings.example_cn: 五千名雇员公开罢工，抗议恶劣的工作条件。

meanings.meaning_en: the general meaning of what someone says
a flat heavy cooking pan with a long handle
meanings.example: A chefs skillet, poêle, has sloping sides and is used for browning and tossing small pieces of food like mushrooms or chicken livers; the long handle makes it easy to toss rather than turn the food.
meanings.example_cn: 长柄平底煎锅的侧面是斜的，适合炒制小块的食物，比如蘑菇或是鸡肝之类的，也适合拿来颠勺；因为有很长的锅柄，所以与其给食物翻面，还不如拿来颠勺更合适。

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s home – sometimes used humorously
meanings.example: Welcome to my humble abode.
meanings.example_cn: 欢迎光临寒舍。

meanings.meaning_cn: 贮藏室, 智囊团, 知识库, 仓库
meanings.meaning_en: a place or container in which large quantities of something are stored
meanings.example: A church in Moscow became a repository for police files.
meanings.example_cn: 莫斯科的一座教堂成为警察局档案的存放处。

meanings.meaning_cn: 注解, 评注注解,注释
meanings.meaning_en: Annotation is the activity of annotating something
meanings.example: She retained a number of copies for further annotation.
meanings.example_cn: 她为进一步解释保留了好多复印件。

meanings.meaning_cn: 注射器, 注油器, 洗涤器
meanings.meaning_en: an instrument for taking blood from someone’s body or putting liquid, drugs etc into it, consisting of a hollow plastic tube and a needle
meanings.example: As he reached over, Azrak slid a hypodermic syringe into his left arm.
meanings.example_cn: 他把手臂伸过来时，阿兹拉克便将皮下注射器刺进他的左臂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 注视, 沉思, 预期, 企图, 打算
meanings.example: The monks spend an hour in contemplation each morning.
meanings.example_cn: 那些修道士每天早上默想一小时。

meanings.meaning_en: a detailed explanation of a piece of writing, especially a religious piece of writing
meanings.example: ...the kind of academic exegesis at which Isaacs excels.
meanings.example_cn: ...这类艾萨克斯擅长的学术诠释。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay attention to something, especially something someone says, and seriously consider it
meanings.example: The government was taking little heed of these threats.
meanings.example_cn: 政府对这些威胁几乎不当回事。

meanings.meaning_en: a square block, usually made of stone, that is used as the base for a  pillar  or  statue
a Christian prayer that asks God to protect and help someone
meanings.example: The minister pronounced the benediction.
meanings.example_cn: 牧师做了赐福祈祷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 铸工, 翻沙工, 创始人, 奠基人
meanings.meaning_en: The founder of an institution, organization, or building is the person who got it started or caused it to be built, often by providing the necessary money
meanings.example: He was one of the founders of the university's medical faculty.
meanings.example_cn: 他是该大学医学院的创建人之一。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who knows a lot about a subject
meanings.example: ...the opinion of savants on the composition of the lunar surface.
meanings.example_cn: ...专家们对于月球表面成分的意见。

meanings.meaning_cn: 专家的意见, 专门技术
meanings.meaning_en: special skills or knowledge in a particular subject, that you learn by experience or training
meanings.example: She was not an accountant and didn't have the expertise to verify all of the financial details.
meanings.example_cn: 她不是会计，不具有核查所有这些财政细目的专业知识。

meanings.meaning_cn: 专家政治论者, 技术统治论者
专利权, 执照, 专利品
meanings.meaning_en: a special document that gives you the right to make or sell a new  invention  or product that no one else is allowed to copy
meanings.example: He wants to take out a patent on his new type of dustbin.
meanings.example_cn: 他想为他的新型垃圾桶取得专利。

meanings.meaning_en: an article or short book that discusses a subject in detail
meanings.example: ...a monograph on her favourite author, John Updike.
meanings.example_cn: ...关于她最喜欢的作者约翰·厄普代克的一本专著。

meanings.meaning_en: rule by a despot
meanings.example: EVEN if I granted all that I have been refuting, the friends of despotism would be no better off.
meanings.example_cn: 即使我接受我所反驳的所有观点，专制主义拥护者的日子也好不到哪里去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 砖坯, 土砖美国Adobe公司, 是著名的图形图像和排版软件的生产商
meanings.meaning_en: earth and  straw  that are made into bricks for building houses
meanings.example: ...a few blocks of adobe houses.
meanings.example_cn: …几个由土坯房组成的街区。

meanings.meaning_cn: 转变, 转换, 跃迁, 过渡, 变调
meanings.meaning_en: when something changes from one form or state to another
meanings.example: Making the transition from youth to adulthood can be very painful.
meanings.example_cn: 从青少年过渡到成年有时是一个非常痛苦的过程。

meanings.meaning_cn: 转变期, [医]更年期,绝经期,[植]呼吸峰
meanings.meaning_en: a critical event or period

meanings.example: Before that, a "butter-and-egg man" was slang for a visitor with a lot of money, a yokel ready to be separated from his funds.
meanings.example_cn: 在那之前，一个“黄油和鸡蛋人”是对有钱拜访者的俚语，一个将要和他的资金分离的庄稼汉。

meanings.example: The most visited city in the world, here is a capital whose great talent has been to interweave the grandeur of its official buildings with the everyday charm of its many quartiers.
meanings.example_cn: 世界上访问者最多的城市，就是这里，拥有庞大人才资本的首都，这城市中庄严肃穆的官方建筑与许多城区的日常魅力始终融合在一起。

meanings.meaning_cn: 装成规矩的女人, (尤指在性问题上)故做正经的女人
meanings.meaning_en: If you call someone a prude, you mean that they are too easily shocked by things relating to sex
meanings.example: Caroline was very much a prude. She wouldn't let me see her naked.
meanings.example_cn: 卡罗琳是个过于一本正经的人。她不肯让我看到她的裸体。

meanings.meaning_cn: 装规矩, 假正经的行为
装模作样的人, 装腔作势的人
meanings.meaning_en: You can describe someone as a poseur when you think that they behave in an insincere or exaggerated way because they want to make a particular impression on other people
meanings.example: I am sometimes accused of being a poseur.
meanings.example_cn: 我有时被人说成是一个装模作样的人。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who pretends to have a quality or social position they do not really have, usually in order to make people notice or admire them
meanings.example: You meet a lot of posers in this job.
meanings.example_cn: 做这份工作你会遇到很多装腔作势的人。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you use to decorate something
meanings.example: It was a building without any adornment or decoration.
meanings.example_cn: 它曾是一栋完全未经装修的大楼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 装饰船头的雕像, 破浪神, 有名无实的领袖
meanings.meaning_en: a wooden model of a woman that used to be placed on the front of ships
meanings.example: The Queen is merely a figurehead.
meanings.example_cn: 女王只是名义上的元首。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of clothes worn by an actor or by someone to make them look like something such as an animal, famous person etc
meanings.example: the film’s lavish costumes and spectacular sets
meanings.example_cn: 影片中奢华的戏装和壮观的场景

meanings.meaning_cn: 装在墙上作装饰或纪念用的薄金属板或瓷片
meanings.example: The team’s coach was given a plaque.
meanings.example_cn: 那个队的教练得到一块匾牌。

meanings.meaning_cn: 壮丽, 盛况, 夸耀
meanings.meaning_en: all the impressive clothes, decorations, music etc that are traditional for an important official or public ceremony
meanings.example: The Queen’s birthday was celebrated with great pomp and ceremony .
meanings.example_cn: 女王生日庆典场面非常盛大。

meanings.meaning_cn: 状态, 不动产, 时期, 阶层, 财产
meanings.meaning_en: Someone's estate is all the money and property that they leave behind when they die
meanings.example: His estate was valued at $150,000.
meanings.example_cn: 他的遗产价值为15万美元。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of following someone or something quickly in order to catch them
meanings.example: a high-speed car chase
meanings.example_cn: 高速汽车追逐

meanings.meaning_en: an inferior follower or imitator
meanings.example: We think, IT tycoon must hour is vigilant all sorts of competitors and epigone , avoid in-house error at the same time.
meanings.example_cn: 我们认为，IT巨头必须时刻警惕各种竞争对手和追随者，同时避免内部失误。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle that can be pulled behind another vehicle, used for carrying something heavy
a pointed tool for making holes in leather

meanings.meaning_cn: 桌子, 餐桌, 工作台, 平地层, 石板, 表格

meanings.example_cn: 科学家已经发现了一些线索，例如植物的生长素在这个过程中起到的作用。

meanings.meaning_cn: 子孙, 后裔, 后代

meanings.meaning_cn: 自动化, 自动作用, 自动力

Spontaneity is spontaneous, natural behaviour
meanings.example: He had the spontaneity of a child.
meanings.example_cn: 他有孩子般的自然举动。

meanings.meaning_en: a farmer in Britain in the past who owned and worked on his own land
when someone is too concerned about their appearance or abilities or spends too much time admiring them – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: He went to the gym every day, driven purely by narcissism.
meanings.example_cn: 他每天都去健身房，纯粹出于自我欣赏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 自我宣传癖, 喜出风头癖, 裸露癖

meanings.example_cn: 这对父母的表现中也有一种出风头癖的成分。

meanings.meaning_cn: 自制, 克制, 节欲(尤指禁欲)

meanings.example_cn: 这里的“自制“指禁欲主义，但在文章中不仅仅代表控制性生活，而是彻底避开性事。

freedom that a place or an organization has to govern or control itself

a fast sailing ship with two sails

meanings.meaning_en: the crime of deliberately making something burn, especially a building

meanings.meaning_cn: 嘴, 鹅管笔的尖端, 钢笔尖

meanings.example_cn: 树木、灌木和攀藤植物相互缠绕，挡了我们的路。

meanings.example: Blood vessels in the lungs are filled and distend. Capillary changes have been observed in the animal model of simulated microgravity.

meanings.meaning_en: to kill someone – used especially in newspapers

meanings.example_cn: …圣乔治屠龙之丘。

meanings.example: Bent double, like old beggars under sacks Knock-kneed, coughing like hags, we cursed through sludge Till on the haunting flares we turned our backs And towards our distant rest began to trudge.
meanings.example_cn: 深深地弯下腰，就像压在麻包下的老乞丐,双膝跪下，象丑陋的老太婆在咳嗽，我们用泥巴诅咒,直到闪耀的火光浮现，我们才背转身,向着我们遥远的憩息处开始跋涉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 包, 蒙住, 压抑(声音)

meanings.example: After that the two alliances might be subsumed into a new European security system.
meanings.example_cn: 之后两个联盟可能会被归入新的欧洲保安系统中。

meanings.meaning_cn: 包围, 环绕, 包含或包括某事物

meanings.example_cn: 这项研究涵盖了这一局势的社会、政治和经济三方面。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone a payment for trouble or losses that you have caused them, or a reward for their efforts to help you

meanings.example_cn: 如果他们在法庭上胜诉，他们的损失就会得到全额赔偿。

meanings.example: This is the common fate of mortal men, useless it is to repine .

meanings.meaning_en: to run with quick short steps, like a child or small animal

to move quickly to avoid someone or something

meanings.example_cn: 他跑过院子，躲避雨点般的子弹。

meanings.meaning_cn: 编织, 密接, 结合

meanings.meaning_en: If something or someone is divested of a particular quality, they lose that quality or it is taken away from them

meanings.example_cn: ...在二十世纪60年代，性爱不再被当做犯罪的年代。

meanings.meaning_en: to carry off (property, prisoners, etc) by force
meanings.example: For the moment no matter the business that it can reave how many KTV truly, sheet sees it swim to be not a net the consequence that players produce and appeal, already had great value.

meanings.meaning_en: to cut the hair and skin off the head of a dead enemy as a sign of victory

meanings.meaning_en: to put new supplies into something, or to fill something again

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel worried and no longer calm

meanings.example_cn: 大学生中有一些反对的呼声。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove a name from a list, piece of information, or book
meanings.example: The revolutionaries expunged domestic opposition.
meanings.example_cn: 革命者清洗了国内反对派。

meanings.meaning_en: to guess that something is true, using the information you know already
meanings.example: There's so little to go on, we can only surmise what happened.
meanings.example_cn: 几乎没有什么可继续进行的，我们只能猜测发生过的事。

meanings.meaning_en: to think of, plan, and organize a large, important, and difficult operation
meanings.example: The project was masterminded by Morris, then aged 29.
meanings.example_cn: 这个项目由时年29岁的莫里斯策划。

meanings.meaning_en: if you unravel threads, string etc, or if they unravel, they stop being twisted together
meanings.example: He could unravel a knot that others wouldn't even attempt.
meanings.example_cn: 他能解开其他人甚至不敢尝试的绳结。

meanings.meaning_en: to express an idea clearly and exactly
meanings.example: ideas that he was to enunciate decades later
meanings.example_cn: 他将于数十年后清晰阐述的想法

meanings.meaning_en: to pay money back to someone when their money has been spent or lost
meanings.example: I'll be happy to reimburse you for any expenses you've had.
meanings.example_cn: 我很乐意报销你的所有花费。

meanings.meaning_cn: 偿还, 补偿, 付报酬
meanings.meaning_en: to replace or balance the effect of something bad
meanings.example: Because my left eye is so weak, my right eye has to work harder to compensate.
meanings.example_cn: 因为我左眼视力差，右眼就要辛苦点来弥补一下。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something better than someone else or be more successful
meanings.example: We outstripped all our competitors in sales last year.
meanings.example_cn: 去年我们的销售额超过了所有竞争对手。

meanings.meaning_en: to tease, taunt, or reproach, often in jest

meanings.example: “Please don’t gibe me,” Lydia said.
meanings.example_cn: “请不要嘲笑我，”利迪娅说。

meanings.meaning_cn: 嘲笑, 骗, 挫败, 嘲弄
meanings.meaning_en: to laugh at someone or something and try to make them look stupid by saying unkind things about them or by copying them
meanings.example: Opposition MPs mocked the government’s decision.
meanings.example_cn: 反对党议员讥笑政府的这一决策。

meanings.meaning_en: to say something in a way that shows you are thinking about it carefully
meanings.example: ‘Somewhere,’ he mused, ‘I’ve heard your name before.’
meanings.example_cn: “我以前在哪里，”他沉思着说，“听说过你的名字。”

meanings.meaning_en: to spend time thinking carefully and seriously about a problem, a difficult question, or something that has happened
meanings.example: He continued to ponder the problem as he walked home.
meanings.example_cn: 他一边往家走一边继续思考那个问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to make into grains
If you avow something, you admit it or declare it
meanings.example: ...a public statement avowing neutrality.
meanings.example_cn: ...一份宣布中立的公开声明。

meanings.meaning_cn: 承认, 同意, [民法]确认, 批准
meanings.meaning_en: to approve or ratify (a deed or contract, esp one that is defective)
to tell someone that you do not approve of something that they have done or said
meanings.example: ‘Edward, you are naughty,’ Dorothy chided.
meanings.example_cn: “爱德华，你真顽皮。”多萝西斥责道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冲淡, 变淡, 变弱, 稀释
meanings.meaning_en: to make a liquid weaker by adding water or another liquid
meanings.example: diluted fruit juice
meanings.example_cn: 稀释的果汁

meanings.meaning_en: to cause something to have too much of something
meanings.example: the glutted property market
meanings.example_cn: 已经饱和的房地产市场

meanings.meaning_en: if warmth, colour, liquid etc suffuses something or someone, it covers or spreads through them
meanings.example: The light of the setting sun suffused the clouds.
meanings.example_cn: 落日的霞光映红了云层。

meanings.meaning_cn: 崇拜, 爱慕, (口语)喜爱
meanings.meaning_en: to love someone very much and feel very proud of them
meanings.example: Betty adores her grandchildren.
meanings.example_cn: 贝蒂非常宠爱孙辈。

meanings.meaning_en: to honour or respect someone or something because they are old, holy, or connected with the past
meanings.example: a symbol of Arab courage, to be venerated for generations
meanings.example_cn: 受到世代尊崇的阿拉伯人勇气的象征

meanings.meaning_en: If you are remunerated for work that you do, you are paid for it
meanings.example: You will be remunerated and so will your staff.
meanings.example_cn: 你将会得到报酬，你的员工也会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 初次公演, 初演主角
meanings.example: The documentary premiered at the Jerusalem Film Festival.
meanings.example_cn: 那部记录片在耶路撒冷电影节上首映。

meanings.meaning_cn: 除去盐分, 淡化海水

meanings.meaning_en: to collect and save large amounts of food, money etc, especially when it is not necessary to do so
meanings.example: families who hoarded food during the strike
meanings.example_cn: 罢工期间囤积食品的家庭

meanings.meaning_en: to punish someone or treat them unfairly
meanings.example: Women feel professionally penalized for taking time off to raise children.
meanings.example_cn: 女性认为休假带孩子在职业上对自己不利。

meanings.meaning_en: to praise something or someone in order to persuade people that they are important or worth a lot
meanings.example: his much touted musical
meanings.example_cn: 他那出备受推崇的音乐剧

meanings.meaning_en: if a smell, smoke, or a light wind wafts somewhere, or if something wafts it somewhere, it moves gently through the air
meanings.example: The scent of climbing roses wafts through the window.
meanings.example_cn: 蔷薇的香味随风从窗户飘进来。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a very strong desire to have something that someone else has
meanings.example: The Michelin Awards are coveted by restaurants all over the world.
meanings.example_cn: 米其林评级是全世界所有餐厅的渴望。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave a place hurriedly; decamp
meanings.example: What reason vamoose is people can'ts help wanting to ask him after all this factory?…
meanings.example_cn: 人们不禁要问他究竟是什么原因匆匆离开这个厂？

meanings.meaning_cn: 窜改, 添写进去, 插入新语句
meanings.meaning_en: to interrupt someone by saying something
meanings.example: He started humming a tune, then interpolated the odd word as though having difficulty remembering.
meanings.example_cn: 他开始哼起一个曲调，尽管记得不太清楚，他又插入了几个词。

meanings.meaning_cn: 篡夺, 篡位, 侵占
meanings.meaning_en: to take someone else’s power, position, job etc when you do not have the right to
meanings.example: There were a couple of attempts to usurp the young king.
meanings.example_cn: 屡次有人企图篡夺那位年轻国王的王位。

meanings.meaning_cn: 催促, 赶紧, 促进, 加速
meanings.meaning_en: to make something happen faster or sooner
meanings.example: Their departure was hastened by an abnormally cold winter.
meanings.example_cn: 那个冬天异常寒冷，所以他们提前走了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 挫败, 阻挠, 使感到灰心, 阻止
meanings.meaning_en: to prevent someone’s plans, efforts, or attempts from succeeding
meanings.example: Their attempts to speak to him were frustrated by the guards.
meanings.example_cn: 他们想跟他说话，但被警卫拦住了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make yourself look attractive by arranging your hair, putting on  make-up  etc
meanings.example: She spends hours primping in front of the mirror.
meanings.example_cn: 她总是花很长时间在镜子前梳妆打扮。

meanings.meaning_cn: 打扮, 装饰, 化妆
meanings.meaning_en: to smarten up (oneself or another), as by making up, doing the hair, etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 打嗝, (火山、炮等)冒烟、喷出
meanings.meaning_en: to let air from your stomach come out loudly through your mouth
meanings.example: a line of chimneys belching out smoke
meanings.example_cn: 喷吐着浓烟的一排烟囱

meanings.example: Overly proud people refuse to admit their mistakes — and sometimes even deny the fact that they make them — because they feel that it would impugn their image.
meanings.example_cn: 过于自负的人拒绝承认自己的错误 — 甚至有时候否认自己制造错误的事实 — 因为他们感觉那将会打击到自己的形象。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a hole or holes in something
meanings.example: A broken rib had perforated her lung.
meanings.example_cn: 一根肋骨骨折，刺穿了她的肺部。

meanings.meaning_cn: 打扫, 以(腐肉)为食, 从废物中提取
meanings.meaning_en: if an animal scavenges, it eats anything that it can find
meanings.example: Pigs scavenged among the rubbish.
meanings.example_cn: 猪在垃圾堆里觅食。

meanings.meaning_cn: 大步走(过), 跨过, 大步行走
meanings.meaning_en: to walk quickly with long steps
meanings.example: They were joined by a newcomer who came striding across a field.
meanings.example_cn: 他们中又来了个新人，那人穿过一块田地大步走过来。

meanings.example: God, said, ‘Let the waters teem with countless living creatures, and let birds fly above the earth across the vault of heaven.
meanings.example_cn: 上帝说：“水中要有万种游鱼，地上要有无数飞鸟”于是上帝创造出种类繁多的大小鱼类及飞鸟。

meanings.meaning_en: if insects, rats etc infest a place, there are a lot of them and they usually cause damage
meanings.example: ...pests like aphids which infest cereal crops.
meanings.example_cn: …像蚜虫那样大肆侵害谷类作物的害虫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 大声叫, 大叫, 喊叫
meanings.meaning_en: to shout loudly, especially when you are complaining
to lead or contribute (to a result)
meanings.example: It is for psychologists to debate how far this method is likely to conduce to a better grasp of things.
meanings.example_cn: 关于这种体罚方式能在多大程度上引导小孩对事物有更好的认识，这个问题可以留给心理学家去讨论。

meanings.meaning_en: to crush something, especially a food that has been cooked, until it is soft and smooth
meanings.example: Mash the bananas.
meanings.example_cn: 把香蕉捣烂。

meanings.meaning_cn: 到处翻寻, 搜出, 检查
meanings.meaning_en: If you rummage through something, you search for something you want by moving things around in a careless or hurried way
meanings.example: They rummage through piles of secondhand clothes for something that fits.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在成堆的二手衣服中翻找合身的衣服。

meanings.meaning_en: to steal things that are not worth much, especially from the place where you work
meanings.example: The staff were pilfering behind the bar.
meanings.example_cn: 工作人员在吧台后面偷东西。

meanings.example: Then saith he unto them, My soul is exceeding sorrowful, even unto death: tarry ye here, and watch with me.
meanings.example_cn: 便对他们说，我心里甚是忧伤，几乎要死。 你们在这里等候，和我一同儆醒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 低垂, 凋萎, 萎靡
meanings.meaning_en: to hang or bend down, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The plant needs some water – it’s starting to droop.
meanings.example_cn: 这株植物需要浇些水——它开始打蔫了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 低声歌唱, 低声哼, 低吟
meanings.meaning_en: If you croon, you sing or hum quietly and gently
meanings.example: He would much rather have been crooning in a smoky bar.
meanings.example_cn: 他宁愿是在充满烟气的酒吧里低声哼唱。

meanings.meaning_en: if liquid trickles somewhere, it flows slowly in drops or in a thin stream
meanings.example: A tear trickled down the old man's cheek.
meanings.example_cn: 一滴泪水顺着老人的面颊流了下来。

meanings.meaning_en: if a liquid dribbles somewhere, it flows in a thin irregular stream
meanings.example: Blood from the wound dribbled down the side of his face.
meanings.example_cn: 伤口的血顺着他脸颊流下来。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn something over so that it is upside down
meanings.example: He upended the beer, and swallowed.
meanings.example_cn: 他把啤酒倒出来，大口喝了。

meanings.meaning_en: to start burning, or to make something start burning
meanings.example: The petrol tank suddenly ignited.
meanings.example_cn: 油箱突然着火了。

meanings.meaning_en: to spoil or reduce the value of something that was perfect
meanings.example: a scandal that sullied his reputation
meanings.example_cn: 玷污了他名誉的丑闻

meanings.meaning_en: to make an object or pattern by cutting a piece of wood or stone
meanings.example: carved wooden chairs
meanings.example_cn: 木雕椅子

meanings.meaning_en: to make a particular shape from stone, wood, clay etc
meanings.example: An artist sculpted a full-size replica of her head.
meanings.example_cn: 一位艺术家雕塑了一尊她头部的全幅头像。

meanings.meaning_cn: 跌跌撞撞地走, 犯大错, 做错
meanings.meaning_en: to move in an unsteady way, as if you cannot see properly
meanings.example: They blundered badly when they gave him the job.
meanings.example_cn: 他们犯了大错，让他做这份工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to look at someone or something for a long time, giving it all your attention, often without realizing you are doing so
meanings.example: Patrick sat gazing into space  (= looking straight in front, not at any particular person or thing ).
meanings.example_cn: 帕特里克坐着，茫然地看着前方。

meanings.meaning_en: if an animal hibernates, it sleeps for the whole winter
meanings.example: Dormice hibernate from October to May.
meanings.example_cn: 睡鼠从10月到5月冬眠。

meanings.meaning_cn: 逗留, 闲荡, 拖延, 游移
meanings.meaning_en: to stay somewhere a little longer, especially because you do not want to leave
meanings.example: I spent a week at Kandersteg and could happily have lingered on.
meanings.example_cn: 我在坎德施泰格逗留了一个星期，本来还可以开开心心地多待几天。

meanings.meaning_en: to publicly say or show that you no longer believe in something, or will no longer behave in a particular way
meanings.example: These groups must renounce violence if there is to be progress towards peace.
meanings.example_cn: 若要迈向和平，这些组织就必须放弃使用暴力。

meanings.meaning_en: to state firmly that something is true
meanings.example: French cooking, she asserted, is the best in the world.
meanings.example_cn: 她坚称法国菜是世界上最好的。

meanings.meaning_en: to sit with your knees bent under you and your bottom just off the ground, balancing on your feet
meanings.example: We squatted beside the pool and watched the diver sink slowly down.
meanings.example_cn: 我们蹲在池边，看潜水员慢慢沉下水。

meanings.meaning_en: to escape from someone or something, especially by tricking them
meanings.example: He eluded his pursuers by escaping into a river.
meanings.example_cn: 他逃到河里，甩掉了追踪他的人。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it difficult or impossible for something to succeed
meanings.example: policies which are throttling many Asian economies
meanings.example_cn: 抑制许多亚洲国家经济发展的政策

meanings.meaning_en: to have a strong and very unpleasant smell
meanings.example: It stinks in here!
meanings.example_cn: 这里很臭！

meanings.meaning_cn: 发出火花, 闪耀光芒
meanings.meaning_en: to give off (sparks); sparkle; twinkle

meanings.meaning_cn: 发火花, (使)闪耀, (香槟酒等)发泡, 用眼神表达, 发光闪烁
meanings.meaning_en: to shine in small bright flashes
meanings.example: The sea sparkled in the sun.
meanings.example_cn: 阳光下大海碧波闪耀。

meanings.example: I flip through my favorite papers and magazines, the images as crisp as in print, without a maddening wait for each page to load.
meanings.example_cn: 我浏览着我喜爱的报纸和杂志，图片犹如印刷的一般明亮清晰，每一页的载入没有出现令人发狂的等待。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发明, 设计, 图谋
meanings.meaning_en: to make or invent something in a skilful way, especially because you need it suddenly
meanings.example: In 1862, a technique was contrived to take a series of photographs showing stages of movement.
meanings.example_cn: 1862年时发明了一种技术，可以拍出一连串展示连续动作的照片。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发芽, 发育, 使生长
meanings.meaning_en: if a seed germinates, or if it is germinated, it begins to grow
meanings.example: Some seed varieties germinate fast, so check every day or so.
meanings.example_cn: 有一些品种的种子发芽快，所以差不多每天都要察看一下。

meanings.meaning_cn: 繁殖, 传播, 宣传
meanings.meaning_en: to spread an idea, belief etc to many people
meanings.example: The group launched a website to propagate its ideas .
meanings.example_cn: 这个团体建了一个网站来宣扬他们的主张。

meanings.meaning_cn: 反驳, 反击, 回报
meanings.meaning_en: to reply quickly, in an angry or humorous way
meanings.example: ‘It’s all your fault!’ he retorted.
meanings.example_cn: “那都是你的错！”他反驳道。

meanings.example: I do not want my son learning how to be a disgusting pervert from these men and seeing this behaviour as normal.
meanings.example_cn: 我不希望我的儿子向这些变态的男人学习，并且认为这是一种十分正常的行为。

meanings.meaning_en: to think carefully and deeply about something
meanings.example: One is to see whether you have any worry triggers and to distract yourself when you begin to ruminate.
meanings.example_cn: 首先看看你自己是否有担忧的动机，如果当你自己出现“沉思”时，尽量分散自己的注意力。

meanings.meaning_en: to oppose or conflict (with)

meanings.meaning_cn: 反抗, 起义, 反叛, 反感, 厌恶
meanings.meaning_en: if people revolt, they take strong and often violent action against the government, usually with the aim of taking power away from them
meanings.example: He was revolted by the smell.
meanings.example_cn: 那气味让他恶心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 反射, 反映, 表现, 反省, 细想
meanings.meaning_en: if a person or a thing is reflected in a mirror, glass, or water, you can see an image of the person or thing on the surface of the mirror, glass, or water
meanings.example: The drop in consumer spending reflects concern about the economy.
meanings.example_cn: 消费支出的下降反映出人们对经济的担忧。

meanings.meaning_en: if a loud sound reverberates, it is heard many times as it is sent back from different surfaces
meanings.example: Day in and day out, the flat crack of the tank guns reverberates through the little Bavarian town.
meanings.example_cn: 日复一日地，单调的坦克炮的轰隆声在巴伐利亚的这个小镇上空回响着。

meanings.meaning_cn: 反责, 反唇相讥, 反控诉
meanings.meaning_en: to return an accusation against someone or engage in mutual accusations
to do something that is morally wrong or illegal
meanings.example: Who could have perpetrated such a dreadful crime?
meanings.example_cn: 谁会犯下如此可怕的罪行？

meanings.example: We do not ask others to be faultless , we only ask their faults should not incommode to our own .
meanings.example_cn: 我们不要求他人完美无缺，我们只要求他们的缺陷不会妨碍我们。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it difficult for someone to do something
meanings.example: She tried to run, but was hampered by her heavy suitcase.
meanings.example_cn: 她想跑，但沉重的旅行箱拖累了她。

meanings.meaning_cn: 放牧, 吃草, 擦伤, 擦过
meanings.meaning_en: to accidentally break the surface of your skin by rubbing it against something
meanings.example: I fell on the gravel, severely grazing my knee.
meanings.example_cn: 我摔倒在砾石路上，膝盖擦伤得很严重。

meanings.meaning_en: to state officially that a right, rule etc can be ignored
meanings.example: She waived her right to a lawyer.
meanings.example_cn: 她放弃了请律师的权利。

meanings.meaning_en: to let someone else have your position, power, or rights, especially unwillingly
meanings.example: No one wants to relinquish power once they have it.
meanings.example_cn: 人一旦有了权就不想放弃。

meanings.meaning_en: to say publicly that you no longer have a political or religious belief that you had before
meanings.example: White House officials ordered Williams to recant.
meanings.example_cn: 白宫官员命令威廉斯公开宣布放弃自己的观点。

meanings.meaning_cn: 放弃, 弃权, 拒绝

meanings.meaning_en: to run or fly somewhere so fast you can hardly be seen
meanings.example: The sky was streaked yellow and purple.
meanings.example_cn: 天空被染成一条一条的黄色和紫色。

meanings.meaning_en: to say unpleasant things about someone that are untrue
meanings.example: She had seen herself repeatedly maligned in the newspapers.
meanings.example_cn: 她看到自己在报纸上一再受到诽谤。

meanings.meaning_en: to write or say bad or untrue things about someone or something, so that people will have a bad opinion of them
meanings.example: Sgt. Norwood complained that the article defamed him.
meanings.example_cn: 诺维德中士抱怨这篇文章诽谤他。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially end a law, or change a decision or agreement
meanings.example: The governor does not have the authority to rescind the ruling.
meanings.example_cn: 该州长无权撤销这项裁决。

meanings.meaning_cn: 废除, 取消, 废止
meanings.meaning_en: to officially state that a marriage or legal agreement no longer exists
meanings.example: Their marriage was annulled last year.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的婚姻关系去年宣告解除。

meanings.meaning_cn: 废止, 撤销, 否定, 放弃, 废除
meanings.meaning_en: if a government repeals a law, it officially ends that law
meanings.example: The government has just repealed the law segregating public facilities.
meanings.example_cn: 政府刚刚废除了隔离公共设施的法令。

meanings.meaning_en: to decay or make something decay
meanings.example: a partially decomposed body
meanings.example_cn: 部分腐烂的尸体

meanings.meaning_en: to pay a debt by making regular payments
meanings.example: There's little advantage to amortizing the loan, especially on a 30 or 40-year basis.
meanings.example_cn: 分期偿还这项贷款没有什么好处，尤其是按30或40年偿还。

meanings.meaning_en: (esp of branches) to diverge at a wide angle
meanings.example: At this location the two roads divaricate.
meanings.example_cn: 两路在此地点分开。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel angry or upset about a situation or about something that someone has done, especially because you think that it is not fair
meanings.example: Paul resented the fact that Carol didn’t trust him.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗非常气愤，因为卡萝尔不信任他。

meanings.meaning_en: to sew two pieces of cloth together, or to sew a decoration onto a piece of cloth
meanings.example: Mary is stitching a bedspread.
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽在缝床罩。

meanings.meaning_en: to say that something is not true, or to disagree with someone
meanings.example: No one dared to gainsay him.
meanings.example_cn: 没有人敢反驳他。

meanings.meaning_en: to gently touch and move your fingers over part of someone’s body in a way that shows love or sexual desire
meanings.example: She fondled his neck.
meanings.example_cn: 她抚摸着他的脖子。

meanings.meaning_en: to bring back an old activity, belief, idea etc that has not existed for a long time
meanings.example: The Home Office have resurrected plans to build a new prison just outside London.
meanings.example_cn: 内政部重新提出了在伦敦市外建一座监狱的计划。

meanings.meaning_en: to send home the members of an army, navy etc, especially at the end of a war
meanings.example: programmes to help demobilized soldiers fit into civilian life
meanings.example_cn: 帮助复员军人适应平民生活的方案

meanings.meaning_en: to get better again after an illness or injury
meanings.example: Winston proposed several ways for the industry to recuperate.
meanings.example_cn: 温斯顿为复兴这个行业提出了几种办法。

meanings.meaning_en: if you replicate someone’s work, a scientific study etc, you do it again, or try to get the same result again
meanings.example: There is a need for further research to replicate these findings.
meanings.example_cn: 需要进一步的研究来验证这些结果。

meanings.meaning_cn: 嘎扎嘎扎的咬嚼, 压碎, 扎扎地踏过
meanings.meaning_en: to eat hard food in a way that makes a noise
meanings.example: She sucked an ice cube into her mouth, and crunched it loudly.
meanings.example_cn: 她把一冰块儿含在嘴里，并嘎吱嘎吱地大声嚼起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to change one substance or type of thing into another
meanings.example: Ascension long ago served to transmute karma of the consensus known as Earth so that Earth could retain her vibration.
meanings.example_cn: 很久之前，提升就为改变地球这个一致实相的业力而服务，好让地球可留在其振动中。

meanings.meaning_en: to damage something by adding an unwanted substance to it
meanings.example: When performing taint flow analysis, the scanner models the flow of data within the system.
meanings.example_cn: 当执行污染流分析时，检测器会在这个系统中为数据流建立模型。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut skin deeply with something sharp
meanings.example: His fingers were badly lacerated by the broken glass.
meanings.example_cn: 他的手指被碎玻璃严重割伤。

meanings.meaning_en: to separate one group of people from others, especially because they are of a different race, sex, or religion
meanings.example: A large detachment of police was used to segregate the two rival camps of protesters.
meanings.example_cn: 一大队分遣警察被派来隔离两群敌对的抗议者。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove from contact with others
meanings.example: In the early 1990’s an extreme form of isolation emerged, where young Japanese people seclude themselves in their homes for months or even years at a time.
meanings.example_cn: 早在20世纪90年代初的时候，日本出现了一种极端的孤独症状，患有此症状的日本青年人一度成年累月地把自己隔离在家中。

meanings.meaning_en: to completely get rid of something such as a disease or a social problem
meanings.example: an attempt to eradicate inflation
meanings.example_cn: 为消除通货膨胀所作的努力

meanings.meaning_en: to strengthen the position of power or success that you have, so that it becomes more effective or continues for longer
meanings.example: The company has consolidated its position as the country’s leading gas supplier.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司巩固了作为该国主要煤气供应商的地位。

meanings.meaning_cn: 共谋, 阴谋, (指事件)凑合起来
meanings.meaning_en: to secretly plan with someone else to do something illegal
meanings.example: They'd conspired to overthrow the government.
meanings.example_cn: 他们曾合谋推翻政府。

meanings.meaning_en: to supply goods, services, information etc to people
meanings.example: DJ Dominic purveys a unique brand of music.
meanings.example_cn: 音乐节目主持人多米尼克播放一种独特的音乐。

meanings.meaning_en: to talk about how good or important something is and try to persuade other people about this
meanings.example: Alexander has been preaching patience.
meanings.example_cn: 亚历山大一直宣扬要坚忍。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to do something bad or violent
meanings.example: He accused union leaders of instigating the disturbances.
meanings.example_cn: 他指责工会领导人煽动骚乱。

meanings.meaning_en: to make the people in an organization or group feel excited again, so that they want to make something successful
meanings.example: Carey’s hope was that the church would be renewed and invigorated.
meanings.example_cn: 凯里希望教会能复兴。

meanings.meaning_en: to train someone to accept a particular set of beliefs, especially political or religious ones, and not consider any others
meanings.example: People were indoctrinated not to question their leaders.
meanings.example_cn: 人们被灌输对领导人不得置疑的观念。

meanings.meaning_en: to strongly fix an idea, feeling, attitude etc in someone’s mind or character
meanings.example: The diagram implanted a dangerous prejudice firmly in the minds of countless economics students.
meanings.example_cn: 该图表在无数经济学学生的头脑中牢牢地灌输了一种危险的偏见。

meanings.meaning_en: to make drunk; intoxicate
meanings.example: To rise thither with my inebriate Soul!
meanings.example_cn: 带着我的酒醉的灵魂向那里飞腾！

meanings.meaning_cn: 规避, 逃避, 躲避
meanings.meaning_en: to not do or deal with something that you should do
meanings.example: You can’t go on evading your responsibilities in this way.
meanings.example_cn: 你不能这样继续逃避责任。

meanings.meaning_en: if an agreement, law, or rule stipulates something, it must be done
meanings.example: Laws stipulate the maximum interest rate that banks can charge.
meanings.example_cn: 法律对银行可以收取的最高利率作了规定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 骇人听闻的, 可怕的
meanings.example: Every article on the breakfast table was fetched away with a hideous crash.
meanings.example_cn: 早餐桌上的每件物品随着可怕的撞击声移动了位置。

meanings.meaning_cn: 行乞, 乞讨, 贩卖
meanings.meaning_en: If someone cadges food, money, or help from you, they ask you for it and succeed in getting it
meanings.example: Can I cadge a cigarette?
meanings.example_cn: 我可以讨一根香烟吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 嚎叫, 怒吼, 嚎啕大哭, 喝住, 号叫
meanings.meaning_en: if a dog,  wolf  , or other animal howls, it makes a long loud sound
meanings.example: The dogs howled all night.
meanings.example_cn: 那些狗整夜嘷叫。

meanings.meaning_en: to combine two or more things to form a single new thing
meanings.example: He conflates two images from Kipling’s short stories in the film.
meanings.example_cn: 影片中，他把吉卜林短篇小说中的两个人物形象合并在一起。

meanings.meaning_cn: 合并, 并入, 结合, 吞没, 融合
meanings.meaning_en: to combine, or to join things together to form one thing
meanings.example: The company plans to merge its subsidiaries in the US.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司计划合并其在美国的几家子公司。

meanings.meaning_cn: 横着走, 悄悄贴近, 侧身而行
meanings.meaning_en: If you sidle somewhere, you walk there in a quiet or cautious way, as if you do not want anyone to notice you
meanings.example: A young man sidled up to me and said, "May I help you?"
meanings.example_cn: 一个年轻人悄悄地走向我，并说道：“我可以帮你吗？”

meanings.meaning_cn: 后悔, 悔改, 忏悔, 悔悟
meanings.meaning_en: to be sorry for something and wish you had not done it – used especially when considering your actions in a religious way
meanings.example: Those who refuse to repent, he said, will be punished.
meanings.example_cn: 他说，那些不肯悔悟的人将受到惩罚。

meanings.meaning_en: if water recedes, it moves back from an area that it was covering
meanings.example: The flood waters finally began to recede in November.
meanings.example_cn: 11 月，洪水终于开始退去。

meanings.meaning_cn: 呼气, 发出, 发散, <古>使蒸发
meanings.meaning_en: to breathe air, smoke etc out of your mouth
meanings.example: Take a deep breath, then exhale slowly.
meanings.example_cn: 深吸一口气，然后慢慢呼出。

meanings.meaning_cn: 互给, 酬答, 互换, 报答
meanings.example: I would like to think the way I treat people is reciprocated.
meanings.example_cn: 我愿意认为我对待别人的方式得到了同等的回应。

meanings.meaning_en: if two or more things interlock, or if they are interlocked, they fit firmly together
meanings.example: a puzzle with 500 interlocking pieces
meanings.example_cn: 由500个紧密相扣的块组成的拼图

meanings.meaning_en: to decide or mark the limits of an area, system etc
meanings.example: A special UN commission was formed to demarcate the border.
meanings.example_cn: 一个特别联合国委员会被设立以期划定边界。

meanings.meaning_cn: 滑行, 悄悄地走, (时间)消逝, 滑翔
meanings.meaning_en: to move smoothly and quietly, as if without effort
meanings.example: Waiters glide between tightly packed tables bearing trays of pasta.
meanings.example_cn: 侍者们托着一盘盘的意大利面食在拥挤的餐桌间自如穿行。

meanings.meaning_en: to dress (oneself, etc) finely; deck out
to be covered in something
meanings.example: The mountains were wreathed in mist.
meanings.example_cn: 群山笼罩在迷雾中。

meanings.example: Those under suspicion can also wield supreme power over their potential accusers, or be in charge of allocating funding to their projects or institutions.
meanings.example_cn: 那些被怀疑的人也会向那些潜在的指控者挥舞权力的大棒，或者掌管着为后者及其单位分配经费。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone is reinstated, they are officially given back their job after it was taken away
meanings.example: California reinstated the death penalty in 1977.
meanings.example_cn: 加利福尼亚于1977年恢复了死刑。

meanings.example: Drink a glass of wine, coffee, or tea, read a good book, or watch a good movie. Look at old photographs and reminisce.
meanings.example_cn: 喝上一杯酒，咖啡或茶，然后读本好书，或看场精彩的电影，也可以翻翻老照片，回忆过去。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn or slide in a different direction suddenly and violently, or to make a vehicle do this
to severely and violently damage someone’s body, especially by cutting or removing part of it
meanings.example: The prisoners had been tortured and mutilated.
meanings.example_cn: 犯人遭受了酷刑并被殴打致残。

meanings.meaning_en: to say things to make someone or something seem less important or good
meanings.example: people who denigrate their own country
meanings.example_cn: 贬损自己国家的人

meanings.meaning_en: if two things meld, or if you meld them, they combine into one thing
meanings.example: She sang the first verse again, listening to the way the words melded with the music.
meanings.example_cn: 她再次吟咏了第一节，倾听着歌词与音乐的交融。

meanings.example: If the Pope's initiative succeeds, the Church of England will be further weakened and plunged into even greater disarray.
meanings.example_cn: 如果教皇的倡议倡议获得成功，英国教会将进一步削弱并陷入到更大的混乱中。

meanings.meaning_en: to mix things together in an untidy way, without any order
meanings.example: The photographs were all jumbled up.
meanings.example_cn: 照片乱七八糟地堆在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: If people scuffle, they fight for a short time in a disorganized way
meanings.example: Police scuffled with some of the protesters.
meanings.example_cn: 警察和一些抗议者打了起来。

meanings.example: All the fighters landed safely on the airport after the military maneuver.
meanings.example_cn: 在军事演习后，所有战斗机都安全降落在机场上。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually get more and more money, possessions, knowledge etc over a period of time
meanings.example: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth.
meanings.example_cn: 少数特权阶级继续积聚财富，这是不公平的。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone want to achieve something and make them willing to work hard in order to do this
meanings.example: A good teacher has to be able to motivate her students.
meanings.example_cn: 好教师必须能够激发学生的积极性。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone very annoyed by continuing to do something that upsets them
meanings.example: It exasperates me to hear comments like that.
meanings.example_cn: 听到那样的评论令我恼怒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 即席演说, 即兴演奏, 当场作成
meanings.meaning_en: to speak or perform without preparation or practice
meanings.example: He completely departed from the text and extemporized in a very energetic fashion.
meanings.example_cn: 他完全脱了稿并以一种精力非常充沛的样子即席演说。

meanings.meaning_cn: 疾跑美国著名的通讯公司
计算, 估计, 用计算机计算(或确定)
meanings.meaning_en: to calculate a result, answer, sum etc
meanings.example: Final results had not yet been computed.
meanings.example_cn: 最终的结果还未计算出来。

meanings.meaning_en: if a process accelerates or if something accelerates it, it happens faster than usual or sooner than you expect
meanings.example: measures to accelerate the rate of economic growth
meanings.example_cn: 加快经济增长速度的措施

meanings.meaning_en: If you expedite something, you cause it to be done more quickly
meanings.example: We tried to help you expedite your plans.
meanings.example_cn: 我们试图帮你加快你的计划。

meanings.meaning_cn: 假装, 伪装, 掩饰
meanings.meaning_en: to change someone’s appearance so that people cannot recognize them
meanings.example: He escaped across the border disguised as a priest.
meanings.example_cn: 他装扮成神父越境逃走了。

meanings.meaning_en: to control the direction a vehicle is going, for example by turning a wheel
meanings.example: He was steering with only one hand.
meanings.example_cn: 他只用一只手在驾驶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 尖声叫喊, 耸人听闻地报道, 尖声喊叫
meanings.meaning_en: to make a very high loud sound, especially because you are afraid, angry, excited, or in pain
meanings.example: They were dragged from their homes, shrieking and weeping.
meanings.example_cn: 他们哭喊着被人从家里拖出去。

meanings.meaning_en: to continue trying to do something in a very determined way in spite of difficulties – use this to show approval
meanings.example: It can be tricky at first, but persevere.
meanings.example_cn: 一开始会有些棘手，不过要坚持。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a long hard journey somewhere, especially on foot
meanings.example: He’s been slogging round the streets delivering catalogues.
meanings.example_cn: 他奔波在街头递送商品目录。

meanings.meaning_en: to repair or change the necessary parts in a machine, system etc that is not working correctly
meanings.example: A mechanic is coming to overhaul the engine.
meanings.example_cn: 一名机修工要来彻底检修引擎。

meanings.meaning_en: to reduce the effects of illness, pain etc without curing them
meanings.example: Chosen carefully, the oils may not only palliate but also cure the condition.
meanings.example_cn: 如果仔细挑选，挑到的精油不仅可以缓和症状，还可以治愈疾病。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a situation or the effects of something less unpleasant, harmful, or serious
meanings.example: Measures need to be taken to mitigate the environmental effects of burning more coal.
meanings.example_cn: 需要采取措施来减轻燃煤增加对环境造成的影响。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut the wool off a sheep
meanings.example: Competitors have six minutes to shear four sheep.
meanings.example_cn: 参赛者们有6分钟的时间来给4只羊剪毛。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut off some of the branches of a tree or bush to make it grow better
meanings.example: The roses need pruning.
meanings.example_cn: 玫瑰需要修枝了。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut something by making quick cuts with scissors
meanings.example: I snipped the string and untied the parcel.
meanings.example_cn: 我剪断绳子，解开包裹。

meanings.meaning_en: to prove that something is true or real
meanings.example: The painting has been authenticated by experts.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅画专家鉴定为真迹。

meanings.meaning_cn: 将鼻插入, 用鼻掘, 用鼻爱抚
meanings.example: Evan leaned forward and began nuzzling her shoulder.
meanings.example_cn: 埃文靠过去蹭她的肩膀。

meanings.meaning_en: to humble or belittle (oneself, etc)
to give something to someone and get something in return
meanings.example: Do you want to swap umbrellas?
meanings.example_cn: 你想交换雨伞吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to talk together; converse; chat
meanings.example: The sofa of ancient formula, can sit to also can lie, still perhaps can put down small tea table, drink confabulate .
meanings.example_cn: 古式的沙发，可坐也可躺，说不定还能放下小茶几，对饮谈心呢。

meanings.meaning_en: to join the ends of two pieces of rope, film etc so that they form one continuous piece
meanings.example: He taught me to edit and splice film.
meanings.example_cn: 他教我剪辑和粘接胶片。

meanings.meaning_en: if objects or ideas coalesce, they combine to form one single group
meanings.example: As the number of moisture droplets increases, they begin to coalesce into small rivulets of fluid.
meanings.example_cn: 当水滴数量增加，它们会汇集成细流。

meanings.meaning_cn: 节约, 节省, 有效地利用
meanings.meaning_en: to reduce the amount of money, time, goods etc that you use
meanings.example: We're going to have to economize from now on.
meanings.example_cn: 我们得从现在起节省开支。

meanings.meaning_en: If you skimp on something, you use less time, money, or material for it than you really need, so that the result is not good enough
meanings.example: Many families must skimp on their food and other necessities just to meet the monthly rent.
meanings.example_cn: 为了交每月的租金，许多家庭不得不节省食物和其他必需品的支出。

meanings.meaning_en: to combine or attempt to combine the characteristic teachings, beliefs, or practices of (differing systems of religion or philosophy)
meanings.example: He tried to syncretize historical and logical empiricism view on scientific rationality.
meanings.example_cn: 在关于科学合理性问题上他试图融合历史的和逻辑经验主义的观点。
