meanings.meaning_en: to stop existing as an organization, or to make something do this
meanings.example: All the armed groups will be disbanded.
meanings.example_cn: 所有武装团体将被解散。

meanings.meaning_cn: 解释, 分析, 直译
meanings.meaning_en: If something is construed in a particular way, its nature or meaning is interpreted in that way
meanings.example: What may seem helpful behaviour to you can be construed as interference by others.
meanings.example_cn: 在你看来似乎有助益的行为会被他人看作干涉。

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone or something into a high rank or position
meanings.example: But it can also inspire and uplift and exalt, because power can be used to help people accomplish marvelous things.
meanings.example_cn: 但是，权力也可以激励人、振奋人和提升人，因为它可以帮助人们成就非同寻常的事业。

meanings.meaning_en: if you soak something, or if you let it soak, you keep it covered with a liquid for a period of time, especially in order to make it softer or easier to clean
meanings.example: Soak the clothes in cold water.
meanings.example_cn: 把衣服浸泡在冷水里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 浸没, 淹没, 掩没
meanings.meaning_en: to cover something completely with water or another liquid
meanings.example: The tunnel entrance was submerged by rising sea water.
meanings.example_cn: 隧道入口被涨起的海水淹没。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something soft by leaving it in water, or to become soft in this way
meanings.example: I like to macerate the food in liqueur for a few minutes before serving.
meanings.example_cn: 我想把食物在利口酒里泡几分钟后再享用。

meanings.example: She soaked bread in milk.
meanings.example_cn: 她把面包浸在牛奶里。

meanings.meaning_en: If you abstain during a vote, you do not use your vote
meanings.example: Three countries abstained in the vote.
meanings.example_cn: 三个国家在投票中弃权了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel very shocked and upset
meanings.example: The way we kill animals appals a lot of people.
meanings.example_cn: 我们屠杀动物的方式令许多人震惊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拘留, 留住, 阻止
meanings.meaning_en: to officially prevent someone from leaving a place
meanings.example: Two suspects have been detained by the police for questioning .
meanings.example_cn: 两名嫌疑人被警方拘留审问。

meanings.meaning_en: to chew food
meanings.example: Hines slowly masticated a shrimp.
meanings.example_cn: 海恩斯慢慢地咀嚼着一只虾。

meanings.meaning_en: to pull or lift something very heavy with one great effort
meanings.example: Michael’s shoulders heaved with silent laughter.
meanings.example_cn: 迈克尔憋着不笑出声来，双肩直抖。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拒绝, 排斥, 反驳, 击退, 憎恶
meanings.meaning_en: to fight someone and successfully stop their attack on you
meanings.example: Government troops repulsed an attack by rebel forces.
meanings.example_cn: 政府军击退了叛军的攻击。

meanings.meaning_en: to come from different directions and meet at the same point to become one thing
meanings.example: The two rivers converge into one near Pittsburgh.
meanings.example_cn: 这两条河在匹兹堡附近汇合。

meanings.meaning_en: to come together in a group
meanings.example: Crowds began to congregate to hear the President’s speech.
meanings.example_cn: 人群开始聚拢，来聆听总统的演讲。

meanings.meaning_cn: 捐款, 订阅, 签署(文件), 赞成, 预订
meanings.meaning_en: to pay money regularly to be a member of an organization or to help its work
meanings.example: I've personally never subscribed to the view that either sex is superior to the other.
meanings.example_cn: 我个人从未持有过一种性别比另一种性别优越的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: to find something after searching for it, especially something that has been buried in the ground or lost for a long time
meanings.example: Farmers still sometimes unearth human bones here.
meanings.example_cn: 农民们有时仍然能在这里挖到人骨。

meanings.meaning_en: to dig and remove a dead body from a  grave
meanings.example: The bones were disinterred and moved to a burial site.
meanings.example_cn: 骨头被掘出并移到了一片墓地。

meanings.meaning_en: to take something away from someone with a quick, often violent, movement
meanings.example: The thief snatched her purse and ran.
meanings.example_cn: 小偷抢了她的钱包就跑。

meanings.meaning_en: to begin or to start something
meanings.example: Work will commence on the new building immediately.
meanings.example_cn: 新大楼即将破土动工。

meanings.meaning_en: to prove that someone is not guilty of something
meanings.example: The writer of the news made all efforts to find some reasons to exculpate Yao Jiaxin.
meanings.example_cn: 这个新闻撰写者，挖空心思，尽一切力量，不遗余力地，想给他（指药家鑫）找出一点开脱的理由来。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut something with a cutting tool
meanings.example: hewn stone
meanings.example_cn: 切割好的石头

meanings.meaning_en: to cut something roughly or violently
meanings.example: Both men had been hacked to death (= killed using large knives ).
meanings.example_cn: 两个男人都被砍死了。

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly see someone or something
meanings.example: Here, from a window, did Guinevere espy a knight standing in a woodman's cart.
meanings.example_cn: 吉尼维尔是从这里透过窗户看到了站在樵夫车上的骑士。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone that you strongly disapprove of something they have said or done
meanings.example: He remonstrated with the referee.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾向裁判抗议。

meanings.meaning_en: When you broil food, you cook it using very strong heat directly above it
meanings.example: Pre-conditioning broil ers to heat stress to encourage better survival during transport, for example, could lead to more variable breast meat taste, appearance and texture.
meanings.example_cn: 举个例子， 为了更好地提高火鸡在运输途中的存活率所使用的热力温控烤箱 ，可能会让胸脯肉产生更多中变化的味道、外观以及口感。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone for money, help, or information
meanings.example: Morgan is accused of illegally soliciting campaign contributions.
meanings.example_cn: 摩根被指控非法征募竞选捐款。

meanings.meaning_en: to eagerly and anxiously ask someone for something
meanings.example: She beseeched him to cut out his drinking and his smoking.
meanings.example_cn: 她央求他戒酒戒烟。

meanings.meaning_cn: 恳求, 哀求, 恳请, 祈祷
meanings.meaning_en: to make a humble request to (someone); plead
to have an extremely strong desire for something
meanings.example: an insecure child who craves attention
meanings.example_cn: 缺乏安全感、渴望被关注的孩子

meanings.meaning_cn: 恳求, 乞求, <古>对待, 对付
meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone, in a very emotional way, to do something for you
meanings.example: He entreated them to delay their departure.
meanings.example_cn: 他恳求他们晚些再走。

meanings.example: You prate of sentences having subjects, but all that sort of talk is out of date.
meanings.example_cn: 你大谈句子必须有主语，这种分类早就过时了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 口吃, 结巴着说出, 结结巴巴地说
meanings.meaning_en: to speak with a lot of pauses and repeated sounds, either because you have a speech problem, or because you are nervous, excited etc
meanings.example: Whenever he was angry, he would begin to stammer slightly.
meanings.example_cn: 他一生气说话就开始有点结巴。

meanings.meaning_cn: 口述, 口授, 使听写, 指令, 指示, 命令, 规定
meanings.meaning_en: to say words for someone else to write down
meanings.example: Federal funds have to be used as dictated by Washington.
meanings.example_cn: 联邦款项得按照华盛顿规定的途径使用。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something seem better, larger, worse etc than it really is
meanings.example: I couldn’t sleep for three days – I’m not exaggerating.
meanings.example_cn: 我三天没睡觉了——一点不夸张。

meanings.meaning_en: to act in a play with too much emotion or movement – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Slender and decently built, Roberts has the look of a martial arts expert but this is one of those movies where he has a tendency to overact.
meanings.example_cn: 片中他表现地细致高杆，有一副武术大师的样子，但是这部影片中他也同样显露出“表演过火”的趋向。

meanings.meaning_en: to sit or stand with your legs on either side of someone or something
meanings.example: The photo shows him dressed in leather, straddling a motorbike.
meanings.example_cn: 照片上他身穿皮衣，跨坐在摩托车上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 快而含糊地说, 吱吱喳喳地叫, 闲聊
meanings.meaning_en: to talk quickly in an excited and unclear way – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: The tourists were jabbering away on the bus.
meanings.example_cn: 那些游客在公共汽车上叽叽呱呱地说话。

meanings.meaning_en: to drink a lot, be noisy, and have fun
meanings.example: They told him to stay home with his wife instead of going out and carousing with friends.
meanings.example_cn: 他们告诉他与他的妻子在一起呆在家里，不要出去和朋友们一起痛饮狂欢。

meanings.meaning_cn: 狂饮, 暴食, 喝酒化掉(钱)
meanings.meaning_en: to eat or drink a lot of something, eagerly and quickly – usually showing disapproval
meanings.example: They’ve been guzzling beer all evening.
meanings.example_cn: 他们整个晚上都在狂饮啤酒。

meanings.meaning_en: to form an ulcer, or become covered with ulcers
meanings.example: In advanced stages the opaque corneas may ulcerate and even perforate.
meanings.example_cn: 在疾病后期，不透明的角膜可能产生溃疡，甚至穿孔。

meanings.meaning_en: to become longer, or make something longer than normal
meanings.example: Her legs were elongated by the very high heels which she wore.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿的高跟鞋非常高，使她的腿显得长了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 懒洋洋地说, 做作而慢慢地说
meanings.meaning_en: to speak slowly, with vowel sounds that are longer than usual
meanings.example: ‘Can’t do that,’ he drawled languidly.
meanings.example_cn: “不能那样做。” 他懒洋洋地拖着长音。

meanings.meaning_en: to sit or lie in a very lazy and relaxed way
meanings.example: He was lolling on the sofa in the shadows near the fire.
meanings.example_cn: 他懒洋洋地躺在炉火边一个背光的沙发上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 狼吞虎咽, 大吃大喝
meanings.meaning_en: to swallow (food) with greed or in excess; gorge
to carelessly waste money, time, opportunities etc
meanings.example: The home team squandered a number of chances in the first half.
meanings.example_cn: 主队在上半场浪费了几次机会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冷笑, 讥笑, 嘲笑
meanings.meaning_en: to smile or speak in a very unkind way that shows you have no respect for someone or something
meanings.example: ‘Is that your best outfit?’ he sneered.
meanings.example_cn: “那就是你最好的衣服了？”他讥笑道。

meanings.meaning_en: to talk or write about something that is not your main subject
meanings.example: Do you mind if I digress for a moment?
meanings.example_cn: 我说些题外话你不介意吧？

meanings.meaning_en: to link or join together, esp in a chain or series
meanings.example: For the no-arguments case, we take the sequence [0 1] and concatenate it to an expression.
meanings.example_cn: 对于没有参数的情况，我们获取序列 [0 1] 并将它连到一个表达式。

meanings.meaning_en: to express your sympathy for someone who is unhappy about something
meanings.example: When I lost, he commiserated with me.
meanings.example_cn: 我失败时，他同情我。

meanings.meaning_en: to name a list of things one by one
meanings.example: I enumerate the work that will have to be done.
meanings.example_cn: 我将必须要做的工作一一列举出来。

meanings.meaning_en: if one piece of land or a building abuts another, it is next to it or touches one side of it
to do something without any preparation, because you are forced to do this by unexpected events
meanings.example: I forgot to bring my notes, so I had to improvise.
meanings.example_cn: 我忘了带笔记，只好临时发挥。

meanings.example: She'd love to tell Comus something about chastity, but he has neither ear nor soul to apprehend the sublime notion and high mystery.
meanings.example_cn: 她愿意告诉科玛斯关于贞节的事，但是科玛斯既没有耳朵也没有灵魂,去理解高尚的理念和谜团。

meanings.meaning_en: If a surface is imprinted with a mark or design, that mark or design is printed on the surface or pressed into it
meanings.example: The company carries a variety of binders that can be imprinted with your message or logo.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司经营各种可以印上客户所需信息或标识的活页夹。

meanings.meaning_en: to digress or wander
meanings.example: Solved the problems of the divagate teachers and the unfit teachers.
meanings.example_cn: 解决流浪教师及不适任教师之问题。

meanings.meaning_en: if soldiers pillage a place in a war, they steal a lot of things and do a lot of damage
meanings.example: Soldiers went on a rampage, pillaging stores and shooting.
meanings.example_cn: 士兵狂暴地掠夺商店，不停地扫射。

meanings.meaning_cn: 掠夺, 抢劫, 劫掠
meanings.meaning_en: to steal things, especially from shops or homes that have been damaged in a war or  riot
meanings.example: Shops were looted and burned.
meanings.example_cn: 商店遭到抢劫和焚毁。

meanings.meaning_en: if a substance leaches or is leached from a larger mass such as the soil, it is removed from it by water passing through the larger mass
meanings.example: The manufacturers say that there is no danger of the aluminium leaching into the water.
meanings.example_cn: 生产厂家说不会有铝渗入水中的危险。

meanings.example: In 1530 it meant to paralyze, deaden, stupefy, to stun or deprive of sensation, as by a blow.
meanings.example_cn: 1530年，它的意思是使人瘫痪、麻木、失去知觉、昏迷或者丧失感觉，就好像被人猛打了一顿。

meanings.meaning_en: to satisfy a desire or need for something such as food or sex, especially so that you feel you have had too much
meanings.example: The dinner was enough to satiate the gourmets.
meanings.example_cn: 这顿饭足够让美食家们吃个够。

meanings.meaning_en: to go on a walk in the countryside for pleasure
meanings.example: There’s plenty to discover as you ramble around this little island.
meanings.example_cn: 漫步这个小岛，你会有很多新发现。

meanings.meaning_cn: 漫游, 流浪, 转来转去, 纺成粗纱
meanings.meaning_en: to travel from one place to another
meanings.example: a salesman roving the country
meanings.example_cn: 全国各地跑的推销员

meanings.meaning_en: to claim that you have a particular right, position etc, without having the legal right to it
to feel sorry for yourself, without making any effort to do anything or be more happy
meanings.example: Don’t lie there moping on a lovely morning like this!
meanings.example_cn: 这么美好的一个早晨，你就别躺在那里自怨自艾了！

meanings.meaning_en: if vegetables, seeds, or plants sprout, they start to grow, producing  shoots  ,  buds  , or leaves
meanings.example: Move the pots outside when the seeds begin to sprout.
meanings.example_cn: 种子开始发芽时把盆搬到外面去。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something to show that you are sorry for having done something wrong
meanings.example: He felt he had atoned for what he had done to his son.
meanings.example_cn: 他觉得他已弥补曾对儿子所做的错事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迷路, 落伍, 蔓生, 四散, 漫延
meanings.example: thin, black, straggling hair
meanings.example_cn: 稀疏、散乱的黑发

meanings.example: So we have the current argument over how much of the derivative market will be exempt from regulation.
meanings.example_cn: 所以我们就看到了当前有关衍生产品市场到底有多大份额可以得到规则的豁免的辩论。

meanings.meaning_en: to describe or draw something carefully so that people can understand it
meanings.example: The document delineates your rights and your obligations.
meanings.example_cn: 这份文件阐明了你的权利和义务。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to hold, move, or find something with your hands in an awkward way
meanings.example: She reached round to fumble the light on.
meanings.example_cn: 她伸手摸索着去开灯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 磨(碎), 碾(碎), 折磨
meanings.meaning_en: to make something smooth or sharp by rubbing it on a hard surface or by using a machine
meanings.example: a stone for grinding knives and scissors
meanings.example_cn: 磨刀剪的石头

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone realize that their behaviour was wrong or mistaken
meanings.example: Party workers have returned to their home towns, chastened by their overwhelming defeat.
meanings.example_cn: 党务工作者遭受惨败后打道回府。

meanings.meaning_cn: 磨损, 摩擦, 折磨
meanings.meaning_en: to rub something so hard that the surface becomes damaged
meanings.example: My skin was abraded and very tender.
meanings.example_cn: 我的皮肤被擦伤了，非常敏感。

meanings.meaning_en: to destroy or remove something
meanings.example: Nothing can efface the last picture I have of them from my mind.
meanings.example_cn: 没有什么能抹去他们在我脑海中留下的最后印象。

meanings.meaning_cn: 目睹, 认识, 洞悉, 辨别, 看清楚
meanings.meaning_en: to be able to see something by looking carefully
meanings.example: We could just discern a town in the distance.
meanings.example_cn: 我们依稀看到远处有一座城镇。

meanings.example: If you plan to use a cart for food preparation, choose one with a tough top like butcher block, stainless steel or plastic laminate.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你想用一款推车来准备食品，上面的搁板要坚硬，竹节板、不锈钢或是层压塑料的都可以。

meanings.meaning_cn: 鸟鸣, 用柔和的颤声唱
meanings.meaning_en: to sing with a high continuous but quickly changing sound, the way a bird does
meanings.example: Mills warbled a few notes.
meanings.example_cn: 米尔斯凑合着唱了几个音。

meanings.meaning_en: to become thicker or form curd, or to make a liquid do this
meanings.example: Milk may curdle in warm weather.
meanings.example_cn: 天暖时牛奶会凝结。

meanings.meaning_en: if a liquid coagulates, or something coagulates it, it becomes thick and almost solid
meanings.example: The blood had not coagulated.
meanings.example_cn: 血未凝结。

meanings.meaning_cn: 凝视, 沉思, 预期, 企图
meanings.meaning_en: to look at someone or something for a period of time in a way that shows you are thinking
meanings.example: He contemplated her with a faint smile.
meanings.example_cn: 他微微含笑注视着她。

meanings.meaning_en: to damage a joint in your body by suddenly twisting it
meanings.example: I fell down the steps and sprained my ankle .
meanings.example_cn: 我从台阶上摔下来，扭伤了脚踝。

meanings.meaning_en: to thicken, as by evaporation

meanings.meaning_cn: 弄坏, 毁坏, 损害
meanings.meaning_en: to make something less attractive or enjoyable
meanings.example: Their wedding was marred by the death of Jenny’s mother a week earlier.
meanings.example_cn: 一周之前珍妮母亲的过世使他们的婚礼蒙上了一层阴影。

meanings.meaning_cn: 弄湿, 弄水, 涉足
meanings.meaning_en: If you dabble in something, you take part in it but not very seriously
meanings.example: He dabbled in business.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾涉足商界。

meanings.meaning_cn: 弄碎, 粉碎, 崩溃
meanings.meaning_en: to break apart into lots of little pieces, or make something do this
meanings.example: The fall leaves crumbled in my fingers.
meanings.example_cn: 秋叶在我指间碎裂了。

meanings.meaning_en: to dirty; soil

meanings.meaning_cn: 弄皱, 弄得乱七八糟
meanings.meaning_en: to make hair, clothes etc less tidy
meanings.example: He rumpled her hair playfully.
meanings.example_cn: 他开玩笑地拨弄她的头发。

meanings.meaning_cn: 弄皱, 起皱, (使)成波状
meanings.meaning_en: to fold or be folded into alternate furrows and ridges

meanings.meaning_cn: 弄皱, 压皱, 变皱, 崩溃, 垮台
meanings.meaning_en: If you crumple something such as paper or cloth, or if it crumples, it is squashed and becomes full of untidy creases and folds
meanings.example: She crumpled the paper in her hand.
meanings.example_cn: 她把手中的纸揉成了一团。

meanings.meaning_en: to look at someone in an angry way
meanings.example: He glowered at me but said nothing.
meanings.example_cn: 他怒视着我，却一言不发。

meanings.meaning_en: to appropriate or embezzle (public money)
meanings.example: It means that we can modify and peculate the code.
meanings.example_cn: 这意味着我们可以盗用或修改其代码。

meanings.meaning_en: to move up through the air
meanings.example: The plane ascended rapidly.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机迅速爬升。

meanings.meaning_en: if a bird, insect, or  helicopter  hovers, it stays in one place in the air
meanings.example: After rising through the air it stops to hover outside the window of a building several storeys high.
meanings.example_cn: 在空气中上升后，它在一幢几层楼高的建筑物的窗前停止升高，进入盘旋状态。

meanings.example: The Spain midfielder missed the midweek Champions League victory over Porto because of the hamstring problem which had seen him hobble out of the win against Burnley.
meanings.example_cn: 西班牙中场在上周与伯尔利的比赛中蹒跚下场，正因为这次腿部的伤势使他错过了周中对阵波尔图的冠军杯比赛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 判决, 宣判, 裁定
meanings.meaning_en: to officially decide who is right in a disagreement and decide what should be done
meanings.example: The Dean adjudicates any faculty disputes.
meanings.example_cn: 系主任裁决教师间的纠纷。

meanings.meaning_en: to talk in an angry, uncontrolled, or crazy way
meanings.example: He was still ranting and raving the next morning.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天上午他仍在大叫大嚷。

meanings.example: ‘Get out of my way,’ he growled.
meanings.example_cn: “滚开。”他低声咆哮道。

meanings.meaning_en: to promise to pay someone if something they own is damaged or lost
meanings.example: They agreed to indemnify the taxpayers against any loss.
meanings.example_cn: 他们同意赔偿纳税人的任何损失。

meanings.meaning_en: If you repudiate something or someone, you show that you strongly disagree with them and do not want to be connected with them in any way
meanings.example: Leaders urged people to turn out in large numbers to repudiate the violence.
meanings.example_cn: 领导们力劝人们集体出面来声讨该暴力。

meanings.meaning_en: to express a very bad opinion of a book, play etc
meanings.example: an excoriating review in ‘The Times’
meanings.example_cn: 《泰晤士报》刊登的一篇措辞严厉的评论

meanings.meaning_en: to give official permission for something
meanings.example: an authorized biography
meanings.example_cn: 授权传记

meanings.meaning_cn: 劈开, (使)裂开, 分裂, 分离
meanings.meaning_en: if a group of people splits, or if it is split, people in the group disagree strongly with each other and the group sometimes divides into separate smaller groups
meanings.example: It was feared that the issue would split the church.
meanings.example_cn: 人们担心这一问题会导致教会分裂。

meanings.meaning_en: if a ship, aircraft etc yaws, it turns away from the direction it should be travelling in
meanings.example: As the plane climbed to 370 feet, it started yawing.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机攀升到370英尺高时开始偏航。

meanings.meaning_en: to get something, or arrange for something to happen, by cleverly persuading or tricking someone

meanings.meaning_cn: 漂白, 使变白, 遮断阳光发白
meanings.meaning_en: to become pale because you are frightened or shocked
meanings.example: Patrick visibly blanched.
meanings.example_cn: 帕特里克的脸色明显地变得苍白。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel less angry and upset about something
meanings.example: He attempted to mollify her.
meanings.example_cn: 他想安抚她。

meanings.meaning_en: to treat someone cruelly or unfairly over a period of time, especially because of their religious or political beliefs
meanings.example: The Puritans left England to escape being persecuted.
meanings.example_cn: 清教徒离开了英国以躲避迫害。

meanings.meaning_en: If you undermine someone's efforts or undermine their chances of achieving something, you behave in a way that makes them less likely to succeed
meanings.example: The continued fighting threatens to undermine efforts to negotiate an agreement.
meanings.example_cn: 持续的战斗有可能破坏通过谈判达成协议的努力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 破坏, 侵犯, 违反
meanings.meaning_en: to do something that is against a law or someone’s legal rights
meanings.example: A backup copy of a computer program does not infringe copyright.
meanings.example_cn: 计算机程序的备份不侵犯版权。

meanings.meaning_cn: 破裂, 裂开, 断绝(关系等), 割裂
meanings.meaning_en: to break or burst, or to make something break or burst
meanings.example: The pipe will rupture at its weakest point.
meanings.example_cn: 管道最薄弱的地方会破裂的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 期满, 终止, 呼气, 断气, 届满
meanings.meaning_en: if a period of time when someone has a particular position of authority expires, it ends
meanings.example: The chairman’s term of office has already expired.
meanings.example_cn: 主席任期已满。

meanings.meaning_en: to trick or deceive someone
meanings.example: What devil was 't that thus hath cozen'd you at hoodman-blind?
meanings.example_cn: 是什么魔鬼如此欺骗了你这个瞎眼的女人？

meanings.example: She brought me to the field and enlightened me.
meanings.example_cn: 她将我领进了这个领域，给我启迪。

meanings.meaning_en: to improve the morality, intellect, etc, of, esp by instruction
meanings.example: If you study my project, it might edify your mind.
meanings.example_cn: “我想是你把我看成自我主义者了。” 汤姆说，“如果你研究一下我的工程，你的思想会受到启发。

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to accept something or someone, especially because you are too proud
meanings.example: She spurned all offers of help.
meanings.example_cn: 她骄傲地拒绝一切帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: to send someone back to their own country
meanings.example: After the war, prisoners were repatriated.
meanings.example_cn: 战后，战俘被遣返。

meanings.meaning_en: to state publicly that you do not approve of something
meanings.example: It may be tempting for some to decry incentives as nothing but a poisonous fruit of Con-Lib responsibility thinking.
meanings.example_cn: 对一些人谴责激励机制只是作为“新政治”责任思考的毒果这样的结论本身是很冒险的。

meanings.meaning_en: to force a woman to have sex
meanings.example: She'll never know how close she came to being dragged off and ravished.
meanings.example_cn: 她永远都不会知道她差一点就被人拖走强暴了。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone for something continuously in an annoying or unreasonable way
meanings.example: One can no longer walk the streets without seeing beggars importuning passersby.
meanings.example_cn: 走在这些街道上总能看到乞丐纠缠行人乞讨。

meanings.meaning_en: to steal large amounts of money or property from somewhere, especially while fighting in a war
meanings.example: The rich provinces of Asia Minor were plundered by the invaders.
meanings.example_cn: 小亚细亚的富饶地区遭到侵略者的劫掠。

meanings.meaning_cn: 敲诈, 逼取, 强取, 勒索
meanings.meaning_en: to illegally force someone to give you something, especially money, by threatening them
meanings.example: Corrupt government officials were extorting money from him.
meanings.example_cn: 腐败的政府官员那时正向他勒索钱财。

meanings.meaning_cn: 巧辩, 演讲, 高声朗读
切, 削, 削减, 损害
meanings.meaning_en: to cut a piece of wood into a particular shape by cutting off small pieces with a knife
meanings.example: We need to whittle down the list of guests for the party.
meanings.example_cn: 我们需要缩减聚会的客人名单。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut through something completely, separating it into two parts, or to become cut in this way
meanings.example: Martin’s hand was severed in the accident.
meanings.example_cn: 马丁的一只手在事故中被切断了。

meanings.meaning_en: to break something into parts, especially violently
meanings.example: The city is being sundered by racial tension.
meanings.example_cn: 该城市因民族关系紧张而正在分裂。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut food, especially meat, into very small pieces, usually using a machine
meanings.example: minced lamb
meanings.example_cn: 碎羔羊肉

meanings.meaning_en: to become unsteady and then fall over, or to make something do this
meanings.example: This scandal could topple the government.
meanings.example_cn: 这一丑闻可能使政府倒台。

meanings.meaning_cn: 倾诉, 委托, 信赖

meanings.example: This is usually fine, unless they forget to sanitize, or check, the incoming data.
meanings.example_cn: 这通常是没问题的，除非他们忘记清洁或检查输入数据。

meanings.meaning_en: to close a business or company and sell the things that belong to it, in order to pay its debts
meanings.example: The stock was sold to liquidate the loan.
meanings.example_cn: 股票被卖出以偿还贷款。

meanings.meaning_cn: 求爱, 追求, 恳求, 招致
meanings.meaning_en: to try to persuade a woman to love you and marry you

meanings.meaning_cn: 驱散, (使)(云、雾、疑虑等)消散, 浪费(金钱或时间)
meanings.meaning_en: to gradually become less or weaker before disappearing completely, or to make something do this
meanings.example: As he thought it over, his anger gradually dissipated.
meanings.example_cn: 他想明白后，怒气就渐渐消了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone leave a place or lose a position of power
meanings.example: the revolution that failed to dislodge the British in 1919
meanings.example_cn: 未能推翻英国统治的1919年革命

meanings.meaning_cn: 驱逐, 开除, 排出, 发射
meanings.meaning_en: to officially force someone to leave a school or organization
meanings.example: More than five-thousand high school students have been expelled for cheating.
meanings.example_cn: 五千多名中学生因考试作弊而被开除。

meanings.meaning_cn: 驱逐, 逐出(租户), 收回(租屋、租地等)

meanings.meaning_en: to bend one or both knees when in church or a holy place as a sign of respect
meanings.example: He genuflected in front of the altar.
meanings.example_cn: 他在祭坛前屈膝施礼。

meanings.example: When you encounter a particular strain, your body eventually produces antibodies to it, which remain on hand to quash that virus the next time you’re exposed.
meanings.example_cn: 当你遇到一种特殊的抗原时，你体内最终就会产生抗体对付它，下次你再感染这种病毒就会马上产生抗体消灭它。

meanings.meaning_cn: 去乡下, 使定居乡下

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone who has been unfriendly or angry with you feel more friendly by doing something to please them
meanings.example: I've never gone out of my way to propitiate people.
meanings.example_cn: 我从未违心安慰过别人。

meanings.meaning_en: If you exhort someone to do something, you try hard to persuade or encourage them to do it
meanings.example: Kennedy exhorted his listeners to turn away from violence.
meanings.example_cn: 肯尼迪劝告他的听众要远离暴力。

meanings.meaning_en: to vouch for; guarantee
meanings.example: He offered to avouch his innocence with his sword.
meanings.example_cn: 他表示愿以剑来保证他是无辜的。

meanings.meaning_en: if people throng a place, they go there in large numbers
meanings.example: Tourists thronged the bars and restaurants.
meanings.example_cn: 游客挤满了酒吧和餐馆。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less pure and good, especially by showing no respect
meanings.example: Hallam’s tomb had been defiled and looted.
meanings.example_cn: 哈勒姆的坟墓遭到了亵渎和洗劫。

meanings.example: They fear the public ignoring their jobs so that city services are not maintained, a discomfit to the elite.
meanings.example_cn: 他们也害怕公众不再去上班，导致城市服务无法维持，这种情况会扰乱精英们的计划。

meanings.meaning_en: to think of something in a particular way or as having a particular quality
meanings.example: French and German were deemed essential.
meanings.example_cn: 法语和德语被认为是必需的。

meanings.example: Objective To evaluate the therapeutic efficacy of percutaneous ethanol injection (PEI) under CT guidance to ablate retroperitoneal or intraperitoneal metastatic lymph nodes.
meanings.example_cn: 目的研究CT引导下经皮穿刺酒精消融疗法对腹膜后或腹腔转移性淋巴结的治疗价值。

meanings.meaning_en: to twist your body from side to side because you are uncomfortable or nervous, or to get free from something which is holding you
meanings.example: Christine squirmed uncomfortably in her chair.
meanings.example_cn: 克里斯蒂娜坐在椅子上不自在地扭来扭去。

meanings.meaning_en: to express hatred of someone or something
meanings.example: The President was now reviled by the same party he had helped to lead.
meanings.example_cn: 如今谩骂总统的正是他曾经协助领导的那个政党。

meanings.meaning_cn: 散播, 传播, 漫射, 扩散, (使)慢慢混合
meanings.meaning_en: to make heat, light, liquid etc spread through something, or to spread like this
meanings.example: Their ideas diffused quickly across Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的观点很快在欧洲传播开来。

meanings.meaning_en: to spread information or ideas to as many people as possible
meanings.example: Her findings have been widely disseminated .
meanings.example_cn: 她的发现已广为传播。

meanings.meaning_en: to smile in an unpleasant way that shows that you are pleased by someone else’s bad luck or think you are better than other people
meanings.example: The boys tried not to smirk.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩们强忍住得意的笑。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone expurgates a piece of writing, they remove parts of it before it is published because they think those parts will offend or shock people
meanings.example: He heavily expurgated the work in its second edition.
meanings.example_cn: 在第二版中，他大幅删减了该作品。

meanings.meaning_cn: 删节, 削减, 精简
meanings.meaning_en: to reduce the length of (a written work) by condensing or rewriting
to shine and look wet or oily
meanings.example: glistening black hair
meanings.example_cn: 乌黑发亮的头发

meanings.meaning_en: If something glimmers, it produces or reflects a faint, gentle, often unsteady light
meanings.example: The moon glimmered faintly through the mists.
meanings.example_cn: 月亮透过薄雾闪烁着微光。

meanings.meaning_en: to burn the surface of something slightly, or to be burned slightly
meanings.example: The flames had singed her hair.
meanings.example_cn: 火焰燎了她的头发。

meanings.meaning_en: if you scorch something, or if it scorches, its surface burns slightly and changes colour
meanings.example: The walls had been blackened and scorched by fire.
meanings.example_cn: 这些墙被大火熏黑了。

meanings.meaning_en: to build a barricade to prevent someone or something from getting in
meanings.example: During the riots, some of the prisoners barricaded their cells.
meanings.example_cn: 暴动期间，有些囚犯把牢房堵了起来。

meanings.meaning_en: if the soul of a dead person haunts a place, it appears there often
meanings.example: The pub is said to be haunted by the ghost of a former landlord.
meanings.example_cn: 据说这个酒吧里经常有一位前任房主的鬼魂出没。

meanings.meaning_en: to treat someone or something with extreme respect and admiration
meanings.example: Valentino was virtually deified by legions of female fans.
meanings.example_cn: 华伦天奴实际上被女性粉丝团神化了。

meanings.meaning_en: to flow slowly through small holes or spaces
meanings.example: Radioactive water had seeped into underground reservoirs.
meanings.example_cn: 放射性水已渗入了地下蓄水池。

meanings.meaning_en: to secretly join an organization or enter a place in order to find out information about it or harm it
meanings.example: Police attempts to infiltrate neo-Nazi groups were largely unsuccessful.
meanings.example_cn: 警方想打入新纳粹团体的行动基本上不成功。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生长, 过单调乏味的生话
meanings.meaning_en: If someone vegetates, they spend their time doing boring or worthless things
meanings.example: He spends all his free time at home vegetating in front of the TV.
meanings.example_cn: 他把所有的空闲时间都用来窝在家里看电视。

meanings.meaning_en: if metals such as silver,  copper  , or  brass  tarnish, or if something tarnishes them, they become dull and lose their colour
meanings.example: Gold does not tarnish easily.
meanings.example_cn: 黄金色泽不容易变暗。

meanings.meaning_en: to collect grain that has been left behind after the crops have been cut
meanings.example: At present we're gleaning information from all sources.
meanings.example_cn: 目前我们正从所有渠道慢慢收集信息。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut lines on a metal plate, piece of glass, stone etc to form a picture or words
meanings.example: A laser is used to etch a pattern in the smooth surface of the disc.
meanings.example_cn: 激光器用于在光盘的光滑表面刻录图案。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使(身体)康复, 使复职, 使恢复名誉, 使复原
meanings.meaning_en: to make people think that someone or something is good again after a period when people had a bad opinion of them
meanings.example: The Prime Minister seems to be trying to rehabilitate the former defence secretary.
meanings.example_cn: 首相似乎在努力为前国防大臣恢复名誉。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something slightly wet

meanings.meaning_cn: 使失掉人性, 使成兽性
meanings.meaning_en: to treat people so badly that they lose their good human qualities
meanings.example: War dehumanizes people.
meanings.example_cn: 战争使人们丧失人性。

meanings.meaning_en: if two organizations amalgamate, or if one amalgamates with another, they join and make one big organization
meanings.example: Stir until the ingredients are amalgamated.
meanings.example_cn: 搅拌至配料完全混合。

meanings.meaning_en: If one thing pertains to another, it relates, belongs, or applies to it
meanings.example: ...matters pertaining to naval district defence.
meanings.example_cn: …与海军区域防卫有关的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: to become smaller, or to make something smaller, through the effects of heat or water
meanings.example: I’m worried about washing that shirt in case it shrinks.
meanings.example_cn: 我不太敢洗那件衬衫，怕它会缩水。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a person or organization the legal right to do something
meanings.example: The army is now empowered to operate on a shoot-to-kill basis.
meanings.example_cn: 军队现在被授权依据“杀无赦”原则行动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 疏散, 撤出, 排泄
meanings.meaning_en: to send people away from a dangerous place to a safe place
meanings.example: They were planning to evacuate the seventy American officials still in the country.
meanings.example_cn: 他们当时在计划将仍在那个国家的70位美国官员撤离。

meanings.example: As to her own life, those good friends for years gradually estrange since she's always on the run. And there's still a void in her love life.
meanings.example_cn: 而自己的生活也因整日奔波，多年的朋友逐渐疏远，感情也一片空白。

meanings.meaning_en: To explicate something means to explain it and make it clear
meanings.example: We shall have to explicate its basic assumptions before we can assess its implications.
meanings.example_cn: 在我们能评估其含义以前，我们得先解释其基本假设。

meanings.example: These demands are helping to stoke fears of civil war.
meanings.example_cn: 这些要求激起了对内战的恐惧。

meanings.meaning_en: to think carefully and seriously about something
meanings.example: He sat silently cogitating.
meanings.example_cn: 他静坐深思。

meanings.meaning_cn: 撕, 剥, 劈, 锯, 裂开, 撕裂
meanings.meaning_en: to tear something or be torn quickly and violently
meanings.example: Her clothes had all been ripped.
meanings.example_cn: 她的衣服都被撕破了。

meanings.meaning_en: to tear or break something violently into pieces
meanings.example: ...pain that rends the heart.
meanings.example_cn: ...撕心裂肺的疼痛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 嘶嘶作声, 用嘘声表示
meanings.meaning_en: To hiss means to make a sound like a long "s."
meanings.example: The tyres of Lenny's bike hissed over the wet pavement as he slowed down.
meanings.example_cn: 兰尼减速时，他自行车的两个轮胎在潮湿的路面上发出嘶嘶声。

meanings.meaning_cn: 松弛, 放慢, 减弱, 减少, 减缓放慢
meanings.meaning_en: to gradually become slower, weaker, less active etc, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The heavy rain showed no signs of slackening off.
meanings.example_cn: 大雨没有减弱的迹象。

meanings.meaning_cn: 松弛, 下陷, 下垂, (物价)下跌, 漂流
meanings.meaning_en: to hang down or bend in the middle, especially because of the weight of something
meanings.example: The branch sagged under the weight of the apples.
meanings.example_cn: 树枝被苹果压弯了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 嗽口, (用清水)刷, 冲洗掉, 漂净
meanings.meaning_en: to wash clothes, dishes, vegetables etc quickly with water, especially running water, and without soap
meanings.example: Let me just rinse my hands.
meanings.example_cn: 让我冲个手。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less effective or spoil it
meanings.example: Strategic policy during the War was vitiated because of a sharp division between easterners and westerners.
meanings.example_cn: 由于“东方人”和“西方人”间的巨大分歧，战争期间的战略方针没有得到切实的执行。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to tell lies in a court of law or to do something else that is illegal, especially for money
meanings.example: an attempt to suborn a witness
meanings.example_cn: 收买证人的企图

meanings.meaning_cn: 缩回, 缩进, 所卷(舌等), 收回, 取消, 撤消
meanings.meaning_en: if you retract something that you said or agreed, you say that you did not mean it
meanings.example: He confessed to the murder but later retracted his statement.
meanings.example_cn: 他承认谋杀，但后来又翻供了。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually become less and less or smaller and smaller
meanings.example: The elephant population is dwindling.
meanings.example_cn: 大象的数量在减少。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to find out details about someone else’s private life in an impolite way
meanings.example: I don’t want to pry , but I need to ask you one or two questions.
meanings.example_cn: 我不想唐突，不过我需要问你一两个问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 探险, 探测, 探究
meanings.meaning_en: to discuss or think about something carefully
meanings.example: Management need to explore ways of improving office security.
meanings.example_cn: 管理层需要探讨如何加强办事处的安全措施。

meanings.meaning_en: to let  saliva (= the liquid produced by your mouth )  come out of your mouth and run down
meanings.example: I hate dogs that slobber everywhere.
meanings.example_cn: 我讨厌到处淌口水的狗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 腾出, 空出,离(职),退(位)
meanings.meaning_en: to leave a job or position so that it is available for someone else to do
meanings.example: Clay will vacate the position on June 19.
meanings.example_cn: 克莱将于6月19日离职。

meanings.example: At any point in the project where you don't interpose your own judgment, your people are more likely to make a mistake. So what?
meanings.example_cn: 在项目中任何你没有提出自己看法的地方，你的手下都更容易犯错。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone advice, an explanation etc
meanings.example: the proffered invitation
meanings.example_cn: 提出的邀请

meanings.meaning_en: to put one picture, image, or photograph on top of another so that both can be partly seen
meanings.example: The image of a seemingly tiny dancer was superimposed on the image of the table.
meanings.example_cn: 一个看似很小的舞蹈者的影像被叠加在了那张桌子的影像上。

meanings.meaning_en: if a lot of people cram into a place or vehicle, they go into it so it is then full
meanings.example: Thousands of people crammed the mall Sunday.
meanings.example_cn: 星期天成千上万的人挤进了这家大型购物中心。

meanings.meaning_en: If you intercede with someone, you try to persuade them to forgive someone or end their disagreement with them
meanings.example: They asked my father to intercede with the king on their behalf.
meanings.example_cn: 他们请我父亲代他们向国王求情。

meanings.example: Should anyone be allowed to invoke any service?
meanings.example_cn: 是否允许任何人调用任何服务？

meanings.meaning_en: if your heart palpitates, it beats quickly in an irregular way
meanings.example: He felt suddenly faint, and his heart began to palpitate.
meanings.example_cn: 他突然感到晕厥，心脏也开始悸动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 停止, 结束, 终止
meanings.meaning_en: if something terminates, or if you terminate it, it ends
meanings.example: The court ruled that the contract must be terminated.
meanings.example_cn: 法庭裁决该合同必须终止。

meanings.meaning_en: to formally or officially tell someone about something
meanings.example: The skipper notified the coastguard of the tragedy.
meanings.example_cn: 船长通知了海岸警卫队这一灾难。

meanings.meaning_en: to happen at exactly the same time, or to arrange for two or more actions to happen at exactly the same time
meanings.example: It was virtually impossible to synchronize our lives so as to take vacations and weekends together.
meanings.example_cn: 为了一起度假和过周末而要让我们的生活同步几乎是不可能的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 同意, 加入, 同意

meanings.meaning_en: to defeat someone completely
meanings.example: We were trounced 13-0.
meanings.example_cn: 我们以0比13惨败。

meanings.meaning_en: to obtain something without permission – often used humorously
meanings.example: He must have purloined a key from somewhere.
meanings.example_cn: 他肯定是从哪里偷了一把钥匙。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately listen secretly to other people’s conversations
meanings.example: There was Helena eavesdropping outside the door.
meanings.example_cn: 海伦娜当时在门外偷听。

meanings.meaning_en: to stick out from somewhere
meanings.example: ...a huge round mass of smooth rock protruding from the water.
meanings.example_cn: …从水中突出来的一块光滑的圆形巨石。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a sudden sideways movement while moving forwards, usually in order to avoid hitting something
meanings.example: Drivers coming in the opposite direction swerved to avoid the bodies.
meanings.example_cn: 从反方向过来的司机们突然转向以避开这些尸体。

meanings.meaning_en: to put paint or a soft substance on something without being very careful
meanings.example: soldiers’ faces daubed with black mud
meanings.example_cn: 抹了黑泥的士兵的脸

meanings.meaning_cn: 涂上, 抹掉, 涂污, 诽谤, 抹去
meanings.meaning_en: to tell an untrue story about someone important in order to make people lose respect for them – used especially in newspapers
meanings.example: an attempt to smear the party leadership
meanings.example_cn: 污蔑党领导的 企图

meanings.meaning_cn: 涂污, 污损(名誉等), 把(界线,视线等)弄得模糊不清, 弄污
meanings.meaning_en: to become difficult to see, or to make something difficult to see, because the edges are not clear
meanings.example: The street lights were blurred by the fog.
meanings.example_cn: 街灯在迷雾的笼罩下十分昏暗。

meanings.meaning_en: if a vehicle or building disgorges people, they come out of it in a large group
meanings.example: Cars drew up to disgorge a wedding party.
meanings.example_cn: 一辆辆轿车开过来，下来的都是参加婚宴的人。

meanings.meaning_en: to use facts about the present or about one thing or group to make a guess about the future or about other things or groups
meanings.example: Extrapolating from his latest findings, he reckons about 80% of these deaths might be attributed to smoking.
meanings.example_cn: 从他最近的发现推断，他估计大约80%的这类死亡可能归因于吸烟。

meanings.meaning_en: to increase or improve something and make it more successful
meanings.example: The new resort area has boosted tourism.
meanings.example_cn: 新的度假区促进了旅游业的发展。

meanings.meaning_en: to go back to an earlier, esp worse, condition; degenerate or deteriorate
meanings.example: At present the moral belief crisis is the co-existence of expansibility crisis and the retrogress crisis.
meanings.example_cn: 当前道德信仰危机是发展性危机与倒退性危机并存。

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly feel very uncomfortable or embarrassed because of something that happens, something you remember etc
meanings.example: Who smile and frown, wince and hiss.
meanings.example_cn: 他们微笑和皱眉，畏缩与嘶嘘。

meanings.meaning_cn: 退位, 放弃(职位,权力等)
meanings.meaning_en: to give up the position of being king or queen
meanings.example: King Alfonso XIII abdicated in favour of his eldest son.
meanings.example_cn: 国王阿方索十三世把王位让给了长子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 挖掘, 开凿, 挖出, 挖空
meanings.meaning_en: to make a hole in the ground by digging up soil etc
meanings.example: Schliemann excavated the ancient city of Troy.
meanings.example_cn: 谢里曼发掘出特洛伊古城。

meanings.meaning_cn: 玩弄, 戏弄, 延误

meanings.meaning_en: to amuse yourself by doing things that are active and enjoyable – used humorously
meanings.example: ...the rich and famous disporting themselves in glamorous places.
meanings.example_cn: ...明星富豪们在豪宅中自娱自乐。

meanings.meaning_en: to risk losing or spoiling something important
meanings.example: large-scale military offensives which could jeopardize the UN peace process
meanings.example_cn: 可能会破坏联合国和平进程的大规模军事进攻

meanings.meaning_en: to settle into a warm comfortable position
meanings.example: Jane snuggled up against his shoulder.
meanings.example_cn: 简依偎在他的肩膀上。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that is not allowed according to a law or rule
meanings.example: Some portions of the bill may contravene state law.
meanings.example_cn: 这项议案中的一些部分可能与州法律相抵触。

meanings.meaning_en: to change figures, records etc so that they contain false information
meanings.example: The file was altered to falsify the evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 文件被动了手脚，以此伪造证据。

meanings.meaning_en: to hide something, especially by making it look the same as the things around it, or by making it seem like something else
meanings.example: The strain she was under was well camouflaged by skilful make-up.
meanings.example_cn: 巧妙的化妆很好地掩盖了她紧张的心情。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone responsible for doing something important, or for taking care of someone
meanings.example: He entrusted his cash to a business partner for investment in a series of projects.
meanings.example_cn: 他把现款委托给一个生意合伙人投资一系列项目。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell or allow someone to do something instead of you
meanings.example: A subcommittee was deputed to investigate the claims.
meanings.example_cn: 一个委员会专门小组受托去核实索赔事宜。

meanings.meaning_en: to express sympathy with someone in grief, pain, etc
meanings.example: We condole with you on your misfortune.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对您的不幸表示慰问。

meanings.meaning_cn: 稳步前进, 铸造, 伪造
meanings.meaning_en: to illegally copy something, especially something printed or written, to make people think that it is real
meanings.example: Someone stole my credit card and forged my signature.
meanings.example_cn: 有人偷了我的信用卡，并假冒我的签名。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially state that something has no legal force
meanings.example: The election results were nullified because of voter fraud.
meanings.example_cn: 由于选票造假，选举结果被宣布无效。

meanings.meaning_en: to accept and be influenced by qualities, ideas, values etc
meanings.example: She had imbibed the traditions of her family.
meanings.example_cn: 她受到了自己家庭传统的影响。

meanings.meaning_en: to completely understand and begin to use new ideas, information etc
meanings.example: It will take time to assimilate all these facts.
meanings.example_cn: 充分掌握所有这些情况需要时间。

meanings.example: The allure and charm of Paris excite all who visit there.
meanings.example_cn: 巴黎的诱惑与魅力吸引了所有到此游玩的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 洗擦, 擦净, 使(气体)净化, 擦洗
meanings.meaning_en: to rub something hard, especially with a stiff brush, in order to clean it
meanings.example: She was on her hands and knees scrubbing the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 她正趴着擦地板。

meanings.meaning_en: to read something, especially in a careful way
meanings.example: She leant forward to peruse the document more closely.
meanings.example_cn: 她俯身向前，更仔细地读那份文件。

meanings.meaning_cn: 下沉, 沉淀, 平息, 减退, 衰减
meanings.meaning_en: if a building or an area of land subsides, it gradually sinks to a lower level
meanings.example: After the heavy rains, part of the road subsided.
meanings.example_cn: 大雨过后，部分路面塌陷了。

meanings.meaning_en: If you preempt an action, you prevent it from happening by doing something that makes it unnecessary or impossible
meanings.example: The law would preempt stronger local rules.
meanings.example_cn: 该法律将预先制止更强硬的地方性法规。

meanings.meaning_cn: 闲荡, 虚度, 徘徊
meanings.meaning_en: to stand or wait somewhere, especially in a public place, without any clear reason
meanings.example: Five or six teenagers were loitering in front of the newsagent’s.
meanings.example_cn: 五六个青少年在报摊前面游荡。

meanings.meaning_en: to talk about other people’s private lives
meanings.example: Did you hear his frenzied tattle?
meanings.example_cn: 你听见这疯狂的闲谈了吗？

meanings.example: His conduct did not comport with his high position.
meanings.example_cn: 他的所作所为与他的高级职务不相称。

meanings.example: The answer lies, yet again, in the interplay of population and technology.
meanings.example_cn: 原因又一次在于人口和科技的相互影响。

meanings.example: Sing a descant on a main tune or melody.
meanings.example_cn: 以主调或悦耳的音调唱着评论。

meanings.meaning_en: to examine information, documents etc carefully in order to find something out or decide what is important and what is not
meanings.example: Police are sifting through the evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 警方在筛查证据。

meanings.meaning_en: to explain or talk about something in detail
meanings.example: Schmidt continued to expound his views on economics and politics.
meanings.example_cn: 施密特继续阐释他关于经济与政治的观点。

meanings.example: Disclosure: This reporter also lives in New Haven and has heard Chua regale friends with parenting stories.
meanings.example_cn: 揭秘：记者也住在纽海文，曾经听过蔡在餐桌上分享育儿故事。

meanings.example: This is its chance to slake the insecurities built during the isolationist years of the Cultural Revolution.
meanings.example_cn: 这是它消除文革期间那段孤立主义岁月所造成的不安全感的机会。

meanings.meaning_en: to kill large numbers of people or animals of a particular type so that they no longer exist
meanings.example: Staff use the poison to exterminate moles and rabbits.
meanings.example_cn: 员工用毒药来消灭鼹鼠和野兔。

meanings.meaning_en: to check or slightly change an instrument or tool, so that it does something correctly
meanings.example: ...instructions on how to calibrate a thermometer.
meanings.example_cn: …校准温度计的说明。

meanings.meaning_en: if two or more things harmonize, they work well together or look good together
meanings.example: How well all her garments harmonized with each other.
meanings.example_cn: 她所有的衣服彼此配起来是多么地协调。

meanings.meaning_en: to frighten or threaten someone into making them do what you want
meanings.example: Attempts to intimidate her failed.
meanings.example_cn: 恐吓她的企图失败了。

meanings.meaning_en: to have each eye looking in a slightly different direction
meanings.example: He also seems to be slightly blinded by the sun, causing him to squint.
meanings.example_cn: 他似乎也被强烈的太阳光照的有点睁不开眼睛，导致有点斜视的样子。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone blabs about something secret, they tell people about it
meanings.example: Her mistake was to blab about their affair.
meanings.example_cn: 她的错误在于泄露了他们的风流韵事。

meanings.meaning_en: to put new strength or power into something
meanings.example: They hope to revitalize the neighborhood by providing better housing.
meanings.example_cn: 他们希望通过提供更好的住房条件使这个社区恢复活力。

meanings.meaning_en: to change something in order to improve it and make it seem more modern
meanings.example: Many older companies are revamping their image.
meanings.example_cn: 很多老牌公司都在更新公司形象。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something more beautiful by adding decorations to it
meanings.example: The boat was embellished with carvings in red and blue.
meanings.example_cn: 这艘船饰有红、蓝雕刻。

meanings.meaning_cn: 羞辱, 使丢脸, 耻辱
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel ashamed or stupid, especially when other people are present
meanings.example: Her boss humiliated her in front of all her colleagues.
meanings.example_cn: 她的老板在所有同事面前羞辱了她。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone a story or describe a series of events
meanings.example: He then recounted the story of the interview for his first job.
meanings.example_cn: 他然后叙述了有关他第一份工作面试的故事。

meanings.meaning_en: to give information about something to the public, so that they know about it
meanings.example: television’s failure to publicize the unemployment issue
meanings.example_cn: 电视未能报道失业问题

meanings.meaning_en: to damage something or make it not as good as it should be
meanings.example: The illness had impaired his ability to think and concentrate.
meanings.example_cn: 这种疾病损害了他的思维能力和注意力。

meanings.meaning_en: to make you feel tired and weak
meanings.example: The hot sun enervated her to the point of collapse.
meanings.example_cn: 热辣辣的太阳把她晒得快要晕过去了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something weaker or less
meanings.example: an attenuated form of the polio virus
meanings.example_cn: 脊髓灰质炎减毒病毒

meanings.example: According to traditions, the selectmen are required by law to perambulate the bounds every five years.
meanings.example_cn: 根据传统法律要求市镇行政管理委员会成员每隔五年巡视边界一次。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop something from continuing to develop or spread
meanings.example: Her creativity had been squelched.
meanings.example_cn: 她的创造力受到了压制。

meanings.meaning_en: to act with arrogance or tyranny; behave imperiously

meanings.meaning_cn: 呀呀学语, 喋喋不休, 作潺潺声, 泄露(秘密)
meanings.meaning_en: to make a sound like water moving over stones
meanings.example: Momma babbled on and on about how he was ruining me.
meanings.example_cn: 妈妈喋喋不休地数说他在如何毁我。

meanings.meaning_en: to engulf entirely with or as if with water
to cover an area with a large amount of water
meanings.example: The tidal wave inundated vast areas of cropland.
meanings.example_cn: 海啸淹没了大片农田。

meanings.meaning_en: to delay doing something that you ought to do, usually because you do not want to do it
meanings.example: People often procrastinate when it comes to paperwork.
meanings.example_cn: 遇到文书工作，人们常常会拖拖拉拉。

meanings.meaning_en: to lengthen or extend (a speech, etc); prolong in time
meanings.example: Delay always breeds danger; and to protract a great design is often to ruin it.
meanings.example_cn: 推迟经常孕育危险；拖延一个伟大的工程常常意味着毁灭它。

meanings.meaning_en: to criticize or punish someone severely
to crush something into a powder
meanings.example: The seeds can be used whole or pulverized into flour.
meanings.example_cn: 这些籽可以完整使用，或者磨成粉末。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone a false idea about something
meanings.example: Her pleasant manner belied her true character.
meanings.example_cn: 她讨人喜欢的举止掩饰了她真实的个性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 掩饰, 假装, 装糊涂
meanings.meaning_en: to hide your true feelings or intentions, especially by lying
meanings.example: This man was too injured to dissimulate well.
meanings.example_cn: 这个男人伤得太重，不可能掩盖得住。

meanings.meaning_en: to hide your true feelings, thoughts etc
meanings.example: Henry was not slow to dissemble when it served his purposes.
meanings.example_cn: 形势一对他有利，亨利就马上开始隐瞒。

meanings.meaning_en: to pretend to be upset, ill etc to gain sympathy or an advantage
meanings.example: She’s not ill, she’s only shamming.
meanings.example_cn: 她没生病，只是在装病。

meanings.meaning_cn: 侥幸成功, 意外受挫
meanings.example: As recently as a year ago people wondered whether M-PESA’s success was a fluke.
meanings.example_cn: 最近一年来，人们开始产生怀疑，是否M-PESA的成功只是一种侥幸。

meanings.meaning_en: to offer something good to someone, in order to persuade them to do something
meanings.example: A good pay package and a company car were dangled in front of her.
meanings.example_cn: 优厚的薪酬和公司配车摆在她面前。

meanings.meaning_en: to move suddenly and roughly, or to make someone or something move in this way
meanings.example: We jolted along rough wet roads through an endless banana plantation.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿崎岖潮湿的公路颠簸着驶过无边无际的香蕉种植园。

meanings.meaning_cn: 摇晃, 蹒跚, 交错, 摇摇摆摆
meanings.meaning_en: to walk or move unsteadily, almost falling over
meanings.example: He managed to stagger home.
meanings.example_cn: 他好不容易才蹒跚着走回家。

meanings.meaning_cn: 咬, 啃, 啮, 使苦恼, 消耗, 折磨, 侵蚀
meanings.meaning_en: to keep biting something hard
meanings.example: Dexter gnawed his pen thoughtfully.
meanings.example_cn: 德克斯特若有所思地咬着钢笔。

meanings.meaning_cn: 一口气喝干, 大口地喝

meanings.meaning_en: to move, or to make someone or something move
meanings.example: She leaned on the door, but it wouldn’t budge.
meanings.example_cn: 她靠在门上，但是门纹丝不动。

meanings.meaning_en: to explode or to make something explode
meanings.example: France is expected to detonate its first nuclear device in the next few days.
meanings.example_cn: 预计法国将在未来几天内引爆它的第一个核装置。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to do something, especially something wrong or dangerous, by making it seem attractive or exciting
meanings.example: He lured her to his home and shot her with his father's gun.
meanings.example_cn: 他把她诱骗到家里，然后用父亲的枪把她打死。

meanings.meaning_en: to hold someone or something very close to you with your arms around them, especially to show that you love them
meanings.example: Dawn and her boyfriend were cuddling on the sofa.
meanings.example_cn: 唐和她的男朋友在沙发上搂搂抱抱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 拥挤, 卷缩, 草率从事, 挤作一团
meanings.meaning_en: if a group of people huddle together, they stay very close to each other, especially because they are cold or frightened
meanings.example: We lay huddled together for warmth.
meanings.example_cn: 我们紧紧挤在一起取暖。

meanings.meaning_en: if words or emotions gush out, you suddenly express them very strongly
meanings.example: All that pent-up frustration gushed out in a torrent of abuse.
meanings.example_cn: 所有压抑着的失望与不快通过一阵痛骂全都发泄了出来。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something very well, or much better than most people
meanings.example: You have excelled yourself with the new exhibition.
meanings.example_cn: 你新办的这次展览特别成功。

meanings.example: We shouldn't boggle at this opportunity to make a profit.
meanings.example_cn: 对这个赚钱的机会我们不应犹豫。

meanings.meaning_en: to continue to change your opinions, decisions, ideas etc
meanings.example: She vacillates between men twice her age and men younger than she.
meanings.example_cn: 她在两个男人之间摇摆不定，一个年龄比她大一倍，一个比她小。

meanings.meaning_en: If an action or situation redounds to your benefit or advantage, it gives people a good impression of you or brings you something that can improve your situation
meanings.example: The success in the Middle East redounds to his benefit.
meanings.example_cn: 中东地区的该项成就对他有益。

meanings.meaning_en: to catch an animal in a trap
meanings.example: The spider must wait for prey to be ensnared on its web.
meanings.example_cn: 蜘蛛一定要耐心等待，直到猎物被它的蛛网困住。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to do something or go somewhere, usually by offering them something that they want
meanings.example: He tries to counterfeit all the good things God offers you, aiming at our weakness in order to exploit our vulnerabilities and entice us into the darkness.
meanings.example_cn: 他试图假冒所有上帝提供给我们的好事情，针对我们的弱点，以便开发我们的缺点，诱使我们进入黑暗。

meanings.meaning_en: If you inveigle someone into doing something, you cleverly persuade them to do it when they do not really want to
meanings.example: She inveigles Paco into a plot to swindle Tania out of her savings.
meanings.example_cn: 她把帕科诱骗进了一个骗取塔尼娅积蓄的阴谋里。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to have sex with you, especially in a way that is attractive and not too direct
meanings.example: The head lecturer was sacked for seducing female students.
meanings.example_cn: 这个首席讲师因诱奸女学生而被解雇。

meanings.example: Today's events bespeak a bright future.
meanings.example_cn: 今天的事件预示着一个美好的未来。

meanings.meaning_en: to be a sign that something will happen later
meanings.example: The wall through Berlin was finally ruptured, prefiguring the reunification of Germany.
meanings.example_cn: 柏林墙终于倒塌了，预示着德国的重新统一。

meanings.meaning_en: to be a sign that something is going to happen, especially something bad
meanings.example: strange events that portend disaster
meanings.example_cn: 预示着灾难的奇怪事件

meanings.meaning_en: If something bodes ill, it makes you think that something bad will happen in the future. If something bodes well, it makes you think that something good will happen.
meanings.example: She says the way the bill was passed bodes ill for democracy.
meanings.example_cn: 她说议案通过的方式预示民主的恶运。

meanings.meaning_cn: 预示, 预言, 预兆, 预感
meanings.meaning_en: to warn of or indicate (an event, result, etc) in advance
meanings.example: can be, if I forebode aright, no power, short of the Divine mercy, to disclose, whether by uttered words, or by type or emblem, the secrets that may be buried with a human heart.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我的预感不错的话，除去上天的仁慈，没有什么力量，无论是通过讲出来的语言或是任何形式的标志，能够揭示可能埋在一个人心里的秘密。

meanings.meaning_en: to foretell (future events) according to present signs or indications; prophesy
meanings.example: Unfortunately, I am not able to prognosticate how everything will eventually shake out.
meanings.example_cn: 不幸的是，我无法预言每件事的最终结果将会怎样。

meanings.meaning_en: to foretell; prophesy
to praise something very much

meanings.example: In such circumstances, governments must do all they can to create and engender trust among its nation’s constituents and institutions.
meanings.example_cn: 在这种情况下，政府必须尽其所能在它的国家选民和公共机构之间创造和产生信任。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone angrily that they have done something wrong
meanings.example: His mother summoned him, upbraided him, wept and prayed.
meanings.example_cn: 他母亲把他叫来，责骂了他。然后母亲哭着做了祷告。

meanings.meaning_en: to criticize someone for something that they have done
meanings.example: "There's no call for talk like that," Mrs. Evans reproved him.
meanings.example_cn: “没有必要说那种话，”埃文斯太太责备他道。

meanings.meaning_en: to blame or criticize someone in a way that shows you are disappointed at what they have done
meanings.example: She is quick to reproach anyone who doesn't live up to her own high standards.
meanings.example_cn: 她动不动就指责达不到她高标准的人。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially criticize someone for something they have done wrong
meanings.example: He was officially censured for his handling of the situation.
meanings.example_cn: 他因对这个情况处理不当而受到严厉批评。

meanings.meaning_en: to increase the value, amount, effectiveness etc of something
meanings.example: Any surplus was sold to augment their income.
meanings.example_cn: 所有多余的东西被售卖一空来增加他们的收入。

meanings.meaning_en: if something proliferates, it increases quickly and spreads to many different places
meanings.example: Computer courses continue to proliferate.
meanings.example_cn: 计算机课程层出不穷。

meanings.meaning_en: to get money from someone by deceiving them
meanings.example: A businessman swindled investors out of millions of dollars.
meanings.example_cn: 一位商人骗走了投资者数百万美元。

meanings.meaning_en: if you incur a cost, debt, or a fine, you have to pay money because of something you have done
meanings.example: The government had also incurred huge debts.
meanings.example_cn: 政府也已承受了大笔债务。

meanings.meaning_en: if someone or something is irradiated,  x-rays  or  radioactive  beams are passed through them
meanings.example: ...the Chernobyl disaster, which irradiated large parts of Europe.
meanings.example_cn: ...辐射了欧洲大部的切尔诺贝利灾难。

meanings.meaning_en: to go back exactly the way you have come
meanings.example: After a few minutes, he turned around and began to retrace his steps.
meanings.example_cn: 几分钟后，他转身顺着原路返回。

meanings.meaning_cn: 折旧, (使)贬值, 降低, 贬低, 轻视
meanings.meaning_en: to decrease in value or price
meanings.example: New cars depreciate in value quickly.
meanings.example_cn: 新车掉价很快。

meanings.meaning_en: if an electric current oscillates, it changes direction very regularly and very frequently
meanings.example: The associated cross-peak amplitude also appears to oscillate.
meanings.example_cn: 相关的交叉峰的幅度也在振荡。

meanings.meaning_en: to end a situation in which people are behaving violently or protesting, especially by using force
meanings.example: Troops eventually quelled the unrest.
meanings.example_cn: 部队最终镇压了动乱。

meanings.meaning_en: to argue when you are trying to agree about the price of something
meanings.example: Ella showed her the best places to go for a good buy, and taught her how to haggle with used furniture dealers.
meanings.example_cn: 埃拉告诉她买便宜货的最佳去处，还教她怎样与二手家具商讨价还价。

meanings.meaning_en: to argue about something unimportant
meanings.example: Mother is devoted to Dad although they squabble all the time.
meanings.example_cn: 妈妈深爱着爸爸，虽然他们总是为琐事争吵。

meanings.meaning_en: to defeat or control a person or group, especially using force
meanings.example: Police managed to subdue the angry crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 警察设法控制住了愤怒的人群。

meanings.meaning_cn: 征募, 谋取(支持、赞助等), 应募, 赞助, 支持, 征召, 参军
meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to help you to do something

meanings.example: You must envisage realities.
meanings.example_cn: 你必须正视现实。

meanings.meaning_en: to show or prove that something is true
meanings.example: Police records attest to his long history of violence.
meanings.example_cn: 警方记录证明他有长期的暴力史。

meanings.meaning_cn: 证明, 证实, 作证
meanings.meaning_en: to make a formal statement of what is true, especially in a court of law
meanings.example: Mr Molto has agreed to testify at the trial.
meanings.example_cn: 莫尔托先生已经同意出庭作证。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay out money, especially from a large sum that is available for a special purpose
meanings.example: The aid will not be disbursed until next year.
meanings.example_cn: 援助款项到明年才能拨出。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to hide the truth by not answering questions directly
meanings.example: ‘I’m not sure,’ he prevaricated.
meanings.example_cn: “我不肯定。”他支支吾吾道。

meanings.example: If SNS wants to press the meaning of its metaphrase " social network serves " for, the history should be quite long.
meanings.example_cn: SNS假如要按它直译的意思“社会网络服务”来说，历史应该相当悠久。

meanings.meaning_en: to kill someone by putting something over their face to stop them breathing
meanings.example: A teenage mother was accused of smothering her 3-month-old daughter.
meanings.example_cn: 一个少女妈妈被指控闷死自己三个月大的女儿。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately say things that are untrue or unpleasant
to stop doing something
meanings.example: We hope that the military regime will desist from its acts of violence.
meanings.example_cn: 我们希望军人政权停止暴力行为。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重步行走, 踏, 践, 践踏
meanings.meaning_en: If you tramp somewhere, you walk there slowly and with regular, heavy steps, for a long time
meanings.example: They put on their coats and tramped through the falling snow.
meanings.example_cn: 他们穿上大衣，在落雪中脚步沉重地缓缓走着。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重读, 强调, 着重强调
meanings.example: The photograph seemed to accentuate his large nose.
meanings.example_cn: 照片似乎突出了他的大鼻子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重述要点, 概括, 摘要
meanings.meaning_en: to repeat the main points of something that has just been said
meanings.example: Let's just recapitulate the essential points.
meanings.example_cn: 让我们只概述一下基本要点吧。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone have a particular feeling, thought etc again
meanings.example: The trial has rekindled painful memories of the war.
meanings.example_cn: 这场审判又唤起了人们对战争的痛苦回忆。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重整旗鼓, 给予新力量, (使)恢复健康, 力量, 决心, 集结
meanings.meaning_en: to become stronger again after a period of weakness or defeat
meanings.example: After a shaky start, he rallied and won the title in style.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然开局不顺，但他振作精神，最后漂亮地赢得了冠军。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in charge of a formal event, organization, ceremony etc
meanings.example: I shall be pleased to preside at your meetings.
meanings.example_cn: 我很高兴主持你们的会议。

meanings.meaning_cn: 主管, 指挥, 管理, 监督
meanings.meaning_en: to be in charge of something, and control how it is done
meanings.example: Meese was to superintend the administration's entire domestic policy.
meanings.example_cn: 米斯要监管政府的所有国内政策。

meanings.meaning_en: to add short notes to a book or piece of writing to explain parts of it
meanings.example: an annotated edition of ‘Othello’
meanings.example_cn: 《奥赛罗》的注释本

meanings.meaning_en: to write down something exactly as it was said
meanings.example: A secretary transcribed the witnesses’ statements.
meanings.example_cn: 一名书记员记录下证人的陈述。

meanings.meaning_en: to look away from something so that you do not see it
meanings.example: Henry averted his eyes as she undressed.
meanings.example_cn: 她脱衣服的时候，亨利把目光转向别处。

meanings.meaning_cn: 转移, 归入, 提交

meanings.meaning_en: to add something to food in order to decorate it
meanings.example: She had finished the vegetables and was garnishing the roast.
meanings.example_cn: 她已经做好了蔬菜，正给烤肉配饰菜。

meanings.meaning_en: to decorate something
meanings.example: His watercolour designs adorn a wide range of books.
meanings.example_cn: 他的水彩设计装饰着各种各样的书籍。

meanings.meaning_en: to describe, praise, or display (one's success, possessions, etc) boastfully
meanings.example: And the LORD said unto Gideon, The people that are with thee are too many for me to give the Midianites into their hands, lest Israel vaunt themselves against me, saying, Mine own hand hath saved me.
meanings.example_cn: 耶和华对基甸说，跟随你的人过多，我不能将米甸人交在他们手中，免得以色列人向我夸大，说，是我们自己的手救了我们。

meanings.example: And, this Valentines Day, pamper yourself.
meanings.example_cn: 最后，这个情人节，纵容一下自己。

meanings.meaning_en: to regularly pay money to live in a house or room that belongs to someone else, or to use something that belongs to someone else
meanings.example: Most students rent rooms in their second year.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数学生到二年级时租房居住。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it difficult for you to do something or for something to happen
meanings.example: He died in 1874, heavily encumbered by debt.
meanings.example_cn: 他于1874年去世，负债累累。

meanings.meaning_en: to obstruct or hinder
If an armed force interdicts something or someone, they stop them and prevent them from moving. If they interdict a route, they block it or cut it off.
meanings.example: Troops could be ferried in to interdict drug shipments.
meanings.example_cn: 军队可以被渡运来阻断毒品运输。

meanings.meaning_cn: 阻隔, 阻塞, 遮断(道路、通道等)
meanings.meaning_en: to block a road, passage etc
meanings.example: A small aircraft was obstructing the runway.
meanings.example_cn: 一架小型飞机堵住了跑道。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it difficult for someone or something to move forward or make progress
meanings.example: Storms at sea impeded our progress.
meanings.example_cn: 海上风暴阻碍了我们的航程。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop someone from doing something, by making them realize it will be difficult or have bad results
meanings.example: The company’s financial difficulties have deterred potential investors.
meanings.example_cn: 该公司的财务困境令潜在的投资者望而却步。

meanings.example: He had a considerable Elizabethan library to delve in.
meanings.example_cn: 他拥有相当多的伊丽莎白时期的藏书供其钻研。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially judge how an argument between two opposing sides should be settled

meanings.meaning_cn: 做姿势表达, 用手势谈话
meanings.meaning_en: to make movements with your arms and hands, usually while speaking, because you are excited, angry, or cannot think of the right words to use
meanings.example: Jane gesticulated wildly and shouted ‘Stop! Stop!’
meanings.example_cn: 简拼命打着手势，喊着“停下！停下！”

meanings.example: Through faith he kept the passover, and the sprinkling of blood, lest he that destroyed the firstborn should touch them.
meanings.example_cn: 他因着信，就守逾越节，（守或作立）行洒血的礼，免得那灭长子的临近以色列人。

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh loudly
meanings.example: We guffawed at what Graham had written.
meanings.example_cn: 我们对格雷厄姆写的东西狂笑不已。

meanings.meaning_en: if a price, value, or condition of something nosedives, it suddenly goes down or gets much worse
meanings.example: Sales have nosedived since January.
meanings.example_cn: 自1月份以来销售额骤降。

meanings.meaning_cn: (道路等)分叉, (意见等)分歧, 脱离
meanings.meaning_en: if opinions, interests etc diverge, they are different from each other
meanings.example: His interests increasingly diverged from those of his colleagues.
meanings.example_cn: 他和同事们的兴趣越来越不同。

meanings.meaning_en: if a particular period of time elapses, it passes
meanings.example: Several months elapsed before his case was brought to trial.
meanings.example_cn: 过了几个月他的案子才开审。

meanings.meaning_cn: (在灯下)用功, 深入研究, 专心著作
meanings.meaning_en: to write or study, esp at night

meanings.meaning_cn: (在水中)挣扎, 困难地往前走, 踌躇, 发慌
meanings.meaning_en: to have a lot of problems and be likely to fail completely
meanings.example: More and more firms are floundering because of the recession.
meanings.example_cn: 由于经济衰退，越来越多的公司举步维艰。

meanings.meaning_cn: (逐步或暗中)侵占, 蚕食, 超出通常(或正常)界线
meanings.meaning_en: to gradually take more of someone’s time, possessions, rights etc than you should
meanings.example: The new institutions do not encroach on political power.
meanings.example_cn: 这些新机构没有侵犯到政治权力。

meanings.example: Left untreated, the abscesses suppurate ; the pus cannot escape from the body, and the malady spreads throughout the organism.
meanings.example_cn: 将其置之脑后，而脓肿仍在化脓，其浓液不可能不侵入身体，这种疼痛（）布了整个有机体。

meanings.meaning_cn: <美口>夸张地作为, 表现感情
meanings.meaning_en: to clearly show emotion, especially when you are acting
meanings.example: Siskind encourages the children to emote to the music as they dance.
meanings.example_cn: 西斯金德鼓励孩子们跳舞时要根据音乐表现出情感。

meanings.meaning_cn: 暗指, 影射, 间接提到
meanings.meaning_en: If you allude to something, you mention it in an indirect way
meanings.example: With friends, she sometimes alluded to a feeling that she herself was to blame for her son's predicament.
meanings.example_cn: 和朋友们一起时，她有时暗示她感到儿子的困境要怪她自己。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk through water that is not deep

meanings.meaning_cn: 备办食物, 满足(需要), 投合
meanings.example: We cater to an exclusive clientele.
meanings.example_cn: 我们满足一个特殊客户群的需求。

meanings.meaning_en: to change what you are doing so that you are not following an expected plan, idea, or type of behaviour
meanings.example: They stopped you as soon as you deviated from the script.
meanings.example_cn: 你一偏离剧本，他们就会叫停。

meanings.meaning_en: to become hard, or make something hard, by adding  lime

meanings.meaning_cn: 变动, 波动, 涨落, 上下, 动摇
meanings.meaning_en: if a price or amount fluctuates, it keeps changing and becoming higher and lower
meanings.example: Insect populations fluctuate wildly from year to year.
meanings.example_cn: 昆虫的数量每年变化很大。

meanings.meaning_en: to change your attitude and become less strict or cruel towards someone
meanings.example: At last her father relented and came to visit her.
meanings.example_cn: 最后她父亲的态度软化，去看了她。

meanings.meaning_cn: 变小, 亏缺, 衰落, 退潮, 消逝, 呈下弦
meanings.meaning_en: if something such as power, influence, or a feeling wanes, it becomes gradually less strong or less important
meanings.example: My enthusiasm for the project was waning.
meanings.example_cn: 我对这个项目的热情逐渐减退了。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for something that you want very much, in a sincere and emotional way
meanings.example: ‘Don’t go!’ Robert pleaded.
meanings.example_cn: “别走！”罗伯特央求道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 搏动, 跳动, 有规律的跳动
meanings.meaning_en: to make sounds or movements that are strong and regular like a heart beating
meanings.example: I could see the veins in his neck pulsating.
meanings.example_cn: 我看到他颈部的血管在跳动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不付赌金而溜掉, 逃避履行义务, 食言
meanings.meaning_en: If someone welshes on a deal or an agreement, they do not do the things they promised to do as part of that deal or agreement
meanings.example: He welshed on his agreement with the team that he would play for them in February.
meanings.example_cn: 他逃避履行他与球队合同中在二月为他们踢球的协议。

meanings.meaning_en: to slide somewhere over a surface, twisting or moving from side to side
meanings.example: A snake slithered across the grass.
meanings.example_cn: 一条蛇蜿蜒爬过草丛。

meanings.meaning_cn: 缠结, 混乱, 吠, 咆哮, 怒骂
meanings.meaning_en: if an animal snarls, it makes a low angry sound and shows its teeth
meanings.example: ‘Shut up,’ he snarled.
meanings.example_cn: “住口。”他怒吼道。

meanings.meaning_en: to move away from the enemy after being defeated in battle
meanings.example: The rebels retreated to the mountains.
meanings.example_cn: 叛乱分子撤退到山区。

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh quietly in a way that is not nice at something which is not supposed to be funny
meanings.example: Suddenly, three schoolkids sitting near me started sniggering.
meanings.example_cn: 突然，坐在我身边的3个学童偷偷地笑了起来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 串通, 勾结, 共谋
meanings.meaning_en: to work with someone secretly, especially in order to do something dishonest or illegal
meanings.example: Several local officials are in jail on charges of colluding with the Mafia.
meanings.example_cn: 几位地方官员因涉嫌串通黑手党而锒铛入狱。

meanings.meaning_en: to come into a place or situation, and have an unwanted effect
meanings.example: The press has been blamed for intruding into people's personal lives in an unacceptable way.
meanings.example_cn: 新闻媒体因以一种令人无法接受的方式侵入人们的私生活而受到谴责。

meanings.meaning_en: if an animal or person wallows, it rolls around in mud, water etc for pleasure or to keep cool
meanings.example: hippos wallowing in the mud
meanings.example_cn: 在泥浆中打滚的河马

meanings.meaning_cn: 盗用公款, 挪用公款, 贪污
meanings.meaning_en: to misuse or misappropriate property or funds entrusted to one

meanings.meaning_cn: 斗嘴, 流动, 闪动
meanings.meaning_en: When people bicker, they argue or quarrel about unimportant things
meanings.example: I went into medicine to care for patients, not to waste time bickering over budgets.
meanings.example_cn: 我从医是为了治病救人，不是为了预算争吵而浪费时间。

meanings.meaning_cn: 对酌, 共饮, (亲切)交谈
meanings.meaning_en: to spend time talking to people who are in a higher social position than you
meanings.example: This gave Bill an opportunity to hobnob with the company's president, board chairman, and leading executives.
meanings.example_cn: 这给了比尔一个与该公司总裁、董事长及主管经理厮混的机会。

meanings.meaning_cn: 多, 大量存在, 富于, 充满
meanings.meaning_en: to exist in very large numbers
meanings.example: Rumours abound as to the reasons for his resignation.
meanings.example_cn: 有关他辞职的原因有各种各样的谣传。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发出尖而高的声音, 吱吱叫鸣
发芽, 抽芽, 充满, 成长, 发展, 产生
meanings.meaning_en: (of animals, etc) to breed rapidly or abundantly; teem; swarm

meanings.meaning_cn: 干涉, 干预, 插入, 介入, (指时间)介于其间
meanings.meaning_en: to become involved in an argument, fight, or other difficult situation in order to change what happens
meanings.example: The army will have to intervene to prevent further fighting.
meanings.example_cn: 军队将不得不干预以阻止进一步的战斗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 干预, 玩弄, 贿赂, 损害, 削弱, 篡改
meanings.meaning_en: If someone tampers with something, they interfere with it or try to change it when they have no right to do so
meanings.example: I don't want to be accused of tampering with the evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 我不想被指控篡改证据。

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh because you are amused or pleased about something
meanings.example: Harry chortled with delight.
meanings.example_cn: 哈里高兴地哈哈大笑。

meanings.meaning_en: to happen after or as a result of something
meanings.example: If the Europeans did not reduce subsidies, a trade war would ensue.
meanings.example_cn: 如果欧洲不减少补贴，贸易战将随即爆发。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in or move into a position where your body is resting on your knees
meanings.example: Tom knelt down and patted the dog.
meanings.example_cn: 汤姆跪下来轻轻拍了拍那只狗。

meanings.meaning_en: to abound abnormally; be in surplus

meanings.meaning_cn: 毁灭, 死亡, 腐烂, 枯萎
meanings.meaning_en: to die, especially in a terrible or sudden way
meanings.example: Hundreds perished when the ship went down.
meanings.example_cn: 轮船沉没，数百人罹难。

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone dotes on a person or a thing, you mean that they love or care about them very much and ignore any faults they may have
meanings.example: He dotes on his nine-year-old son.
meanings.example_cn: 他对自己9岁的儿子十分溺爱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 混时间, 闲荡, 涂鸦
meanings.meaning_en: When someone doodles, they draw doodles
meanings.example: He looked across at Jackson, doodling on his notebook.
meanings.example_cn: 他一边看着对面的杰克逊，一边在笔记本上信手涂鸦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 急促而不清楚地说话, 七嘴八嘴地说, 喋喋不休地说
meanings.meaning_en: to say something so quickly that people cannot hear you clearly or understand you properly
meanings.example: Just calm down, stop gabbling, and tell me what has happened.
meanings.example_cn: 冷静一下，说话别太急，告诉我发生了什么事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 急赶, 急跑, 急转, 以轻快而交替的步子走动
meanings.meaning_en: to move quickly with short steps, especially because you are in a hurry
meanings.example: People were scurrying off to work.
meanings.example_cn: 人们急匆匆赶着去上班。

meanings.example: Above all, everyone must abide by the law.
meanings.example_cn: 首要的是，每个人都必须遵守法律。

meanings.meaning_en: If you are convalescing, you are resting and getting your health back after an illness or operation
meanings.example: After two weeks, I was allowed home, where I convalesced for three months.
meanings.example_cn: 2星期后，我经允许回家静养，在家康复了3个月。

meanings.meaning_en: to change something so that its parts become similar or the same
