meanings.example: plans to homogenize the various school systems
meanings.example_cn: 统一各类不同学制的计划

meanings.meaning_en: to watch people who are taking an examination and make sure that they do not cheat
meanings.example: Different is, the exam in the life often does not have person invigilate.
meanings.example_cn: 不同的是，生活中的考试常常是没有人监考的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 渴望, 想念, 怀念, 向往
meanings.meaning_en: to have a strong desire for something, especially something that is difficult or impossible to get
meanings.example: He yearned for freedom.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾渴望自由。

meanings.meaning_en: If you hanker after something, you want it very much
meanings.example: I hankered after a floor-length brown suede coat.
meanings.example_cn: 我渴望一件垂地长度的棕色麂皮大衣。

meanings.meaning_cn: 狂热地描述, 写狂想文, 作狂想曲
meanings.example: The critics rhapsodized over her performance in "Autumn Sonata."
meanings.example_cn: 评论家对于她在《秋日奏鸣曲》中的表演大加赞赏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 溃烂, 发炎, 怨恨
扩大, 详述, 膨胀
meanings.meaning_en: if a hollow part of your body dilates or if something dilates it, it becomes wider
meanings.example: dilated pupils
meanings.example_cn: 扩大的瞳孔

meanings.meaning_cn: 流行, 盛行, 获胜, 成功
meanings.meaning_en: if a belief, custom, situation etc prevails, it exists among a group of people at a certain time
meanings.example: Justice will prevail.
meanings.example_cn: 正义终将获胜。

meanings.meaning_en: to let  saliva (= the liquid in your mouth )  come out of your mouth
meanings.example: The dog was drooling at the mouth.
meanings.example_cn: 那狗嘴上流着口水。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乱窜, 猛冲, (车等)颠簸, 沸腾作用
meanings.meaning_en: to hit someone or something very hard, especially with your hand
if a bird or insect alights on something, it stops flying and stands on it
meanings.example: A thrush alighted on a branch of the pine tree.
meanings.example_cn: 一只画眉落在这棵松树的一根树枝上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 秘密而匆忙地移居, 撤营, 逃走, 逃亡
meanings.meaning_en: If you decamp, you go away from somewhere secretly or suddenly
meanings.example: The company is decamping to Asia with 1,700 jobs.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司带着1,700份工作正逃往亚洲。

meanings.meaning_en: to do what someone else wants, or allow something to happen, even though you do not really agree with it
meanings.example: Steve seemed to acquiesce in the decision.
meanings.example_cn: 斯蒂夫看样子默许了这个决定。

meanings.meaning_cn: 默许, 纵容, 暗中合作, 密谋策划
meanings.meaning_en: to not try to stop something wrong from happening
meanings.example: They connived with their mother to deceive me.
meanings.example_cn: 他们与他们的母亲串通来骗我。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a long and difficult journey, especially on foot
meanings.example: ...trekking through the jungles.
meanings.example_cn: …徒步穿越丛林。

meanings.meaning_cn: 趴, 匍匐, 卑躬屈膝, 五体投地的
meanings.meaning_en: to move along the ground on your hands and knees
meanings.example: I saw him grovelling in the road for his hat.
meanings.example_cn: 我看到他趴在路上找帽子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 蹒跚, 踉跄, 动摇, 摇摇欲坠
meanings.meaning_en: to walk or move unsteadily from side to side as if you are going to fall over
meanings.example: Lorrimer swayed a little, tottered, and fell.
meanings.example_cn: 洛里默身体微微摇晃，蹒跚几步后跌倒在地。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit something or someone that is moving in a different direction from you
meanings.example: A car and a van collided on the motorway.
meanings.example_cn: 一辆汽车和一辆小型货车在高速公路上相撞了。

meanings.example: Doubt and animadvert are inner motive force of innovation of science and culture.
meanings.example_cn: 怀疑和批判是促进科学与文化不断创新的内推力。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something in a way that shows you think it is below your social or professional position – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: When he condescended to speak, he contradicted himself three or four times in the space of half an hour.
meanings.example_cn: 当他屈尊讲话时，半小时内有三四次前后矛盾。

meanings.meaning_en: to escape from a place where you are being kept
meanings.example: He was ordered to appear the following day, but absconded.
meanings.example_cn: 他被传唤于第二天出庭，却逃跑了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 憔悴, 凋萎, 衰退, 苦思

meanings.meaning_en: to listen
meanings.example: Give ye ear, and hear my voice; hearken, and hear my speech.
meanings.example_cn: 你们当侧耳听我的声音，留心听我的言语。

meanings.meaning_cn: 求助, 诉诸, 采取(某种手段等), 常去
meanings.meaning_en: If you resort to a course of action that you do not really approve of, you adopt it because you cannot see any other way of achieving what you want
meanings.example: His punishing work schedule had made him resort to drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 他那累人的工作日程已经使他不得不求助于毒品了。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop opposing someone or something that is stronger than you, and allow them to take control
meanings.example: Don't succumb to the temptation to have just one cigarette.
meanings.example_cn: 不要屈服于只抽一支烟的诱惑。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that you think you are really too important to do – often used humorously
meanings.example: Travis called after her, but she didn’t deign to answer.
meanings.example_cn: 特拉维斯在后面叫她，但她不肯屈尊应一声。

meanings.meaning_en: to move or develop in a particular direction
meanings.example: People tend to need less sleep as they get older.
meanings.example_cn: 随着年龄的增长，人需要的睡眠通常会减少。

meanings.meaning_en: to lower your body close to the ground by bending your knees completely
meanings.example: He crouched in the shadows near the doorway.
meanings.example_cn: 他蹲在门道近旁的阴暗处。

meanings.example: I expostulate with her on the impropriety.
meanings.example_cn: 因行为不当我向她提出告诫。

meanings.meaning_cn: 撒尿, 鬼混, 游荡
meanings.meaning_en: to  urinate

meanings.meaning_cn: 散发, 发出, 发源
meanings.meaning_en: If a quality emanates from you, or if you emanate a quality, you give people a strong sense that you have that quality
meanings.example: Intelligence and cunning emanated from him.
meanings.example_cn: 聪明和机灵从他身上散发出来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 晒太阳(享受温暖), 感到温暖, 愉快或舒适
meanings.meaning_en: to enjoy sitting or lying in the heat of the sun or a fire
meanings.example: All through the hot, still days of their holiday Amy basked in the sun.
meanings.example_cn: 在整个炎热、寂静的假期里埃米都在晒太阳。

meanings.meaning_cn: 闪身, 急转, 逃走
meanings.example: He jinked left, then right, throwing the plane into sudden turns.
meanings.example_cn: 他突然向左，然后向右，使飞机猛地旋转起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to emit flashes of light; sparkle
meanings.example: What kind of mood can let person mind coruscate?
meanings.example_cn: 什么样心情可以让人精神焕发?。

meanings.meaning_cn: 慎重的打球, 妨碍, 阻碍

meanings.meaning_en: If someone reneges on a promise or an agreement, they do not do what they have promised or agreed to do
meanings.example: He reneged on a promise to leave his wife.
meanings.example_cn: 他背弃了诺言，离开了他的妻子。

meanings.meaning_en: to move into a comfortable position, pressing your head or body against someone or against something soft
meanings.example: Sarah lay there peacefully, the child nestling by her side.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉安静地躺在那儿，孩子偎依在她身边。

meanings.meaning_cn: 顺从, 答应, 遵守
meanings.meaning_en: to do what you have to do or are asked to do
meanings.example: The newspaper was asked by federal agents for assistance and agreed to comply.
meanings.example_cn: 联邦探员要求这家报社给予协助，报社同意配合。

meanings.meaning_cn: 说孩子气的话, 说半截话, 闲聊, 胡说, 唠叨
meanings.example: Lou prattled on about various trivialities till I wanted to scream.
meanings.example_cn: 卢就各种琐碎小事唠叨个没完，一直到我烦得都想尖叫了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 说模棱两可的话, 支吾
meanings.meaning_en: to avoid giving a clear or direct answer to a question
meanings.example: He is equivocating a lot about what is going to happen if and when there are elections.
meanings.example_cn: 他含含糊糊地说着很多如果进行选举会发生的状况。

meanings.meaning_cn: 私奔, 潜逃, 出走
meanings.meaning_en: to leave your home secretly in order to get married
meanings.example: My parents didn’t approve of the marriage, so we eloped.
meanings.example_cn: 我父母不赞成这桩婚事，所以我们就私奔了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 渴望, 漠然, 熄灭
meanings.meaning_en: to stop living and become dead
meanings.example: He died in 1985 at the age of 76.
meanings.example_cn: 他1985年去世，终年76岁。

meanings.meaning_cn: 探听, 调查, 偷窃
meanings.meaning_en: If someone snoops around a place, they secretly look around it in order to find out things
meanings.example: Ricardo was the one she'd seen snooping around Kim's hotel room.
meanings.example_cn: 里卡多就是她曾见过的在金的旅馆房间里到处窥探的那个人。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately avoid doing something you should do, because you are lazy
meanings.example: He was fired for shirking.
meanings.example_cn: 他因偷懒被解雇了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 提出异议, 反对, 抗辩, 犹豫
meanings.meaning_en: to express doubt about or opposition to a plan or suggestion
meanings.example: They demurred politely, but finally agreed to stay.
meanings.example_cn: 他们礼貌地推却，但最后还是同意留下。

meanings.meaning_en: to make unnecessary complaints about someone or something
a word meaning to have sex with someone who you are not married to - used to show strong disapproval
meanings.example: One of the soldiers chance upon a girl from a mysterious tribe, that is cursed such that its members who fornicate with outsiders will, together with them, transform into wolves.
meanings.example_cn: 一个士兵偶然发现了一个来自神奇部落的女孩，这个部落遭到诅咒，如果它的成员和其他部落人私通，和他们在一起，就会变成狼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 统治, 支配, 盛行, 占优势
meanings.meaning_en: if a feeling or quality reigns, it exists strongly for a period of time
meanings.example: For several minutes confusion reigned .
meanings.example_cn: 有好几分钟场面大乱。

meanings.example: You, meanwhile, will be skulking in the safety of the car.
meanings.example_cn: 与此同时，你会安全地藏在汽车里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 推测, 思索, 做投机买卖
meanings.meaning_en: to guess about the possible causes or effects of something, without knowing all the facts or details
meanings.example: She refused to speculate.
meanings.example_cn: 她拒绝猜测。

meanings.meaning_cn: 推托, 背叛, 自相矛盾
meanings.meaning_en: to change sides or loyalties; apostatize

meanings.meaning_cn: 为琐事费心, 拘泥小节
畏缩, 阿谀, 奉承
meanings.meaning_en: to move away from someone or something because you are afraid
meanings.example: A stray dog was cringing by the door.
meanings.example_cn: 一条流浪狗畏缩在门旁。

meanings.meaning_en: to shy away, as in fear; quail
meanings.example: The conflict among the interest groups is a political puzzle unable to blench for all the societies of all ages.
meanings.example_cn: 利益集团之间的冲突是古往今来所有社会都无法回避的政治难题。

meanings.meaning_en: to bend low and move back because you are frightened
meanings.example: The hostages cowered in their seats.
meanings.example_cn: 这些人质蜷缩在其座位上。

meanings.meaning_cn: 畏缩, 退缩, 畏首畏尾
meanings.meaning_en: to move your face or body away from someone or something because you are in pain, frightened, or upset
meanings.example: Leo stared back at him without flinching.
meanings.example_cn: 利奥毫不畏缩地回瞪着他。

meanings.meaning_en: to make low crying sounds, or to speak in this way
meanings.example: He heard the dog whimper.
meanings.example_cn: 他听到狗在呜咽。

meanings.meaning_cn: 下来, 下降, 遗传(指财产,气质,权利), 突击, 出其不意的拜访
meanings.meaning_en: to move from a higher level to a lower one
meanings.example: Our plane started to descend.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的飞机开始下降。

meanings.example: Keeping things short and sweet not only shows people that you are concise and don't waffle, but that you also know what you want.
meanings.example_cn: 亲切简洁的语言彰显了你简明的个性，不仅不会被误认为是在胡扯，还让对方知道你是一个了解自己想要什么的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 显现, 浮现, 暴露, 形成, (由某种状态)脱出, (事实)显现出来
meanings.meaning_en: to appear or come out from somewhere
meanings.example: The flowers emerge in the spring.
meanings.example_cn: 花儿在春天开放。

meanings.meaning_en: to explode inwards
meanings.example: The windows on both sides of the room had imploded.
meanings.example_cn: 房间两边的窗户都向内爆碎了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 性交, 交配, 交尾
meanings.meaning_en: to have sex
meanings.example: During the time she is paired to a male, the female allows no other males to copulate with her.
meanings.example_cn: 雌性与一雄性配对时，雌性不允许其他雄性与其交配。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn around fast in circles
meanings.example: The dancers gyrated wildly to the beat of the music.
meanings.example_cn: 舞蹈员随着音乐的节奏疯狂地旋转起舞。

meanings.meaning_en: if two people’s ideas, opinions etc coincide, they are the same
meanings.example: The interests of the US and those of the islanders may not coincide.
meanings.example_cn: 美国的利益和这些岛民的利益可能并不一致。

meanings.meaning_cn: 以重量胜过, 占优势, 超过, 胜过
meanings.meaning_en: to be more important or frequent than something else

meanings.example: Water overbrim med the vessel.
meanings.example_cn: 水从容器中溢出来了。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave your own country in order to live in another country
meanings.example: He emigrated to Belgium.
meanings.example_cn: 他移民去了比利时。

meanings.meaning_cn: 有条件投降, 认输, 屈服, 让步, 停止抵抗
meanings.meaning_en: to accept or agree to something that you have been opposing for a long time
meanings.example: Helen finally capitulated and let her son have a car.
meanings.example_cn: 海伦最终让步，同意让儿子买一辆车。

meanings.example: What is your brand of charismatic smolder?
meanings.example_cn: 你的超凡魅力闷烧是什么牌子？

meanings.meaning_cn: 粘附, 胶着, 坚持
meanings.meaning_en: to stick firmly to something
meanings.example: But this means they cannot always adhere to the strict codes of practice dictated in UN headquarters.
meanings.example_cn: 但是这就意味着它们无法总是坚持联合国总部规定的严格的实践规章。

meanings.meaning_cn: 争论, 争吵, 口角
meanings.meaning_en: to argue with someone angrily for a long time
meanings.example: The two sides have spent most of their time wrangling over procedural problems.
meanings.example_cn: 双方花了大部分的时间争论程序上的一些问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: 正式脱离或退出, 分离
meanings.meaning_en: if a country or state secedes from another country, it officially stops being part of it and becomes independent
meanings.example: Singapore seceded from the Federation of Malaysia and became an independent sovereign state.
meanings.example_cn: 新加坡脱离马来西亚联邦成为一个独立的主权国家。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a law about something
meanings.example: Most member countries have already legislated against excessive overtime.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分成员国已经立法禁止过度加班。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent someone from breathing normally, usually so that they die, or stop breathing
meanings.example: Three people were asphyxiated in the crush for last week's train.
meanings.example_cn: 三个人为了赶上周的火车窒息在人群中。

meanings.meaning_cn: 逐步升高, 逐步增强
meanings.meaning_en: to become higher or increase, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The costs were escalating alarmingly.
meanings.example_cn: 成本在以惊人的速度增长。

meanings.meaning_en: to change direction
meanings.example: The plane veered off course.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机偏离了航线。

meanings.meaning_en: to avoid work by pretending to be ill
meanings.example: He accused Frank of malingering.
meanings.example_cn: 他指责弗兰克装病逃避工作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 追逐女人, 玩弄女性, 调情
meanings.meaning_en: (of a man) to flirt with women

meanings.example: Interest will accrue until payment is made.
meanings.example_cn: 利息将会累计增加，直至付清款项。

meanings.meaning_en: to be enough
meanings.example: A light lunch will suffice .
meanings.example_cn: 简单的午餐就够了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 作呕, 产生恶感, 厌恶
meanings.meaning_en: If something nauseates you, it makes you feel as if you are going to vomit
meanings.example: The smell of frying nauseated her.
meanings.example_cn: 油炸味道让她恶心。

meanings.meaning_cn: 坐立不安, 烦躁, 慌张, (不安地或心不在焉地)弄, 玩弄
meanings.meaning_en: to keep moving your hands or feet, especially because you are bored or nervous
meanings.example: The kids had started to fidget.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们开始坐立不安起来。

meanings.meaning_cn: （不以人作主语的）使容易, 使便利, 推动, 帮助, 使容易, 促进
meanings.meaning_en: To facilitate an action or process, especially one that you would like to happen, means to make it easier or more likely to happen
meanings.example: The new airport will facilitate the development of tourism.
meanings.example_cn: 新机场将促进旅游业的发展。

meanings.meaning_cn: (常用被动语态)使挨饿, <古>使饿死
meanings.meaning_en: to be or make very hungry or weak

meanings.meaning_cn: （除医学外现罕用的）刺, 刺痛, 撕裂
(古希腊)贝壳放逐法, 放逐, 排斥
meanings.meaning_en: If someone is ostracized, people deliberately behave in an unfriendly way toward them and do not allow them to take part in any of their social activities
meanings.example: She claims she's being ostracized by some members of her local community.
meanings.example_cn: 她声称遭到自己所在社区的一些成员排斥。

meanings.meaning_cn: (鸟)用嘴整理, 打扮, 赞扬
meanings.meaning_en: if a bird preens or preens itself, it cleans itself and makes its feathers smooth using its beak
meanings.example: 50% of men under 35 spend at least 20 minutes preening themselves every morning in the bathroom.
meanings.example_cn: 50%的35岁以下男性每天早上至少花20分钟在盥洗室精心打扮。

meanings.meaning_en: to form or be formed in layers or strata
meanings.example: We currently use a large repository of data from our operational systems to help us stratify, or classify, members.
meanings.example_cn: 目前，我们使用我们业务系统的一个大型数据存储库来帮助我们对会员进行分层或分类。

meanings.meaning_en: to break up, or make something break up, into very small pieces
meanings.example: The plane just disintegrated in mid-air.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机就在半空中解体了。

meanings.meaning_en: If you twirl something or if it twirls, it turns around and around with a smooth, fast movement
meanings.example: Bonnie twirled her empty glass in her fingers.
meanings.example_cn: 邦妮用手指转动着她的空杯子。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove the liquid from a substance such as food or a chemical
meanings.example: The substance is dehydrated and stored as powder.
meanings.example_cn: 该物质经脱水处理后以粉末形式储存。

meanings.meaning_cn: (书面语) 招致, 产生, 引起
meanings.meaning_en: to cause something or make it happen
meanings.example: Hunger begets crime.
meanings.example_cn: 饥饿滋生犯罪。

meanings.meaning_cn: (为乐器)调音, 使合调, 使相合
meanings.meaning_en: to adjust or accustom (a person or thing); acclimatize

meanings.meaning_cn: (尤指动物)吞吃, 狼吞虎咽, 挥霍, (火灾等)毁灭, 破坏, 吞没, 贪看, 贪听
meanings.meaning_en: to eat something quickly because you are very hungry
meanings.example: The boys devoured their pancakes.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩子们狼吞虎咽地把薄煎饼吃了。

meanings.meaning_cn: [古]诅咒(主要用于温和的诅咒), 该死!
meanings.meaning_en: to wish evil on; curse (used in mild oaths such as beshrew me)
to use the energy that comes from sexual feelings to do something, such as work or art, that is more acceptable to your society
meanings.example: He could try to sublimate the problem by writing, in detail, about it.
meanings.example_cn: 他可以通过详细记述而尝试使人们正视该问题。

meanings.meaning_cn: [律] 逐出法庭, 剥夺律师资格
meanings.meaning_en: to make a lawyer leave the legal profession
meanings.example: Roy learns that his political opponents plan to disbar him for an ethical lapse, but he vows to remain a lawyer until he dies.
meanings.example_cn: 罗伊了解到他的政治对手他计划夺取律师资格的伦理失效，但他发誓要留一名律师，直到他去世。

meanings.meaning_cn: [律]控告, 检举, <主美>弹劾, 怀疑
meanings.meaning_en: if a government official is impeached, they are formally charged with a serious crime in a special government court
meanings.example: The governor was impeached for using state funds improperly.
meanings.example_cn: 州长因违规使用州政府资金而受到弹劾。

meanings.meaning_cn: [律]使有效, 使生效, 确认, 证实, 验证
meanings.meaning_en: to prove that something is true or correct, or to make a document or agreement officially and legally acceptable
meanings.example: The Supreme Court has validated the lower court’s interpretation of the law.
meanings.example_cn: 最高法院已经认可下级法院对这条法规的阐释。

meanings.meaning_cn: [现罕] 刎颈自尽, 扼杀, [医]顿挫

meanings.meaning_en: to render (a metal) less susceptible to corrosion by coating the surface with a substance, such as an oxide
meanings.example: Exploit activate and passivate for transient variables to enable pooling
meanings.example_cn: 利用激活和钝化瞬态变量来启用池机制

meanings.meaning_en: If someone or something foments trouble or violent opposition, they cause it to develop
meanings.example: They accused strike leaders of fomenting violence.
meanings.example_cn: 他们指责罢工领导人煽动暴力事件。

meanings.meaning_en: to modify or treat (a beat, rhythm, note, etc) by syncopation

meanings.meaning_cn: <口>使大吃一惊, 哑然失色, 使目瞪口呆
meanings.meaning_en: to overcome with astonishment; amaze utterly; astound
to catch or arrest someone who is doing something wrong
meanings.example: The police nabbed him for speeding.
meanings.example_cn: 他超速行驶被警察逮住。

meanings.meaning_cn: <美>[医]以醚麻醉, 化成为醚

meanings.meaning_en: to kill someone using electricity
meanings.example: Last week a housewife was electrocuted by her washing machine.
meanings.example_cn: 上周有个家庭主妇被洗衣机电死了。

meanings.meaning_en: to control a group of people by force
meanings.example: The police were widely criticized for their role in repressing the protest movement.
meanings.example_cn: 警方因为他们在镇压抗议活动时所扮演的角色而广受批评。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel better when they are feeling sad or disappointed
meanings.example: No one could console her when Peter died.
meanings.example_cn: 彼得去世时没人能够安慰她。

meanings.meaning_cn: 安慰, 赢得, 调和
meanings.meaning_en: to do something to make people more likely to stop arguing, especially by giving them something they want
meanings.example: efforts to conciliate the unions
meanings.example_cn: 对工会进行调停的努力

meanings.meaning_cn: 摆脱烦恼, 不受妨碍
meanings.meaning_en: to free from encumbrances
meanings.example: How can you disencumber Oh?
meanings.example_cn: 怎样才可以摆脱烦恼噢?。

meanings.meaning_cn: 保护, 保持, 保存, 保藏
meanings.meaning_en: to save something or someone from being harmed or destroyed
meanings.example: We must encourage the planting of new trees and preserve our existing woodlands.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须鼓励栽种新树木，同时也要保护现有的林地。

meanings.meaning_en: to give or do something in return for something done or given to you
meanings.example: I thank you, and can but requite your good deeds with my prayers.
meanings.example_cn: 我感激你，只有用我的祈祷来报答你的善行。

meanings.meaning_en: to dry (drugs, ores, etc) by subjection to intense heat; roast
to deliberately avoid someone or something
meanings.example: a shy woman who shunned publicity
meanings.example_cn: 不爱抛头露面的羞怯女子

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately avoid doing or using something
meanings.example: I had eschewed politics in favour of a life practising law.
meanings.example_cn: 我选择从事律师职业，有意避开了政治。

meanings.meaning_cn: 编译, 编辑, 汇编
meanings.meaning_en: to make a book, list, record etc, using different pieces of information, music etc
meanings.example: The document was compiled by the Department of Health.
meanings.example_cn: 这份文件是由卫生部汇编的。

meanings.meaning_en: to whip yourself or someone else, especially as a religious punishment
to make someone or something lose its value or people’s respect
meanings.example: The medical profession has been debased by these revelations.
meanings.example_cn: 这些事被披露后，医学界的声誉受到了损害。

meanings.meaning_en: to show a feeling or have a quality in a way that people can easily notice
meanings.example: She evinced no surprise at seeing them together.
meanings.example_cn: 看到他们在一起，她没有表露出惊讶。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things together, especially things that are not normally together, in order to compare them or to make something new
meanings.example: The technique Mr. Wilson uses most often is to juxtapose things for dramatic effect.
meanings.example_cn: 威尔逊先生最常用的技巧是把事物并列起来以获得戏剧性效果。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove something that is covering the surface of something else
meanings.example: Strip the beds and wash the sheets.
meanings.example_cn: 把床单撤下来清洗。

meanings.meaning_cn: 剥, 削, 修, 削减, 消灭
meanings.meaning_en: If you pare something down or back, or if you pare it, you reduce it
meanings.example: The governor's campaign fund could be pared down to $500.
meanings.example_cn: 州长竞选活动基金可能会被削减到$500。

meanings.meaning_en: to deprive (of) something or someone valued, esp through death

meanings.meaning_cn: 剥夺公民权, 剥夺推举议员权, 剥夺权利
meanings.meaning_en: to  disenfranchise  someone
to remove the bark or some other outer layer from
meanings.example: The person that decorticate says: 4 city gate, can attack only, attack which?
meanings.example_cn: 剥皮者说：四个城门，只能攻一个，攻哪个？

meanings.meaning_cn: 剥皮, 去皮, 抢夺, 严厉批评
meanings.meaning_en: to criticize someone very severely
meanings.example: She was well-known for flaying public officials in her daily column.
meanings.example_cn: 她因在每日专栏里批判政府官员而出名。

meanings.meaning_en: to prove that a statement or idea is not correct
meanings.example: It was the kind of rumour that it is impossible to refute.
meanings.example_cn: 这是那种不可能推翻的谣言。

meanings.meaning_cn: 驳回, 否决, 支配, 制服
meanings.meaning_en: If someone in authority overrules a person or their decision, they officially decide that the decision is incorrect or not valid
meanings.example: In 1991, the Court of Appeal overruled this decision.
meanings.example_cn: 1991年，上诉法院否决了此项决议。

meanings.meaning_cn: 簸, 扬(谷), 吹开糠皮, 吹掉, 精选
meanings.example: Administration officials have winnowed the list of candidates to three.
meanings.example_cn: 行政官员将候选人名单筛减到三人。

meanings.meaning_en: If you expiate guilty feelings or bad behaviour, you do something to indicate that you are sorry for what you have done
meanings.example: It seemed that Alice was expiating her father's sins with her charity work.
meanings.example_cn: 看来爱丽丝要用自己的善行来赎她父亲的罪恶。

meanings.example: It would be irresponsible for me to downplay the magnitude of this crisis or assure you that everything is under control.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我缩小这次危机的严重性或向你们保证一切都在控制之中，就是不负责任的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 不再当机密文件处理, 从机密表删除
meanings.meaning_en: If secret documents or records are declassified, it is officially stated that they are no longer secret
meanings.example: These reports were only declassified last year.
meanings.example_cn: 这些报告去年才被消密。

meanings.meaning_cn: 擦亮, 恢复, 磨光
meanings.meaning_en: to make bright by polishing; burnish
to take someone else’s child into your home and legally become its parent
meanings.example: Sally was adopted when she was four.
meanings.example_cn: 莎莉四岁时被人收养。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something inside or into something else
meanings.example: He took a small key from his pocket and slowly inserted it into the lock.
meanings.example_cn: 他从衣袋里掏出一把小钥匙，然后缓缓地将其插入锁孔里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 插入水中, 把弄熄, 弄湿, 放松
meanings.meaning_en: to plunge or be plunged into water or some other liquid; duck
to notice, see, or recognize something
meanings.example: That morning, he perceived a change in Franca’s mood.
meanings.example_cn: 那天早上，他注意到弗兰卡情绪的变化。

meanings.meaning_cn: 察看, 发现, 远远看到

meanings.meaning_en: to make food or drink less pure by adding another substance of lower quality to it
meanings.example: The food had been adulterated to increase its weight.
meanings.example_cn: 这种食物被掺了假以增加其重量。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce or cause something
meanings.example: a useful technique for generating new ideas
meanings.example_cn: 能产生新创意的有用技术

meanings.meaning_en: to explain something that is difficult to understand by providing more information
meanings.example: The full picture has not yet been elucidated.
meanings.example_cn: 详细情况还没有解释清楚。

meanings.meaning_en: to go beyond the usual limits of something
meanings.example: The desire for peace transcended political differences.
meanings.example_cn: 对和平的渴望超越了政治分歧。

meanings.meaning_en: to be more than a particular number or amount
meanings.example: Working hours must not exceed 42 hours a week.
meanings.example_cn: 工作时间每周不得超过42小时。

meanings.meaning_en: to make remarks or jokes that show you think someone or something is silly or useless
meanings.example: You shouldn’t deride their efforts.
meanings.example_cn: 你不应该嘲笑他们的努力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 吵吵嚷嚷地反对, 唾弃
撤回, 废除, 宣告无效
meanings.meaning_en: to officially state that a law, decision, or agreement is no longer effective
meanings.example: Their work permits have been revoked.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的工作许可证被吊销了。

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone or something deep into a liquid so that they are completely covered
meanings.example: The electrodes are immersed in liquid.
meanings.example_cn: 电极被浸没在液体中。

meanings.meaning_cn: 称赞, 表扬, 推荐, 委托, 吸引
meanings.meaning_en: to praise or approve of someone or something publicly
meanings.example: The paper was highly commended in the UK Press Awards.
meanings.example_cn: 该报获得了“英国新闻奖”的高度褒奖。

meanings.meaning_cn: 呈递, 归还, 着色, 汇报, 致使, 放弃, 表演, 实施
meanings.example: It contained so many errors as to render it worthless.
meanings.example_cn: 太多的错误使之变得毫无价值。

meanings.meaning_cn: 冲洗, 擦亮, (搜索或追捕时)急速走遍
meanings.meaning_en: to clean something very thoroughly by rubbing it with a rough material
meanings.example: Ada was scouring out the pans.
meanings.example_cn: 阿达在擦锅。

meanings.meaning_cn: 穿上, 授予, 赋予
meanings.meaning_en: to invest or provide, as with some quality or trait

meanings.meaning_cn: 穿透, 渗透, 看穿, 洞察
meanings.meaning_en: to enter something and pass or spread through it, especially when this is difficult
meanings.example: bullets that penetrate thick armour plating
meanings.example_cn: 穿过厚装甲的子弹

meanings.meaning_cn: 传输, 转送, 传达, 传导, 发射, 遗传, 传播
meanings.meaning_en: to send out electronic signals, messages etc using radio, television, or other similar equipment
meanings.example: The US Open will be transmitted live via satellite.
meanings.example_cn: 美国公开赛将通过卫星现场直播。

meanings.meaning_cn: 刺, 戳, 刺痛, 竖起
meanings.meaning_en: to make a small hole in something using something sharp
meanings.example: Prick the sausages before you grill them.
meanings.example_cn: 烤之前把香肠戳孔。

meanings.meaning_cn: 刺穿, 刺破, 穿透, 突破, 深深感动
meanings.meaning_en: to make a small hole in or through something, using an object with a sharp point
meanings.example: Steam the corn until it can easily be pierced with a fork.
meanings.example_cn: 把玉米蒸到用叉子可以轻易扎透。

meanings.meaning_en: to surprise, in-terest, frighten etc someone so much that they do not move
meanings.example: We were all transfixed by the images of the war.
meanings.example_cn: 我们被战争的画面牢牢抓住了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make an electrical system or chemical process start working
meanings.example: Cooking fumes may activate the alarm.
meanings.example_cn: 烹调时的油烟可能会触发警报器。

meanings.meaning_cn: 粗缝, 润以油脂, (在烤肉上)涂油, 狠揍, 大骂
meanings.meaning_en: to pour liquid or melted fat over food that is cooking
meanings.example: Baste the potatoes occasionally.
meanings.example_cn: 不时在马铃薯上涂点油。

meanings.meaning_en: to damage or destroy things deliberately, especially public property
meanings.example: The cemetery was vandalized during the night.
meanings.example_cn: 公墓在夜间遭到了破坏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 打(谷), (用棍、鞭等)痛打, 打败, 使逆行, 胜过, 使颠簸, 推敲
meanings.meaning_en: to beat someone violently, especially in order to punish them
meanings.example: My poor brother used to get thrashed for all kinds of minor offences.
meanings.example_cn: 我那可怜的哥哥过去常常因为各种各样的小错而挨打。

meanings.meaning_cn: 打扰, 折磨, 使狼狈, 使担忧
meanings.example: John was embarrassed, but it didn’t faze Mike a bit.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰很尴尬，但迈克并没有觉得困窘。

meanings.meaning_cn: 打伤, 挫伤, 撞伤
meanings.meaning_en: to injure (the body) without breaking the skin; bruise
meanings.example: The sports trauma not only damage their health, which contuse the enthusiasm of physical activity, but also effect normal study living, indeed the suffering of mentally and physical.
meanings.example_cn: 学生在运动中受了伤，不仅损害健康，挫伤体育活动的积极性，而且影响正常的生活、学习，甚至给学生造成生理和心理上的痛苦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 大量的用, 厚厚地涂
meanings.meaning_en: to cover something with a thick layer of a soft substance
meanings.example: If your skin is dry, you have to slather on moisturizer to soften it.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你的皮肤干燥，就得多涂些润肤霜让它滋润。

meanings.meaning_cn: 到处搜索, 掠夺, 洗劫
meanings.meaning_en: to go through a place, stealing things and causing damage
meanings.example: The whole flat had been ransacked.
meanings.example_cn: 整间公寓都遭到洗劫。

meanings.meaning_en: to steal money from the place where you work
meanings.example: Two managers were charged with embezzling $400,000.
meanings.example_cn: 两名经理被控挪用了40万美元。

meanings.meaning_cn: 得出, 引出, 抽出, 引起
meanings.meaning_en: If you elicit a response or a reaction, you do or say something that makes other people respond or react
meanings.example: Mr. Norris said he was hopeful that his request would elicit a positive response.
meanings.example_cn: 诺里斯先生说他希望他的要求会引起积极的回应。

meanings.meaning_cn: 抵消, 中和, 阻碍
meanings.meaning_en: to reduce or prevent the bad effect of something, by doing something that has the opposite effect
meanings.example: They gave him drugs to counteract his withdrawal symptoms.
meanings.example_cn: 他们给他服药以消除他的脱瘾症状。

meanings.meaning_cn: 点燃, 使燃烧, 激起(热情等), 挑起(战争等)
meanings.meaning_en: to set on fire; kindle

meanings.meaning_cn: 点燃, 使着火, 引起, 照亮
meanings.meaning_en: if you kindle a fire, or if it kindles, it starts to burn
meanings.example: I came in and kindled a fire in the stove.
meanings.example_cn: 我进来把炉子点着了。

meanings.meaning_en: to set or say exactly what the limits of something are
meanings.example: This is not meant to delimit what approaches social researchers can adopt.
meanings.example_cn: 这并不是说要划定社会研究者所能够采用方法的界限。

meanings.meaning_en: to show or promise something that someone really wants, but then not allow them to have it
meanings.example: ...the dreams of democracy that have so tantalized them.
meanings.example_cn: …让他们可望而不可及的民主梦想。

meanings.meaning_en: to say something firmly and strongly because you are sure that it is true
meanings.example: In this conflict of emotions all I dare aver is that it has been my faithful study to collect, my duty from a just appreciation of every circumstance by which it might be affected.
meanings.example_cn: 怀着这种矛盾心情，我唯一敢断言的是，通过正确估计可能产生影响的各种情况来克尽吾职，乃是我忠贞不渝的努力目标。 我唯一敢祈望的是，如果我在执行这项任务时因陶醉于往事。

meanings.meaning_en: to jumble (a story, quotation, etc), esp unintentionally
to steal from a place or people using force, especially in a war
meanings.example: ...people who despoil the countryside.
meanings.example_cn: ...掠夺乡村的人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 恶化, 增剧, 激怒, 使加剧, 使烦恼
meanings.meaning_en: to make a bad situation worse
meanings.example: The recession has exacerbated this problem.
meanings.example_cn: 经济衰退使这个问题更加严重。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发布, 公布, 传播
meanings.meaning_en: to spread an idea or belief to as many people as possible
meanings.example: The shipping industry promulgated a voluntary code.
meanings.example_cn: 航运业对自律守则进行了宣传。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发出, 放射, 吐露, 散发, 发表, 发行
meanings.meaning_en: to send out gas, heat, light, sound etc
meanings.example: The kettle emitted a shrill whistle.
meanings.example_cn: 水壶发出了刺耳的鸣笛声。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发生, 得知, 使蒸发, 使排出
meanings.meaning_en: to happen
meanings.example: Exactly what transpired remains unknown.
meanings.example_cn: 究竟发生了什么一直无人知晓。

meanings.meaning_cn: 发誓放弃, 避免, 公开放弃
meanings.meaning_en: to state publicly that you will give up a particular belief or way of behaving
meanings.example: ...a formal statement abjuring military action.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个宣布撤回军事行动的正式声明。

meanings.example: Violent storms wreaked havoc on the French Riviera, leaving three people dead and dozens injured.
meanings.example_cn: 强风暴对法国里维埃拉造成严重破坏，致使3人死亡、数十人受伤。

meanings.meaning_en: to punish by a fine
meanings.example: The thing that you touch is too much also, return amerce!
meanings.example_cn: 你碰的事情也太多了吧，还罚款呢！

meanings.meaning_cn: 反复地说, 重申, 重做
meanings.meaning_en: to repeat a statement or opinion in order to make your meaning as clear as possible
meanings.example: Let me reiterate the most important points.
meanings.example_cn: 我来把最重要的几点重申一遍。

meanings.meaning_cn: 反复说, 重申, 重述
meanings.meaning_en: to say or do something again

meanings.meaning_cn: 防止结冰, 装以除冰装置, 除冰
放大, 扩大, 赞美, 夸大, 夸张
meanings.meaning_en: to make something seem bigger or louder, especially using special equipment
meanings.example: At the Sheffield arena, the speakers were magnified ten times on a giant screen.
meanings.example_cn: 在谢菲尔德体育馆，演讲者在一个巨大的屏幕上被放大了十倍。

meanings.meaning_en: to make sound louder, especially musical sound
meanings.example: an amplified guitar
meanings.example_cn: 带有扩音设备的电吉他

meanings.example: That is what the regime fears most, because then it either has to shoot its own people or cede power.
meanings.example_cn: 这是当前伊朗政权最害怕的，因为到那时只能被迫选择开枪射击自己的人们，或放弃权力。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone, especially when you should stay because they need you
meanings.example: children forsaken by their parents
meanings.example_cn: 被父母遗弃的孩子

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone, especially someone you are responsible for
meanings.example: How could she abandon her own child?
meanings.example_cn: 她怎么能抛弃自己的孩子？

meanings.meaning_cn: 放射, 辐射, 传播, 广播
meanings.meaning_en: If things radiate out from a place, they form a pattern that is like lines drawn from the centre of a circle to various points on its edge
meanings.example: Many kinds of woodland can be seen on the various walks which radiate from the Heritage Centre.
meanings.example_cn: 从遗产中心向外伸展的各条走道上可以看到多种林地。

meanings.meaning_cn: 诽谤, 辱骂, 贬低, 轻视
meanings.meaning_en: to say or write bad things about someone or something
meanings.example: The agency has been vilified by some doctors for being unnecessarily slow to approve life-saving drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 该机构因对救生药物的审批速度过慢而备受一些医生的诽谤。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially end a legal agreement, practice etc
meanings.example: Both governments voted to abrogate the treaty.
meanings.example_cn: 两国政府均投票通过废除这项条约。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide what group something belongs to
meanings.example: We’d classify Drabble’s novels under ‘Romance’.
meanings.example_cn: 我们把德拉布尔的小说归类为“言情小说”。

meanings.meaning_en: to send someone or something somewhere for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Goods are normally dispatched within 24 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 货物一般在24小时内派送。

meanings.meaning_cn: 吩咐, 命令, 嘱咐, <主美>禁止
meanings.meaning_en: If you enjoin someone to do something, you order them to do it. If you enjoin an action or attitude, you order people to do it or have it.
meanings.example: She enjoined me strictly not to tell anyone else.
meanings.example_cn: 她严令我不要告诉其他任何人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 奉承, 谄媚, 奉承
meanings.meaning_en: to flatter or praise obsequiously
to state that something does not exist or is untrue
meanings.example: He warned that to negate the results of elections would only make things worse.
meanings.example_cn: 他警告说否定选举结果只能使事态更加恶化。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赋予新肉体, 使转生
meanings.example: ...their belief that human souls were reincarnated in the bodies of turtles.
meanings.example_cn: ...他们认为人的灵魂转世投胎到海龟身体里的信仰。

meanings.meaning_en: to use the same ideas again in a new form that is not really different or better - used to show disapproval
meanings.example: He simply rehashed the same story.
meanings.example_cn: 他只是把同一个故事改头换面了一下。

meanings.meaning_cn: 给予(尤指抽象事物), 传授, 告知, 透露
meanings.meaning_en: to give a particular quality to something
meanings.example: She had information that she couldn’t wait to impart.
meanings.example_cn: 她得到了消息，迫不及待地想告诉别人。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone something of great value or importance
meanings.example: The United States bestowed honorary citizenship upon England's World War II prime minister, Sir Winston Churchill.
meanings.example_cn: 美国授予了二战期间的英国首相温斯顿·丘吉尔爵士荣誉公民的称号。

meanings.meaning_cn: 给予选举权, 给予自治权, 解放
meanings.meaning_en: to give a group of people the right to vote
meanings.example: The company voted to enfranchise its 120 women members.
meanings.example_cn: 公司投票决定给予其120名女员工选举权。

meanings.meaning_en: to make small changes to something in order to improve it and make it more suitable or effective
meanings.example: The feedback will be used to modify the course for next year.
meanings.example_cn: 这些反馈意见将用于修改明年的课程。

meanings.meaning_cn: 公开指责, 公然抨击, 谴责
meanings.meaning_en: to express strong disapproval of someone or something, especially in public
meanings.example: The group denounced the failure by the authorities to take action.
meanings.example_cn: 该团体谴责当局没有采取行动。

meanings.meaning_en: to attack someone or something violently
meanings.example: Protesters assailed the proposed fare increase.
meanings.example_cn: 抗议者们抨击了提价的提议。

meanings.meaning_cn: 构思, 以为, 持有
meanings.meaning_en: to think of a new idea, plan etc and develop it in your mind
meanings.example: Scientists first conceived the idea of the atomic bomb in the 1930’s.
meanings.example_cn: 在20世纪30年代，科学家第一次有了原子弹的设想。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay someone to work for you
meanings.example: The factory employs over 2,000 people.
meanings.example_cn: 这家工厂雇用了2,000多名员工。

meanings.meaning_cn: 关在栏中, 拘留, 扣押, 没收
meanings.meaning_en: if the police or law courts impound something you have or own, they keep it until it has been decided that you can have it back
meanings.example: He sued the police after they impounded his car.
meanings.example_cn: 警察扣押他的车后他提起诉讼。

meanings.meaning_cn: 管制, 控制, 调节, 校准
meanings.meaning_en: to control an activity or process, especially by rules
meanings.example: strict rules regulating the use of chemicals in food
meanings.example_cn: 限制化学品在食物中使用的严格规定

meanings.meaning_cn: 灌溉, 修水利, 冲洗伤口, 使潮湿
meanings.meaning_en: to supply land or crops with water
meanings.example: The water in Lake Powell is used to irrigate the area.
meanings.example_cn: 包尔湖的水被用来灌溉该地区。

meanings.meaning_cn: 灌输, 注入, 沏或泡(茶、药等), 浸渍, 鼓舞
meanings.meaning_en: to fill something or someone with a particular feeling or quality
meanings.example: Many of the girls seemed to be infused with excitement on seeing the snow.
meanings.example_cn: 许多女孩子似乎一看到雪心里就充满了兴奋。

meanings.meaning_cn: 归罪于, 归咎于, 归因于
meanings.meaning_en: If you impute something such as blame or a crime to someone, you say that they are responsible for it or are the cause of it
meanings.example: It is grossly unfair to impute blame to the United Nations.
meanings.example_cn: 把责任归咎于联合国是极不公平的。

meanings.meaning_en: if something sweet or pleasant cloys, it begins to annoy you because there is too much of it
meanings.example: Her sweet submissive smile began to cloy after a while.
meanings.example_cn: 不久，她那种甜甜的媚笑开始让人厌烦了。

meanings.meaning_en: to join metals by melting their edges and pressing them together when they are hot
meanings.example: The new handle will have to be welded on.
meanings.example_cn: 新的把手得焊上去。

meanings.meaning_en: To deplete a stock or amount of something means to reduce it
meanings.example: ...substances that deplete the ozone layer.
meanings.example_cn: …消耗臭氧层的物质。

meanings.meaning_cn: 花费, 消耗, 支出, [海]把(暂时不用的绳)绕在杆上
meanings.meaning_en: to use or spend a lot of energy etc in order to do something
meanings.example: Children expend a lot of energy and may need more high-energy food than adults.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们耗能多，可能比成人需要更多高能量的食物。

meanings.meaning_en: to outline; give a faint indication of

meanings.meaning_cn: 缓和, 减轻, 镇定
meanings.meaning_en: to make an unpleasant feeling less painful or severe
meanings.example: Nothing could assuage his guilt.
meanings.example_cn: 什么都不能减轻他的内疚。

meanings.meaning_cn: 唤起, 引起, 博得
meanings.meaning_en: to produce a strong feeling or memory in someone
meanings.example: The photographs evoked strong memories of our holidays in France.
meanings.example_cn: 那些照片勾起了我们到法国度假的深刻回忆。

meanings.meaning_en: to damage something very badly or completely
meanings.example: The city centre was devastated by the bomb.
meanings.example_cn: 市中心被这枚炸弹摧毁了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 毁坏, 破坏, 推翻, 粉碎
meanings.meaning_en: to prove that an idea or opinion is completely wrong
meanings.example: He demolished my argument in minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 他几分钟内就把我的论点驳倒了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 混合, 使微醉, 使咬字不清晰, 鬼混
meanings.meaning_en: to confuse one person or thing with another, and make a mistake
meanings.example: The twins are so alike that it’s easy to muddle them up.
meanings.example_cn: 这对双胞胎看上去太像了，很容易弄混。

meanings.meaning_cn: 击, 打, 用拳头连续揍
meanings.meaning_en: to hit someone or something many times quickly, especially using your  fist s (= closed hands )
meanings.example: Diane leaned over and pummeled the pillows.
meanings.example_cn: 黛安娜俯下身不断捶打枕头。

meanings.meaning_cn: 击退, 抵制, 使厌恶, 使不愉快
meanings.meaning_en: if something repels you, it is so unpleasant that you do not want to be near it, or it makes you feel ill
meanings.example: The smell repelled him.
meanings.example_cn: 这气味让他反感。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately encourage people to fight, argue etc
meanings.example: They were charged with inciting racial hatred.
meanings.example_cn: 他们被指控煽动种族仇恨。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel annoyed or impatient, especially by doing something many times or for a long period of time
meanings.example: It really irritates me when he doesn’t help around the house.
meanings.example_cn: 家里的事情他一点都不帮忙，真让我恼火。

meanings.meaning_cn: 激怒, 挑拨, 煽动, 惹起, 驱使
meanings.meaning_en: to cause a reaction or feeling, especially a sudden one
meanings.example: The novel has provoked fierce debate in the US.
meanings.example_cn: 那部小说在美国引发了激烈的争论。

meanings.meaning_cn: 嫉妒, 羡慕, 舍不得给
meanings.meaning_en: to feel angry or upset with someone because they have something that you think they do not deserve
meanings.example: I certainly don't begrudge him the Nobel Prize.
meanings.example_cn: 我肯定不会妒忌他得了获诺贝尔奖。

meanings.meaning_cn: 加苦味于, 使受苦, 使难受, 使怨恨, 加重
meanings.meaning_en: to make (a person) resentful or bitter

meanings.meaning_cn: 假装, 装作, 捏造, <古>想象
meanings.meaning_en: to pretend to have a particular feeling or to be ill, asleep etc
meanings.example: Feigning a headache, I went upstairs to my room.
meanings.example_cn: 我假装头痛，上楼到自己房间去了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 嫁娶, 支持, 赞成
meanings.meaning_en: to support an idea, belief etc, especially a political one
meanings.example: She ran away with him to Mexico and espoused the revolutionary cause.
meanings.example_cn: 她与他一起逃到了墨西哥，支持革命事业。

meanings.meaning_cn: 检验, 校验, 查证, 核实[计] 打开或关闭文件的读写校验
meanings.meaning_en: to discover whether something is correct or true
meanings.example: American forces will remain to verify compliance with the treaty.
meanings.example_cn: 美军将继续驻留，核查条约是否得到遵守。

meanings.meaning_cn: 减弱, 减少, 抑制
娇养, 溺爱, 放纵

meanings.meaning_en: to correct something that is wrong
meanings.example: I did my best to rectify the situation, but the damage was already done.
meanings.example_cn: 我竭尽全力去挽回局面，但损害已经造成了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 教唆, 煽动, 帮助, 支持
meanings.meaning_en: to help someone do something wrong or illegal
meanings.example: His wife was sentenced to seven years imprisonment for aiding and abetting him.
meanings.example_cn: 他的妻子因与他同谋被判决关押七年。

meanings.meaning_en: to kiss
meanings.example: And so we would osculate (kiss).
meanings.example_cn: 然后，我们接吻。

meanings.meaning_en: to protect someone against a disease by putting a weak form of the disease into their body using a needle
meanings.example: ...a programme to inoculate every child in the country.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个给全国每个孩子接种疫苗的计划。

meanings.meaning_cn: 揭穿, 拆穿假面具, 暴露
meanings.example: Historian Michael Beschloss debunks a few myths.
meanings.example_cn: 历史学家迈克尔·贝斯切罗斯揭露了一些神话的真相。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop a fire from burning
meanings.example: a desperate bid to quench the raging flames
meanings.example_cn: 为扑灭熊熊大火而不顾一切的努力

meanings.meaning_en: to free from slavery, servitude, etc; emancipate

meanings.meaning_cn: 解惑, 释疑, 使省悟
meanings.meaning_en: If you disabuse someone of something, you tell them or persuade them that what they believe is in fact untrue
meanings.example: Their view of country people was that they like to please strangers. I did not disabuse them of this notion.
meanings.example_cn: 他们认为乡下人爱讨好外地人。我没有纠正他们的这种想法。

meanings.meaning_en: to discover the meaning of a message written in a  code (= a set of secret signs or letters )
meanings.example: The software decodes the information embedded in the satellite broadcasts.
meanings.example_cn: 这种软件能够解读衞星广播中的信息。

meanings.meaning_en: to describe the grammar of a word when it is in a particular sentence, or the grammar of the whole sentence
meanings.example: How would you parse it, then?
meanings.example_cn: 那么，如何解析它呢？

meanings.meaning_cn: 尽(力), 施加(压力等), 努力
meanings.meaning_en: to work very hard and use a lot of physical or mental energy
meanings.example: He has exerted himself tirelessly on behalf of the charity.
meanings.example_cn: 他为这个慈善组织奋斗不懈。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that makes people lose respect for someone or something
meanings.example: language that demeans women
meanings.example_cn: 侮辱女性的语言

meanings.meaning_cn: 具体表达, 使具体化, 包含, 收录
meanings.meaning_en: to be a very good example of an idea or quality
meanings.example: She embodies everything I admire in a teacher.
meanings.example_cn: 她具备了我所钦佩的教师该具备的一切素质。

meanings.meaning_cn: 卷入, 吞没, 狼吞虎咽
meanings.meaning_en: if an unpleasant feeling engulfs you, you feel it very strongly
meanings.example: despair so great it threatened to engulf him
meanings.example_cn: 几乎要将他压垮的绝望情绪

meanings.meaning_en: to remove a dead body from the ground, especially in order to check the cause of death
meanings.example: His remains have been exhumed from a cemetery in Queens.
meanings.example_cn: 他的遗体已被从昆士郡的一个墓地里挖了出来。

meanings.meaning_cn: 开拓, 开发, 开采, 剥削, 用以自肥
meanings.meaning_en: to treat someone unfairly by asking them to do things for you, but giving them very little in return – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Homeworkers can easily be exploited by employers.
meanings.example_cn: 在家工作的人容易被雇主剥削。

meanings.example: These grains may parch , but they will not pop.
meanings.example_cn: 这些谷物也许能烘焙，但他们不能爆破。

meanings.meaning_cn: 克服, 苦修, 使苦恼
meanings.example: Jane mortified her family by leaving her husband.
meanings.example_cn: 简的家人为简离开丈夫感到奇耻大辱。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for something in an emotional way
meanings.example: ‘Don’t go,’ I implored her.
meanings.example_cn: “不要走。”我哀求她。

meanings.meaning_en: to take property away from the person it belongs to because they have not paid their debts
meanings.example: He tried to prevent union money from being sequestrated by the courts.
meanings.example_cn: 他试图阻止法院扣押工会的钱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 宽恕, 赦免, 免除, 缓和, 推迟, 汇出, 传送, 使复职
meanings.meaning_en: to send a payment
meanings.example: Please remit payment by cheque.
meanings.example_cn: 请用支票汇付货款。

meanings.meaning_en: to connect or link together; tie; join

meanings.meaning_cn: 困惑, 阻碍, 为难
meanings.meaning_en: if something baffles you, you cannot understand or explain it at all
meanings.example: The question baffled me completely.
meanings.example_cn: 这个问题把我彻底难倒了。

meanings.meaning_en: to use something for a particular purpose
meanings.example: We must consider how best to utilize what resources we have.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须考虑怎样充分利用现有的资源。

meanings.meaning_en: to represent by an instance
meanings.example: You will never instantiate this class directly, but always create an instance of its subclass.
meanings.example_cn: 永远不要直接实例化这个类，而是创建它的子类的一个实例。

meanings.example: The word 'concatenate' is just a verbose synonym for 'catenate'.
meanings.example_cn: “连接”只是“连接”的较为详细的同义词（看英文吧）。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流出, 发散, 散发, 脱落, 脱皮, 摆脱
meanings.meaning_en: to get rid of something that you no longer need or want
meanings.example: The company is planning to shed about a quarter of its workforce.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司正计划裁减约四分之一的人员。

meanings.meaning_cn: 流放, 驱逐, 消除
meanings.meaning_en: to not allow someone or something to stay in a particular place
meanings.example: John was banished from England.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰被逐出英国。

meanings.meaning_cn: 乱砍, 撕裂, 破坏, 毁损, 损坏, 轧布
meanings.meaning_en: If a physical object is mangled, it is crushed or twisted very forcefully, so that it is difficult to see what its original shape was
meanings.example: His body was crushed and mangled beyond recognition.
meanings.example_cn: 他的身体被轧得血肉模糊而无法辨认。

meanings.meaning_en: to write in a careless and untidy way, so that your words are not easy to read
meanings.example: He scrawled his name at the bottom.
meanings.example_cn: 他在底端潦草地写下了自己的名字。

meanings.meaning_en: to bury a dead person
meanings.example: The team of archaeologists found the spot where his bones were originally interred.
meanings.example_cn: 这队考古学家发现了起初埋葬他骸骨的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: to buy something
meanings.example: You can purchase insurance online.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以在网上买保险。

meanings.meaning_en: to gain an advantage over someone using tricks or clever plans
meanings.example: a wolf that had outwitted hunters for years
meanings.example_cn: 一头多年来智胜猎人的狼

meanings.meaning_en: to berate or rail (against) abusively; revile

meanings.example: However, I do try to instill in them the ability to use sound engineering methods to analyze and design their programs and customize their practices.
meanings.example_cn: 然而，我确实试图慢慢的向他们灌输使用适合的工程学方法来分析和设计程序、定制实践的能力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 没收, 充公, 查抄, 征用
meanings.meaning_en: to officially take private property away from someone, usually as a punishment
meanings.example: Miss Williams confiscated all our sweets.
meanings.example_cn: 威廉斯老师没收了我们所有的糖果。

meanings.meaning_cn: 没收, 征用, 剥夺
meanings.meaning_en: if a government or someone in authority expropriates your private property, they take it away for public use
meanings.example: The Bolsheviks expropriated the property of the landowners.
meanings.example_cn: 布尔什维克征收了地主的土地。

meanings.meaning_cn: 每十人杀一人, 大批杀害
meanings.example: The population has been decimated by disease.
meanings.example_cn: 疾病导致大量人口死亡。

meanings.meaning_cn: 弥漫, 渗透, 透过, 充满
meanings.meaning_en: if liquid, gas etc permeates something, it enters it and spreads through every part of it
meanings.example: The smell of diesel oil permeated the air.
meanings.example_cn: 空气里充斥着柴油的气味。

meanings.example: Neither side should delude itself that it can avoid the harm caused by an increased mutual antagonism; both should understand that a crisis in one country can hurt the other.
meanings.example_cn: 任何一方都不应迷惑他自己，认为增长的相互对立所带来的伤害是可以避免；双方都应认识到，一国的危机可以伤害到另一国。

meanings.meaning_cn: 迷惑, 迷住, 奴役

meanings.meaning_en: to attract someone very much, and hold their attention
meanings.example: I was captivated by her brilliant mind.
meanings.example_cn: 我为她的聪慧所迷。

meanings.meaning_en: to state officially that someone who has been blamed for something is not guilty
meanings.example: The official report basically exonerated everyone.
meanings.example_cn: 该官方报告基本洗脱了所有人的干系。

meanings.meaning_cn: 免职, 废(王位), 作证
meanings.meaning_en: to remove a leader or ruler from a position of power
meanings.example: Mr. Ben Bella was deposed in a coup in 1965.
meanings.example_cn: 本·贝拉先生在1965年的一次政变中被罢免了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 勉强, 承认, 退让
meanings.meaning_en: to admit that something is true or correct, although you wish it were not true
meanings.example: ‘That’s the only possible solution.’ ‘Yes, I suppose so,’ Charles conceded.
meanings.example_cn: “那是唯一可行的解决办法。”“对，我想是。”查尔斯承认道。

meanings.example: If you can't limn the character, don't say it's the character.
meanings.example_cn: 如果你不能描写的特点，并没有说这是性格。

meanings.meaning_cn: 蔑视, 贬损, 使失去信誉

meanings.meaning_en: to give a specific name to; designate

meanings.meaning_cn: 模仿, 扮演, 人格化, 拟人
meanings.meaning_en: to copy someone’s voice and behaviour, especially in order to make people laugh
meanings.example: In the film he amusingly impersonates a woman.
meanings.example_cn: 影片中他模仿一个女人，非常好笑。

meanings.meaning_cn: 模拟, 模仿, 假装, 冒充
meanings.meaning_en: to make or produce something that is not real but has the appearance or feeling of being real
meanings.example: a machine that simulates conditions in space
meanings.example_cn: 一台模拟太空环境的机器

meanings.meaning_cn: 磨, 磨快, 使兴奋
meanings.meaning_en: to make the edge of a blade sharp
to polish metal or another substance until it shines
meanings.example: The agency hired a New York public-relations firm to burnish Washington's image.
meanings.example_cn: 该机构雇用了一家纽约公关公司来提升华盛顿的形象。

meanings.meaning_cn: 抹去, 擦掉, 消磁, <俚>杀死
meanings.meaning_en: to remove information from a computer memory or recorded sounds from a tape
meanings.example: The computer crashed, and all our records were erased.
meanings.example_cn: 计算机瘫痪了，我们所有的记录都被删除了。

meanings.meaning_en: if you contort something, or if it contorts, it twists out of its normal shape and looks strange or unattractive
meanings.example: His face contorts as he screams out the lyrics.
meanings.example_cn: 当他大声朗读这些抒情诗时，脸都变形了。

meanings.example: What is the best way to deal with the acute wrick?
meanings.example_cn: 急性扭伤后应立即采取什么处理办法？

meanings.meaning_cn: 弄成粉, 粉碎, 磨碎, 捣碎
meanings.meaning_en: to grind or rub into a fine powder or pulp; masticate
If you besmirch someone or their reputation, you say that they are a bad person or that they have done something wrong, usually when this is not true
meanings.example: He has accused local people of trying to besmirch his reputation.
meanings.example_cn: 他指责当地人企图败坏他的名誉。

meanings.meaning_en: to become or make wrinkled, creased, or puckered
to treat a person or animal cruelly
meanings.example: The hostages said they were hungry but had not been maltreated.
meanings.example_cn: 人质说他们挨了饿，但没有受到虐待。

meanings.meaning_en: to completely get rid of something that is unnecessary or unwanted
meanings.example: a ruthless dictator who eliminated all his rivals
meanings.example_cn: 铲除所有异己的残酷独裁者

meanings.meaning_cn: 排除在外, 妨碍, 自称, 阻止, 预先处理, 取消抵押品赎回权
meanings.meaning_en: if a bank forecloses, it takes away someone’s property because they have failed to pay back the money that they borrowed from the bank to buy it
meanings.example: The bank foreclosed on the mortgage for his previous home.
meanings.example_cn: 银行取消了他先前住房的抵押赎回权。

meanings.meaning_en: to take the place of a person or thing so that they are no longer used, no longer in a position of power etc
meanings.example: Barker was soon supplanted as party leader.
meanings.example_cn: 巴克在党内的领导地位很快就被人取代了。

meanings.meaning_en: to excrete (waste material)
meanings.example: Conclusion:The hypolipidemic mechanism of Yaobao Xuezhiqing capsules is related lowering LDL-C in blood-serum and increasing TC egest with excrement.
meanings.example_cn: 结论：瑶宝血脂清胶囊降血脂作用与降低血清中低密度脂蛋白胆固醇和促进体内的TC随粪便排泄有关。

meanings.meaning_cn: 判刑, 处刑, 声讨, 谴责
meanings.meaning_en: to say very strongly that you do not approve of something or someone, especially because you think it is morally wrong
meanings.example: Politicians were quick to condemn the bombing.
meanings.example_cn: 政治家们立即对爆炸事件进行了谴责。

meanings.meaning_en: to prepare and use land for growing crops and plants
meanings.example: The land was too rocky to cultivate.
meanings.example_cn: 这块地石头太多，无法耕作。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赔偿, 补偿, 扣除
meanings.example: Insurance companies are trying to recoup their losses by increasing premiums.
meanings.example_cn: 保险公司正试图通过增加保费来弥补损失。

meanings.meaning_en: if a volcano erupts, it explodes and sends smoke, fire, and rock into the sky
meanings.example: The volcano erupted in 1980, devastating a large area of Washington state.
meanings.example_cn: 这座火山1980年喷发，摧毁了华盛顿州的大片地区。

meanings.meaning_en: to face or stare down
meanings.example: Was it perhaps dropped by accident as the woman climbed up the 1500 stairs carved outface?
meanings.example_cn: 它或许是削减变乱的女子爬上1500刻蔑视楼梯？

meanings.meaning_cn: 平息, 安抚, 缓和, 使满足
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone less angry or stop them from attacking you by giving them what they want
meanings.example: They attempted to appease international opposition by promising to hold talks.
meanings.example_cn: 他们答应举行会谈，试图以此平息国际上的反对声音。

meanings.meaning_en: to expose to sunlight, as for bleaching
meanings.example: Defect: Compare enervated , do not easily, treat water or insolate wait to be out of shape possibly.
meanings.example_cn: 缺点：比较娇贵，不轻易打理，遇水或暴晒等都可能变形。

meanings.meaning_cn: 欺骗, 哄骗, 欺瞒

meanings.meaning_en: to deceive, trick, or confuse someone
meanings.example: He bamboozled Mercer into defeat.
meanings.example_cn: 他蒙骗默瑟并击败了他。

meanings.meaning_en: to swear, curse, or blaspheme

meanings.meaning_cn: 起誓, 恳请, (以起誓或诅咒等形式)命令
meanings.meaning_en: to order or try to persuade someone to do something

meanings.meaning_cn: 起诉, 控告, 指控, 告发
meanings.meaning_en: to officially charge someone with a criminal offence
meanings.example: He was later indicted on corruption charges.
meanings.example_cn: 他后来被控贪污。

meanings.example: I should not obtrude my affairs so much on the notice of my readers if very particular inquiries had not been made by my townsmen concerning my mode of life.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我的生活方式已经被我的乡邻们详细的调查出来的话我是不会强迫我的读者来注意我的锁事的。

meanings.meaning_en: to force someone to do something
meanings.example: ...the introduction of legislation to compel cyclists to wear a helmet.
meanings.example_cn: …强制骑车人戴头盔的法律的引入。

meanings.meaning_en: to force someone to do something they do not want to do by threatening them
meanings.example: Potter had argued that the government coerced him into pleading guilty.
meanings.example_cn: 波特曾争辩说是政府胁迫他认罪。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut off someone’s arm, leg, finger etc during a medical operation
meanings.example: Two of her toes were amputated because of frostbite.
meanings.example_cn: 她的两个脚趾因为冻伤被截掉了。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut a pattern, word etc into something, using a sharp instrument
meanings.example: an inscription incised in stone
meanings.example_cn: 刻在石头上的碑文

meanings.meaning_en: to make a straight narrow cut in cloth, paper, skin etc
meanings.example: Guy slit open the envelope.
meanings.example_cn: 盖伊拆开信封。

meanings.meaning_cn: 侵蚀, 腐蚀, 使变化
meanings.meaning_en: if the weather erodes rock or soil, or if rock or soil erodes, its surface is gradually destroyed
meanings.example: The cliffs are being constantly eroded by heavy seas.
meanings.example_cn: 悬崖正不断受到汹涌海浪的侵蚀。

meanings.meaning_cn: 轻视, 嘲笑, 愚弄
meanings.meaning_en: If you flout something such as a law, an order, or an accepted way of behaving, you deliberately do not obey it or follow it
meanings.example: ...illegal campers who persist in flouting the law.
meanings.example_cn: …一向无视法律的非法露营者。

meanings.meaning_cn: 倾斜, 倾, (为修理或清洁而)使倾侧
meanings.example: He stood to one side as they careened past him.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在他身边猛冲而过，他赶紧让到一边。

meanings.meaning_cn: 驱散, 驱逐, 使消散
meanings.meaning_en: to make something go away, especially a belief, idea, or feeling
meanings.example: We want to dispel the myth that you cannot eat well in Britain.
meanings.example_cn: 我们要消除在英国吃不好的误解。

meanings.meaning_en: to force evil spirits to leave a place by using special words and ceremonies
meanings.example: He confronted his childhood trauma and tried to exorcize the pain.
meanings.example_cn: 他与童年时代的精神创伤对抗并试图祛除这种痛苦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 取出内脏, 除去精华, 除去主要部分
meanings.meaning_en: to cut the organs out of a person’s or animal’s body
meanings.example: ...strangling and eviscerating rabbits for the pot.
meanings.example_cn: ...勒死并取出兔子的内脏以便下锅。

meanings.meaning_cn: 取消, 撤消, 下反对命令召回
meanings.meaning_en: If you countermand an order, you cancel it, usually by giving a different order
meanings.example: I can't countermand an order Winger's given.
meanings.example_cn: 我无法撤销温格下达的命令。

meanings.meaning_cn: 取消, 省略, 省略发音, 不予考虑删节
meanings.meaning_en: to leave out the sound of a letter or of a part of a word
meanings.example: Most English speakers elide the first ‘d’ in ‘Wednesday.’
meanings.example_cn: 大多数说英语的人会省略Wednesday中第一个d的发音。

meanings.meaning_cn: 劝告, 训诫, 警告
meanings.meaning_en: to tell someone severely that they have done something wrong
meanings.example: They admonished me for taking risks with my health.
meanings.example_cn: 他们告诫我不要拿自己的健康来冒险。

meanings.meaning_cn: 劝诱, 促使, 导致, 引起, 感应
meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to do something, especially something that does not seem wise
meanings.example: Patients with eating disorders may use drugs to induce vomiting.
meanings.example_cn: 患有进食障碍的人可使用药物催吐。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone not to do something
meanings.example: Doctors had tried to dissuade patients from smoking.
meanings.example_cn: 医生曾试图说服病人不要抽烟。

meanings.meaning_en: to find out something
meanings.example: A postmortem was ordered to try to ascertain the cause of death.
meanings.example_cn: 下令验尸以查明死因。

meanings.meaning_en: if something such as a tradition or right is enshrined in something, it is preserved and protected so that people will remember and respect it
if something is interspersed with a particular kind of thing, it has a lot of them in it
meanings.example: sunny periods interspersed with showers
meanings.example_cn: 晴天，间或有阵雨

meanings.meaning_cn: 骚乱, 困扰, 调戏
meanings.meaning_en: to attack or harm someone, especially a child, by touching them in a sexual way or by trying to have sex with them
meanings.example: men who molest young boys
meanings.example_cn: 猥亵男童的男子

meanings.meaning_cn: 杀菌, 消毒, 使成不毛
meanings.meaning_en: to make something completely clean by killing any  bacteria  in it
meanings.example: Sterilize the bottles with boiling water.
meanings.example_cn: 用沸水把这些瓶子消毒。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove something that has been written down or stored in a computer
meanings.example: His name was deleted from the list.
meanings.example_cn: 他的名字从名单上删掉了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 删除(书等的)不妥的文句, 删改, 修订
meanings.meaning_en: to remove all the parts of a book, play etc that you think might offend someone – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: a bowdlerized version of ‘Antony and Cleopatra’
meanings.example_cn: 《安东尼和克里奥帕特拉》的删节本

meanings.example: The water roiled to his left as he climbed carefully at the edge of the waterfall.
meanings.example_cn: 当他在瀑布边缘小心攀爬时，水飞溅到他左边。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赦免, 释放, 补偿
meanings.meaning_en: to absolve; set free

meanings.meaning_cn: 摄取, 咽下, 吸收
meanings.meaning_en: to take food or other substances into your body
meanings.example: ...side effects occurring in fish that ingest this substance.
meanings.example_cn: ...在吃了此物质的鱼身上产生的副作用。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone a lot of questions for a long time in order to get information, sometimes using threats
meanings.example: The police interrogated the suspect for several hours.
meanings.example_cn: 警察盘问了这名嫌疑犯好几个小时。

meanings.meaning_cn: 生(儿,女), 生殖, 产生
meanings.meaning_en: to produce children or baby animals
meanings.example: Most young women feel a biological need to procreate.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数年轻妇女觉得生儿育女是一种生理需要。

meanings.meaning_en: In fairy tales and legends, to enchant someone or something means to put a magic spell on them
meanings.example: ...Celtic stories of cauldrons and enchanted vessels.
meanings.example_cn: …凯尔特人关于神锅和魔法器皿的故事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 实行, 从事, 告发, 起诉
meanings.meaning_en: to charge someone with a crime and try to show that they are guilty of it in a court of law
meanings.example: Shoplifters will be prosecuted.
meanings.example_cn: 在商店行窃者将被起诉。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使(数量、程度等)减少, 减轻, 除去, 缓和, 打折扣
meanings.meaning_en: to become less strong or decrease
meanings.example: We waited for the storm to abate.
meanings.example_cn: 我们等风暴减弱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使(痛苦等)易于忍受, 减轻
meanings.meaning_en: to make something less painful or difficult to deal with
meanings.example: measures to alleviate poverty
meanings.example_cn: 扶贫措施

meanings.meaning_en: to catch or involve in or as if in a net or snare; entangle

meanings.meaning_cn: 使暴露于空气中, 使充满气体
meanings.meaning_en: to put a gas or air into a liquid or into soil
meanings.example: Aerate your lawn to allow it to breathe and absorb water better.
meanings.example_cn: 给草坪通气，使它能够多吸收空气和水分。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使爆发, 以严词谴责
meanings.meaning_en: to criticize someone or something angrily

meanings.meaning_cn: 使变形, 美化, 理想化
meanings.meaning_en: to change the way someone or something looks, especially so that they become more beautiful
meanings.example: Her face was transfigured with joy.
meanings.example_cn: 她高兴得容光焕发。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使变形, 使变成奇形怪状
meanings.meaning_en: to change or transform into a different shape, esp a grotesque or bizarre one

meanings.meaning_cn: 使不方便, 使为难, 使不自由
meanings.meaning_en: to cause inconvenience or annoyance to; disturb

meanings.meaning_cn: 使残废, 使不能工作
meanings.meaning_en: to wound or injure someone very seriously and often permanently
meanings.example: Landmines still kill or maim about 300 people every month.
meanings.example_cn: 地雷每个月仍造成约300人死伤。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使插入, 使嵌入, 深留, 嵌入, [医]包埋
meanings.meaning_en: to put something firmly and deeply into something else, or to be put into something in this way
meanings.example: One of the bullets passed through Andrea's chest before embedding itself in a wall.
meanings.example_cn: 其中一颗子弹穿过安德烈亚的胸膛然后嵌入一面墙中。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使缠上, 纠缠, 卷入, 连累, 使混乱
meanings.meaning_en: to involve someone in an argument, a relationship, or a situation that is difficult to escape from
meanings.example: Bureaucracy can entangle applications for months.
meanings.example_cn: 官僚主义会使申请耽搁数月之久。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使充满, 使拥塞, [医]使充血
meanings.meaning_en: to crowd or become crowded to excess; overfill

meanings.meaning_cn: 使除去空气, 从(液体)中除去气泡

meanings.meaning_en: to put something or someone in danger
meanings.example: Tax increases now might imperil economic recovery.
meanings.example_cn: 目前提高税收可能会危及经济的复苏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使大胆, 使有胆量, 使勇敢
meanings.meaning_en: to give someone more courage
meanings.example: Emboldened by her smile, he asked her to dance.
meanings.example_cn: 她的微笑让他鼓起勇气邀请她跳舞。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使凋谢, 使消亡, 使畏缩
使断奶, 使丢弃, 使断念
meanings.meaning_en: to gradually stop feeding a baby or young animal on its mother’s milk and start giving it ordinary food
meanings.example: When would be the best time to start weaning my baby?
meanings.example_cn: 什么时候开始给我的孩子断奶最好呢？

meanings.meaning_en: to lead into a life of depraved self-indulgence
to make a bad situation, an illness, or an injury worse
meanings.example: Their money problems were further aggravated by a rise in interest rates.
meanings.example_cn: 由于利率上调，他们的财务问题更加严重。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使发伪誓, 使破坏誓言

meanings.meaning_en: to annoy someone, especially by asking them many times to do something
meanings.example: She’d been pestered by reporters for days.
meanings.example_cn: 几天来她一直受到记者们的纠缠。

meanings.meaning_en: to confuse someone so they cannot think properly
If you proselytize, you try to persuade someone to share your beliefs, especially religious or political beliefs
meanings.example: I assured him we didn't come here to proselytize.
meanings.example_cn: 我向他保证我们并不是来改变他的信仰的。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel very excited and happy
to change into bone or to make something change into bone
meanings.example: ...conventions that threatened to ossify art.
meanings.example_cn: ...使艺术僵化的一些规矩。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使和好, 使愉快, 使柔和
meanings.meaning_en: to make pleasant or agreeable

meanings.meaning_cn: 使和解, 使和谐, 使顺从
meanings.meaning_en: to have a good relationship again with someone after you have quarrelled with them
meanings.example: Jonah and his youngest son were, on the surface at least, reconciled.
meanings.example_cn: 乔纳和他小儿子和好了，至少表面上如此。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使怀孕, 使受精, 使充满, 注入, 灌输
meanings.meaning_en: to make a woman or female animal pregnant
meanings.example: Undercover officers found drug-making equipment used to impregnate paper with LSD.
meanings.example_cn: 卧底警官发现了用于使迷幻药渗入纸张的毒品制造设备。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使惶惑, 打乱, 使狼狈, 使混乱
meanings.meaning_en: If someone is flummoxed by something, they are confused by it and do not know what to do or say
meanings.example: The two leaders were flummoxed by the suggestion.
meanings.example_cn: 这两位领导被这项提议搞得慌乱失措。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使恢复完整, 使更新, 重建
meanings.meaning_en: to make whole or complete again; restore to a perfect state; renew
to mix or blend
to provide information that supports or helps to prove someone else’s statement, idea etc
meanings.example: We now have new evidence to corroborate the defendant’s story.
meanings.example_cn: 我们现在有新的证据来证实被告人的说法。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone’s rank or position lower or less important
meanings.example: The sergeant was demoted to private.
meanings.example_cn: 这名中士被降为列兵。

meanings.meaning_en: to join together (patterns, fingers, etc) by crossing, as if woven; intertwine
meanings.example: It is the interlace weave pattern of Universal Essence.
meanings.example_cn: 它是宇宙基本本质的纵横交错编织模式。

meanings.meaning_en: to rid (a patient) of a poison or its effects
meanings.example: Indications:Clear away heat, eliminate dampness, purge pathogenic fire, put out steam, detoxicate and cure furuncles .
meanings.example_cn: 功能主治：清热燥湿，泻火除蒸，解毒疗疮。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使解脱, 救出, 使(气体)游离, 放出
meanings.meaning_en: to escape from a difficult or embarrassing situation, or to help someone escape
meanings.example: It represents a last-ditch attempt by the country to extricate itself from its economic crisis.
meanings.example_cn: 这是该国摆脱经济危机的最后一搏。

meanings.meaning_en: to enter or insert or allow to enter or be inserted
meanings.example: The as each country government relaxation on international is control, open of celestial policy carry out, also the obstacle of intromit aviation industry is abate.
meanings.example_cn: 国际上随着各国政府的放松管制、开放天空的政策的实施，也使进入航空业的障碍减弱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使卷入, 牵连, 使纠缠
meanings.meaning_en: to involve someone or something in a difficult situation
meanings.example: Any hostilities could result in retaliation and further embroil U.N. troops in fighting.
meanings.example_cn: 任何敌对活动都可能会招致报复，进而使联合国部队卷入战斗中。

meanings.meaning_en: to cover or protect something with a material that stops electricity, sound, heat etc from getting in or out
meanings.example: an insulated attic
meanings.example_cn: 隔热[隔音]的阁楼

meanings.example: The starred delights will enrapture my soul to insanity.
meanings.example_cn: 闪耀之星的高兴会使我狂喜甚至灵魂上的疯狂。

meanings.meaning_en: to put at a loss; confound
meanings.example: he was nonplussed by the sudden announcement

meanings.meaning_cn: 使烂醉, 使迷糊, 使沉醉
使裸露, 剥下, 剥夺, 脱毛
meanings.meaning_en: to remove the plants and trees that cover an area of land
meanings.example: a hillside denuded in a fire
meanings.example_cn: 被一场火烧得光秃秃的山坡

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel pleased and satisfied
meanings.example: He was gratified by Lucy’s response.
meanings.example_cn: 他对露西的回答很满意。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使免疫, 赋予免疫性, 使成为无害
meanings.meaning_en: to protect someone from a particular illness by giving them a vaccine
meanings.example: We should require that every student is immunized against hepatitis B.
meanings.example_cn: 我们应该要求每一位学生都注射乙肝疫苗。

meanings.meaning_en: if a problem, difficulty etc confronts you, it appears and needs to be dealt with
meanings.example: The problems confronting the new government were enormous.
meanings.example_cn: 新政府面临的难题是巨大的。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately make something unclear or difficult to understand
meanings.example: They are obfuscating the issue, as only insurance companies can.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在这个问题上混淆视听，也只有保险公司才做得出这种事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使年轻, 使复原, 使恢复精神, 使恢复活力, 使回春, 使更新
meanings.meaning_en: to make something work much better or become much better again
meanings.example: plans to rejuvenate the inner city areas
meanings.example_cn: 旧城区复兴计划

meanings.meaning_cn: 使膨胀, 详述, 扩张
meanings.meaning_en: if a company, business etc expands, or if someone expands it, they open new shops, factories etc
meanings.example: The computer industry has expanded greatly over the last decade.
meanings.example_cn: 计算机行业在过去十年间大大地发展起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone very poor
meanings.example: Falling coffee prices have impoverished many developing economies.
meanings.example_cn: 咖啡价格下跌使很多发展中的经济面临困境。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使牵连其中, 含意, 暗示
meanings.example: The allegations implicated Abe to such an extent he was forced to resign.
meanings.example_cn: 安倍深受指控牵连，不得不辞职。

meanings.meaning_en: to become or cause to become abnormally thin
meanings.example: To cause to become lean, usually by starvation; emaciate.
meanings.example_cn: 使消瘦通常通过饥饿使变瘦；使消瘦。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使穷困, 使为难, 限制
使屈服, 征服, 使服从, 克制, 抑制
meanings.meaning_en: to defeat a person or group and make them obey you
meanings.example: The native population was subjugated and exploited.
meanings.example_cn: 土著人被征服，并遭受剥削。

meanings.meaning_en: to combine to become a smooth mixture, or to make two liquids do this
meanings.example: It is the pressure which releases the coffee oils; these emulsify and give the coffee its rich, velvety texture.
meanings.example_cn: 是压力将咖啡油脂释放出来；这些油脂充分乳化融合给咖啡带来浓郁、醇厚的口感。

meanings.meaning_en: to prove the truth of something that someone has said, claimed etc
meanings.example: Katzen offered little evidence to substantiate his claims .
meanings.example_cn: 卡曾拿不出什么证据来证明他的说法。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone ill and weak
meanings.example: He was debilitated by his illness.
meanings.example_cn: 他由于生病身体虚弱。

meanings.example: You can bet that would truly paralyze the flow of credit: Does anyone believe Washington can manage banks?
meanings.example_cn: 你可以打赌，这会使流动的信贷真正限于瘫痪：真有人相信华盛顿可以经营银行吗？

meanings.meaning_en: (of an alcoholic drink) to produce in (a person) a state ranging from euphoria to stupor, usually accompanied by loss of inhibitions and control; make drunk; inebriate
meanings.example: Sea wind intoxicate.
meanings.example_cn: 海风醉人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使完全变干, 干贮(食物等)

meanings.meaning_en: to make a document, ticket, claim etc no longer legally or officially acceptable
meanings.example: Failure to disclose all relevant changes may invalidate your policy.
meanings.example_cn: 未能披露所有的相关变化会令保单无效。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使习惯于, 使熟习于
meanings.meaning_en: to be used to something or gradually become used to it
meanings.example: Over the centuries, these animals have become habituated to living in a dry environment.
meanings.example_cn: 几百年下来，这些动物已经习惯于生活在干燥的环境里。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使显得愚笨, 使变无效, 使成为徒劳
meanings.example: ...a uniformed guard stultified with boredom.
meanings.example_cn: ...一名穿制服的闲得无聊的警卫。

meanings.meaning_en: if two or more facts, ideas etc correlate or if you correlate them, they are closely connected to each other or one causes the other
meanings.example: Attempts to correlate specific language functions with particular parts of the brain have not advanced very far.
meanings.example_cn: 试图把特定的语言功能和大脑特定区域相联系的努力还没有取得很大进展。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使心满意足, 过分的给与
meanings.meaning_en: to satisfy (a desire or appetite) fully

meanings.meaning_cn: 使新生, 重建, 改革, 革新
meanings.meaning_en: to grow again, or make something grow again
meanings.example: Small nodules form as the liver cells regenerate.
meanings.example_cn: 肝细胞再生时会形成一些小结节。

meanings.meaning_en: if something irks you, it makes you feel annoyed
meanings.example: The rehearsal process also irked him increasingly.
meanings.example_cn: 排练过程也更加让他厌烦。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone tries to ingratiate themselves with you, they do things to try and make you like them
meanings.example: Many politicians are trying to ingratiate themselves with her.
meanings.example_cn: 很多政客都在试图讨她的欢心。

meanings.example: an education system that perpetuates the divisions in our society
meanings.example_cn: 使我们的社会持续分化的一种教育制度

meanings.meaning_cn: 使晕倒, 使惊吓, 打晕
meanings.meaning_en: If you are stunned by something, you are extremely shocked or surprised by it and are therefore unable to speak or do anything
meanings.example: He's stunned by today's resignation of his longtime ally.
meanings.example_cn: 他被自己的长期助手今天的辞职所震惊。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使再结合, 再加入, 再回答
meanings.meaning_en: to say (something) in reply; answer, reply, or retort
meanings.example: ‘I don’t care!’ she rejoined.
meanings.example_cn: “我不在乎！”她回嘴道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使着迷, 使神魂颠倒
meanings.meaning_en: If something fascinates you, it interests and delights you so much that your thoughts tend to concentrate on it
meanings.example: Politics fascinated Franklin's father.
meanings.example_cn: 政治让富兰克林的父亲着迷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使止血, 止, 止流, 止血
meanings.meaning_en: to stem the flow of (a liquid, esp blood) or (of a liquid) to stop flowing

meanings.meaning_cn: 使窒息, 噎住, 闷熄
meanings.meaning_en: to die or make someone die by preventing them from breathing
meanings.example: The animal seizes its prey by the throat and suffocates it to death.
meanings.example_cn: 这种动物会抓住猎物的喉咙，使其窒息而死。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone stifles something you consider to be a good thing, they prevent it from continuing
meanings.example: Regulations on children stifled creativity.
meanings.example_cn: 对孩子们制定的各种规定压制了创造力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使逐步而巧妙地取得, 使迂回地潜入(或挤入), 使慢慢滋长, 含沙射影地说
meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone insinuates themselves into a particular situation, you mean that they manage very cleverly, and perhaps dishonestly, to get into that situation
meanings.example: He gradually insinuated himself into her life.
