meanings.example_cn: 他一步步巧妙地走进了她的生活。

meanings.meaning_cn: 饰以浮饰, 使浮雕出来

meanings.meaning_en: if you withdraw a threat, offer, request etc, you say that you no longer will do what you said
meanings.example: After much persuasion he agreed to withdraw his resignation.
meanings.example_cn: 几经劝说，他同意收回辞呈。

meanings.meaning_en: to take back cars, furniture, or property from people who had arranged to pay for them over a long time, but cannot now continue to pay for them
meanings.example: Eventually the bailiffs came to repossess the flat.
meanings.example_cn: 查封官终于来收公寓了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 收集, 积聚(尤指财富)
meanings.meaning_en: if you amass money, knowledge, information etc, you gradually collect a large amount of it
meanings.example: For 25 years, Darwin amassed evidence to support his theories.
meanings.example_cn: 25年间，达尔文收集了大量证据来支持自己的理论。

meanings.meaning_cn: 赎回, 挽回, 恢复, 补偿, 兑换
meanings.meaning_en: to make something less bad
meanings.example: Olivier’s performance redeemed an otherwise second-rate play.
meanings.example_cn: 奥利维尔的表演补救了一出本是二流水平的戏。

meanings.meaning_cn: 涮, 冲洗, 痛饮, 倒出
meanings.meaning_en: to wash something by pouring a lot of water over it or into it
meanings.example: He does nothing but swill beer all day.
meanings.example_cn: 他整天什么事也不干，就是拼命喝啤酒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 撕开, 劈开, 使沮丧
meanings.meaning_en: to split asunder
meanings.example: a tree riven by lightning

meanings.meaning_cn: 提问, 传讯, 责难
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone come to court to hear what their crime is
meanings.example: He was arraigned for criminally abetting a traitor.
meanings.example_cn: 他因非法怂恿一名叛国者而被传讯。

meanings.meaning_cn: 体现, 使具体化, 使成化身
meanings.meaning_en: If you say that a quality is incarnated in a person, you mean that they represent that quality or are typical of it in an extreme form
meanings.example: The iniquities of the regime are incarnated in one man.
meanings.example_cn: 该体制的种种劣迹集中体现于一人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 调整, 调节, (信号)调制
meanings.meaning_en: to change the sound of your voice
meanings.example: He carefully modulated his voice.
meanings.example_cn: 他仔细地调节了自己的声音。

meanings.meaning_cn: 调制, 调合, 编造
meanings.meaning_en: If you concoct an excuse or explanation, you invent one that is not true
meanings.example: Mr. Ferguson said the prisoner concocted the story to get a lighter sentence.
meanings.example_cn: 费格森先生说该囚犯为了获轻罚编造了这个故事。

meanings.meaning_cn: 听取报告, 听取汇报
meanings.example: As you listen, consider the following questions. Then we’ll examine the answers in the debrief.
meanings.example_cn: 听录音时，考虑以下的问题，我们在听取汇报时会检查答案。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell or give someone information about something
meanings.example: Have customers been fully apprised of the advantages?
meanings.example_cn: 客户有没有被充分告知各项好处呢？

meanings.meaning_en: If you lambaste someone, you criticize them severely, usually in public
meanings.example: And you can be sure that when the referee cheats our boys, I'll be ready to lambaste him.
meanings.example_cn: 而且你可以放心，如果裁判对孩子们不公平，我会公开斥责他。

meanings.meaning_en: to hate something very much
meanings.example: I abominate dancing.
meanings.example_cn: 我痛恨跳舞。

meanings.meaning_cn: 痛骂, 憎恨, 憎恶, 诅咒
meanings.meaning_en: to express strong disapproval or hatred for someone or something

meanings.meaning_cn: 偷窃(不贵重的东西), 窃取
meanings.meaning_en: to steal something small or not very valuable
meanings.example: He filched a bottle of wine from the cellar.
meanings.example_cn: 他从地窖里偷了一瓶酒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 突然说出, (从生物体中)射出
meanings.meaning_en: when a man ejaculates, semen comes out of his penis
meanings.example: ...a tendency to ejaculate quickly.
meanings.example_cn: ...易早泄。

meanings.meaning_cn: 涂去, 删除, 使湮没

meanings.meaning_en: to force down or thrust away or out

meanings.meaning_cn: 推动, 推进, 激励, 驱使, 逼迫
meanings.meaning_en: if something impels you to do something, it makes you feel very strongly that you must do it
meanings.example: ...the courage and competitiveness which impels him to take risks.
meanings.example_cn: ...驱策他冒险的勇气和竞争精神。

meanings.meaning_cn: 推翻, 暗中破坏, 搅乱
meanings.meaning_en: to try to destroy the power and influence of a government or the established system
meanings.example: an attempt to subvert the democratic process
meanings.example_cn: 颠覆民主进程的企图

meanings.meaning_en: to move, drive, or push something forward
meanings.example: a boat propelled by a small motor
meanings.example_cn: 由小马达驱动的小船

meanings.meaning_cn: 吞, 一口吞(下), 忍住, 抑制
meanings.meaning_en: to swallow large quantities of food or drink quickly
meanings.example: She gulped down her breakfast and ran for the bus.
meanings.example_cn: 她狼吞虎咽地吃完早饭，跑去赶公交车了。

meanings.meaning_en: to send something somewhere, especially in order to sell it
to remove the hat you are wearing as a sign of respect
meanings.example: The peasants doff their hats.
meanings.example_cn: 农夫们脱去他们的帽子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 弯曲(四肢), 伸缩, 折曲vi折曲, 弯曲
meanings.meaning_en: If you flex your muscles or parts of your body, you bend, move, or stretch them for a short time in order to exercise them
meanings.example: He slowly flexed his muscles and tried to stand.
meanings.example_cn: 他缓慢地活动了一下肌肉，想站起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something complete, especially an agreement
meanings.example: His wife divorced him for failing to consummate their marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 他的妻子因为他未能完婚而跟他离婚了。

meanings.meaning_en: to do a disservice to
meanings.example: Varroa mite is one of the most harmful vermin that disserve the beekeeping in the worldwide.
meanings.example_cn: 大蜂螨是危害世界养蜂业最为严重的害虫之一。

meanings.meaning_cn: 违反, 犯罪, 侵犯
meanings.meaning_en: to do something that is against the rules of social behaviour or against a moral principle
meanings.example: Orton’s plays transgress accepted social norms.
meanings.example_cn: 奥顿的戏剧违背了公认的社会准则。

meanings.example: Curiger sees “a lot of commonalities between the Venetian master's quest and the eagerness of some contemporary artists to defy the conventions which beleaguer art in our time.”
meanings.example_cn: Curiger 看到“在威尼斯大师的探求和当代艺术家热心反抗习俗中的许多共性，在我们这个时代，艺术被围攻，这些当代艺术家们敢公然反抗习俗。”

meanings.meaning_cn: 围困, 围攻, 包围
meanings.meaning_en: to surround a city or castle with military force until the people inside let you take control
meanings.example: In April 655, Osman’s palace was besieged by rebels.
meanings.example_cn: 公元655年4月，奥斯曼的宫殿遭到叛军围攻。

meanings.meaning_cn: 围绕, 包围, 智取
围绕, 缚, 以带子缠绕
meanings.meaning_en: to surround; gird around

meanings.meaning_cn: 维护, 保护, 捍卫
meanings.meaning_en: to protect something from harm or damage
meanings.example: technology that will safeguard the environment
meanings.example_cn: 将会保护环境的技术

meanings.meaning_cn: 维护, 辩护, 表白

meanings.meaning_en: to  misunderstand  something that someone has said or done
meanings.example: His behaviour could easily be misconstrued.
meanings.example_cn: 他的行为容易被误解。

meanings.meaning_en: to breathe in air, smoke, or gas
meanings.example: It is dangerous to inhale ammonia fumes.
meanings.example_cn: 吸入氨气是很危险的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 牺牲, 献出, 献祭

meanings.example: Does the lion return gally you?
meanings.example_cn: 狮子还吓唬你吗?。

meanings.meaning_cn: 想出, 研究出, 设计, 发明
meanings.meaning_en: to devise, invent, or contrive

meanings.meaning_cn: 消除, 排除(危险、障碍等), 回避, 预防, 避免
meanings.meaning_en: to prevent or avoid a problem or the need to do something
meanings.example: The new treatment obviates the need for surgery.
meanings.example_cn: 新的疗法免除了手术的必要。

meanings.meaning_cn: 消灭, 根除, 毁灭, [医]摘除(肿瘤等)
meanings.meaning_en: to completely destroy something that is unpleasant or unwanted
to destroy something or someone completely
meanings.example: Just one of these bombs could annihilate a city the size of New York.
meanings.example_cn: 这种炸弹只要一颗就能彻底毁灭纽约那么大的一座城市。

meanings.meaning_cn: 写(文章,信等)创作, 赋诗, 创作
meanings.meaning_en: to write
meanings.example: The Xinluo students were accomplished in the Confucianism sutra, could compose in types of literature and indite many excellent Chinese writings.
meanings.example_cn: 新罗留学生精通儒家典籍，熟悉各种汉文学体裁的写作，创作了大量优秀的汉文学作品。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone information that should be secret
meanings.example: Officials refuse to divulge details of the negotiations.
meanings.example_cn: 官员们拒绝透露谈判的细节。

meanings.meaning_cn: 卸下, 放出, 清偿(债务), 履行(义务), 解雇, 开(炮), 放(枪), 射(箭)
meanings.meaning_en: to send out gas, liquid, smoke etc, or to allow it to escape
meanings.example: Hospitals now tend to discharge patients earlier than in the past.
meanings.example_cn: 与过去相比，现在医院更趋向于让病人早些出院。

meanings.meaning_cn: 亵渎, 污辱, 把(神物)供俗用
meanings.meaning_en: to spoil or damage something holy or respected
meanings.example: She shouldn't have desecrated the picture of a religious leader.
meanings.example_cn: 她不该亵渎宗教领袖的肖像。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove the mistakes from something that has been written
meanings.example: When they do, rule aficionados will say, “Well, we can emend it and make it more supple by adding to the circumstances it covers.
meanings.example_cn: 当发生这种情况的时候，爱好制定规则的人们就会说，“好吧，我们可以修订一下规则，让它能适应更多的环境。

meanings.meaning_cn: 修理, 使复原, 使正常
meanings.meaning_en: to repair something, especially an old machine, so that it works like a new one
meanings.example: a reconditioned engine
meanings.example_cn: 翻新的发动机

meanings.meaning_cn: 驯养, 使安于土地, 教化
meanings.meaning_en: to make an animal able to work for people or live with them as a pet
meanings.example: We domesticated the dog to help us with hunting.
meanings.example_cn: 我们驯养狗来帮助我们打猎。

meanings.meaning_en: to press something or make it smaller so that it takes up less space, or to become smaller
meanings.example: Light silk is best for parachutes, as it compresses well and then expands rapidly.
meanings.example_cn: 轻质丝绸最适合制作降落伞，因为这种面料便于压缩，而且展开迅速。

meanings.meaning_cn: 阉割, 使柔弱, 删削, 使无力
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something weaker or less effective
meanings.example: The bill has been emasculated by Congress.
meanings.example_cn: 国会削弱了这个法案的效力。

meanings.meaning_cn: 淹没, 覆没, 受打击, 制服, 压倒
meanings.meaning_en: if water overwhelms an area of land, it covers it completely and suddenly
meanings.example: It was clear that one massive Allied offensive would overwhelm the weakened enemy.
meanings.example_cn: 显然同盟国一次大规模的进攻就会彻底击败已被削弱的敌军。

meanings.meaning_cn: 延迟, 使减速, 阻止, 妨碍, 阻碍
meanings.meaning_en: to delay the development of something, or to make something happen more slowly than expected
meanings.example: Cold weather retards the growth of many plants.
meanings.example_cn: 寒冷的天气使许多植物生长滞缓。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately make something such as a feeling or an activity last longer
meanings.example: I was trying to think of some way to prolong the conversation.
meanings.example_cn: 我在想方设法拖长这次谈话。

meanings.meaning_en: to physically punish someone
meanings.example: Thomas Rane chastised Peters for his cruelty.
meanings.example_cn: 托马斯·瑞训斥了彼得斯的残忍。

meanings.meaning_en: to speak angrily to someone because they have done something wrong
meanings.example: Marion berated Joe for the noise he made.
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽恩指责乔制造的噪声。

meanings.meaning_cn: 掩饰, 减轻, 使人原谅, 低估, <古>使稀薄

meanings.meaning_en: to hate someone or something very much
meanings.example: He loathes their politics.
meanings.example_cn: 他讨厌他们那一套政治。

meanings.meaning_en: to hate something or someone very much
meanings.example: The two men detested each other.
meanings.example_cn: 两个男人互相厌恶。

meanings.meaning_cn: 摇摆, 摇动, 饶舌
meanings.meaning_en: if a dog wags its tail, or if its tail wags, the dog moves its tail many times from one side to the other
meanings.example: ‘You naughty girl!’ Mom said, wagging her finger at me.
meanings.example_cn: “你这个调皮的丫头！”妈妈对我摇了摇手指说道。

meanings.meaning_cn: 要求归还, 收回, 开垦
meanings.meaning_en: to get back an amount of money that you have paid
meanings.example: You may be entitled to reclaim some tax.
meanings.example_cn: 你也许可以享受一定额度的退税。

meanings.meaning_en: If you outfox someone, you defeat them in some way because you are more clever than they are
meanings.example: There is no greater thrill than to bluff a man, trap him, and outfox him.
meanings.example_cn: 没有什么比虚张声势吓唬别人、让他钻入圈套并用计将他击败更加刺激了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 以麻梳梳理, 激烈质问, 诘问, 集中质问
以甜言蜜语哄骗, 勾引
meanings.meaning_en: to gradually persuade someone to do something by being nice to them, or making promises to them
meanings.example: If they no longer do, that is because of the new vernaculars invented to cajole automatons into doing man’s bidding.
meanings.example_cn: 如果人们不再这样以为了，那是因为一些新的语言被发明了出来用于哄骗机器人，使之屈服于人类。

meanings.example: Have taken part in academy controvert competition four times, and named as "best debate student" four times and "best elegant demeanor" one time.
meanings.example_cn: 参加院校间辩论赛四次，四次被评为“最佳辩手”及一次“最佳风采奖”；

meanings.meaning_en: to stop someone from doing something, often by using physical force
meanings.example: Renwick restrained a feeling of annoyance.
meanings.example_cn: 伦威克忍住了不悦的情绪。

meanings.meaning_en: to convert (a message, document, etc) from plain text into code or cipher; encode
to find the meaning of something that is difficult to read or understand
meanings.example: She studied the envelope, trying to decipher the handwriting.
meanings.example_cn: 她仔细地看信封，试图辨认上面的字迹。

meanings.meaning_cn: 引发, 引起, 触发
meanings.meaning_en: to make something happen very quickly, especially a series of events
meanings.example: The assassination triggered off a wave of rioting.
meanings.example_cn: 这次暗杀事件引发了一阵骚乱。

meanings.meaning_cn: 引证, 举出(例证、理由、证据)
meanings.meaning_en: to give facts or reasons in order to prove that something is true
meanings.example: Let me adduce more evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 让我举出更多的证据。

meanings.meaning_en: to establish or settle firmly or comfortably
meanings.example: ensconced in a chair

meanings.meaning_cn: 隐秘, 隐藏, 隐匿, [生理]分泌
meanings.meaning_en: to hide something
meanings.example: The money had been secreted in a Swiss bank account.
meanings.example_cn: 这笔钱藏匿在一个瑞士银行账户里。

meanings.meaning_en: to subject (milk, beer, etc) to pasteurization
meanings.example: Finally, they pasteurize the milk with a special technique that heats it to about 144.5 degrees Fahrenheit, minimizing the destruction of antibodies while killing viruses and other pathogens.
meanings.example_cn: 最后，他们将对这些乳汁进行巴氏消毒——采用特殊手段将这些乳汁加热到华氏144.5度，尽量避免破坏抗体的同时杀灭病毒和其他病原体。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用大字体书写, 吸引, 占用, 使全神贯注, 独占
meanings.meaning_en: if something engrosses you, it interests you so much that you do not notice anything else
meanings.example: The scene was stunning, and for a time engrossed all our attention.
meanings.example_cn: 景色非常美丽，一时间把我们都完全吸引住了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 用公式表示, 明确地表达, 作简洁陈述
meanings.example: We are studying the situation but have not formulated any response yet.
meanings.example_cn: 我们正在研究形势，但尚未考虑好如何回应。

meanings.meaning_en: to cause to be spellbound; entrance or enthral
to take someone away by force
meanings.example: The diplomat was abducted on his way to the airport.
meanings.example_cn: 外交官在去机场途中遭绑架。

meanings.meaning_cn: 诱骗, 哄骗, 骗得
meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to do or give you something, for example by saying nice things to them that you do not mean – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Cross decided to beg and wheedle a bit.
meanings.example_cn: 克罗斯决定小小地乞求和哄骗一下。

meanings.meaning_en: If someone beguiles you into doing something, they trick you into doing it
meanings.example: He used his newspapers to beguile the readers into buying shares in his company.
meanings.example_cn: 他利用他的报纸诱导读者购买他公司的股票。

meanings.meaning_en: to foreordain; determine beforehand
meanings.example: Today predestine a change not drive the fate of strong J?
meanings.example_cn: 今天注定改变不了被强J的命运吗？

meanings.meaning_cn: 预期, 期望, 过早使用, 先人一着, 占先
meanings.meaning_en: to expect that something will happen and be ready for it
meanings.example: Sales are better than anticipated.
meanings.example_cn: 销量比预期要好。

meanings.meaning_cn: 预先, 注定, 预定命运
meanings.meaning_en: to determine (events, results, etc) in the future
meanings.example: To foreordain or elect by divine will or decree.
meanings.example_cn: 预定预先决定、判决或颁布；

meanings.meaning_en: to treat (food) artificially to aid subsequent digestion in the body
meanings.example: Therefore , it is essential to study how to predigest actual circuit and achieve optimized design in V HDL .
meanings.example_cn: 因此，有必要深入讨论在V HDL 设计、应用中如何简化实际电路，达到优化设计的要求。

meanings.meaning_en: To refurbish a building or room means to clean it and decorate it and make it more attractive or better equipped
meanings.example: We have spent money on refurbishing the offices.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已在这些办公室的翻新上花了钱。

meanings.meaning_en: To aggrandize someone means to make them seem richer, more powerful, and more important than they really are. To aggrandize a building means to make it more impressive.
meanings.example: At the dinner table, my father would go on and on, showing off, aggrandizing himself.
meanings.example_cn: 吃饭时我父亲总是不停地夸耀和吹嘘自己。

meanings.meaning_en: to hate a kind of behaviour or way of thinking, especially because you think it is morally wrong
meanings.example: I abhor discrimination of any kind.
meanings.example_cn: 我厌恶任何一种歧视。

meanings.meaning_cn: 展开, 展示, 公开, 使旗招展
meanings.meaning_en: if a flag, sail etc unfurls, or if someone unfurls it, it unrolls and opens
meanings.example: Once outside the inner breakwater, we began to unfurl all the sails.
meanings.example_cn: 一出内防波堤，我们就开始展开所有的风帆。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell people that they must come together for a formal meeting
meanings.example: Separate meetings had been convoked by the two opposing factions.
meanings.example_cn: 这两个对立的派别各自召开了会议。

meanings.meaning_en: to provide protection for by defilade
meanings.example: The measurement and plotting of defilade angle is a very important training subject even if using real radar set.
meanings.example_cn: 即使是在真实装备中，测量与绘制雷达遮蔽角也是一个非常重要的训练科目。

meanings.meaning_cn: 遮眼, 欺骗, 蒙蔽
meanings.meaning_en: to trick someone in a clever way so that you can get an advantage for yourself
meanings.example: People expect others to be honest, which is why conmen find it so easy to hoodwink people.
meanings.example_cn: 人们期待他人是诚实的，所以骗子很容易行骗得逞。

meanings.meaning_cn: 震动, 震撼, 使抽筋
meanings.meaning_en: if your body or a part of it convulses, it moves violently and you are not able to control it
meanings.example: He sat down, his shoulders convulsing with sobs.
meanings.example_cn: 他坐下来，因抽泣肩膀剧烈抖动。

meanings.meaning_cn: 征服, 击败, 克服
meanings.meaning_en: to defeat someone or something completely
meanings.example: A happy ending is only possible because the hero has first vanquished the dragons.
meanings.example_cn: 只有主人公先把那些恶龙制服，快乐的结局才有可能。

meanings.meaning_en: to assert or declare emphatically or solemnly
meanings.example: I hereby do asseverate my solemn belief that globalization, taken as a whole, is a positive economic force and well worth defending.
meanings.example_cn: 在此我郑重声明我的神圣信仰国际化，总体上是一种积极地经济力量，十分值得卫护。

meanings.meaning_cn: 支撑, 撑住, 维持, 持续
meanings.meaning_en: to make something continue to exist or happen for a period of time
meanings.example: She found it difficult to sustain the children’s interest.
meanings.example_cn: 她发现很难保持孩子们的兴趣。

meanings.meaning_en: to defend or support a law, system, or principle so that it continues to exist
meanings.example: a committee that aims to uphold educational standards
meanings.example_cn: 旨在保持教育水准的委员会

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone back the money that they have spent on something
meanings.example: The proceeds from the competition help to defray the expenses of the evening.
meanings.example_cn: 比赛的收入帮助支付晚会的开销。

meanings.meaning_cn: 制定法律, 颁布, 扮演
meanings.meaning_en: to act in a play, story etc
meanings.example: a drama enacted on a darkened stage
meanings.example_cn: 在灯光暗淡的舞台上演的戏剧

meanings.meaning_cn: 制服, 践踏, 奔越过, 蹂躏, 不顾, 不考虑(某人的意见,决定,愿望等)
meanings.meaning_en: to use your power or authority to change someone else’s decision
meanings.example: The EU commission exercised its power to override British policy.
meanings.example_cn: 欧盟委员会行使其权力来否决英国的政策。

meanings.meaning_cn: 制作, 构成, 捏造, 伪造, 虚构
meanings.meaning_en: to invent a story, piece of information etc in order to deceive someone
meanings.example: The police were accused of fabricating evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 警方被控捏造证据。

meanings.meaning_cn: 置于架子上, 缓议, 搁置, 解雇
meanings.meaning_en: to decide not to continue with a plan, idea etc, although you might continue with it at a later time
meanings.example: King County has shelved plans to build a driving range.
meanings.example_cn: 金郡已搁置了建造一个高尔夫练习场的计划。

meanings.meaning_en: to slander
If you intercept someone or something that is travelling from one place to another, you stop them before they get to their destination
meanings.example: Gunmen intercepted him on his way to the airport.
meanings.example_cn: 持枪人在他去机场的路上截住了他。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重新塑造, 改造, 改变
meanings.meaning_en: to change the shape, structure, or appearance of something, especially a building
meanings.example: The airport terminals have been extensively remodelled.
meanings.example_cn: 航站楼已作了大规模的改建。

meanings.meaning_cn: 逐出, 撵出, 驱逐, 喷射
meanings.meaning_en: to make someone leave a place or building by using force
meanings.example: Two engines cut out and the plane started to eject fuel as it lost height.
meanings.example_cn: 两个发动机突然熄火，飞机在下降的同时开始喷出燃料。

meanings.meaning_cn: 逐出国外, 脱离国籍, 放逐
注定, 规定, 任命(牧师)
meanings.meaning_en: to order that something should happen
meanings.example: Desmond Tutu was ordained in 1960.
meanings.example_cn: 德斯蒙德•图图于1960年被任命为牧师。

meanings.meaning_cn: 祝福, 保佑, <口>哎呀!我的天哪!
meanings.meaning_en: if God blesses someone or something, he helps and protects them
meanings.example: May God bless you.
meanings.example_cn: 愿上帝保佑你。

meanings.meaning_cn: 祝贺, 庆祝, 庆贺, 把某人看作有福, 庆幸
meanings.meaning_en: to wish joy to; congratulate
to express or show something in a short way
meanings.example: The words of the song neatly encapsulate the mood of the country at that time.
meanings.example_cn: 这首歌的歌词言简意赅地表现出国家当时的氛围。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay a company for the use of their aircraft, boat etc
meanings.example: We chartered a boat to take us to some of the smaller islands.
meanings.example_cn: 我们包了一条船带我们到一些较小的岛上去。

meanings.example: If we were to let these differences, and the Communists' exploitation of them, break up the union that has stopped aggression in Korea the checkmate would be against us.
meanings.example_cn: 如果我们放任这些分歧，看着它们被中共所利用，一个阻止了朝鲜侵略行为的联盟将因此分崩离析，垮台的就会是我们。

meanings.meaning_en: to not do or have something pleasant or enjoyable
meanings.example: I had to forgo lunch.
meanings.example_cn: 我只得放弃午餐。
